00234 | def build_focus_export_df(df_ux: pd.DataFrame, foco: str | list[str] = "Todo") -> pd.DataFrame:
00235 |     df = df_ux.copy()
00236 | 
00237 |     needed = [
00238 |         "fecha",
00239 |         "COD_RT",
00240 |         "LOCAL",
00241 |         "CLIENTE",
00242 |         "RUTERO",
00243 |         "REPONEDOR",
00244 |         "MARCA",
00245 |         "Sku",
00246 |         "Descripción del Producto",
00247 |         "Stock",
00248 |         "Venta(+7)",
00249 |         "NEGATIVO",
00250 |         "RIESGO DE QUIEBRE",
00251 |         "OTROS",
00252 |     ]
00253 |     for c in needed:
00254 |         if c not in df.columns:
00255 |             df[c] = ""
00256 | 
00257 |     df["Fecha stock"] = pd.to_datetime(df["fecha"], errors="coerce").dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d").fillna("")
00258 |     for c in ["COD_RT", "LOCAL", "CLIENTE", "RUTERO", "REPONEDOR", "MARCA"]:
00259 |         df[c] = df[c].astype(str).replace({"nan": "", "None": ""}).fillna("")
00260 |     df["Sku"] = df["Sku"].astype(str)
00261 |     df["Stock"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Stock"], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
00262 |     df["Venta(+7)"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Venta(+7)"], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
00263 | 
00264 |     df["VENTA 0"] = df["Venta(+7)"].apply(_venta_0_flag)
00265 |     df["NEGATIVO"] = df["NEGATIVO"].apply(_clean_yes)
00266 |     df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"] = df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"].apply(_clean_yes)
00267 |     df["OTROS"] = df["OTROS"].apply(_clean_otros)
00268 |     df["FOCO PRINCIPAL"] = df.apply(_focus_principal, axis=1)
00269 |     df["ACCIÓN SUGERIDA"] = df["FOCO PRINCIPAL"].apply(_accion_sugerida)
00270 | 
00271 |     focos = _normalize_focos_export(foco)
00272 | 
00273 |     if focos:
00274 |         mask = pd.Series(False, index=df.index)
00275 | 
00276 |         if "Venta 0" in focos:
00277 |             mask = mask | (df["VENTA 0"] == "SI")
00278 |         if "Negativo" in focos:
00279 |             mask = mask | (df["NEGATIVO"] == "SI")
00280 |         if "Quiebres" in focos:
00281 |             mask = mask | (df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"] == "SI")
00282 |         if "Otros" in focos:
00283 |             mask = mask | (df["OTROS"] != "")
00284 | 
00285 |         df = df[mask].copy()
00286 |     else:
00287 |         df = df[df["FOCO PRINCIPAL"] != ""].copy()
00288 | 
00289 |     if df.empty:
00290 |         return pd.DataFrame(columns=FOCUS_EXPORT_COLS)
00291 | 
00292 |     df = _sorted_for_export(df)
00293 |     return df[FOCUS_EXPORT_COLS]

00296 | def export_excel_generic(sheet_name: str, df_export: pd.DataFrame) -> bytes:
00297 |     out = io.BytesIO()
00298 |     safe_sheet = str(sheet_name or "DATA")[:31]
00299 |     df_export = _sorted_for_export(df_export)
00300 | 
00301 |     with pd.ExcelWriter(out, engine="openpyxl") as writer:
00302 |         df_export.to_excel(writer, index=False, sheet_name=safe_sheet)
00303 |         ws = writer.sheets[safe_sheet]
00304 |         ws.freeze_panes = "A2"
00305 |         ws.auto_filter.ref = ws.dimensions
00306 | 
00307 |         for col_cells in ws.columns:
00308 |             col_letter = col_cells[0].column_letter
00309 |             values = []
00310 |             for cell in col_cells[:200]:
00311 |                 if cell.value is not None:
00312 |                     values.append(len(str(cell.value)))
00313 |             max_len = max(values) if values else 10
00314 |             ws.column_dimensions[col_letter].width = min(max(10, max_len + 2), 45)
00315 | 
00316 |     return out.getvalue()
00317 |

00319 | def export_excel_one_sheet(cod_rt: str, df_export: pd.DataFrame) -> bytes:
00320 |     return export_excel_generic(str(cod_rt), df_export)

00323 | def export_pdf_table(title_lines: list[str], df_export: pd.DataFrame) -> bytes:
00324 |     out = io.BytesIO()
00325 |     doc = SimpleDocTemplate(
00326 |         out,
00327 |         pagesize=landscape(A4),
00328 |         leftMargin=1.0 * cm,
00329 |         rightMargin=1.0 * cm,
00330 |         topMargin=1.0 * cm,
00331 |         bottomMargin=1.0 * cm,
00332 |     )
00333 | 
00334 |     styles = getSampleStyleSheet()
00335 |     body = ParagraphStyle(
00336 |         "BodySmall",
00337 |         parent=styles["BodyText"],
00338 |         fontName="Helvetica",
00339 |         fontSize=7,
00340 |         leading=8,
00341 |     )

00343 |     story = []
00344 |     for line in title_lines:
00345 |         story.append(Paragraph(line, styles["Heading4"]))
00346 |     story.append(Spacer(1, 8))
00347 |

00349 |     if "Descripción del Producto" not in df.columns:
00350 |         df["Descripción del Producto"] = ""

00352 |

00354 |     for _, r in df.iterrows():

00356 |         for c in EXPORT_COLS:
00357 |             v = r.get(c, "")
00358 |             if c == "Descripción del Producto":

00365 |         2.4 * cm,

00369 |         1.8 * cm,
00370 |         2.0 * cm,
00371 |         2.0 * cm,
00372 |         3.0 * cm,
00373 |         2.0 * cm,
00374 |     ]

00377 |     table.setStyle(TableStyle([
00378 |         ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.HexColor("#E6E6E6")),
00379 |         ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (-1, 0), "Helvetica-Bold"),
00380 |         ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8),
00381 |         ("FONTNAME", (0, 1), (-1, -1), "Helvetica"),
00382 |         ("FONTSIZE", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 7),
00383 |         ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.25, colors.HexColor("#CFCFCF")),
00384 |         ("VALIGN", (0, 0), (-1, -1), "TOP"),
00385 |         ("ROWBACKGROUNDS", (0, 1), (-1, -1), [colors.white, colors.HexColor("#F7F7F7")]),
00386 |         ("ALIGN", (4, 1), (4, -1), "RIGHT"),
00387 |         ("ALIGN", (5, 1), (7, -1), "CENTER"),

00401 | def _pdf_column_widths(columns: list[str]) -> tuple[list[float], object]:
00402 |     width_map_cm = {
00403 |         "Fecha stock": 2.1,
00404 |         "FECHA STOCK": 2.1,
00405 |         "MARCA": 2.2,
00406 |         "Sku": 2.0,
00407 |         "SKU": 2.0,
00408 |         "COD_RT": 2.0,
00409 |         "LOCAL": 4.2,
00410 |         "CLIENTE": 3.2,
00411 |         "RESP. TIPO": 2.5,
00412 |         "RESPONSABLE": 3.2,
00413 |         "RUTERO": 3.0,
00414 |         "REPONEDOR": 3.4,
00415 |         "CLIENTES": 2.2,
00416 |         "LOCALES": 2.0,
00417 |         "TOTAL SKUS": 2.3,
00418 |         "SKUS EN FOCO": 2.5,
00419 |         "Stock": 1.6,
00420 |         "STOCK": 1.6,
00421 |         "VENTA(+7)": 2.0,
00422 |         "VENTA 0": 1.9,
00423 |         "NEGATIVO": 2.0,
00424 |         "RIESGO DE QUIEBRE": 3.0,
00425 |         "QUIEBRES OBS.": 2.8,
00426 |         "OTROS": 2.4,
00427 |         "Descripción del Producto": 8.4,
00428 |         "PRODUCTO": 8.4,
00429 |         "FOCO PRINCIPAL": 2.8,
00430 |         "ACCIÓN SUGERIDA": 4.8,
00431 |     }
00432 |     widths_cm = [width_map_cm.get(col, 2.5) for col in columns]
00433 |     total_cm = sum(widths_cm)
00434 |     pagesize = landscape(A3) if len(columns) >= 10 or total_cm > 27.2 else landscape(A4)
00435 |     return [w * cm for w in widths_cm], pagesize

00437 | 
00438 | def export_pdf_generic(title_lines: list[str], df_export: pd.DataFrame, columns: list[str]) -> bytes:
00439 |     out = io.BytesIO()
00440 |     col_widths, pagesize = _pdf_column_widths(columns)
00441 |     doc = SimpleDocTemplate(
00442 |         out,
00443 |         pagesize=pagesize,
00444 |         leftMargin=0.8 * cm,
00445 |         rightMargin=0.8 * cm,
00446 |         topMargin=0.8 * cm,
00447 |         bottomMargin=0.8 * cm,
00448 |     )
00449 | 
00450 |     styles = getSampleStyleSheet()
00451 |     body = ParagraphStyle(
00452 |         "BodySmallWrap",
00453 |         parent=styles["BodyText"],
00454 |         fontName="Helvetica",
00455 |         fontSize=6.3,
00456 |         leading=7.2,
00457 |     )
00458 |     header = ParagraphStyle(
00459 |         "HeaderSmallWrap",
00460 |         parent=styles["BodyText"],
00461 |         fontName="Helvetica-Bold",
00462 |         fontSize=7,
00463 |         leading=8,
00464 |     )
00465 | 
00466 |     wrap_cols = {
00467 |         "Descripción del Producto",
00468 |         "PRODUCTO",
00469 |         "ACCIÓN SUGERIDA",
00470 |         "OTROS",
00471 |         "LOCAL",
00472 |         "CLIENTE",
00473 |         "RESPONSABLE",
00474 |         "RESP. TIPO",
00475 |         "RUTERO",
00476 |         "REPONEDOR",
00477 |         "FOCO PRINCIPAL",
00478 |     }
00479 |     numeric_cols = {
00480 |         "Stock",
00481 |         "STOCK",
00482 |         "TOTAL SKUS",
00483 |         "SKUS EN FOCO",
00484 |         "VENTA(+7)",
00485 |         "VENTA 0",
00486 |         "CLIENTES",
00487 |         "LOCALES",
00488 |     }
00489 |     center_cols = {
00490 |         "VENTA 0",
00491 |         "NEGATIVO",
00492 |         "RIESGO DE QUIEBRE",
00493 |         "QUIEBRES OBS.",
00494 |         "FOCO PRINCIPAL",
00495 |     }
00496 | 
00497 |     story = []
00498 |     for line in title_lines:
00499 |         story.append(Paragraph(line, styles["Heading4"]))
00500 |     story.append(Spacer(1, 8))
00501 | 
00502 |     df = _sorted_for_export(df_export)
00503 |     for c in columns:
00504 |         if c not in df.columns:
00505 |             df[c] = ""
00506 |     df = df[columns].copy()
00507 | 
00508 |     data = [[Paragraph(str(col), header) for col in columns]]
00509 |     for _, r in df.iterrows():
00510 |         row = []
00511 |         for c in columns:
00512 |             v = r.get(c, "")
00513 |             if c in wrap_cols:
00514 |                 row.append(Paragraph(str(v), body))
00515 |             else:
00516 |                 row.append(str(v))
00517 |         data.append(row)
00518 | 
00519 |     table = LongTable(data, colWidths=col_widths, repeatRows=1)
00520 |     style = [
00521 |         ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.HexColor("#E6E6E6")),
00522 |         ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.25, colors.HexColor("#CFCFCF")),
00523 |         ("VALIGN", (0, 0), (-1, -1), "TOP"),
00524 |         ("ROWBACKGROUNDS", (0, 1), (-1, -1), [colors.white, colors.HexColor("#F7F7F7")]),
00525 |         ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 3),
00526 |         ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 3),
00527 |         ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 2.5),
00528 |         ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 2.5),
00529 |     ]
00530 | 
00531 |     for idx, col in enumerate(columns):
00532 |         if col in numeric_cols:
00533 |             style.append(("ALIGN", (idx, 1), (idx, -1), "RIGHT"))
00534 |         elif col in center_cols:
00535 |             style.append(("ALIGN", (idx, 1), (idx, -1), "CENTER"))
00536 |         else:
00537 |             style.append(("ALIGN", (idx, 1), (idx, -1), "LEFT"))
00538 | 
00539 |     table.setStyle(TableStyle(style))
00540 |     story.append(table)
00541 |     doc.build(story)
00542 |     return out.getvalue()
00543 |

00545 | def export_pdf_focus_table(title_lines: list[str], df_export: pd.DataFrame) -> bytes:
00546 |     return export_pdf_generic(title_lines, df_export, FOCUS_EXPORT_COLS)

00017 | 
00018 | def _qp_get(key: str, default: str = "") -> str:
00019 |     try:
00020 |         qp = st.query_params  # Streamlit moderno
00021 |         v = qp.get(key, default)
00022 |         if isinstance(v, list):
00023 |             return v[0] if v else default
00024 |         return v if v is not None else default
00025 |     except Exception:
00026 |         qp = st.experimental_get_query_params()
00027 |         v = qp.get(key, [default])
00028 |         return v[0] if isinstance(v, list) and v else default

00031 | def _as_bool(s: str) -> bool:
00032 |     s = (s or "").strip().lower()
00033 |     return s in {"1", "true", "t", "si", "sí", "y", "yes"}

00035 | 
00036 | def _infer_runtime_env() -> str:
00037 |     raw = (
00038 |         os.getenv("STOCKZERO_RUNTIME_ENV", "")
00039 |         or os.getenv("APP_ENV", "")
00040 |         or os.getenv("ENV", "")
00041 |     ).strip().lower()
00042 |     if raw in {"local", "public"}:
00043 |         return raw
00044 |     if any(os.getenv(k) for k in ("IS_STREAMLIT_CLOUD", "STREAMLIT_RUNTIME", "STREAMLIT_CLOUD")):
00045 |         return "public"
00046 |     if os.name == "nt":
00047 |         return "local"
00048 |     if any(os.path.exists(p) for p in ("/mount/src", "/home/appuser", "/home/adminuser")):
00049 |         return "public"
00050 |     if (os.getenv("USER", "") or os.getenv("USERNAME", "")).strip().lower() in {"appuser", "adminuser"}:
00051 |         return "public"
00052 |     return "public" if os.name != "nt" else "local"
00053 | 
00054 | 
00055 | def _ensure_run_context() -> None:
00056 |     seq = int(st.session_state.get("_run_seq", 0)) + 1
00057 |     stamp = int(time.time() * 1000) % 1000000
00058 |     st.session_state["_run_seq"] = seq
00059 |     st.session_state["_run_id"] = f"RUN{seq:04d}-{stamp:06d}"
00060 |     st.session_state["_runtime_env"] = _infer_runtime_env()
00061 |     st.session_state["_run_path"] = "cold" if seq == 1 else "warm"
00062 | 
00063 | 
00064 | def _dbg(msg: str, tag: str = "UI", **kv) -> None:
00065 |     global DEBUG
00066 |     ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%H:%M:%S.%f")[:-3]
00067 |     ctx = {
00068 |         "run_id": st.session_state.get("_run_id", "-"),
00069 |         "env": st.session_state.get("_runtime_env", "-"),
00070 |         "path": st.session_state.get("_run_path", "-"),
00071 |         "mode": st.session_state.get("home_mode", "-"),
00072 |     }
00073 |     payload = {**ctx, **kv}
00074 |     extra = " ".join([f"{k}={v}" for k, v in payload.items()]) if payload else ""
00075 |     line = f"{ts} | {tag} | {msg}" + (f" | {extra}" if extra else "")
00076 | 
00077 |     try:
00078 |         logger.info("DBG %s", line)
00079 |     except Exception:
00080 |         pass
00081 | 
00082 |     if not DEBUG:
00083 |         return
00084 | 
00085 |     st.session_state.setdefault("_dbg_lines", [])
00086 |     st.session_state["_dbg_lines"].append(line)
00087 | 
00088 |     if len(st.session_state["_dbg_lines"]) > 250:
00089 |         st.session_state["_dbg_lines"] = st.session_state["_dbg_lines"][-250:]
00090 | 
00091 |     st.session_state["_dbg_last"] = f"{tag} | {msg}"
00092 | 
00093 | def _dbg_block() -> None:
00094 |     global DEBUG
00095 |     if not DEBUG:
00096 |         return
00097 |     st.sidebar.markdown("### 🛠 DEBUG")
00098 |     st.sidebar.caption(f"Último paso: {st.session_state.get('_dbg_last', '-')}")
00099 |     with st.sidebar.expander("Trace (últimos 250)", expanded=False):
00100 |         st.sidebar.code("\n".join(st.session_state.get("_dbg_lines", [])))
00101 | 
00102 | 
00103 | def _timed(label: str, tag: str = "UI"):
00104 |     class _T:
00105 |         def __enter__(self_):
00106 |             self_.t0 = time.perf_counter()
00107 |             _dbg(f"START {label}", tag=tag)
00108 |             return self_
00109 | 
00110 |         def __exit__(self_, exc_type, exc, tb):
00111 |             ms = round((time.perf_counter() - self_.t0) * 1000.0, 3)
00112 |             if exc_type is None:
00113 |                 _dbg(f"OK {label}", tag=tag, ms=ms)
00114 |             else:
00115 |                 _dbg(f"ERR {label}", tag=tag, ms=ms, exc=str(exc_type.__name__))
00116 |             return False
00117 | 
00118 |     return _T()
00119 | 
00120 | 
00121 | FOCO_OPTIONS = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
00122 | 
00123 | 
00124 | def _normalize_focos_ui(value) -> list[str]:
00125 |     if value is None:
00126 |         raw = []
00127 |     elif isinstance(value, str):
00128 |         raw = [x.strip() for x in value.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
00129 |     else:
00130 |         raw = [str(x).strip() for x in value if str(x).strip()]
00131 | 
00132 |     out = []
00133 |     for x in raw:
00134 |         if x in FOCO_OPTIONS and x not in out:
00135 |             out.append(x)
00136 |     return out
00137 | 
00138 | 
00139 | def _foco_label(value) -> str:
00140 |     focos = _normalize_focos_ui(value)
00141 |     return "Todo" if not focos else " | ".join(focos)
00142 |

00144 | def _render_kpi_cards(kpis_row: dict | None) -> None:
00145 |     values = {
00146 |         "Venta 0": int((kpis_row or {}).get("venta_0") or 0),
00147 |         "Negativo": int((kpis_row or {}).get("negativos") or 0),
00148 |         "Quiebres": int((kpis_row or {}).get("quiebres") or 0),
00149 |         "Otros": int((kpis_row or {}).get("otros") or 0),
00150 |     }
00151 | 
00152 |     cards = [
00153 |         ("Venta 0", values["Venta 0"], "Productos sin rotación"),
00154 |         ("Negativo", values["Negativo"], "Ajustar inventario"),
00155 |         ("Quiebres", values["Quiebres"], "Solicitar empuje"),
00156 |         ("Otros", values["Otros"], "Observación cliente"),
00157 |     ]
00158 | 
00159 |     st.markdown(
00160 |         """
00161 | <style>
00162 | .sz-kpi-grid{
00163 |     display:grid;
00164 |     grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));
00165 |     gap:.75rem;
00166 |     margin:.35rem 0 .35rem 0;
00167 | }
00168 | .sz-kpi-card{
00169 |     border:1px solid rgba(128,128,128,.22);
00170 |     border-radius:12px;
00171 |     padding:.85rem .95rem;
00172 |     background:rgba(250,250,250,.02);
00173 | }
00174 | .sz-kpi-title{
00175 |     font-size:.95rem;
00176 |     font-weight:600;
00177 |     margin-bottom:.5rem;
00178 | }
00179 | .sz-kpi-body{
00180 |     display:flex;
00181 |     align-items:center;
00182 |     gap:.7rem;
00183 | }
00184 | .sz-kpi-value{
00185 |     font-size:2.1rem;
00186 |     line-height:1;
00187 |     font-weight:700;
00188 |     min-width:2.2rem;
00189 | }
00190 | .sz-kpi-desc{
00191 |     font-size:.98rem;
00192 |     line-height:1.2;
00193 |     opacity:.86;
00194 | }
00195 | </style>
00196 |         """,
00197 |         unsafe_allow_html=True,
00198 |     )
00199 | 
00200 |     cards_html = "".join(
00201 |         f'<div class="sz-kpi-card">'
00202 |         f'<div class="sz-kpi-title">{title}</div>'
00203 |         f'<div class="sz-kpi-body">'
00204 |         f'<div class="sz-kpi-value">{value}</div>'
00205 |         f'<div class="sz-kpi-desc">{desc}</div>'
00206 |         f'</div>'
00207 |         f'</div>'
00208 |         for title, value, desc in cards
00209 |     )
00210 | 
00211 |     st.markdown(f'<div class="sz-kpi-grid">{cards_html}</div>', unsafe_allow_html=True)
00212 |     
00213 | 
00214 | def _scope_value_or_none(value: str | None, all_token: str = "Todos") -> str | None:
00215 |     if value is None:
00216 |         return None
00217 |     v = str(value).strip()
00218 |     if not v:
00219 |         return None
00220 |     if v.upper() == str(all_token).strip().upper():
00221 |         return None
00222 |     if v.upper() == "— SELECCIONA TIPO —".upper():
00223 |         return None
00224 |     return v
00225 | 
00226 | 
00227 | def _df_total_rows(df: pd.DataFrame | None) -> int:
00228 |     if df is None or df.empty or "total_rows" not in df.columns:
00229 |         return 0
00230 |     try:
00231 |         return int(df["total_rows"].iloc[0] or 0)
00232 |     except Exception:
00233 |         return 0
00234 | 
00235 | 
00236 | def _drop_total_rows(df: pd.DataFrame | None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00237 |     if df is None:
00238 |         return pd.DataFrame()
00239 |     return df.drop(columns=["total_rows"], errors="ignore").copy()
00240 | 
00241 | 
00242 | def _rename_and_pick(
00243 |     df: pd.DataFrame | None,
00244 |     rename_map: dict[str, str],
00245 |     ordered_cols: list[str] | None = None,
00246 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
00247 |     view = _drop_total_rows(df).rename(columns=rename_map)
00248 |     if ordered_cols:
00249 |         for col in ordered_cols:
00250 |             if col not in view.columns:
00251 |                 view[col] = ""
00252 |         view = view[ordered_cols]
00253 |     return view

00757 |         def _get_page_state(page_key: str, page_size: int = 25) -> tuple[int, int]:
00758 |             input_key = f"{page_key}_ui"
00759 | 
00760 |             st.session_state.setdefault(page_key, 1)
00761 |             st.session_state.setdefault(input_key, 1)
00762 | 
00763 |             try:
00764 |                 current_page = int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1))
00765 |             except Exception:
00766 |                 current_page = 1
00767 | 
00768 |             current_page = max(1, current_page)
00769 |             st.session_state[page_key] = current_page
00770 | 
00771 |             if int(st.session_state.get(input_key, current_page)) != current_page:
00772 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = current_page
00773 | 
00774 |             return current_page, (current_page - 1) * page_size
00775 | 
00776 |         def _render_scope_pager(page_key: str, total_rows: int, page_size: int = 25):
00777 |             input_key = f"{page_key}_ui"
00778 |             total_pages = max(1, int(math.ceil(total_rows / page_size))) if total_rows > 0 else 1
00779 | 
00780 |             if int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) > total_pages:
00781 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = total_pages
00782 |             if int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) < 1:
00783 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = 1
00784 | 
00785 |             current_page = int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1))
00786 |             if int(st.session_state.get(input_key, current_page)) != current_page:
00787 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = current_page
00788 | 
00789 |             def _prev():
00790 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = max(1, int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) - 1)
00791 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = st.session_state[page_key]
00792 | 
00793 |             def _next():
00794 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = min(total_pages, int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) + 1)
00795 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = st.session_state[page_key]
00796 | 
00797 |             def _from_input():
00798 |                 try:
00799 |                     new_page = int(st.session_state.get(input_key, 1))
00800 |                 except Exception:
00801 |                     new_page = 1
00802 |                 new_page = max(1, min(total_pages, new_page))
00803 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = new_page
00804 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = new_page
00805 | 
00806 |             if total_rows:
00807 |                 start = (current_page - 1) * page_size + 1
00808 |                 end = min(current_page * page_size, total_rows)
00809 |                 pager_text = f"{start}-{end} de {total_rows} registros"
00810 |             else:
00811 |                 pager_text = "Sin filas para el filtro aplicado."
00812 | 
00813 |             p1, p2, p3, p4 = st.columns([0.9, 1.3, 0.9, 2.2], gap="small")
00814 | 
00815 |             with p1:
00816 |                 st.button(
00817 |                     "◀",
00818 |                     key=f"{page_key}_prev_btn",
00819 |                     disabled=(current_page <= 1),
00820 |                     on_click=_prev,
00821 |                     use_container_width=True,
00822 |                 )
00823 | 
00824 |             with p2:
00825 |                 st.number_input(
00826 |                     "Página",
00827 |                     min_value=1,
00828 |                     max_value=max(1, total_pages),
00829 |                     step=1,
00830 |                     key=input_key,
00831 |                     on_change=_from_input,
00832 |                     label_visibility="collapsed",
00833 |                 )
00834 | 
00835 |             with p3:
00836 |                 st.button(
00837 |                     "▶",
00838 |                     key=f"{page_key}_next_btn",
00839 |                     disabled=(current_page >= total_pages),
00840 |                     on_click=_next,
00841 |                     use_container_width=True,
00842 |                 )
00843 | 
00844 |             with p4:
00845 |                 st.caption(pager_text)
00846 |

00940 |         def _render_cliente_exports() -> None:

00964 |             def _split_pipe_values(value) -> list[str]:
00965 |                 raw = str(value or "").strip()
00966 |                 if not raw:
00967 |                     return []
00968 |                 return [part.strip() for part in raw.split("|") if part.strip()]

00970 |             def _match_multi_value(value, target: str | None) -> bool:
00971 |                 if not target:
00972 |                     return True
00973 |                 return str(target).strip().upper() in {x.upper() for x in _split_pipe_values(value)}

02214 |     def _row_indicadores(r) -> str:

02217 |         try:

00008 | def _cg_get_page_state(page_key: str, page_size: int = 25) -> tuple[int, int]:
00009 |     st.session_state.setdefault(page_key, 1)
00010 |     try:
00011 |         current_page = int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1))
00012 |     except Exception:
00013 |         current_page = 1
00014 |     current_page = max(1, current_page)
00015 |     st.session_state[page_key] = current_page
00016 |     return current_page, (current_page - 1) * page_size
00017 | 
00018 | 
00019 | def _cg_render_pager(page_key: str, total_rows: int, page_size: int = 25) -> None:
00020 |     total_pages = max(1, int(math.ceil(total_rows / page_size))) if total_rows > 0 else 1
00021 |     if int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) > total_pages:
00022 |         st.session_state[page_key] = total_pages
00023 |     if int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) < 1:
00024 |         st.session_state[page_key] = 1
00025 | 
00026 |     current_page = int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1))
00027 | 
00028 |     def _page_prev():
00029 |         st.session_state[page_key] = max(1, int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) - 1)
00030 | 
00031 |     def _page_next():
00032 |         st.session_state[page_key] = min(total_pages, int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) + 1)
00033 | 
00034 |     p1, p2, p3 = st.columns([0.9, 1.8, 2.5], gap="small")
00035 |     with p1:
00036 |         st.button(
00037 |             "◀",
00038 |             key=f"{page_key}_prev_btn",
00039 |             disabled=(current_page <= 1),
00040 |             on_click=_page_prev,
00041 |             use_container_width=True,
00042 |         )
00043 |     with p2:
00044 |         st.selectbox(
00045 |             "Página",
00046 |             options=list(range(1, total_pages + 1)),
00047 |             index=max(0, current_page - 1),
00048 |             key=f"{page_key}_selectbox",
00049 |             on_change=lambda: st.session_state.update({page_key: st.session_state[f"{page_key}_selectbox"]}),
00050 |             label_visibility="collapsed",
00051 |         )

00054 |             "▶",
00055 |             key=f"{page_key}_next_btn",
00056 |             disabled=(current_page >= total_pages),

00061 |         start = (current_page - 1) * page_size + 1
00062 |         end = min(current_page * page_size, total_rows)

00099 |         "role": RESULT_VIEW_ROLE,
00100 |         "status": "active_transition",
00101 |         "truth": "not_final_model_truth",
00102 |     }
00103 | 
00104 | 
00105 | @st.cache_data(ttl=ACTIVE_DB_URL_TTL, show_spinner=False)
00106 | def _get_active_db_url_cached() -> str:
00107 |     cache_sig = _sig("active_db_url")
00108 |     _set_mark("INFRA", "active_db_url", cache_sig)
00109 | 
00110 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00111 |     primary, fallback = _get_db_urls()
00112 |     selected = "none"
00113 | 
00114 |     if primary and _probe_pg(primary, target="primary"):
00115 |         selected = "primary"
00116 |         out = primary
00117 |     elif fallback and _probe_pg(fallback, target="fallback"):
00118 |         logger.warning("Usando DB_URL_FALLBACK (primary no responde).")
00119 |         selected = "fallback"
00120 |         out = fallback
00121 |     else:
00122 |         out = primary or (fallback or "")
00123 |         if primary:
00124 |             selected = "primary_unchecked"
00125 |         elif fallback:
00126 |             selected = "fallback_unchecked"
00127 | 
00128 |     _trace(
00129 |         "INFRA",
00130 |         "active_db_url_exec",
00131 |         active_db_url_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00132 |         selected=selected,
00133 |         fallback_present=bool(fallback),
00134 |         ttl=ACTIVE_DB_URL_TTL,
00135 |     )
00136 |     return out

00139 | class AppError(RuntimeError):
00140 |     pass
00141 | 
00142 | 
00143 | TRACE_STATE_KEY = "_stock_zero_trace"
00144 | 
00145 | 
00146 | def _safe_session_state():
00147 |     try:
00148 |         return st.session_state
00149 |     except Exception:
00150 |         return None
00151 | 
00152 | 
00153 | def _infer_runtime_env() -> str:
00154 |     raw = (
00155 |         os.getenv("STOCKZERO_RUNTIME_ENV", "")
00156 |         or os.getenv("APP_ENV", "")
00157 |         or os.getenv("ENV", "")
00158 |     ).strip().lower()
00159 |     if raw in {"local", "public"}:
00160 |         return raw
00161 |     if any(os.getenv(k) for k in ("IS_STREAMLIT_CLOUD", "STREAMLIT_RUNTIME", "STREAMLIT_CLOUD")):
00162 |         return "public"
00163 |     if os.name == "nt":
00164 |         return "local"
00165 |     if any(Path(p).exists() for p in ("/mount/src", "/home/appuser", "/home/adminuser")):
00166 |         return "public"
00167 |     if (os.getenv("USER", "") or os.getenv("USERNAME", "")).strip().lower() in {"appuser", "adminuser"}:
00168 |         return "public"
00169 |     return "public" if os.name != "nt" else "local"
00170 | 
00171 | 
00172 | def _trace_ctx() -> dict[str, Any]:
00173 |     ss = _safe_session_state()
00174 |     return {
00175 |         "run_id": (ss.get("_run_id") if ss is not None else None) or "-",
00176 |         "env": (ss.get("_runtime_env") if ss is not None else None) or _infer_runtime_env(),
00177 |         "path": (ss.get("_run_path") if ss is not None else None) or "-",
00178 |         "mode": (ss.get("home_mode") if ss is not None else None) or "-",
00179 |     }
00180 | 
00181 | 
00182 | def _fmt_ms(seconds: float) -> float:
00183 |     return round(seconds * 1000.0, 3)
00184 | 
00185 | 
00186 | def _trace(tag: str, event: str, **kv) -> None:
00187 |     payload = {**_trace_ctx(), **kv}
00188 |     extra = " ".join(f"{k}={v}" for k, v in payload.items())
00189 |     try:
00190 |         logger.info("TRACE %s | %s | %s", tag, event, extra)
00191 |     except Exception:
00192 |         pass
00193 | 
00194 | 
00195 | def _sig(*parts: Any) -> str:
00196 |     try:
00197 |         raw = json.dumps(parts, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, default=str)
00198 |     except Exception:
00199 |         raw = repr(parts)
00200 |     return hashlib.md5(raw.encode("utf-8", errors="ignore")).hexdigest()[:12]
00201 | 
00202 | 
00203 | def _trace_bucket() -> dict[str, Any]:
00204 |     ss = _safe_session_state()
00205 |     if ss is None:
00206 |         return {}
00207 |     bucket = ss.get(TRACE_STATE_KEY)
00208 |     if not isinstance(bucket, dict):
00209 |         bucket = {"marks": {}}
00210 |         ss[TRACE_STATE_KEY] = bucket
00211 |     if "marks" not in bucket or not isinstance(bucket["marks"], dict):
00212 |         bucket["marks"] = {}
00213 |     return bucket
00214 | 
00215 | 
00216 | def _get_mark(scope: str, name: str, sig: str) -> str | None:
00217 |     bucket = _trace_bucket()
00218 |     return bucket.get("marks", {}).get(f"{scope}:{name}:{sig}")
00219 | 
00220 | 
00221 | def _set_mark(scope: str, name: str, sig: str) -> str:
00222 |     bucket = _trace_bucket()
00223 |     stamp = str(time.time_ns())
00224 |     bucket.setdefault("marks", {})[f"{scope}:{name}:{sig}"] = stamp
00225 |     return stamp

00228 | # =========================================================
00229 | # 1) INFRA
00230 | # =========================================================
00231 | def _get_db_urls() -> tuple[str, str | None]:
00232 |     primary = (os.getenv("DB_URL_APP", "") or os.getenv("DB_URL", "")).strip()
00233 |     fallback = os.getenv("DB_URL_FALLBACK", "").strip() or None
00234 |     if not primary and not fallback:
00235 |         raise AppError(
00236 |             "Configuración incompleta: falta DB_URL_APP/DB_URL.\n"
00237 |             "Solución: agrega en tu .env una línea:\n"
00238 |             "DB_URL_APP=postgresql://USER:PASS@HOST:PORT/DB"
00239 |         )
00240 |     return primary, fallback
00241 | 
00242 | 
00243 | def _probe_pg(url: str, target: str = "primary") -> bool:
00244 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00245 |     if psycopg2 is None:
00246 |         _trace(
00247 |             "INFRA",
00248 |             "probe_pg",
00249 |             target=target,
00250 |             probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00251 |             ok=True,
00252 |             driver="psycopg2_missing",
00253 |         )
00254 |         return True
00255 | 
00256 |     timeout = int(os.getenv("CONNECT_TIMEOUT", "3"))
00257 |     try:
00258 |         with psycopg2.connect(url, connect_timeout=timeout) as conn:
00259 |             with conn.cursor() as cur:
00260 |                 cur.execute("SELECT 1;")
00261 |         ok = True
00262 |     except Exception as e:
00263 |         ok = False
00264 |         _trace(
00265 |             "INFRA",
00266 |             "probe_pg_err",
00267 |             target=target,
00268 |             probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00269 |             ok=ok,
00270 |             err=type(e).__name__,
00271 |         )
00272 |         return ok
00273 | 
00274 |     _trace("INFRA", "probe_pg", target=target, probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), ok=ok)
00275 |     return ok
00276 |

00281 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00282 |     out = _get_active_db_url_cached()
00283 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("INFRA", "active_db_url", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00284 |     _trace("INFRA", "get_active_db_url", active_db_url_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), cache_state=cache_state)
00285 |     return out

00289 | def _engine_cached(db_url: str) -> Engine:
00290 |     cache_sig = _sig(db_url)
00291 |     _set_mark("INFRA", "engine", cache_sig)
00292 | 
00293 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00294 |     pool_size = int(os.getenv("POOL_SIZE", "15"))
00295 |     max_overflow = int(os.getenv("MAX_OVERFLOW", "30"))
00296 |     pool_timeout = int(os.getenv("POOL_TIMEOUT", "30"))
00297 |     pool_recycle = int(os.getenv("POOL_RECYCLE", "1800"))
00298 | 
00299 |     connect_timeout = int(os.getenv("CONNECT_TIMEOUT", "3"))
00300 |     stmt_timeout_ms = int(os.getenv("STATEMENT_TIMEOUT_MS", "15000"))
00301 | 
00302 |     connect_args: dict[str, Any] = {"connect_timeout": connect_timeout}
00303 |     if stmt_timeout_ms > 0:
00304 |         connect_args["options"] = f"-c statement_timeout={stmt_timeout_ms}"
00305 | 
00306 |     eng = create_engine(
00307 |         db_url,
00308 |         pool_size=pool_size,
00309 |         max_overflow=max_overflow,
00310 |         pool_timeout=pool_timeout,
00311 |         pool_recycle=pool_recycle,
00312 |         pool_pre_ping=True,
00313 |         future=True,
00314 |         connect_args=connect_args,
00315 |     )
00316 |     _trace(
00317 |         "INFRA",
00318 |         "engine_exec",
00319 |         engine_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00320 |         pool_size=pool_size,
00321 |         max_overflow=max_overflow,
00322 |         pool_timeout=pool_timeout,
00323 |         pool_recycle=pool_recycle,
00324 |         stmt_timeout_ms=stmt_timeout_ms,
00325 |     )
00326 |     return eng

00390 | @st.cache_data(ttl=300, show_spinner=False)
00391 | def _get_data_version_cached() -> str:
00392 |     cache_sig = _sig("data_version")
00393 |     _set_mark("DV", "data_version", cache_sig)
00394 | 
00395 |     eng = get_engine()
00396 |     candidates = [
00397 |         ("public.fact_stock_venta.ingested_at", "SELECT MAX(ingested_at) AS dv FROM public.fact_stock_venta;"),
00398 |         (RESULT_VIEW, f"SELECT MAX(fecha) AS dv FROM {RESULT_VIEW};"),
00399 |         ("public.v_data_version", "SELECT MAX(fecha_datos) AS dv FROM public.v_data_version;"),
00400 |     ]
00401 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00402 |     with eng.connect() as conn:
00403 |         for source, sql in candidates:
00404 |             try:
00405 |                 t_sql = time.perf_counter()
00406 |                 df = pd.read_sql(text(sql), conn)
00407 |                 read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)
00408 |                 dv = df.iloc[0]["dv"]
00409 |                 _trace("DV", "data_version_candidate", source=source, read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms, dv_found=dv is not None)
00410 |                 if dv is not None:
00411 |                     out = str(dv)
00412 |                     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source=source, dv=out)
00413 |                     return out
00414 |             except Exception as e:
00415 |                 _trace("DV", "data_version_candidate_err", source=source, err=type(e).__name__)
00416 |                 continue
00417 | 
00418 |     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source="none", dv="NA")
00419 |     return "NA"

00555 | 
00556 | # =========================================================
00557 | # 2) HELPERS DE SCOPE / FILTROS
00558 | # =========================================================
00559 | def _modalidad_clause(modalidad: str | None, field: str = "rr.modalidad") -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00560 |     if modalidad and str(modalidad).strip():
00561 |         return (
00562 |             f" AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({field}, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:modalidad, '')))",
00563 |             {"modalidad": str(modalidad).strip()},
00564 |         )
00565 |     return "", {}
00566 | 
00567 | 
00568 | def _build_result_filters(
00569 |     marcas: list[str] | None,
00570 |     search: str,
00571 |     foco: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None,
00572 |     alias: str = "",
00573 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00574 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
00575 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
00576 |     filters: list[str] = []
00577 | 
00578 |     if marcas:
00579 |         filters.append(f'AND {pfx}"MARCA" = ANY(:marcas)')
00580 |         params["marcas"] = marcas
00581 | 
00582 |     valid_focos = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
00583 | 
00584 |     if isinstance(foco, str):
00585 |         raw_focos = [x.strip() for x in foco.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
00586 |     elif foco is None:
00587 |         raw_focos = []
00588 |     else:
00589 |         raw_focos = [str(x).strip() for x in foco if str(x).strip()]
00590 | 
00591 |     focos = []
00592 |     for item in raw_focos:
00593 |         if item in valid_focos and item not in focos:
00594 |             focos.append(item)
00595 | 
00596 |     if focos:
00597 |         foco_clauses: list[str] = []
00598 | 
00599 |         if "Venta 0" in focos:
00600 |             foco_clauses.append(f'COALESCE({pfx}"Venta(+7)", 0) = 0')
00601 | 
00602 |         if "Negativo" in focos:
00603 |             foco_clauses.append(f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}\"NEGATIVO\", ''))) = 'SI'")
00604 | 
00605 |         if "Quiebres" in focos:
00606 |             foco_clauses.append(f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}\"RIESGO DE QUIEBRE\", ''))) = 'SI'")
00607 | 
00608 |         if "Otros" in focos:
00609 |             foco_clauses.append(
00610 |                 f"""
00611 |                 (
00612 |                     NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}"OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00613 |                     AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}"OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00614 |                 )
00615 |                 """
00616 |             )
00617 | 
00618 |         if foco_clauses:
00619 |             filters.append("AND (" + " OR ".join(f"({c})" for c in foco_clauses) + ")")
00620 | 
00621 |     s = (search or "").strip()
00622 |     if len(s) >= 2:
00623 |         filters.append(
00624 |             f"""
00625 |             AND (
00626 |                 CAST({pfx}"Sku" AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
00627 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}"Descripción del Producto", '') ILIKE :q
00628 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}"MARCA", '') ILIKE :q
00629 |             )
00630 |             """
00631 |         )
00632 |         params["q"] = f"%{s}%"
00633 | 
00634 |     return "\n".join(filters), params
00635 | 
00636 | 
00637 | 
00638 | def _rr_scope_exists(alias: str = "v", modalidad: str | None = None) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00639 |     modalidad_sql, modalidad_params = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "rr.modalidad")
00640 |     sql = f"""
00641 |         EXISTS (
00642 |             SELECT 1
00643 |             FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
00644 |             WHERE rr.cod_rt = {alias}.cod_rt
00645 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00646 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00647 |               {modalidad_sql}
00648 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({alias}."MARCA", '')))
00649 |         )
00650 |     """
00651 |     return sql, modalidad_params

00656 | # =========================================================
00657 | def get_rutero_reponedor() -> pd.DataFrame:
00658 |     return qdf(f"""
00659 |         SELECT DISTINCT
00660 |             TRIM(rutero) AS rutero,
00661 |             TRIM(reponedor) AS reponedor
00662 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00663 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00664 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00665 |         ORDER BY rutero, reponedor
00666 |     """)

00669 | def get_locales(rutero: str, reponedor: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
00670 |     return qdf(f"""
00671 |         SELECT DISTINCT
00672 |             cod_rt,
00673 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt) AS nombre_local_rr
00674 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00675 |         WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00676 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00677 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cod_rt, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00678 |         ORDER BY cod_rt, nombre_local_rr
00679 |     """, {"rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor})

00682 | def get_contexto_local(
00683 |     rutero: str,
00684 |     reponedor: str,
00685 |     cod_rt: str,
00686 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
00687 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
00688 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "modalidad")
00689 |     sql = f"""
00690 |         SELECT
00691 |             cod_rt,
00692 |             MAX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt)) AS nombre_local_rr,
00693 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), '')) AS clientes,
00694 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), '')) AS modalidades,
00695 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), '')) AS mercaderistas
00696 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00697 |         WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
00698 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00699 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00700 |           {modalidad_sql}
00701 |         GROUP BY cod_rt
00702 |     """
00703 |     params = {
00704 |         "rutero": rutero,
00705 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
00706 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00707 |         **extra,
00708 |     }
00709 |     return _selector_df("get_contexto_local", sql, params)

00820 | def get_marcas(

00841 | 
00842 | def get_kpis_local_home(cod_rt: str, marcas: list[str] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00843 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search="", foco="Todo", alias="v")
00844 |     return qdf(f"""
00845 |         SELECT
00846 |             MAX(v.fecha) AS fecha_stock,
00847 |             COUNT(*)::int AS total_skus,
00848 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(v."Venta(+7)", 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS venta_0,
00849 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."NEGATIVO", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS negativos,
00850 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS quiebres,
00851 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE
00852 |                 WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00853 |                  AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00854 |                 THEN 1 ELSE 0
00855 |             END), 0)::int AS otros
00856 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00857 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00858 |         {where_extra}
00859 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, **p2})

00869 |     exists_sql, extra = _rr_scope_exists("v", modalidad=modalidad)
00870 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search="", foco="Todo", alias="v")
00871 |     return qdf(f"""
00872 |         SELECT
00873 |             MAX(v.fecha) AS fecha_stock,
00874 |             COUNT(*)::int AS total_skus,
00875 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(v."Venta(+7)", 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS venta_0,
00876 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."NEGATIVO", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS negativos,
00877 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS quiebres,
00878 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE
00879 |                 WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00880 |                  AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00881 |                 THEN 1 ELSE 0

00883 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v

00896 | def get_tabla_ux_total_home(
00897 |     cod_rt: str,
00898 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
00899 |     foco: str = "Todo",
00900 |     search: str = "",
00901 | ) -> int:
00902 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search, foco, alias="v")
00903 |     df = qdf(f"""
00904 |         SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total
00905 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00906 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00907 |         {where_extra}
00908 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, **p2})
00909 |     return int(df.iloc[0]["total"]) if df is not None and not df.empty else 0
00910 | 
00911 | 
00912 | def get_tabla_ux_page_home(
00913 |     cod_rt: str,
00914 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
00915 |     page: int = 1,
00916 |     page_size: int = 25,
00917 |     foco: str = "Todo",
00918 |     search: str = "",
00919 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
00920 |     page = max(int(page or 1), 1)
00921 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search, foco, alias="v")
00922 |     return qdf(f"""
00923 |         SELECT
00924 |           v.fecha,
00925 |           v."MARCA", v."Sku", v."Descripción del Producto",
00926 |           v."Stock", v."Venta(+7)", v."NEGATIVO", v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", v."OTROS"
00927 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00928 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00929 |         {where_extra}
00930 |         ORDER BY
00931 |           v."MARCA" ASC,
00932 |           CASE WHEN v."Sku" ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
00933 |           CASE WHEN v."Sku" ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN (v."Sku")::bigint END ASC NULLS LAST,
00934 |           v."Sku" ASC,
00935 |           v."Descripción del Producto" ASC
00936 |         LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
00937 |     """, {
00938 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00939 |         "limit": int(page_size),
00940 |         "offset": (page - 1) * int(page_size),
00941 |         **p2,
00942 |     })

00970 | def get_tabla_ux_total(
00971 |     rutero: str,
00972 |     reponedor: str,
00973 |     cod_rt: str,
00974 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
00975 |     foco: str = "Todo",
00976 |     search: str = "",
00977 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
00978 | ) -> int:
00979 |     exists_sql, extra = _rr_scope_exists("v", modalidad=modalidad)
00980 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search, foco, alias="v")
00981 |     df = qdf(f"""
00982 |         SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total
00983 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00984 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00985 |           AND {exists_sql}
00986 |           {where_extra}
00987 |     """, {
00988 |         "rutero": rutero,
00989 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
00990 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00991 |         **extra,
00992 |         **p2,
00993 |     })
00994 |     return int(df.iloc[0]["total"]) if df is not None and not df.empty else 0

00997 | def get_tabla_ux_page(
00998 |     rutero: str,
00999 |     reponedor: str,
01000 |     cod_rt: str,
01001 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
01002 |     page: int = 1,
01003 |     page_size: int = 25,
01004 |     foco: str = "Todo",
01005 |     search: str = "",
01006 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
01007 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01008 |     page = max(int(page or 1), 1)
01009 |     exists_sql, extra = _rr_scope_exists("v", modalidad=modalidad)
01010 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search, foco, alias="v")
01011 |     return qdf(f"""
01012 |         SELECT
01013 |           v.fecha,
01014 |           v."MARCA", v."Sku", v."Descripción del Producto",
01015 |           v."Stock", v."Venta(+7)", v."NEGATIVO", v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", v."OTROS"
01016 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
01017 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
01018 |           AND {exists_sql}
01019 |           {where_extra}
01020 |         ORDER BY
01021 |           v."MARCA" ASC,
01022 |           CASE WHEN v."Sku" ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
01023 |           CASE WHEN v."Sku" ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN (v."Sku")::bigint END ASC NULLS LAST,
01024 |           v."Sku" ASC,
01025 |           v."Descripción del Producto" ASC
01026 |         LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
01027 |     """, {
01028 |         "rutero": rutero,
01029 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
01030 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
01031 |         "limit": int(page_size),
01032 |         "offset": (page - 1) * int(page_size),
01033 |         **extra,
01034 |         **p2,

01038 | def get_tabla_ux_paginada(
01039 |     rutero: str,
01040 |     reponedor: str,
01041 |     cod_rt: str,
01042 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
01043 |     page: int = 1,
01044 |     page_size: int = 25,
01045 |     foco: str = "Todo",
01046 |     search: str = "",
01047 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
01048 | ) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, int]:
01049 |     total = get_tabla_ux_total(
01050 |         rutero=rutero,
01051 |         reponedor=reponedor,
01052 |         cod_rt=cod_rt,
01053 |         marcas=marcas,
01054 |         foco=foco,
01055 |         search=search,
01056 |         modalidad=modalidad,
01057 |     )
01058 |     df = get_tabla_ux_page(
01059 |         rutero=rutero,
01060 |         reponedor=reponedor,
01061 |         cod_rt=cod_rt,
01062 |         marcas=marcas,
01063 |         page=page,
01064 |         page_size=page_size,
01065 |         foco=foco,
01066 |         search=search,
01067 |         modalidad=modalidad,
01068 |     )
01069 |     return df, int(total or 0)

01073 | def get_tabla_ux_export(
01074 |     rutero: str,
01075 |     reponedor: str,
01076 |     cod_rt: str,
01077 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
01078 |     foco: str = "Todo",
01079 |     search: str = "",
01080 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
01081 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01082 |     exists_sql, extra = _rr_scope_exists("v", modalidad=modalidad)
01083 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search, foco, alias="v")
01084 |     return qdf(f"""
01085 |         SELECT
01086 |           v.fecha,
01087 |           v."MARCA", v."Sku", v."Descripción del Producto",
01088 |           v."Stock", v."Venta(+7)", v."NEGATIVO", v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", v."OTROS"
01089 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
01090 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
01091 |           AND {exists_sql}
01092 |           {where_extra}
01093 |         ORDER BY
01094 |           v."MARCA" ASC,
01095 |           CASE WHEN v."Sku" ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
01096 |           CASE WHEN v."Sku" ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN (v."Sku")::bigint END ASC NULLS LAST,
01097 |           v."Sku" ASC,
01098 |           v."Descripción del Producto" ASC
01099 |     """, {
01100 |         "rutero": rutero,
01101 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
01102 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
01103 |         **extra,
01104 |         **p2,
01105 |     })
01106 | 
01107 | 
01108 | def _scope_tipo_norm(value: str | None) -> str | None:
01109 |     v = str(value or "").strip().upper()
01110 |     return v if v in {"GESTOR", "SUPERVISOR"} else None
01111 | 
01112 | 
01113 | def _scope_match_text_expr(
01114 |     alias: str,
01115 |     preferred_field: str,
01116 |     fallback_field: str | None = None,
01117 | ) -> str:
01118 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01119 |     parts = [f"NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}{preferred_field}, '')), '')"]
01120 |     if fallback_field and fallback_field != preferred_field:
01121 |         parts.append(f"NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}{fallback_field}, '')), '')")
01122 |     parts.append("''")
01123 |     return "COALESCE(" + ", ".join(parts) + ")"
01124 | 
01125 | 
01126 | # =========================================================
01127 | # 5) CLIENTE_SCOPE SOBRE VISTAS DEDICADAS
01128 | # =========================================================
01129 | def _scope_norm_expr(field: str) -> str:
01130 |     return f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({field}, '')))"
01131 | 
01132 | 
01133 | def _scope_is_selected(value: str | None) -> bool:
01134 |     if value is None:
01135 |         return False
01136 |     v = str(value).strip()
01137 |     return bool(v) and v.upper() != "TODOS"
01138 | 
01139 | 
01140 | def _normalize_scope_focos(
01141 |     focos: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None,
01142 | ) -> list[str]:
01143 |     valid_focos = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
01144 | 
01145 |     if isinstance(focos, str):
01146 |         raw = [x.strip() for x in focos.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
01147 |     elif focos is None:
01148 |         raw = []
01149 |     else:
01150 |         raw = [str(x).strip() for x in focos if str(x).strip()]
01151 | 
01152 |     out: list[str] = []
01153 |     for item in raw:
01154 |         if item in valid_focos and item not in out:
01155 |             out.append(item)
01156 |     return out
01157 | 
01158 | 
01159 | def _scope_page_clause(
01160 |     limit: int | None,
01161 |     offset: int | None,
01162 |     params: dict[str, Any],
01163 | ) -> str:
01164 |     if limit is None:
01165 |         return ""
01166 |     params["limit"] = max(int(limit), 1)
01167 |     params["offset"] = max(int(offset or 0), 0)
01168 |     return " LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset "
01169 | 
01170 | 
01171 | def _scope_cliente_filters(
01172 |     *,
01173 |     alias: str = "",
01174 |     marca: str | None = None,
01175 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01176 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01177 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01178 |     cliente_field: str = "cliente_norm",
01179 |     responsable_field: str = "responsable_norm",
01180 |     responsable_tipo_field: str = "responsable_tipo",
01181 |     marca_field: str = "marca",
01182 |     apply_marca_intersection: bool = False,
01183 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
01184 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01185 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
01186 |     filters: list[str] = []
01187 | 
01188 |     if _scope_is_selected(cliente):
01189 |         filters.append(
01190 |             f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{cliente_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':cliente')}"
01191 |         )
01192 |         params["cliente"] = str(cliente).strip()
01193 | 
01194 |     tipo_norm = _scope_tipo_norm(responsable_tipo)
01195 | 
01196 |     if _scope_is_selected(responsable) and tipo_norm is None:
01197 |         filters.append("AND 1=0")
01198 | 
01199 |     if tipo_norm is not None:
01200 |         filters.append(
01201 |             f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{responsable_tipo_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':responsable_tipo')}"
01202 |         )
01203 |         params["responsable_tipo"] = tipo_norm
01204 | 
01205 |     if _scope_is_selected(responsable):
01206 |         filters.append(
01207 |             f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{responsable_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':responsable')}"
01208 |         )
01209 |         params["responsable"] = str(responsable).strip()
01210 | 
01211 |     if _scope_is_selected(marca):
01212 |         params["marca"] = str(marca).strip()
01213 |         if apply_marca_intersection:
01214 |             cliente_match_expr = _scope_match_text_expr(
01215 |                 alias,
01216 |                 cliente_field,
01217 |                 "cliente" if cliente_field != "cliente" else None,
01218 |             )
01219 |             filters.append(
01220 |                 f"""
01221 |                 AND EXISTS (
01222 |                     SELECT 1
01223 |                     FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01224 |                     WHERE b.cod_rt = {pfx}cod_rt
01225 |                       AND {_scope_norm_expr('b.cliente')} = {_scope_norm_expr(cliente_match_expr)}
01226 |                       AND {_scope_norm_expr('b.marca')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':marca')}
01227 |                 )
01228 |                 """
01229 |             )
01230 |         else:
01231 |             filters.append(
01232 |                 f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{marca_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':marca')}"
01233 |             )
01234 | 
01235 |     return "\n".join(filters), params
01236 | 
01237 | 
01238 | def _scope_summary_filters(
01239 |     *,
01240 |     alias: str = "",
01241 |     marca: str | None = None,
01242 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01243 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01244 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01245 |     focos: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None = None,
01246 |     search: str = "",
01247 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
01248 |     filters_sql, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01249 |         alias=alias,
01250 |         marca=marca,
01251 |         cliente=cliente,
01252 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01253 |         responsable=responsable,
01254 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01255 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01256 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01257 |         marca_field="marca",
01258 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01259 |     )
01260 | 
01261 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01262 |     filters: list[str] = [filters_sql] if filters_sql else []
01263 | 
01264 |     focos_norm = _normalize_scope_focos(focos)
01265 |     if focos_norm:
01266 |         foco_clauses: list[str] = []
01267 |         if "Venta 0" in focos_norm:
01268 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}venta_0, 0) > 0")
01269 |         if "Negativo" in focos_norm:
01270 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}negativos, 0) > 0")
01271 |         if "Quiebres" in focos_norm:
01272 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}quiebres, 0) > 0")
01273 |         if "Otros" in focos_norm:
01274 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}otros, 0) > 0")
01275 |         if foco_clauses:
01276 |             filters.append("AND (" + " OR ".join(f"({c})" for c in foco_clauses) + ")")
01277 | 
01278 |     s = (search or "").strip()
01279 |     if len(s) >= 2:
01280 |         filters.append(
01281 |             f"""
01282 |             AND (
01283 |                 CAST({pfx}cod_rt AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
01284 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}local_nombre_rr, '') ILIKE :q
01285 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}cliente, '') ILIKE :q
01286 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}responsable, '') ILIKE :q
01287 |             )
01288 |             """
01289 |         )
01290 |         params["q"] = f"%{s}%"
01291 | 
01292 |     return "\n".join(x for x in filters if x), params
01293 | 
01294 | 
01295 | def _scope_detail_filters(
01296 |     *,
01297 |     alias: str = "",
01298 |     marca: str | None = None,
01299 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01300 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01301 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01302 |     focos: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None = None,
01303 |     search: str = "",
01304 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
01305 |     filters_sql, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01306 |         alias=alias,
01307 |         marca=marca,
01308 |         cliente=cliente,
01309 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01310 |         responsable=responsable,
01311 |         cliente_field="cliente",
01312 |         responsable_field="responsable",
01313 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01314 |         marca_field="marca",
01315 |         apply_marca_intersection=False,
01316 |     )
01317 | 
01318 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01319 |     filters: list[str] = [filters_sql] if filters_sql else []
01320 | 
01321 |     focos_norm = _normalize_scope_focos(focos)
01322 |     if focos_norm:
01323 |         foco_clauses: list[str] = []
01324 |         if "Venta 0" in focos_norm:
01325 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}venta_7, 0) = 0")
01326 |         if "Negativo" in focos_norm:
01327 |             foco_clauses.append(f"{_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}negativo')} = 'SI'")
01328 |         if "Quiebres" in focos_norm:
01329 |             foco_clauses.append(f"{_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}riesgo_quiebre')} = 'SI'")
01330 |         if "Otros" in focos_norm:
01331 |             foco_clauses.append(
01332 |                 f"""
01333 |                 (
01334 |                     NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}otros, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01335 |                     AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}otros')} NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
01336 |                 )
01337 |                 """
01338 |             )
01339 |         if foco_clauses:
01340 |             filters.append("AND (" + " OR ".join(f"({c})" for c in foco_clauses) + ")")
01341 | 
01342 |     s = (search or "").strip()
01343 |     if len(s) >= 2:
01344 |         filters.append(
01345 |             f"""
01346 |             AND (
01347 |                 CAST({pfx}cod_rt AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
01348 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}local_nombre_rr, '') ILIKE :q
01349 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}cliente, '') ILIKE :q
01350 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}responsable, '') ILIKE :q
01351 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}marca, '') ILIKE :q
01352 |                 OR CAST({pfx}sku AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
01353 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}producto, '') ILIKE :q
01354 |             )
01355 |             """
01356 |         )
01357 |         params["q"] = f"%{s}%"
01358 | 
01359 |     return "\n".join(x for x in filters if x), params
01360 | 
01361 | 
01362 | def get_marcas_home_global() -> list[str]:
01363 |     sql = f"""
01364 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01365 |             TRIM(marca) AS marca
01366 |         FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW}
01367 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(marca, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01368 |         ORDER BY marca
01369 |     """
01370 |     df = _selector_df("get_marcas_home_global", sql)
01371 |     return df["marca"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []
01372 | 
01373 | 
01374 | def get_clientes_home_scope(marca: str | None = None) -> list[str]:
01375 |     where_extra, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01376 |         alias="rr",
01377 |         marca=marca,
01378 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01379 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01380 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01381 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01382 |     )
01383 |     sql = f"""
01384 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01385 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente), ''), TRIM(rr.cliente_norm)) AS cliente
01386 |         FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01387 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente_norm, rr.cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01388 |         {where_extra}
01389 |         ORDER BY cliente
01390 |     """
01391 |     df = _selector_df("get_clientes_home_scope", sql, params)
01392 |     return df["cliente"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []
01393 | 
01394 | 
01395 | def get_responsables_home_scope(
01396 |     tipo: str,
01397 |     marca: str | None = None,
01398 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01399 | ) -> list[str]:
01400 |     tipo_norm = str(tipo or "").strip().upper()
01401 |     if tipo_norm not in {"GESTOR", "SUPERVISOR"}:
01402 |         return []
01403 | 
01404 |     where_extra, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01405 |         alias="rr",
01406 |         marca=marca,
01407 |         cliente=cliente,
01408 |         responsable_tipo=tipo_norm,
01409 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01410 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01411 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01412 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01413 |     )
01414 |     sql = f"""
01415 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01416 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable), ''), TRIM(rr.responsable_norm)) AS responsable
01417 |         FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01418 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.responsable_norm, rr.responsable, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01419 |         {where_extra}
01420 |         ORDER BY responsable
01421 |     """
01422 |     df = _selector_df("get_responsables_home_scope", sql, params)
01423 |     return df["responsable"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []

01425 | 
01426 | def get_rr_people_scope(
01427 |     tipo: str,
01428 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01429 |     marca: str | None = None,
01430 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01431 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01432 |     tipo_norm = str(tipo or "").strip().upper()
01433 |     if tipo_norm not in {"GESTOR", "SUPERVISOR"}:
01434 |         return pd.DataFrame(
01435 |             columns=[
01436 |                 "rutero",
01437 |                 "reponedor",
01438 |                 "responsable",
01439 |                 "cliente",
01440 |                 "locales_relacionados",
01441 |             ]
01442 |         )
01443 | 
01444 |     where_extra, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01445 |         alias="rr",
01446 |         marca=marca,
01447 |         cliente=cliente,
01448 |         responsable_tipo=tipo_norm,
01449 |         responsable=responsable,
01450 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01451 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01452 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01453 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01454 |     )
01455 |     sql = f"""
01456 |         SELECT
01457 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.rutero), ''), '-') AS rutero,
01458 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.reponedor), ''), '-') AS reponedor,
01459 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable), ''), TRIM(rr.responsable_norm)) AS responsable,
01460 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente), ''), TRIM(rr.cliente_norm)) AS cliente,
01461 |             COUNT(DISTINCT rr.cod_rt)::int AS locales_relacionados
01462 |         FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01463 |         WHERE 1=1
01464 |         {where_extra}
01465 |         GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
01466 |         ORDER BY rutero, reponedor, cliente
01467 |     """
01468 |     return _selector_df("get_rr_people_scope", sql, params)

01470 | 
01471 | def get_scope_level(
01472 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01473 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01474 | ) -> str:
01475 |     has_cliente = _scope_is_selected(cliente)
01476 |     has_responsable = _scope_is_selected(responsable)
01477 | 
01478 |     if not has_cliente and not has_responsable:
01479 |         return "L0"
01480 |     if has_cliente and not has_responsable:
01481 |         return "L1"
01482 |     if not has_cliente and has_responsable:
01483 |         return "L2"
01484 |     return "L3"
01485 | 
01486 | 
01487 | def get_kpis_scope_cliente(
01488 |     marca: str | None = None,
01489 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01490 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01491 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01492 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01493 |     search: str = "",
01494 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01495 |     where_summary, params_summary = _scope_summary_filters(
01496 |         alias="s",
01497 |         marca=marca,
01498 |         cliente=cliente,
01499 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01500 |         responsable=responsable,
01501 |         focos=focos,
01502 |         search=search,
01503 |     )
01504 | 
01505 |     where_detail, params_detail = _scope_detail_filters(
01506 |         alias="b",
01507 |         marca=marca,
01508 |         cliente=cliente,
01509 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01510 |         responsable=responsable,
01511 |         focos=focos,
01512 |         search=search,
01513 |     )
01514 | 
01515 |     params = {**params_summary, **params_detail}
01516 | 
01517 |     sql = f"""
01518 |         WITH kpi AS (
01519 |             SELECT
01520 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cod_rt)::int AS locales_scope,
01521 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cliente_norm)::int AS clientes_scope,
01522 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.responsable_norm)::int AS responsables_scope,
01523 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01524 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01525 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01526 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01527 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros
01528 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01529 |             WHERE 1=1
01530 |             {where_summary}
01531 |         ),
01532 |         fecha AS (
01533 |             SELECT
01534 |                 MAX(b.fecha) AS fecha_stock
01535 |             FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01536 |             WHERE 1=1
01537 |             {where_detail}
01538 |         )
01539 |         SELECT
01540 |             fecha.fecha_stock,
01541 |             kpi.locales_scope,
01542 |             kpi.clientes_scope,
01543 |             kpi.responsables_scope,
01544 |             kpi.total_skus,
01545 |             kpi.venta_0,
01546 |             kpi.negativos,
01547 |             kpi.quiebres,
01548 |             kpi.otros
01549 |         FROM kpi
01550 |         CROSS JOIN fecha
01551 |     """
01552 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01553 | 
01554 | 
01555 | def get_tabla_scope_responsable_total_page(
01556 |     marca: str | None = None,
01557 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01558 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01559 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01560 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01561 |     search: str = "",
01562 |     limit: int | None = None,
01563 |     offset: int | None = None,
01564 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01565 |     where_extra, params = _scope_summary_filters(
01566 |         alias="s",
01567 |         marca=marca,
01568 |         cliente=cliente,
01569 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01570 |         responsable=responsable,
01571 |         focos=focos,
01572 |         search=search,
01573 |     )
01574 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01575 | 
01576 |     sql = f"""
01577 |         WITH base AS (
01578 |             SELECT
01579 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') AS responsable_tipo,
01580 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable), ''), TRIM(s.responsable_norm)) AS responsable,
01581 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cliente_norm)::int AS clientes,
01582 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cod_rt)::int AS locales,
01583 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01584 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01585 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01586 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01587 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros,
01588 |                 (
01589 |                     COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)
01590 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)
01591 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)
01592 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)
01593 |                 )::int AS skus_en_foco
01594 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01595 |             WHERE 1=1
01596 |             {where_extra}
01597 |             GROUP BY 1, 2
01598 |         )
01599 |         SELECT
01600 |             base.*,
01601 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01602 |         FROM base
01603 |         ORDER BY negativos DESC, quiebres DESC, venta_0 DESC, responsable ASC
01604 |         {page_sql}
01605 |     """
01606 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01607 | 
01608 | 
01609 | def get_tabla_scope_cliente_total_page(
01610 |     marca: str | None = None,
01611 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01612 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01613 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01614 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01615 |     search: str = "",
01616 |     limit: int | None = None,
01617 |     offset: int | None = None,
01618 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01619 |     where_extra, params = _scope_summary_filters(
01620 |         alias="s",
01621 |         marca=marca,
01622 |         cliente=cliente,
01623 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01624 |         responsable=responsable,
01625 |         focos=focos,
01626 |         search=search,
01627 |     )
01628 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01629 | 
01630 |     sql = f"""
01631 |         WITH base AS (
01632 |             SELECT
01633 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente), ''), TRIM(s.cliente_norm)) AS cliente,
01634 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.responsable_norm)::int AS responsables,
01635 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cod_rt)::int AS locales,
01636 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01637 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01638 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01639 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01640 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros,
01641 |                 (
01642 |                     COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)
01643 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)
01644 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)
01645 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)
01646 |                 )::int AS skus_en_foco
01647 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01648 |             WHERE 1=1
01649 |             {where_extra}
01650 |             GROUP BY 1
01651 |         )
01652 |         SELECT
01653 |             base.*,
01654 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01655 |         FROM base
01656 |         ORDER BY negativos DESC, quiebres DESC, venta_0 DESC, cliente ASC
01657 |         {page_sql}
01658 |     """
01659 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01660 | 
01661 | 
01662 | def get_tabla_scope_local_total_page(
01663 |     marca: str | None = None,
01664 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01665 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01666 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01667 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01668 |     search: str = "",
01669 |     limit: int | None = None,
01670 |     offset: int | None = None,
01671 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01672 |     where_extra, params = _scope_summary_filters(
01673 |         alias="s",
01674 |         marca=marca,
01675 |         cliente=cliente,
01676 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01677 |         responsable=responsable,
01678 |         focos=focos,
01679 |         search=search,
01680 |     )
01681 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01682 | 
01683 |     sql = f"""
01684 |         WITH base AS (
01685 |             SELECT
01686 |                 s.cod_rt,
01687 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.local_nombre_rr), ''), CAST(s.cod_rt AS TEXT)) AS nombre_local_rr,
01688 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente), ''), TRIM(s.cliente_norm)) AS cliente,
01689 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') AS responsable_tipo,
01690 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable), ''), TRIM(s.responsable_norm)) AS responsable,
01691 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01692 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01693 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01694 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01695 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros,
01696 |                 (
01697 |                     COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)
01698 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)
01699 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)
01700 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)
01701 |                 )::int AS skus_en_foco
01702 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01703 |             WHERE 1=1
01704 |             {where_extra}
01705 |             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
01706 |         )
01707 |         SELECT
01708 |             base.*,
01709 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01710 |         FROM base
01711 |         ORDER BY negativos DESC, quiebres DESC, venta_0 DESC, cod_rt ASC
01712 |         {page_sql}
01713 |     """
01714 |     return qdf(sql, params)

01717 | def get_detalle_sku_scope_total_page(

01719 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01720 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01721 |     responsable: str | None = None,

01725 |     offset: int | None = None,

01727 |     level = get_scope_level(cliente=cliente, responsable=responsable)

01746 |             ]

01749 |     where_extra, params = _scope_detail_filters(
01750 |         alias="b",
01751 |         marca=marca,
01752 |         cliente=cliente,
01753 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01754 |         responsable=responsable,
01755 |         focos=focos,
01756 |         search=search,
01757 |     )
01758 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01759 |

01762 |             b.fecha,
01763 |             b.cod_rt,
01764 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.local_nombre_rr), ''), CAST(b.cod_rt AS TEXT)) AS nombre_local_rr,
01765 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.cliente), ''), '') AS cliente,
01766 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') AS responsable_tipo,
01767 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.responsable), ''), '') AS responsable,

01769 |             CAST(b.sku AS TEXT) AS sku,
01770 |             COALESCE(b.producto, '') AS descripcion,
01771 |             COALESCE(b.stock, 0)::int AS stock,
01772 |             COALESCE(b.venta_7, 0)::int AS venta_7,
01773 |             COALESCE(b.negativo, '') AS negativo,
01774 |             COALESCE(b.riesgo_quiebre, '') AS riesgo_quiebre,
01775 |             COALESCE(b.otros, '') AS otros,
01776 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01777 |         FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01778 |         WHERE 1=1
01779 |         {where_extra}
01780 |         ORDER BY
01781 |             CASE WHEN {_scope_norm_expr('b.negativo')} = 'SI' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
01782 |             CASE WHEN {_scope_norm_expr('b.riesgo_quiebre')} = 'SI' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
01783 |             COALESCE(b.venta_7, 0) ASC,
01784 |             COALESCE(b.marca, '') ASC,
