01791 | # =========================================================
01792 | # 6) AUDITORÍA DE COBERTURA E INCONSISTENCIAS
01793 | # =========================================================
01794 | def get_scope_clientes_rr(
01795 |     cod_rt: str,
01796 |     rutero: str,
01797 |     reponedor: str,
01798 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
01799 | ) -> list[str]:
01800 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "modalidad")
01801 |     df = qdf(f"""
01802 |         SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(cliente) AS cliente
01803 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
01804 |         WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
01805 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
01806 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
01807 |           {modalidad_sql}
01808 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01809 |         ORDER BY cliente
01810 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, "rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor, **extra})
01811 |     return df["cliente"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []

01813 | 
01814 | def get_rr_stock_en_local(cod_rt: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
01815 |     return qdf(f"""
01816 |         SELECT
01817 |             rr.cod_rt,
01818 |             TRIM(rr.modalidad) AS modalidad,
01819 |             TRIM(rr.rutero) AS rutero,
01820 |             TRIM(rr.reponedor) AS reponedor,
01821 |             TRIM(rr.cliente) AS cliente_rr,
01822 |             CASE
01823 |                 WHEN EXISTS (
01824 |                     SELECT 1
01825 |                     FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
01826 |                     WHERE v.cod_rt = rr.cod_rt
01827 |                       AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."MARCA", ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')))
01828 |                 ) THEN 'SI'
01829 |                 ELSE 'NO'
01830 |             END AS tiene_stock_match
01831 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
01832 |         WHERE rr.cod_rt = :cod_rt
01833 |         ORDER BY modalidad, rutero, reponedor, cliente_rr
01834 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt})
01835 | 
01836 | 
01837 | def get_cobertura_local(cod_rt: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
01838 |     return qdf(f"""
01839 |         WITH rr AS (
01840 |             SELECT DISTINCT
01841 |                 cod_rt,
01842 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, ''))) AS cliente_norm
01843 |             FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
01844 |             WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
01845 |               AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01846 |         ),
01847 |         st AS (
01848 |             SELECT DISTINCT
01849 |                 cod_rt,
01850 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE("MARCA", ''))) AS marca_norm
01851 |             FROM {RESULT_VIEW}
01852 |             WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
01853 |               AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE("MARCA", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01854 |         )
01855 |         SELECT
01856 |             :cod_rt AS cod_rt,
01857 |             (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rr)::int AS clientes_rr,
01858 |             (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM st)::int AS clientes_stock,
01859 |             (
01860 |                 SELECT COUNT(*)::int
01861 |                 FROM rr
01862 |                 INNER JOIN st
01863 |                     ON rr.cod_rt = st.cod_rt
01864 |                    AND rr.cliente_norm = st.marca_norm
01865 |             ) AS clientes_match
01866 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt})
01867 | 
01868 | 
01869 | def get_clientes_sin_match_rr_stock(
01870 |     cod_rt: str,
01871 |     rutero: str,
01872 |     reponedor: str,
01873 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
01874 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01875 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "rr.modalidad")
01876 |     return qdf(f"""
01877 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01878 |             rr.cod_rt,
01879 |             TRIM(rr.modalidad) AS modalidad,
01880 |             TRIM(rr.rutero) AS rutero,
01881 |             TRIM(rr.reponedor) AS reponedor,
01882 |             TRIM(rr.cliente) AS cliente_rr
01883 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
01884 |         WHERE rr.cod_rt = :cod_rt
01885 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
01886 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
01887 |           {modalidad_sql}
01888 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01889 |           AND NOT EXISTS (
01890 |               SELECT 1
01891 |               FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
01892 |               WHERE v.cod_rt = rr.cod_rt
01893 |                 AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."MARCA", ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')))
01894 |           )
01895 |         ORDER BY cliente_rr
01896 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, "rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor, **extra})

01903 |     return {
01904 |         "status": "frozen",
01905 |         "branch": "B3_CONTROL_GESTION_SQL",
01906 |         "roles_publicos": ["JEFE_OPERACIONES", "GESTOR"],

01908 |             "parity": CG_PARITY_VIEW,
01909 |             "scope": CG_SCOPE_VIEW,
01910 |             "alertas": CG_ALERTAS_VIEW,

01913 |             "detalle": CG_DETALLE_VIEW,
01914 |         },
01915 |         "compat_aliases": {
01916 |             "alertas": CG_COMPAT_ALERTAS_VIEW,
01917 |             "inicio_jefe": CG_COMPAT_INICIO_JEFE_VIEW,
01918 |             "inicio_gestor": CG_COMPAT_INICIO_GESTOR_VIEW,
01919 |             "detalle": CG_COMPAT_DETALLE_VIEW,
01920 |         },
01921 |         "rules": [
01922 |             "no_recalculo_negocio_en_python",
01923 |             "pair_global_truth_separada_de_scope_assigned_truth",
01924 |             "no_supervisor_no_reponedor_en_contrato_publico_actual",
01925 |         ],
01926 |     }

01928 | 
01929 | def _cg_page_clause(limit: int | None, offset: int | None, params: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
01930 |     clauses: list[str] = []
01931 |     if limit is not None:
01932 |         params["limit"] = max(1, int(limit))
01933 |         clauses.append("LIMIT :limit")
01934 |     if offset is not None:
01935 |         params["offset"] = max(0, int(offset))
01936 |         clauses.append("OFFSET :offset")
01937 |     return (" " + " ".join(clauses)) if clauses else ""
01938 | 
01939 | 
01940 | def _cg_select_page(
01941 |     *,
01942 |     selector_name: str,
01943 |     view_name: str,
01944 |     limit: int | None = None,
01945 |     offset: int | None = None,
01946 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01947 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
01948 |     page_sql = _cg_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01949 |     sql = f"""
01950 |         SELECT *
01951 |         FROM {view_name}
01952 |         {page_sql}
01953 |     """
01954 |     return _selector_df(selector_name, sql, params or None)

02028 | 
02029 | def get_cg_contract_smoke() -> dict[str, Any]:
02030 |     checks = [
02031 |         ("parity", CG_PARITY_VIEW),
02032 |         ("scope", CG_SCOPE_VIEW),
02033 |         ("alertas", CG_ALERTAS_VIEW),
02034 |         ("inicio_jefe", CG_INICIO_JEFE_VIEW),
02035 |         ("inicio_gestor", CG_INICIO_GESTOR_VIEW),
02036 |         ("detalle", CG_DETALLE_VIEW),
02037 |     ]
02038 |     results: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
02039 |     failed_objects: list[str] = []
02040 |     non_zero_expected = {"parity", "scope", "alertas", "inicio_jefe", "inicio_gestor", "detalle"}
02041 | 
02042 |     for object_name, view_name in checks:
02043 |         try:
02044 |             df = _selector_df(
02045 |                 f"smoke_{object_name}",
02046 |                 f"SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS rows FROM {view_name}",
02047 |             )
02048 |             rows = int(df.iloc[0]["rows"] or 0) if df is not None and not df.empty else 0
02049 |             status = "ok" if rows > 0 or object_name not in non_zero_expected else "warn"
02050 |             results.append({
02051 |                 "object": object_name,
02052 |                 "view": view_name,
02053 |                 "rows": rows,
02054 |                 "status": status,
02055 |             })
02056 |         except Exception as exc:
02057 |             failed_objects.append(object_name)
02058 |             results.append({
02059 |                 "object": object_name,
02060 |                 "view": view_name,
02061 |                 "rows": None,
02062 |                 "status": "fail",
02063 |                 "error": f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}",
02064 |             })
02065 | 
02066 |     zero_warns = [r["object"] for r in results if r.get("status") == "warn"]
02067 |     smoke_status = "fail" if failed_objects else ("warn" if zero_warns else "ok")
02068 |     return {
02069 |         "smoke_status": smoke_status,
02070 |         "branch": "B3_CONTROL_GESTION_SQL",
02071 |         "views_checked": len(checks),
02072 |         "failed_objects": failed_objects,
02073 |         "zero_row_objects": zero_warns,
02074 |         "results": results,
02075 |     }
02076 |

00039 | def _clean_yes(v) -> str:
00040 |     return "SI" if str(v or "").strip().upper() == "SI" else ""
00041 | 
00042 | 
00043 | def _clean_otros(v) -> str:
00044 |     out = str(v or "").strip()
00045 |     return "" if out.upper() in {"", "NO", "N/A", "NA", "-"} else out
00046 | 
00047 | 
00048 | def _venta_0_flag(v) -> str:
00049 |     try:
00050 |         return "SI" if int(pd.to_numeric(v, errors="coerce") or 0) == 0 else ""
00051 |     except Exception:
00052 |         return ""
00053 | 
00054 | 
00055 | def build_export_df(df_ux: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
00056 |     df = df_ux.copy()
00057 | 
00058 |     needed = [
00059 |         "fecha",
00060 |         "MARCA",
00061 |         "Sku",
00062 |         "Descripción del Producto",
00063 |         "Stock",
00064 |         "Venta(+7)",
00065 |         "NEGATIVO",
00066 |         "RIESGO DE QUIEBRE",
00067 |         "OTROS",
00068 |     ]
00069 |     for c in needed:
00070 |         if c not in df.columns:
00071 |             df[c] = ""
00072 | 
00073 |     df["Fecha stock"] = pd.to_datetime(df["fecha"], errors="coerce").dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d").fillna("")
00074 |     df["Sku"] = df["Sku"].astype(str)
00075 |     df["Stock"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Stock"], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
00076 |     df["Venta(+7)"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Venta(+7)"], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
00077 | 
00078 |     df["VENTA 0"] = df["Venta(+7)"].apply(_venta_0_flag)
00079 |     df["NEGATIVO"] = df["NEGATIVO"].apply(_clean_yes)
00080 |     df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"] = df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"].apply(_clean_yes)
00081 |     df["OTROS"] = df["OTROS"].apply(_clean_otros)
00082 | 
00083 |     return df[EXPORT_COLS]

00086 | def _sorted_for_export(df_in: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
00087 |     if df_in is None or df_in.empty:
00088 |         return df_in
00089 | 
00090 |     df = df_in.copy()
00091 | 
00092 |     base_cols = [c for c in df.columns]
00093 |     for c in base_cols:
00094 |         if c not in df.columns:
00095 |             df[c] = ""
00096 | 
00097 |     if "MARCA" not in df.columns:
00098 |         df["MARCA"] = ""
00099 |     if "Sku" not in df.columns:
00100 |         df["Sku"] = ""
00101 |     if "Descripción del Producto" not in df.columns:
00102 |         df["Descripción del Producto"] = ""
00103 | 
00104 |     df["MARCA"] = df["MARCA"].astype(str)
00105 |     df["Sku"] = df["Sku"].astype(str)
00106 |     df["Descripción del Producto"] = df["Descripción del Producto"].astype(str)
00107 | 
00108 |     sku_num = pd.to_numeric(df["Sku"], errors="coerce")
00109 |     df["_sku_is_text"] = sku_num.isna().astype(int)
00110 |     df["_sku_num"] = sku_num.fillna(0)
00111 | 
00112 |     sort_cols = ["MARCA", "_sku_is_text", "_sku_num", "Sku", "Descripción del Producto"]
00113 |     if "FOCO PRINCIPAL" in df.columns:
00114 |         sort_cols = ["MARCA", "FOCO PRINCIPAL", "_sku_is_text", "_sku_num", "Sku", "Descripción del Producto"]
00115 | 
00116 |     df = df.sort_values(
00117 |         by=sort_cols,
00118 |         ascending=[True] * len(sort_cols),
00119 |         kind="mergesort",
00120 |     ).drop(columns=["_sku_is_text", "_sku_num"])
00121 | 
00122 |     return df

00124 | 
00125 | def _focus_principal(row) -> str:
00126 |     neg = _clean_yes(row.get("NEGATIVO", ""))
00127 |     quiebre = _clean_yes(row.get("RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", ""))
00128 |     venta0 = _venta_0_flag(row.get("Venta(+7)", 0))
00129 |     otros = _clean_otros(row.get("OTROS", ""))
00130 | 
00131 |     # prioridad semántica operativa
00132 |     if neg == "SI":
00133 |         return "NEGATIVO"
00134 |     if quiebre == "SI":
00135 |         return "QUIEBRE"
00136 |     if venta0 == "SI":
00137 |         return "VENTA 0"
00138 |     if otros:
00139 |         return "OTROS"
00140 |     return ""
00141 | 
00142 | 
00143 | def _accion_sugerida(foco_principal: str) -> str:
00144 |     if foco_principal == "NEGATIVO":
00145 |         return "Ajustar inventario y validar sala"
00146 |     if foco_principal == "QUIEBRE":
00147 |         return "Solicitar empuje o reposición"
00148 |     if foco_principal == "VENTA 0":
00149 |         return "Revisar exhibición, precio y rotación"
00150 |     if foco_principal == "OTROS":
00151 |         return "Revisar observación cliente"
00152 |     return ""

00154 | 
00155 | def _normalize_focos_export(foco) -> list[str]:
00156 |     valid = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
00157 | 
00158 |     if foco is None:
00159 |         raw = []
00160 |     elif isinstance(foco, str):
00161 |         raw = [x.strip() for x in foco.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
00162 |     else:
00163 |         raw = [str(x).strip() for x in foco if str(x).strip()]
00164 | 
00165 |     out = []
00166 |     for x in raw:
00167 |         if x in valid and x not in out:
00168 |             out.append(x)
00169 |     return out

00171 | 
00172 | def build_focus_export_df(df_ux: pd.DataFrame, foco: str | list[str] = "Todo") -> pd.DataFrame:
00173 |     df = df_ux.copy()
00174 | 
00175 |     needed = [
00176 |         "fecha",
00177 |         "MARCA",
00178 |         "Sku",
00179 |         "Descripción del Producto",
00180 |         "Stock",
00181 |         "Venta(+7)",
00182 |         "NEGATIVO",
00183 |         "RIESGO DE QUIEBRE",
00184 |         "OTROS",
00185 |     ]
00186 |     for c in needed:
00187 |         if c not in df.columns:
00188 |             df[c] = ""
00189 | 
00190 |     df["Fecha stock"] = pd.to_datetime(df["fecha"], errors="coerce").dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d").fillna("")
00191 |     df["Sku"] = df["Sku"].astype(str)
00192 |     df["Stock"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Stock"], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
00193 |     df["Venta(+7)"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Venta(+7)"], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
00194 | 
00195 |     df["VENTA 0"] = df["Venta(+7)"].apply(_venta_0_flag)
00196 |     df["NEGATIVO"] = df["NEGATIVO"].apply(_clean_yes)
00197 |     df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"] = df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"].apply(_clean_yes)
00198 |     df["OTROS"] = df["OTROS"].apply(_clean_otros)
00199 |     df["FOCO PRINCIPAL"] = df.apply(_focus_principal, axis=1)
00200 |     df["ACCIÓN SUGERIDA"] = df["FOCO PRINCIPAL"].apply(_accion_sugerida)
00201 | 
00202 |     focos = _normalize_focos_export(foco)
00203 | 
00204 |     if focos:
00205 |         mask = pd.Series(False, index=df.index)
00206 | 
00207 |         if "Venta 0" in focos:
00208 |             mask = mask | (df["VENTA 0"] == "SI")
00209 |         if "Negativo" in focos:
00210 |             mask = mask | (df["NEGATIVO"] == "SI")
00211 |         if "Quiebres" in focos:
00212 |             mask = mask | (df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"] == "SI")
00213 |         if "Otros" in focos:
00214 |             mask = mask | (df["OTROS"] != "")
00215 | 
00216 |         df = df[mask].copy()
00217 |     else:
00218 |         df = df[df["FOCO PRINCIPAL"] != ""].copy()
00219 | 
00220 |     if df.empty:
00221 |         return pd.DataFrame(columns=FOCUS_EXPORT_COLS)
00222 | 
00223 |     df = _sorted_for_export(df)
00224 |     return df[FOCUS_EXPORT_COLS]

00226 | 
00227 | def export_excel_generic(sheet_name: str, df_export: pd.DataFrame) -> bytes:
00228 |     out = io.BytesIO()
00229 |     safe_sheet = str(sheet_name or "DATA")[:31]
00230 |     df_export = _sorted_for_export(df_export)
00231 | 
00232 |     with pd.ExcelWriter(out, engine="openpyxl") as writer:
00233 |         df_export.to_excel(writer, index=False, sheet_name=safe_sheet)
00234 |         ws = writer.sheets[safe_sheet]
00235 |         ws.freeze_panes = "A2"
00236 |         ws.auto_filter.ref = ws.dimensions
00237 | 
00238 |         for col_cells in ws.columns:
00239 |             col_letter = col_cells[0].column_letter
00240 |             values = []
00241 |             for cell in col_cells[:200]:
00242 |                 if cell.value is not None:
00243 |                     values.append(len(str(cell.value)))
00244 |             max_len = max(values) if values else 10
00245 |             ws.column_dimensions[col_letter].width = min(max(10, max_len + 2), 45)
00246 | 
00247 |     return out.getvalue()

00330 | 
00331 | def export_pdf_generic(title_lines: list[str], df_export: pd.DataFrame, columns: list[str]) -> bytes:
00332 |     out = io.BytesIO()
00333 |     doc = SimpleDocTemplate(
00334 |         out,
00335 |         pagesize=landscape(A4),
00336 |         leftMargin=1.0 * cm,
00337 |         rightMargin=1.0 * cm,
00338 |         topMargin=1.0 * cm,
00339 |         bottomMargin=1.0 * cm,
00340 |     )
00341 | 
00342 |     styles = getSampleStyleSheet()
00343 |     body = ParagraphStyle(
00344 |         "BodySmall",
00345 |         parent=styles["BodyText"],
00346 |         fontName="Helvetica",
00347 |         fontSize=7,
00348 |         leading=8,
00349 |     )
00350 | 
00351 |     story = []
00352 |     for line in title_lines:
00353 |         story.append(Paragraph(line, styles["Heading4"]))
00354 |     story.append(Spacer(1, 8))
00355 | 
00356 |     df = _sorted_for_export(df_export)
00357 |     # ensure required cols exist
00358 |     for c in columns:
00359 |         if c not in df.columns:
00360 |             df[c] = ""
00361 |     df = df[columns].copy()
00362 |     # render description-like columns with Paragraph
00363 |     data = [columns]
00364 |     for _, r in df.iterrows():
00365 |         row = []
00366 |         for c in columns:
00367 |             v = r.get(c, "")
00368 |             if c in {"Descripción del Producto", "ACCIÓN SUGERIDA"}:
00369 |                 row.append(Paragraph(str(v), body))
00370 |             else:
00371 |                 row.append(str(v))
00372 |         data.append(row)
00373 | 
00374 |     # choose layout widths based on columns
00375 |     if columns == EXPORT_COLS:
00376 |         col_widths = [
00377 |             2.4 * cm,
00378 |             2.6 * cm,
00379 |             2.6 * cm,
00380 |             9.8 * cm,
00381 |             1.8 * cm,
00382 |             2.0 * cm,
00383 |             2.0 * cm,
00384 |             3.0 * cm,
00385 |             2.0 * cm,
00386 |         ]
00387 |         align_center_range = (5, 7)
00388 |         align_left_index = 8
00389 |     else:
00390 |         # layout for FOCUS_EXPORT_COLS (11 cols)
00391 |         col_widths = [
00392 |             2.2 * cm,  # Fecha stock
00393 |             2.6 * cm,  # MARCA
00394 |             2.6 * cm,  # Sku
00395 |             8.8 * cm,  # Descripción
00396 |             1.8 * cm,  # Stock
00397 |             2.4 * cm,  # FOCO PRINCIPAL
00398 |             4.2 * cm,  # ACCIÓN SUGERIDA
00399 |             2.0 * cm,  # VENTA 0
00400 |             2.0 * cm,  # NEGATIVO
00401 |             3.0 * cm,  # RIESGO DE QUIEBRE
00402 |             2.0 * cm,  # OTROS
00403 |         ]
00404 |         # center the flags columns (VENTA 0..RIESGO)
00405 |         align_center_range = (7, 9)
00406 |         align_left_index = 10
00407 | 
00408 |     table = LongTable(data, colWidths=col_widths, repeatRows=1)
00409 |     style = [
00410 |         ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.HexColor("#E6E6E6")),
00411 |         ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (-1, 0), "Helvetica-Bold"),
00412 |         ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8),
00413 |         ("FONTNAME", (0, 1), (-1, -1), "Helvetica"),
00414 |         ("FONTSIZE", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 7),
00415 |         ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.25, colors.HexColor("#CFCFCF")),
00416 |         ("VALIGN", (0, 0), (-1, -1), "TOP"),
00417 |         ("ROWBACKGROUNDS", (0, 1), (-1, -1), [colors.white, colors.HexColor("#F7F7F7")]),
00418 |         ("ALIGN", (4, 1), (4, -1), "RIGHT"),
00419 |         ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 4),
00420 |         ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 4),
00421 |         ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 3),
00422 |         ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 3),
00423 |     ]
00424 | 
00425 |     # center flags
00426 |     style.append(("ALIGN", (align_center_range[0], 1), (align_center_range[1], -1), "CENTER"))
00427 |     # left-align the last 'otros' like original
00428 |     style.append(("ALIGN", (align_left_index, 1), (align_left_index, -1), "LEFT"))
00429 | 
00430 |     table.setStyle(TableStyle(style))
00431 | 
00432 |     story.append(table)
00433 |     doc.build(story)
00434 |     return out.getvalue()

00438 |     return export_pdf_generic(title_lines, df_export, FOCUS_EXPORT_COLS)

00018 | def _qp_get(key: str, default: str = "") -> str:
00019 |     try:
00020 |         qp = st.query_params  # Streamlit moderno
00021 |         v = qp.get(key, default)
00022 |         if isinstance(v, list):
00023 |             return v[0] if v else default
00024 |         return v if v is not None else default
00025 |     except Exception:
00026 |         qp = st.experimental_get_query_params()
00027 |         v = qp.get(key, [default])
00028 |         return v[0] if isinstance(v, list) and v else default

00032 |     s = (s or "").strip().lower()
00033 |     return s in {"1", "true", "t", "si", "sí", "y", "yes"}

00036 | def _infer_runtime_env() -> str:
00037 |     raw = (
00038 |         os.getenv("STOCKZERO_RUNTIME_ENV", "")
00039 |         or os.getenv("APP_ENV", "")
00040 |         or os.getenv("ENV", "")
00041 |     ).strip().lower()

00043 |         return raw
00044 |     if any(os.getenv(k) for k in ("IS_STREAMLIT_CLOUD", "STREAMLIT_RUNTIME", "STREAMLIT_CLOUD")):
00045 |         return "public"
00046 |     if os.name == "nt":
00047 |         return "local"

00055 | def _ensure_run_context() -> None:

00057 |     stamp = int(time.time() * 1000) % 1000000

00064 | def _dbg(msg: str, tag: str = "UI", **kv) -> None:
00065 |     global DEBUG
00066 |     ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%H:%M:%S.%f")[:-3]
00067 |     ctx = {
00068 |         "run_id": st.session_state.get("_run_id", "-"),
00069 |         "env": st.session_state.get("_runtime_env", "-"),
00070 |         "path": st.session_state.get("_run_path", "-"),
00071 |         "mode": st.session_state.get("home_mode", "-"),
00072 |     }
00073 |     payload = {**ctx, **kv}
00074 |     extra = " ".join([f"{k}={v}" for k, v in payload.items()]) if payload else ""
00075 |     line = f"{ts} | {tag} | {msg}" + (f" | {extra}" if extra else "")
00076 | 
00077 |     try:
00078 |         logger.info("DBG %s", line)
00079 |     except Exception:
00080 |         pass
00081 | 
00082 |     if not DEBUG:
00083 |         return
00084 | 
00085 |     st.session_state.setdefault("_dbg_lines", [])
00086 |     st.session_state["_dbg_lines"].append(line)
00087 | 
00088 |     if len(st.session_state["_dbg_lines"]) > 250:
00089 |         st.session_state["_dbg_lines"] = st.session_state["_dbg_lines"][-250:]
00090 | 
00091 |     st.session_state["_dbg_last"] = f"{tag} | {msg}"
00092 | 
00093 | def _dbg_block() -> None:
00094 |     global DEBUG
00095 |     if not DEBUG:
00096 |         return
00097 |     st.sidebar.markdown("### 🛠 DEBUG")
00098 |     st.sidebar.caption(f"Último paso: {st.session_state.get('_dbg_last', '-')}")
00099 |     with st.sidebar.expander("Trace (últimos 250)", expanded=False):
00100 |         st.sidebar.code("\n".join(st.session_state.get("_dbg_lines", [])))
00101 | 
00102 | 
00103 | def _timed(label: str, tag: str = "UI"):
00104 |     class _T:
00105 |         def __enter__(self_):
00106 |             self_.t0 = time.perf_counter()
00107 |             _dbg(f"START {label}", tag=tag)
00108 |             return self_
00109 | 
00110 |         def __exit__(self_, exc_type, exc, tb):
00111 |             ms = round((time.perf_counter() - self_.t0) * 1000.0, 3)
00112 |             if exc_type is None:
00113 |                 _dbg(f"OK {label}", tag=tag, ms=ms)
00114 |             else:
00115 |                 _dbg(f"ERR {label}", tag=tag, ms=ms, exc=str(exc_type.__name__))
00116 |             return False
00117 | 
00118 |     return _T()
00119 |

00121 | FOCO_OPTIONS = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
00122 | 
00123 | 
00124 | def _normalize_focos_ui(value) -> list[str]:
00125 |     if value is None:
00126 |         raw = []
00127 |     elif isinstance(value, str):
00128 |         raw = [x.strip() for x in value.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
00129 |     else:
00130 |         raw = [str(x).strip() for x in value if str(x).strip()]
00131 | 
00132 |     out = []
00133 |     for x in raw:
00134 |         if x in FOCO_OPTIONS and x not in out:
00135 |             out.append(x)
00136 |     return out

00139 | def _foco_label(value) -> str:
00140 |     focos = _normalize_focos_ui(value)
00141 |     return "Todo" if not focos else " | ".join(focos)

00144 | def _render_kpi_cards(kpis_row: dict | None) -> None:

00146 |         "Venta 0": int((kpis_row or {}).get("venta_0") or 0),

00150 |     }

00153 |         ("Venta 0", values["Venta 0"], "Productos sin rotación"),
00154 |         ("Negativo", values["Negativo"], "Ajustar inventario"),
00155 |         ("Quiebres", values["Quiebres"], "Solicitar empuje"),
00156 |         ("Otros", values["Otros"], "Observación cliente"),
00157 |     ]

00160 |         """

00201 |         f'<div class="sz-kpi-card">'
00202 |         f'<div class="sz-kpi-title">{title}</div>'
00203 |         f'<div class="sz-kpi-body">'

00205 |         f'<div class="sz-kpi-desc">{desc}</div>'
00206 |         f'</div>'
00207 |         f'</div>'
00208 |         for title, value, desc in cards
00209 |     )

00213 | 
00214 | def _scope_value_or_none(value: str | None, all_token: str = "Todos") -> str | None:
00215 |     if value is None:
00216 |         return None
00217 |     v = str(value).strip()
00218 |     if not v:
00219 |         return None
00220 |     if v.upper() == str(all_token).strip().upper():
00221 |         return None
00222 |     if v.upper() == "— SELECCIONA TIPO —".upper():
00223 |         return None
00224 |     return v
00225 | 
00226 | 
00227 | def _df_total_rows(df: pd.DataFrame | None) -> int:
00228 |     if df is None or df.empty or "total_rows" not in df.columns:
00229 |         return 0
00230 |     try:
00231 |         return int(df["total_rows"].iloc[0] or 0)
00232 |     except Exception:
00233 |         return 0
00234 | 
00235 | 
00236 | def _drop_total_rows(df: pd.DataFrame | None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00237 |     if df is None:
00238 |         return pd.DataFrame()
00239 |     return df.drop(columns=["total_rows"], errors="ignore").copy()

00726 |         def _get_page_state(page_key: str, page_size: int = 25) -> tuple[int, int]:
00727 |             input_key = f"{page_key}_ui"
00728 | 
00729 |             st.session_state.setdefault(page_key, 1)
00730 |             st.session_state.setdefault(input_key, 1)
00731 | 
00732 |             try:
00733 |                 current_page = int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1))
00734 |             except Exception:
00735 |                 current_page = 1
00736 | 
00737 |             current_page = max(1, current_page)
00738 |             st.session_state[page_key] = current_page
00739 | 
00740 |             if int(st.session_state.get(input_key, current_page)) != current_page:
00741 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = current_page
00742 | 
00743 |             return current_page, (current_page - 1) * page_size
00744 | 
00745 |         def _render_scope_pager(page_key: str, total_rows: int, page_size: int = 25):
00746 |             input_key = f"{page_key}_ui"
00747 |             total_pages = max(1, int(math.ceil(total_rows / page_size))) if total_rows > 0 else 1
00748 | 
00749 |             if int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) > total_pages:
00750 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = total_pages
00751 |             if int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) < 1:
00752 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = 1
00753 | 
00754 |             current_page = int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1))
00755 |             if int(st.session_state.get(input_key, current_page)) != current_page:
00756 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = current_page
00757 | 
00758 |             def _prev():
00759 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = max(1, int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) - 1)
00760 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = st.session_state[page_key]
00761 | 
00762 |             def _next():
00763 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = min(total_pages, int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) + 1)
00764 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = st.session_state[page_key]
00765 | 
00766 |             def _from_input():
00767 |                 try:
00768 |                     new_page = int(st.session_state.get(input_key, 1))
00769 |                 except Exception:
00770 |                     new_page = 1
00771 |                 new_page = max(1, min(total_pages, new_page))
00772 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = new_page
00773 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = new_page
00774 | 
00775 |             if total_rows:
00776 |                 start = (current_page - 1) * page_size + 1
00777 |                 end = min(current_page * page_size, total_rows)
00778 |                 pager_text = f"{start}-{end} de {total_rows} registros"
00779 |             else:
00780 |                 pager_text = "Sin filas para el filtro aplicado."
00781 | 
00782 |             p1, p2, p3, p4 = st.columns([0.9, 1.3, 0.9, 2.2], gap="small")
00783 | 
00784 |             with p1:
00785 |                 st.button(
00786 |                     "◀",
00787 |                     key=f"{page_key}_prev_btn",
00788 |                     disabled=(current_page <= 1),
00789 |                     on_click=_prev,
00790 |                     use_container_width=True,
00791 |                 )
00792 | 
00793 |             with p2:
00794 |                 st.number_input(
00795 |                     "Página",
00796 |                     min_value=1,
00797 |                     max_value=max(1, total_pages),
00798 |                     step=1,
00799 |                     key=input_key,
00800 |                     on_change=_from_input,
00801 |                     label_visibility="collapsed",
00802 |                 )
00803 | 
00804 |             with p3:
00805 |                 st.button(
00806 |                     "▶",
00807 |                     key=f"{page_key}_next_btn",
00808 |                     disabled=(current_page >= total_pages),
00809 |                     on_click=_next,
00810 |                     use_container_width=True,
00811 |                 )
00812 | 
00813 |             with p4:
00814 |                 st.caption(pager_text)
00815 |

01176 |         def _cg_show(title: str, df: pd.DataFrame | None) -> None:
01177 |             st.markdown(f"#### {title}")
01178 |             if df is None or df.empty:
01179 |                 st.info("Sin filas para esta superficie del contrato B3.")
01180 |                 return

01862 |     def _row_indicadores(r) -> str:
01863 |         parts = []
01864 | 
01865 |         try:
01866 |             v = int(r.get("Venta(+7)", 0) or 0)
01867 |         except Exception:
01868 |             v = 0
01869 |         if v == 0:
01870 |             parts.append("Venta 0: Productos sin rotación (Prioridad Alta).")
01871 | 
01872 |         if str(r.get("NEGATIVO", "")).strip().upper() == "SI":
01873 |             parts.append("Negativo: Realizar ajuste de inventario.")
01874 | 
01875 |         if str(r.get("RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", "")).strip().upper() == "SI":
01876 |             parts.append("Quiebres: Solicitar empuje.")
01877 | 
01878 |         ot = str(r.get("OTROS", "") or "").strip()
01879 |         if ot and ot.upper() not in {"NO", "N/A", "NA", "-"}:
01880 |             parts.append("Otros: Observaciones cliente.")
01881 | 
01882 |         return " · ".join(parts)

00105 | @st.cache_data(ttl=ACTIVE_DB_URL_TTL, show_spinner=False)
00106 | def _get_active_db_url_cached() -> str:
00107 |     cache_sig = _sig("active_db_url")
00108 |     _set_mark("INFRA", "active_db_url", cache_sig)
00109 | 
00110 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00111 |     primary, fallback = _get_db_urls()
00112 |     selected = "none"
00113 | 
00114 |     if primary and _probe_pg(primary, target="primary"):
00115 |         selected = "primary"
00116 |         out = primary
00117 |     elif fallback and _probe_pg(fallback, target="fallback"):
00118 |         logger.warning("Usando DB_URL_FALLBACK (primary no responde).")
00119 |         selected = "fallback"
00120 |         out = fallback
00121 |     else:
00122 |         out = primary or (fallback or "")
00123 |         if primary:
00124 |             selected = "primary_unchecked"
00125 |         elif fallback:
00126 |             selected = "fallback_unchecked"
00127 | 
00128 |     _trace(
00129 |         "INFRA",
00130 |         "active_db_url_exec",
00131 |         active_db_url_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00132 |         selected=selected,
00133 |         fallback_present=bool(fallback),
00134 |         ttl=ACTIVE_DB_URL_TTL,
00135 |     )
00136 |     return out

00139 | class AppError(RuntimeError):
00140 |     pass
00141 | 
00142 | 
00143 | TRACE_STATE_KEY = "_stock_zero_trace"
00144 | 
00145 | 
00146 | def _safe_session_state():
00147 |     try:
00148 |         return st.session_state
00149 |     except Exception:
00150 |         return None
00151 | 
00152 | 
00153 | def _infer_runtime_env() -> str:
00154 |     raw = (
00155 |         os.getenv("STOCKZERO_RUNTIME_ENV", "")
00156 |         or os.getenv("APP_ENV", "")
00157 |         or os.getenv("ENV", "")
00158 |     ).strip().lower()
00159 |     if raw in {"local", "public"}:
00160 |         return raw
00161 |     if any(os.getenv(k) for k in ("IS_STREAMLIT_CLOUD", "STREAMLIT_RUNTIME", "STREAMLIT_CLOUD")):
00162 |         return "public"
00163 |     if os.name == "nt":
00164 |         return "local"
00165 |     if any(Path(p).exists() for p in ("/mount/src", "/home/appuser", "/home/adminuser")):
00166 |         return "public"
00167 |     if (os.getenv("USER", "") or os.getenv("USERNAME", "")).strip().lower() in {"appuser", "adminuser"}:
00168 |         return "public"
00169 |     return "public" if os.name != "nt" else "local"
00170 | 
00171 | 
00172 | def _trace_ctx() -> dict[str, Any]:
00173 |     ss = _safe_session_state()
00174 |     return {
00175 |         "run_id": (ss.get("_run_id") if ss is not None else None) or "-",
00176 |         "env": (ss.get("_runtime_env") if ss is not None else None) or _infer_runtime_env(),
00177 |         "path": (ss.get("_run_path") if ss is not None else None) or "-",
00178 |         "mode": (ss.get("home_mode") if ss is not None else None) or "-",
00179 |     }
00180 | 
00181 | 
00182 | def _fmt_ms(seconds: float) -> float:
00183 |     return round(seconds * 1000.0, 3)
00184 | 
00185 | 
00186 | def _trace(tag: str, event: str, **kv) -> None:
00187 |     payload = {**_trace_ctx(), **kv}
00188 |     extra = " ".join(f"{k}={v}" for k, v in payload.items())
00189 |     try:
00190 |         logger.info("TRACE %s | %s | %s", tag, event, extra)
00191 |     except Exception:
00192 |         pass
00193 | 
00194 | 
00195 | def _sig(*parts: Any) -> str:
00196 |     try:
00197 |         raw = json.dumps(parts, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, default=str)
00198 |     except Exception:
00199 |         raw = repr(parts)
00200 |     return hashlib.md5(raw.encode("utf-8", errors="ignore")).hexdigest()[:12]
00201 | 
00202 | 
00203 | def _trace_bucket() -> dict[str, Any]:
00204 |     ss = _safe_session_state()
00205 |     if ss is None:
00206 |         return {}
00207 |     bucket = ss.get(TRACE_STATE_KEY)
00208 |     if not isinstance(bucket, dict):
00209 |         bucket = {"marks": {}}
00210 |         ss[TRACE_STATE_KEY] = bucket
00211 |     if "marks" not in bucket or not isinstance(bucket["marks"], dict):
00212 |         bucket["marks"] = {}
00213 |     return bucket
00214 | 
00215 | 
00216 | def _get_mark(scope: str, name: str, sig: str) -> str | None:
00217 |     bucket = _trace_bucket()
00218 |     return bucket.get("marks", {}).get(f"{scope}:{name}:{sig}")
00219 | 
00220 | 
00221 | def _set_mark(scope: str, name: str, sig: str) -> str:
00222 |     bucket = _trace_bucket()
00223 |     stamp = str(time.time_ns())
00224 |     bucket.setdefault("marks", {})[f"{scope}:{name}:{sig}"] = stamp
00225 |     return stamp
00226 | 
00227 | 
00228 | # =========================================================
00229 | # 1) INFRA
00230 | # =========================================================
00231 | def _get_db_urls() -> tuple[str, str | None]:
00232 |     primary = (os.getenv("DB_URL_APP", "") or os.getenv("DB_URL", "")).strip()
00233 |     fallback = os.getenv("DB_URL_FALLBACK", "").strip() or None
00234 |     if not primary and not fallback:
00235 |         raise AppError(
00236 |             "Configuración incompleta: falta DB_URL_APP/DB_URL.\n"
00237 |             "Solución: agrega en tu .env una línea:\n"
00238 |             "DB_URL_APP=postgresql://USER:PASS@HOST:PORT/DB"
00239 |         )
00240 |     return primary, fallback
00241 | 
00242 | 
00243 | def _probe_pg(url: str, target: str = "primary") -> bool:
00244 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00245 |     if psycopg2 is None:
00246 |         _trace(
00247 |             "INFRA",
00248 |             "probe_pg",
00249 |             target=target,
00250 |             probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00251 |             ok=True,
00252 |             driver="psycopg2_missing",
00253 |         )
00254 |         return True
00255 | 
00256 |     timeout = int(os.getenv("CONNECT_TIMEOUT", "3"))
00257 |     try:
00258 |         with psycopg2.connect(url, connect_timeout=timeout) as conn:
00259 |             with conn.cursor() as cur:
00260 |                 cur.execute("SELECT 1;")
00261 |         ok = True
00262 |     except Exception as e:
00263 |         ok = False
00264 |         _trace(
00265 |             "INFRA",
00266 |             "probe_pg_err",
00267 |             target=target,
00268 |             probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00269 |             ok=ok,
00270 |             err=type(e).__name__,
00271 |         )
00272 |         return ok
00273 | 
00274 |     _trace("INFRA", "probe_pg", target=target, probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), ok=ok)
00275 |     return ok
00276 | 
00277 | 
00278 | def get_active_db_url() -> str:
00279 |     cache_sig = _sig("active_db_url")
00280 |     before = _get_mark("INFRA", "active_db_url", cache_sig)
00281 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00282 |     out = _get_active_db_url_cached()
00283 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("INFRA", "active_db_url", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00284 |     _trace("INFRA", "get_active_db_url", active_db_url_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), cache_state=cache_state)
00285 |     return out

00288 | @st.cache_resource(show_spinner=False)
00289 | def _engine_cached(db_url: str) -> Engine:
00290 |     cache_sig = _sig(db_url)
00291 |     _set_mark("INFRA", "engine", cache_sig)
00292 | 
00293 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00294 |     pool_size = int(os.getenv("POOL_SIZE", "15"))
00295 |     max_overflow = int(os.getenv("MAX_OVERFLOW", "30"))
00296 |     pool_timeout = int(os.getenv("POOL_TIMEOUT", "30"))
00297 |     pool_recycle = int(os.getenv("POOL_RECYCLE", "1800"))
00298 | 
00299 |     connect_timeout = int(os.getenv("CONNECT_TIMEOUT", "3"))
00300 |     stmt_timeout_ms = int(os.getenv("STATEMENT_TIMEOUT_MS", "15000"))
00301 | 
00302 |     connect_args: dict[str, Any] = {"connect_timeout": connect_timeout}
00303 |     if stmt_timeout_ms > 0:
00304 |         connect_args["options"] = f"-c statement_timeout={stmt_timeout_ms}"
00305 | 
00306 |     eng = create_engine(
00307 |         db_url,
00308 |         pool_size=pool_size,
00309 |         max_overflow=max_overflow,
00310 |         pool_timeout=pool_timeout,
00311 |         pool_recycle=pool_recycle,
00312 |         pool_pre_ping=True,
00313 |         future=True,
00314 |         connect_args=connect_args,
00315 |     )
00316 |     _trace(
00317 |         "INFRA",
00318 |         "engine_exec",
00319 |         engine_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00320 |         pool_size=pool_size,
00321 |         max_overflow=max_overflow,
00322 |         pool_timeout=pool_timeout,
00323 |         pool_recycle=pool_recycle,
00324 |         stmt_timeout_ms=stmt_timeout_ms,
00325 |     )
00326 |     return eng
00327 | 
00328 | 
00329 | def get_engine() -> Engine:
00330 |     db_url = get_active_db_url()
00331 |     cache_sig = _sig(db_url)
00332 |     before = _get_mark("INFRA", "engine", cache_sig)
00333 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00334 |     eng = _engine_cached(db_url)
00335 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("INFRA", "engine", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00336 |     _trace("INFRA", "get_engine", engine_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), cache_state=cache_state)
00337 |     return eng

00340 | @st.cache_data(ttl=DV_TTL, show_spinner=False)
00341 | def _get_data_version_info_cached() -> dict[str, Any]:
00342 |     cache_sig = _sig("data_version_info")
00343 |     _set_mark("DV", "data_version_info", cache_sig)
00344 | 
00345 |     eng = get_engine()
00346 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()

00349 |             t_sql = time.perf_counter()

00351 |             read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)

00355 |                     "fecha_datos": df.iloc[0].get("fecha_datos"),

00360 |         except Exception as e:

00363 |

00365 |             t_sql = time.perf_counter()

00370 |             _trace("DV", "get_data_version_info_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source=RESULT_VIEW)

00372 |         except Exception as e:
00373 |             logger.warning("No pude leer %s: %s", RESULT_VIEW, e)
00374 |             _trace("DV", "data_version_info_candidate_err", source=RESULT_VIEW, err=type(e).__name__)
00375 | 
00376 |     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_info_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source="none")
00377 |     return {"fecha_datos": None, "ingested_at": None}

00383 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()

00390 | @st.cache_data(ttl=300, show_spinner=False)
00391 | def _get_data_version_cached() -> str:
00392 |     cache_sig = _sig("data_version")
00393 |     _set_mark("DV", "data_version", cache_sig)
00394 | 
00395 |     eng = get_engine()
00396 |     candidates = [
00397 |         ("public.fact_stock_venta.ingested_at", "SELECT MAX(ingested_at) AS dv FROM public.fact_stock_venta;"),
00398 |         (RESULT_VIEW, f"SELECT MAX(fecha) AS dv FROM {RESULT_VIEW};"),
00399 |         ("public.v_data_version", "SELECT MAX(fecha_datos) AS dv FROM public.v_data_version;"),
00400 |     ]
00401 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00402 |     with eng.connect() as conn:
00403 |         for source, sql in candidates:
00404 |             try:
00405 |                 t_sql = time.perf_counter()
00406 |                 df = pd.read_sql(text(sql), conn)
00407 |                 read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)
00408 |                 dv = df.iloc[0]["dv"]
00409 |                 _trace("DV", "data_version_candidate", source=source, read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms, dv_found=dv is not None)
00410 |                 if dv is not None:
00411 |                     out = str(dv)
00412 |                     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source=source, dv=out)
00413 |                     return out
00414 |             except Exception as e:
00415 |                 _trace("DV", "data_version_candidate_err", source=source, err=type(e).__name__)
00416 |                 continue
00417 | 
00418 |     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source="none", dv="NA")
00419 |     return "NA"
00420 |

00422 | def _get_data_version_with_state() -> tuple[str, str]:
00423 |     cache_sig = _sig("data_version")
00424 |     before = _get_mark("DV", "data_version", cache_sig)
00425 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00426 |     out = _get_data_version_cached()
00427 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("DV", "data_version", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00428 |     _trace("DV", "get_data_version", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), cache_state=cache_state, dv=out)
00429 |     return out, cache_state

00432 | def get_data_version() -> str:
00433 |     out, _ = _get_data_version_with_state()

00437 | @st.cache_data(ttl=QDF_TTL, show_spinner=False)
00438 | def _qdf_cached(data_version: str, sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00439 |     cache_sig = _sig(data_version, sql, params or {})
00440 |     _set_mark("QUERY", "qdf", cache_sig)
00441 | 
00442 |     eng = get_engine()
00443 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00444 |     with eng.connect() as conn:
00445 |         t_sql = time.perf_counter()
00446 |         df = pd.read_sql(text(sql), conn, params=params)
00447 |         read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)
00448 | 
00449 |     total_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0)
00450 |     _trace(
00451 |         "QUERY",
00452 |         "qdf_exec",
00453 |         dv_sig=_sig(data_version),
00454 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00455 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00456 |         rows=len(df),
00457 |         read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00458 |         qdf_total_ms=total_ms,
00459 |         page_read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00460 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00461 |     )
00462 |     _trace(
00463 |         "PAGE",
00464 |         "page_exec",
00465 |         dv_sig=_sig(data_version),
00466 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00467 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00468 |         rows=len(df),
00469 |         page_read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00470 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00471 |     )
00472 |     return df
00473 | 
00474 | 
00475 | def qdf(sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00476 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00477 |     dv, dv_state = _get_data_version_with_state()
00478 |     cache_sig = _sig(dv, sql, params or {})
00479 |     before = _get_mark("QUERY", "qdf", cache_sig)
00480 |     df = _qdf_cached(dv, sql, params)
00481 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("QUERY", "qdf", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00482 |     total_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0)
00483 |     _trace(
00484 |         "QUERY",
00485 |         "qdf",
00486 |         dv_sig=_sig(dv),
00487 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00488 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00489 |         rows=0 if df is None else len(df),
00490 |         qdf_total_ms=total_ms,
00491 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00492 |         cache_state=cache_state,
00493 |         dv_state=dv_state,
00494 |     )
00495 |     _trace(
00496 |         "PAGE",
00497 |         "page",
00498 |         dv_sig=_sig(dv),
00499 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00500 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00501 |         rows=0 if df is None else len(df),
00502 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00503 |         cache_state=cache_state,
00504 |         dv_state=dv_state,
00505 |     )
00506 |     return df

00509 | @st.cache_data(ttl=SELECTOR_TTL, show_spinner=False)
00510 | def _selector_df_cached(name: str, sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00511 |     cache_sig = _sig(name, sql, params or {})
00512 |     _set_mark("SELECTOR", name, cache_sig)
00513 | 
00514 |     eng = get_engine()
00515 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00516 |     with eng.connect() as conn:
00517 |         t_sql = time.perf_counter()
00518 |         df = pd.read_sql(text(sql), conn, params=params)
00519 |         read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)
00520 | 
00521 |     total_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0)
00522 |     _trace(
00523 |         "SELECTOR",
00524 |         "selector_exec",
00525 |         selector=name,
00526 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00527 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00528 |         rows=len(df),
00529 |         selector_read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00530 |         selector_total_ms=total_ms,
00531 |         dv_state="not_used",
00532 |     )
00533 |     return df
00534 | 
00535 | 
00536 | def _selector_df(name: str, sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00537 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00538 |     cache_sig = _sig(name, sql, params or {})
00539 |     before = _get_mark("SELECTOR", name, cache_sig)
00540 |     df = _selector_df_cached(name, sql, params)
00541 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("SELECTOR", name, cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00542 |     _trace(
00543 |         "SELECTOR",
00544 |         name,
00545 |         selector=name,
00546 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00547 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00548 |         rows=0 if df is None else len(df),
00549 |         selector_total_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0),
00550 |         cache_state=cache_state,
00551 |         dv_state="not_used",
00552 |     )
00553 |     return df
00554 | 
00555 | 
00556 | # =========================================================
00557 | # 2) HELPERS DE SCOPE / FILTROS
00558 | # =========================================================
00559 | def _modalidad_clause(modalidad: str | None, field: str = "rr.modalidad") -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00560 |     if modalidad and str(modalidad).strip():
00561 |         return (
00562 |             f" AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({field}, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:modalidad, '')))",
00563 |             {"modalidad": str(modalidad).strip()},
00564 |         )
00565 |     return "", {}
00566 | 
00567 | 
00568 | def _build_result_filters(
00569 |     marcas: list[str] | None,
00570 |     search: str,
00571 |     foco: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None,
00572 |     alias: str = "",
00573 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00574 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
00575 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
00576 |     filters: list[str] = []
00577 | 
00578 |     if marcas:
00579 |         filters.append(f'AND {pfx}"MARCA" = ANY(:marcas)')
00580 |         params["marcas"] = marcas
00581 | 
00582 |     valid_focos = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
00583 | 
00584 |     if isinstance(foco, str):
00585 |         raw_focos = [x.strip() for x in foco.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
00586 |     elif foco is None:
00587 |         raw_focos = []
00588 |     else:
00589 |         raw_focos = [str(x).strip() for x in foco if str(x).strip()]
00590 | 
00591 |     focos = []
00592 |     for item in raw_focos:
00593 |         if item in valid_focos and item not in focos:
00594 |             focos.append(item)
00595 | 
00596 |     if focos:
00597 |         foco_clauses: list[str] = []
00598 | 
00599 |         if "Venta 0" in focos:
00600 |             foco_clauses.append(f'COALESCE({pfx}"Venta(+7)", 0) = 0')
00601 | 
00602 |         if "Negativo" in focos:
00603 |             foco_clauses.append(f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}\"NEGATIVO\", ''))) = 'SI'")
00604 | 
00605 |         if "Quiebres" in focos:
00606 |             foco_clauses.append(f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}\"RIESGO DE QUIEBRE\", ''))) = 'SI'")
00607 | 
00608 |         if "Otros" in focos:
00609 |             foco_clauses.append(
00610 |                 f"""
00611 |                 (
00612 |                     NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}"OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00613 |                     AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}"OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00614 |                 )
00615 |                 """
00616 |             )
00617 | 
00618 |         if foco_clauses:
00619 |             filters.append("AND (" + " OR ".join(f"({c})" for c in foco_clauses) + ")")
00620 | 
00621 |     s = (search or "").strip()
00622 |     if len(s) >= 2:
00623 |         filters.append(
00624 |             f"""
00625 |             AND (
00626 |                 CAST({pfx}"Sku" AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
00627 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}"Descripción del Producto", '') ILIKE :q
00628 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}"MARCA", '') ILIKE :q
00629 |             )
00630 |             """
00631 |         )
00632 |         params["q"] = f"%{s}%"
00633 | 
00634 |     return "\n".join(filters), params
00635 | 
00636 | 
00637 | 
00638 | def _rr_scope_exists(alias: str = "v", modalidad: str | None = None) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00639 |     modalidad_sql, modalidad_params = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "rr.modalidad")
00640 |     sql = f"""
00641 |         EXISTS (
00642 |             SELECT 1
00643 |             FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
00644 |             WHERE rr.cod_rt = {alias}.cod_rt
00645 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00646 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00647 |               {modalidad_sql}
00648 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({alias}."MARCA", '')))
00649 |         )
00650 |     """
00651 |     return sql, modalidad_params
00652 |

00654 | # =========================================================
00655 | # 3) SELECTORES / CONTEXTO DESDE RUTA_RUTERO
00656 | # =========================================================
00657 | def get_rutero_reponedor() -> pd.DataFrame:
00658 |     return qdf(f"""
00659 |         SELECT DISTINCT
00660 |             TRIM(rutero) AS rutero,
00661 |             TRIM(reponedor) AS reponedor
00662 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00663 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00664 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00665 |         ORDER BY rutero, reponedor
00666 |     """)
00667 | 
00668 | 
00669 | def get_locales(rutero: str, reponedor: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
00670 |     return qdf(f"""
00671 |         SELECT DISTINCT
00672 |             cod_rt,
00673 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt) AS nombre_local_rr
00674 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00675 |         WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00676 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00677 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cod_rt, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00678 |         ORDER BY cod_rt, nombre_local_rr
00679 |     """, {"rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor})

00681 | 
00682 | def get_contexto_local(
00683 |     rutero: str,
00684 |     reponedor: str,
00685 |     cod_rt: str,
00686 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
00687 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
00688 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "modalidad")
00689 |     sql = f"""
00690 |         SELECT
00691 |             cod_rt,
00692 |             MAX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt)) AS nombre_local_rr,
00693 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), '')) AS clientes,
00694 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), '')) AS modalidades,
00695 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), '')) AS mercaderistas
00696 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00697 |         WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
00698 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00699 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00700 |           {modalidad_sql}
00701 |         GROUP BY cod_rt
00702 |     """
00703 |     params = {
00704 |         "rutero": rutero,
00705 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
00706 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00707 |         **extra,
00708 |     }
00709 |     return _selector_df("get_contexto_local", sql, params)

00810 | def get_marcas_local(cod_rt: str) -> list[str]:

00820 | def get_marcas(
00821 |     rutero: str,
00822 |     reponedor: str,
00823 |     cod_rt: str,
00824 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
00825 | ) -> list[str]:
00826 |     exists_sql, extra = _rr_scope_exists("v", modalidad=modalidad)
00827 |     df = qdf(f"""
00828 |         SELECT DISTINCT v."MARCA" AS marca
00829 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00830 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00831 |           AND {exists_sql}
00832 |         ORDER BY marca
00833 |     """, {
00834 |         "rutero": rutero,
00835 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
00836 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00837 |         **extra,
00838 |     })
00839 |     return df["marca"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []

00841 | 
00842 | def get_kpis_local_home(cod_rt: str, marcas: list[str] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00843 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search="", foco="Todo", alias="v")
00844 |     return qdf(f"""
00845 |         SELECT
00846 |             MAX(v.fecha) AS fecha_stock,
00847 |             COUNT(*)::int AS total_skus,
00848 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(v."Venta(+7)", 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS venta_0,
00849 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."NEGATIVO", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS negativos,
00850 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS quiebres,
00851 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE
00852 |                 WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00853 |                  AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00854 |                 THEN 1 ELSE 0
00855 |             END), 0)::int AS otros
00856 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00857 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00858 |         {where_extra}
00859 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, **p2})

00862 | def get_kpis_local(
00863 |     rutero: str,
00864 |     reponedor: str,
00865 |     cod_rt: str,
00866 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
00867 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
00868 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
00869 |     exists_sql, extra = _rr_scope_exists("v", modalidad=modalidad)
00870 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search="", foco="Todo", alias="v")
00871 |     return qdf(f"""
00872 |         SELECT
00873 |             MAX(v.fecha) AS fecha_stock,
00874 |             COUNT(*)::int AS total_skus,
00875 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(v."Venta(+7)", 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS venta_0,
00876 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."NEGATIVO", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS negativos,
00877 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS quiebres,
00878 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE
00879 |                 WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00880 |                  AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00881 |                 THEN 1 ELSE 0
00882 |             END), 0)::int AS otros
00883 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00884 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00885 |           AND {exists_sql}
00886 |           {where_extra}
00887 |     """, {
00888 |         "rutero": rutero,
00889 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
00890 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00891 |         **extra,
00892 |         **p2,
00893 |     })

00896 | def get_tabla_ux_total_home(
00897 |     cod_rt: str,
00898 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
00899 |     foco: str = "Todo",
00900 |     search: str = "",
00901 | ) -> int:
00902 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search, foco, alias="v")
00903 |     df = qdf(f"""
00904 |         SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total
00905 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00906 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00907 |         {where_extra}
00908 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, **p2})
00909 |     return int(df.iloc[0]["total"]) if df is not None and not df.empty else 0

00911 | 
00912 | def get_tabla_ux_page_home(
00913 |     cod_rt: str,
00914 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
00915 |     page: int = 1,
00916 |     page_size: int = 25,
00917 |     foco: str = "Todo",
00918 |     search: str = "",
00919 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
00920 |     page = max(int(page or 1), 1)
00921 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search, foco, alias="v")
00922 |     return qdf(f"""
00923 |         SELECT
00924 |           v.fecha,
00925 |           v."MARCA", v."Sku", v."Descripción del Producto",
00926 |           v."Stock", v."Venta(+7)", v."NEGATIVO", v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", v."OTROS"
00927 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00928 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00929 |         {where_extra}
00930 |         ORDER BY
00931 |           v."MARCA" ASC,
00932 |           CASE WHEN v."Sku" ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
00933 |           CASE WHEN v."Sku" ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN (v."Sku")::bigint END ASC NULLS LAST,
00934 |           v."Sku" ASC,
00935 |           v."Descripción del Producto" ASC
00936 |         LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
00937 |     """, {
00938 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00939 |         "limit": int(page_size),
00940 |         "offset": (page - 1) * int(page_size),
00941 |         **p2,
00942 |     })

00957 |           v."Stock", v."Venta(+7)", v."NEGATIVO", v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", v."OTROS"

00960 |         {where_extra}
