00064 | def _dbg(msg: str, tag: str = "UI", **kv) -> None:
00065 |     global DEBUG
00066 |     ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%H:%M:%S.%f")[:-3]
00067 |     ctx = {
00068 |         "run_id": st.session_state.get("_run_id", "-"),
00069 |         "env": st.session_state.get("_runtime_env", "-"),
00070 |         "path": st.session_state.get("_run_path", "-"),
00071 |         "mode": st.session_state.get("home_mode", "-"),
00072 |     }
00073 |     payload = {**ctx, **kv}
00074 |     extra = " ".join([f"{k}={v}" for k, v in payload.items()]) if payload else ""
00075 |     line = f"{ts} | {tag} | {msg}" + (f" | {extra}" if extra else "")
00076 | 
00077 |     try:
00078 |         logger.info("DBG %s", line)
00079 |     except Exception:
00080 |         pass
00081 | 
00082 |     if not DEBUG:
00083 |         return
00084 | 
00085 |     st.session_state.setdefault("_dbg_lines", [])
00086 |     st.session_state["_dbg_lines"].append(line)
00087 | 
00088 |     if len(st.session_state["_dbg_lines"]) > 250:
00089 |         st.session_state["_dbg_lines"] = st.session_state["_dbg_lines"][-250:]
00090 | 
00091 |     st.session_state["_dbg_last"] = f"{tag} | {msg}"
00092 | 
00093 | def _dbg_block() -> None:
00094 |     global DEBUG
00095 |     if not DEBUG:
00096 |         return
00097 |     st.sidebar.markdown("### 🛠 DEBUG")
00098 |     st.sidebar.caption(f"Último paso: {st.session_state.get('_dbg_last', '-')}")
00099 |     with st.sidebar.expander("Trace (últimos 250)", expanded=False):
00100 |         st.sidebar.code("\n".join(st.session_state.get("_dbg_lines", [])))

00102 | 
00103 | def _timed(label: str, tag: str = "UI"):
00104 |     class _T:
00105 |         def __enter__(self_):
00106 |             self_.t0 = time.perf_counter()
00107 |             _dbg(f"START {label}", tag=tag)
00108 |             return self_
00109 | 
00110 |         def __exit__(self_, exc_type, exc, tb):
00111 |             ms = round((time.perf_counter() - self_.t0) * 1000.0, 3)
00112 |             if exc_type is None:
00113 |                 _dbg(f"OK {label}", tag=tag, ms=ms)
00114 |             else:
00115 |                 _dbg(f"ERR {label}", tag=tag, ms=ms, exc=str(exc_type.__name__))
00116 |             return False
00117 | 
00118 |     return _T()

00124 | def _normalize_focos_ui(value) -> list[str]:
00125 |     if value is None:
00126 |         raw = []
00127 |     elif isinstance(value, str):
00128 |         raw = [x.strip() for x in value.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
00129 |     else:
00130 |         raw = [str(x).strip() for x in value if str(x).strip()]
00131 | 
00132 |     out = []
00133 |     for x in raw:
00134 |         if x in FOCO_OPTIONS and x not in out:
00135 |             out.append(x)
00136 |     return out

00227 | def _df_total_rows(df: pd.DataFrame | None) -> int:
00228 |     if df is None or df.empty or "total_rows" not in df.columns:
00229 |         return 0
00230 |     try:
00231 |         return int(df["total_rows"].iloc[0] or 0)
00232 |     except Exception:
00233 |         return 0

00237 |     if df is None:
00238 |         return pd.DataFrame()
00239 |     return df.drop(columns=["total_rows"], errors="ignore").copy()

00755 |         def _get_page_state(page_key: str, page_size: int = 25) -> tuple[int, int]:
00756 |             input_key = f"{page_key}_ui"
00757 | 
00758 |             st.session_state.setdefault(page_key, 1)
00759 |             st.session_state.setdefault(input_key, 1)
00760 | 
00761 |             try:
00762 |                 current_page = int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1))
00763 |             except Exception:
00764 |                 current_page = 1
00765 | 
00766 |             current_page = max(1, current_page)
00767 |             st.session_state[page_key] = current_page
00768 | 
00769 |             if int(st.session_state.get(input_key, current_page)) != current_page:
00770 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = current_page
00771 | 
00772 |             return current_page, (current_page - 1) * page_size
00773 | 
00774 |         def _render_scope_pager(page_key: str, total_rows: int, page_size: int = 25):
00775 |             input_key = f"{page_key}_ui"
00776 |             total_pages = max(1, int(math.ceil(total_rows / page_size))) if total_rows > 0 else 1
00777 | 
00778 |             if int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) > total_pages:
00779 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = total_pages
00780 |             if int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) < 1:
00781 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = 1
00782 | 
00783 |             current_page = int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1))
00784 |             if int(st.session_state.get(input_key, current_page)) != current_page:
00785 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = current_page
00786 | 
00787 |             def _prev():
00788 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = max(1, int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) - 1)
00789 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = st.session_state[page_key]
00790 | 
00791 |             def _next():
00792 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = min(total_pages, int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) + 1)
00793 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = st.session_state[page_key]
00794 | 
00795 |             def _from_input():
00796 |                 try:
00797 |                     new_page = int(st.session_state.get(input_key, 1))
00798 |                 except Exception:
00799 |                     new_page = 1
00800 |                 new_page = max(1, min(total_pages, new_page))
00801 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = new_page
00802 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = new_page
00803 | 
00804 |             if total_rows:
00805 |                 start = (current_page - 1) * page_size + 1
00806 |                 end = min(current_page * page_size, total_rows)
00807 |                 pager_text = f"{start}-{end} de {total_rows} registros"
00808 |             else:
00809 |                 pager_text = "Sin filas para el filtro aplicado."
00810 | 
00811 |             p1, p2, p3, p4 = st.columns([0.9, 1.3, 0.9, 2.2], gap="small")
00812 | 
00813 |             with p1:
00814 |                 st.button(
00815 |                     "◀",
00816 |                     key=f"{page_key}_prev_btn",
00817 |                     disabled=(current_page <= 1),
00818 |                     on_click=_prev,
00819 |                     use_container_width=True,
00820 |                 )
00821 | 
00822 |             with p2:
00823 |                 st.number_input(
00824 |                     "Página",
00825 |                     min_value=1,
00826 |                     max_value=max(1, total_pages),
00827 |                     step=1,
00828 |                     key=input_key,
00829 |                     on_change=_from_input,
00830 |                     label_visibility="collapsed",
00831 |                 )
00832 | 
00833 |             with p3:
00834 |                 st.button(
00835 |                     "▶",
00836 |                     key=f"{page_key}_next_btn",
00837 |                     disabled=(current_page >= total_pages),
00838 |                     on_click=_next,
00839 |                     use_container_width=True,
00840 |                 )
00841 | 
00842 |             with p4:
00843 |                 st.caption(pager_text)
00844 | 
00845 |         def _render_rr_people_context():
00846 |             if scope_level not in {"L2", "L3"}:
00847 |                 return
00848 |             if not responsable_tipo_sel or not responsable_sel:
00849 |                 return
00850 | 
00851 |             try:
00852 |                 with _timed("PAGE rr_people_scope", tag="PAGE"):
00853 |                     rr_people = db.get_rr_people_scope(
00854 |                         tipo=responsable_tipo_sel,
00855 |                         responsable=responsable_sel,
00856 |                         marca=marca_ap,
00857 |                         cliente=cliente_sel,
00858 |                     )
00859 |                     _dbg("CLIENTE rr_people loaded", rows=0 if rr_people is None else len(rr_people))
00860 |                     _dbg_block()
00861 |             except Exception as e:

00880 |         def _scope_file_token() -> str:
00881 |             raw = responsable_sel or cliente_sel or "scope"
00882 |             token = "".join(ch if str(ch).isalnum() else "_" for ch in str(raw))
00883 |             token = token.strip("_")
00884 |             return token[:60] or "scope"
00885 |

00887 |             if scope_level not in {"L2", "L3"}:
00888 |                 return

00910 |             def _split_pipe_values(value) -> list[str]:
00911 |                 raw = str(value or "").strip()
00912 |                 if not raw:
00913 |                     return []
00914 |                 return [part.strip() for part in raw.split("|") if part.strip()]
00915 | 
00916 |             def _match_multi_value(value, target: str | None) -> bool:
00917 |                 if not target:
00918 |                     return True
00919 |                 return str(target).strip().upper() in {x.upper() for x in _split_pipe_values(value)}

02091 |     def _page_prev():

02099 |     def _page_from_input():
02100 |         try:
02101 |             new_page = int(st.session_state.get("page_input_ui", 1))
02102 |         except Exception:
02103 |             new_page = 1
02104 |

02106 |         st.session_state["page"] = new_page
02107 |         st.session_state["page_input_ui"] = new_page

02110 |     if current_page < 1:

02214 |     def _row_indicadores(r) -> str:
02215 |         parts = []
02216 | 
02217 |         try:
02218 |             v = int(r.get("Venta(+7)", 0) or 0)
02219 |         except Exception:
02220 |             v = 0
02221 |         if v == 0:
02222 |             parts.append("Venta 0: Productos sin rotación (Prioridad Alta).")
02223 | 
02224 |         if str(r.get("NEGATIVO", "")).strip().upper() == "SI":
02225 |             parts.append("Negativo: Realizar ajuste de inventario.")
02226 | 
02227 |         if str(r.get("RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", "")).strip().upper() == "SI":
02228 |             parts.append("Quiebres: Solicitar empuje.")
02229 | 
02230 |         ot = str(r.get("OTROS", "") or "").strip()
02231 |         if ot and ot.upper() not in {"NO", "N/A", "NA", "-"}:
02232 |             parts.append("Otros: Observaciones cliente.")
02233 | 
02234 |         return " · ".join(parts)
02235 | 
02236 |     if df_raw is not None and not df_raw.empty:
02237 |         df_tbl = df_raw.copy()
02238 | 
02239 |         if "fecha" in df_tbl.columns:
02240 |             df_tbl["FECHA STOCK"] = pd.to_datetime(df_tbl["fecha"], errors="coerce").dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
02241 |             df_tbl["FECHA STOCK"] = df_tbl["FECHA STOCK"].fillna("")
02242 |         else:
02243 |             df_tbl["FECHA STOCK"] = ""
02244 | 
02245 |         df_tbl["INDICADORES"] = df_tbl.apply(_row_indicadores, axis=1)
02246 |         df_tbl = df_tbl.rename(columns={
02247 |             "MARCA": "CLIENTE",
02248 |             "Sku": "SKU",
02249 |             "Descripción del Producto": "PRODUCTO",
02250 |         })
02251 |         df_tbl = df_tbl[["FECHA STOCK", "CLIENTE", "SKU", "PRODUCTO", "Stock", "INDICADORES"]]
02252 |     else:
02253 |         df_tbl = df_raw
02254 | 
02255 |     st.dataframe(df_tbl, width="stretch", hide_index=True)
02256 |

02282 |     def _prepare_export(scope: str, fmt: str):
02283 |         if total_rows <= 0:
02284 |             return

02287 |         if fmt not in {"excel", "pdf"}:
02288 |             return

02296 |                         df_export_raw = db.get_tabla_ux_export_home(

02300 |                             search=search_ap,
02301 |                         )

02304 |                         df_export_raw = db.get_tabla_ux_export(
02305 |                             rutero=rutero,
02306 |                             reponedor=reponedor,
02307 |                             cod_rt=cod_rt,
02308 |                             marcas=marcas,
02309 |                             foco=foco_ap,
02310 |                             search=search_ap,

02317 |

02320 |                 st.error("No pude preparar export.")
02321 |                 st.code(repr(e))
02322 |                 if DEBUG:
02323 |                     st.code(traceback.format_exc())

02354 |                         ]

00105 | @st.cache_data(ttl=ACTIVE_DB_URL_TTL, show_spinner=False)
00106 | def _get_active_db_url_cached() -> str:
00107 |     cache_sig = _sig("active_db_url")
00108 |     _set_mark("INFRA", "active_db_url", cache_sig)
00109 | 
00110 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00111 |     primary, fallback = _get_db_urls()
00112 |     selected = "none"
00113 | 
00114 |     if primary and _probe_pg(primary, target="primary"):
00115 |         selected = "primary"
00116 |         out = primary
00117 |     elif fallback and _probe_pg(fallback, target="fallback"):
00118 |         logger.warning("Usando DB_URL_FALLBACK (primary no responde).")
00119 |         selected = "fallback"
00120 |         out = fallback
00121 |     else:
00122 |         out = primary or (fallback or "")
00123 |         if primary:
00124 |             selected = "primary_unchecked"
00125 |         elif fallback:
00126 |             selected = "fallback_unchecked"
00127 |

00129 |         "INFRA",
00130 |         "active_db_url_exec",
00131 |         active_db_url_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00132 |         selected=selected,
00133 |         fallback_present=bool(fallback),
00134 |         ttl=ACTIVE_DB_URL_TTL,
00135 |     )
00136 |     return out

00153 | def _infer_runtime_env() -> str:
00154 |     raw = (
00155 |         os.getenv("STOCKZERO_RUNTIME_ENV", "")
00156 |         or os.getenv("APP_ENV", "")
00157 |         or os.getenv("ENV", "")
00158 |     ).strip().lower()
00159 |     if raw in {"local", "public"}:
00160 |         return raw
00161 |     if any(os.getenv(k) for k in ("IS_STREAMLIT_CLOUD", "STREAMLIT_RUNTIME", "STREAMLIT_CLOUD")):
00162 |         return "public"
00163 |     if os.name == "nt":
00164 |         return "local"
00165 |     if any(Path(p).exists() for p in ("/mount/src", "/home/appuser", "/home/adminuser")):
00166 |         return "public"
00167 |     if (os.getenv("USER", "") or os.getenv("USERNAME", "")).strip().lower() in {"appuser", "adminuser"}:
00168 |         return "public"
00169 |     return "public" if os.name != "nt" else "local"

00172 | def _trace_ctx() -> dict[str, Any]:
00173 |     ss = _safe_session_state()
00174 |     return {
00175 |         "run_id": (ss.get("_run_id") if ss is not None else None) or "-",
00176 |         "env": (ss.get("_runtime_env") if ss is not None else None) or _infer_runtime_env(),
00177 |         "path": (ss.get("_run_path") if ss is not None else None) or "-",
00178 |         "mode": (ss.get("home_mode") if ss is not None else None) or "-",

00182 | def _fmt_ms(seconds: float) -> float:
00183 |     return round(seconds * 1000.0, 3)
00184 | 
00185 | 
00186 | def _trace(tag: str, event: str, **kv) -> None:
00187 |     payload = {**_trace_ctx(), **kv}
00188 |     extra = " ".join(f"{k}={v}" for k, v in payload.items())
00189 |     try:
00190 |         logger.info("TRACE %s | %s | %s", tag, event, extra)
00191 |     except Exception:
00192 |         pass

00194 | 
00195 | def _sig(*parts: Any) -> str:
00196 |     try:
00197 |         raw = json.dumps(parts, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, default=str)
00198 |     except Exception:
00199 |         raw = repr(parts)
00200 |     return hashlib.md5(raw.encode("utf-8", errors="ignore")).hexdigest()[:12]
00201 | 
00202 | 
00203 | def _trace_bucket() -> dict[str, Any]:
00204 |     ss = _safe_session_state()
00205 |     if ss is None:
00206 |         return {}
00207 |     bucket = ss.get(TRACE_STATE_KEY)
00208 |     if not isinstance(bucket, dict):
00209 |         bucket = {"marks": {}}
00210 |         ss[TRACE_STATE_KEY] = bucket
00211 |     if "marks" not in bucket or not isinstance(bucket["marks"], dict):
00212 |         bucket["marks"] = {}
00213 |     return bucket
00214 | 
00215 | 
00216 | def _get_mark(scope: str, name: str, sig: str) -> str | None:
00217 |     bucket = _trace_bucket()
00218 |     return bucket.get("marks", {}).get(f"{scope}:{name}:{sig}")
00219 | 
00220 | 
00221 | def _set_mark(scope: str, name: str, sig: str) -> str:
00222 |     bucket = _trace_bucket()
00223 |     stamp = str(time.time_ns())
00224 |     bucket.setdefault("marks", {})[f"{scope}:{name}:{sig}"] = stamp
00225 |     return stamp

00231 | def _get_db_urls() -> tuple[str, str | None]:
00232 |     primary = (os.getenv("DB_URL_APP", "") or os.getenv("DB_URL", "")).strip()
00233 |     fallback = os.getenv("DB_URL_FALLBACK", "").strip() or None
00234 |     if not primary and not fallback:
00235 |         raise AppError(
00236 |             "Configuración incompleta: falta DB_URL_APP/DB_URL.\n"
00237 |             "Solución: agrega en tu .env una línea:\n"
00238 |             "DB_URL_APP=postgresql://USER:PASS@HOST:PORT/DB"
00239 |         )
00240 |     return primary, fallback

00242 | 
00243 | def _probe_pg(url: str, target: str = "primary") -> bool:
00244 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00245 |     if psycopg2 is None:
00246 |         _trace(
00247 |             "INFRA",
00248 |             "probe_pg",
00249 |             target=target,
00250 |             probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00251 |             ok=True,
00252 |             driver="psycopg2_missing",
00253 |         )
00254 |         return True
00255 | 
00256 |     timeout = int(os.getenv("CONNECT_TIMEOUT", "3"))
00257 |     try:
00258 |         with psycopg2.connect(url, connect_timeout=timeout) as conn:
00259 |             with conn.cursor() as cur:
00260 |                 cur.execute("SELECT 1;")
00261 |         ok = True
00262 |     except Exception as e:
00263 |         ok = False
00264 |         _trace(
00265 |             "INFRA",
00266 |             "probe_pg_err",
00267 |             target=target,
00268 |             probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00269 |             ok=ok,
00270 |             err=type(e).__name__,
00271 |         )
00272 |         return ok
00273 | 
00274 |     _trace("INFRA", "probe_pg", target=target, probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), ok=ok)
00275 |     return ok

00278 | def get_active_db_url() -> str:
00279 |     cache_sig = _sig("active_db_url")
00280 |     before = _get_mark("INFRA", "active_db_url", cache_sig)
00281 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00282 |     out = _get_active_db_url_cached()
00283 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("INFRA", "active_db_url", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00284 |     _trace("INFRA", "get_active_db_url", active_db_url_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), cache_state=cache_state)
00285 |     return out

00288 | @st.cache_resource(show_spinner=False)
00289 | def _engine_cached(db_url: str) -> Engine:
00290 |     cache_sig = _sig(db_url)
00291 |     _set_mark("INFRA", "engine", cache_sig)
00292 | 
00293 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00294 |     pool_size = int(os.getenv("POOL_SIZE", "15"))
00295 |     max_overflow = int(os.getenv("MAX_OVERFLOW", "30"))
00296 |     pool_timeout = int(os.getenv("POOL_TIMEOUT", "30"))
00297 |     pool_recycle = int(os.getenv("POOL_RECYCLE", "1800"))
00298 | 
00299 |     connect_timeout = int(os.getenv("CONNECT_TIMEOUT", "3"))
00300 |     stmt_timeout_ms = int(os.getenv("STATEMENT_TIMEOUT_MS", "15000"))
00301 | 
00302 |     connect_args: dict[str, Any] = {"connect_timeout": connect_timeout}
00303 |     if stmt_timeout_ms > 0:
00304 |         connect_args["options"] = f"-c statement_timeout={stmt_timeout_ms}"
00305 | 
00306 |     eng = create_engine(
00307 |         db_url,
00308 |         pool_size=pool_size,
00309 |         max_overflow=max_overflow,
00310 |         pool_timeout=pool_timeout,
00311 |         pool_recycle=pool_recycle,
00312 |         pool_pre_ping=True,
00313 |         future=True,
00314 |         connect_args=connect_args,
00315 |     )
00316 |     _trace(
00317 |         "INFRA",
00318 |         "engine_exec",
00319 |         engine_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00320 |         pool_size=pool_size,
00321 |         max_overflow=max_overflow,
00322 |         pool_timeout=pool_timeout,
00323 |         pool_recycle=pool_recycle,
00324 |         stmt_timeout_ms=stmt_timeout_ms,
00325 |     )
00326 |     return eng

00330 |     db_url = get_active_db_url()

00335 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("INFRA", "engine", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00336 |     _trace("INFRA", "get_engine", engine_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), cache_state=cache_state)
00337 |     return eng

00343 |     _set_mark("DV", "data_version_info", cache_sig)

00375 | 
00376 |     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_info_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source="none")
00377 |     return {"fecha_datos": None, "ingested_at": None}

00386 |     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_info", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), cache_state=cache_state)
00387 |     return out
00388 | 
00389 | 
00390 | @st.cache_data(ttl=300, show_spinner=False)
00391 | def _get_data_version_cached() -> str:
00392 |     cache_sig = _sig("data_version")
00393 |     _set_mark("DV", "data_version", cache_sig)
00394 | 
00395 |     eng = get_engine()
00396 |     candidates = [
00397 |         ("public.fact_stock_venta.ingested_at", "SELECT MAX(ingested_at) AS dv FROM public.fact_stock_venta;"),
00398 |         (RESULT_VIEW, f"SELECT MAX(fecha) AS dv FROM {RESULT_VIEW};"),
00399 |         ("public.v_data_version", "SELECT MAX(fecha_datos) AS dv FROM public.v_data_version;"),
00400 |     ]
00401 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00402 |     with eng.connect() as conn:
00403 |         for source, sql in candidates:
00404 |             try:
00405 |                 t_sql = time.perf_counter()
00406 |                 df = pd.read_sql(text(sql), conn)
00407 |                 read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)
00408 |                 dv = df.iloc[0]["dv"]
00409 |                 _trace("DV", "data_version_candidate", source=source, read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms, dv_found=dv is not None)
00410 |                 if dv is not None:
00411 |                     out = str(dv)
00412 |                     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source=source, dv=out)
00413 |                     return out
00414 |             except Exception as e:
00415 |                 _trace("DV", "data_version_candidate_err", source=source, err=type(e).__name__)
00416 |                 continue
00417 | 
00418 |     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source="none", dv="NA")
00419 |     return "NA"
00420 | 
00421 | 
00422 | def _get_data_version_with_state() -> tuple[str, str]:
00423 |     cache_sig = _sig("data_version")
00424 |     before = _get_mark("DV", "data_version", cache_sig)
00425 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00426 |     out = _get_data_version_cached()
00427 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("DV", "data_version", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00428 |     _trace("DV", "get_data_version", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), cache_state=cache_state, dv=out)
00429 |     return out, cache_state
00430 | 
00431 | 
00432 | def get_data_version() -> str:
00433 |     out, _ = _get_data_version_with_state()
00434 |     return out
00435 | 
00436 | 
00437 | @st.cache_data(ttl=QDF_TTL, show_spinner=False)
00438 | def _qdf_cached(data_version: str, sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00439 |     cache_sig = _sig(data_version, sql, params or {})
00440 |     _set_mark("QUERY", "qdf", cache_sig)
00441 | 
00442 |     eng = get_engine()
00443 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00444 |     with eng.connect() as conn:
00445 |         t_sql = time.perf_counter()
00446 |         df = pd.read_sql(text(sql), conn, params=params)
00447 |         read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)
00448 | 
00449 |     total_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0)
00450 |     _trace(
00451 |         "QUERY",
00452 |         "qdf_exec",
00453 |         dv_sig=_sig(data_version),
00454 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00455 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00456 |         rows=len(df),
00457 |         read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00458 |         qdf_total_ms=total_ms,
00459 |         page_read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00460 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00461 |     )
00462 |     _trace(
00463 |         "PAGE",
00464 |         "page_exec",
00465 |         dv_sig=_sig(data_version),
00466 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00467 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00468 |         rows=len(df),
00469 |         page_read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00470 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00471 |     )
00472 |     return df
00473 | 
00474 | 
00475 | def qdf(sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00476 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00477 |     dv, dv_state = _get_data_version_with_state()
00478 |     cache_sig = _sig(dv, sql, params or {})
00479 |     before = _get_mark("QUERY", "qdf", cache_sig)
00480 |     df = _qdf_cached(dv, sql, params)
00481 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("QUERY", "qdf", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00482 |     total_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0)
00483 |     _trace(
00484 |         "QUERY",
00485 |         "qdf",
00486 |         dv_sig=_sig(dv),
00487 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00488 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00489 |         rows=0 if df is None else len(df),
00490 |         qdf_total_ms=total_ms,
00491 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00492 |         cache_state=cache_state,
00493 |         dv_state=dv_state,
00494 |     )
00495 |     _trace(
00496 |         "PAGE",
00497 |         "page",
00498 |         dv_sig=_sig(dv),
00499 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00500 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00501 |         rows=0 if df is None else len(df),
00502 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00503 |         cache_state=cache_state,
00504 |         dv_state=dv_state,
00505 |     )
00506 |     return df
00507 | 
00508 | 
00509 | @st.cache_data(ttl=SELECTOR_TTL, show_spinner=False)
00510 | def _selector_df_cached(name: str, sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00511 |     cache_sig = _sig(name, sql, params or {})
00512 |     _set_mark("SELECTOR", name, cache_sig)
00513 | 
00514 |     eng = get_engine()
00515 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00516 |     with eng.connect() as conn:
00517 |         t_sql = time.perf_counter()
00518 |         df = pd.read_sql(text(sql), conn, params=params)
00519 |         read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)
00520 | 
00521 |     total_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0)
00522 |     _trace(
00523 |         "SELECTOR",
00524 |         "selector_exec",
00525 |         selector=name,
00526 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00527 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00528 |         rows=len(df),
00529 |         selector_read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00530 |         selector_total_ms=total_ms,
00531 |         dv_state="not_used",
00532 |     )
00533 |     return df
00534 | 
00535 | 
00536 | def _selector_df(name: str, sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00537 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00538 |     cache_sig = _sig(name, sql, params or {})
00539 |     before = _get_mark("SELECTOR", name, cache_sig)
00540 |     df = _selector_df_cached(name, sql, params)
00541 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("SELECTOR", name, cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00542 |     _trace(
00543 |         "SELECTOR",
00544 |         name,
00545 |         selector=name,
00546 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00547 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00548 |         rows=0 if df is None else len(df),
00549 |         selector_total_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0),
00550 |         cache_state=cache_state,
00551 |         dv_state="not_used",
00552 |     )
00553 |     return df
00554 | 
00555 | 
00556 | # =========================================================
00557 | # 2) HELPERS DE SCOPE / FILTROS
00558 | # =========================================================
00559 | def _modalidad_clause(modalidad: str | None, field: str = "rr.modalidad") -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00560 |     if modalidad and str(modalidad).strip():
00561 |         return (
00562 |             f" AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({field}, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:modalidad, '')))",
00563 |             {"modalidad": str(modalidad).strip()},
00564 |         )
00565 |     return "", {}
00566 | 
00567 | 
00568 | def _build_result_filters(
00569 |     marcas: list[str] | None,
00570 |     search: str,
00571 |     foco: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None,
00572 |     alias: str = "",
00573 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00574 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
00575 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
00576 |     filters: list[str] = []
00577 | 
00578 |     if marcas:
00579 |         filters.append(f'AND {pfx}"MARCA" = ANY(:marcas)')
00580 |         params["marcas"] = marcas
00581 | 
00582 |     valid_focos = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
00583 | 
00584 |     if isinstance(foco, str):
00585 |         raw_focos = [x.strip() for x in foco.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
00586 |     elif foco is None:
00587 |         raw_focos = []
00588 |     else:
00589 |         raw_focos = [str(x).strip() for x in foco if str(x).strip()]
00590 | 
00591 |     focos = []
00592 |     for item in raw_focos:
00593 |         if item in valid_focos and item not in focos:
00594 |             focos.append(item)
00595 | 
00596 |     if focos:
00597 |         foco_clauses: list[str] = []
00598 | 
00599 |         if "Venta 0" in focos:
00600 |             foco_clauses.append(f'COALESCE({pfx}"Venta(+7)", 0) = 0')
00601 | 
00602 |         if "Negativo" in focos:
00603 |             foco_clauses.append(f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}\"NEGATIVO\", ''))) = 'SI'")
00604 | 
00605 |         if "Quiebres" in focos:
00606 |             foco_clauses.append(f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}\"RIESGO DE QUIEBRE\", ''))) = 'SI'")
00607 | 
00608 |         if "Otros" in focos:
00609 |             foco_clauses.append(
00610 |                 f"""
00611 |                 (
00612 |                     NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}"OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00613 |                     AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}"OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00614 |                 )
00615 |                 """
00616 |             )
00617 | 
00618 |         if foco_clauses:
00619 |             filters.append("AND (" + " OR ".join(f"({c})" for c in foco_clauses) + ")")
00620 | 
00621 |     s = (search or "").strip()
00622 |     if len(s) >= 2:
00623 |         filters.append(
00624 |             f"""
00625 |             AND (
00626 |                 CAST({pfx}"Sku" AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
00627 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}"Descripción del Producto", '') ILIKE :q
00628 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}"MARCA", '') ILIKE :q
00629 |             )
00630 |             """
00631 |         )
00632 |         params["q"] = f"%{s}%"
00633 | 
00634 |     return "\n".join(filters), params
00635 | 
00636 | 
00637 | 
00638 | def _rr_scope_exists(alias: str = "v", modalidad: str | None = None) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00639 |     modalidad_sql, modalidad_params = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "rr.modalidad")
00640 |     sql = f"""
00641 |         EXISTS (
00642 |             SELECT 1
00643 |             FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
00644 |             WHERE rr.cod_rt = {alias}.cod_rt
00645 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00646 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00647 |               {modalidad_sql}
00648 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({alias}."MARCA", '')))
00649 |         )
00650 |     """
00651 |     return sql, modalidad_params
00652 |

00654 | # =========================================================
00655 | # 3) SELECTORES / CONTEXTO DESDE RUTA_RUTERO
00656 | # =========================================================
00657 | def get_rutero_reponedor() -> pd.DataFrame:
00658 |     return qdf(f"""
00659 |         SELECT DISTINCT
00660 |             TRIM(rutero) AS rutero,
00661 |             TRIM(reponedor) AS reponedor
00662 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00663 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00664 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00665 |         ORDER BY rutero, reponedor
00666 |     """)
00667 | 
00668 | 
00669 | def get_locales(rutero: str, reponedor: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
00670 |     return qdf(f"""
00671 |         SELECT DISTINCT
00672 |             cod_rt,
00673 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt) AS nombre_local_rr
00674 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00675 |         WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00676 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00677 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cod_rt, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00678 |         ORDER BY cod_rt, nombre_local_rr
00679 |     """, {"rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor})

00681 | 
00682 | def get_contexto_local(
00683 |     rutero: str,
00684 |     reponedor: str,
00685 |     cod_rt: str,
00686 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
00687 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
00688 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "modalidad")
00689 |     sql = f"""
00690 |         SELECT
00691 |             cod_rt,
00692 |             MAX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt)) AS nombre_local_rr,
00693 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), '')) AS clientes,
00694 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), '')) AS modalidades,
00695 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), '')) AS mercaderistas
00696 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00697 |         WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
00698 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00699 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00700 |           {modalidad_sql}
00701 |         GROUP BY cod_rt
00702 |     """
00703 |     params = {
00704 |         "rutero": rutero,
00705 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
00706 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00707 |         **extra,
00708 |     }
00709 |     return _selector_df("get_contexto_local", sql, params)

00807 | # =========================================================
00808 | # 4) RESULTADOS LOCAL / MERCADERISTA SOBRE VISTA PUENTE
00809 | # =========================================================
00810 | def get_marcas_local(cod_rt: str) -> list[str]:
00811 |     df = qdf(f"""
00812 |         SELECT DISTINCT v."MARCA" AS marca
00813 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00814 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00815 |         ORDER BY marca
00816 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt})
00817 |     return df["marca"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []
00818 | 
00819 | 
00820 | def get_marcas(
00821 |     rutero: str,
00822 |     reponedor: str,
00823 |     cod_rt: str,
00824 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
00825 | ) -> list[str]:
00826 |     exists_sql, extra = _rr_scope_exists("v", modalidad=modalidad)
00827 |     df = qdf(f"""
00828 |         SELECT DISTINCT v."MARCA" AS marca
00829 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00830 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00831 |           AND {exists_sql}
00832 |         ORDER BY marca
00833 |     """, {
00834 |         "rutero": rutero,
00835 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
00836 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00837 |         **extra,
00838 |     })
00839 |     return df["marca"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []
00840 | 
00841 | 
00842 | def get_kpis_local_home(cod_rt: str, marcas: list[str] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00843 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search="", foco="Todo", alias="v")
00844 |     return qdf(f"""
00845 |         SELECT
00846 |             MAX(v.fecha) AS fecha_stock,
00847 |             COUNT(*)::int AS total_skus,
00848 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(v."Venta(+7)", 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS venta_0,
00849 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."NEGATIVO", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS negativos,
00850 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS quiebres,
00851 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE
00852 |                 WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00853 |                  AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00854 |                 THEN 1 ELSE 0
00855 |             END), 0)::int AS otros
00856 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00857 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00858 |         {where_extra}
00859 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, **p2})
00860 | 
00861 | 
00862 | def get_kpis_local(
00863 |     rutero: str,
00864 |     reponedor: str,
00865 |     cod_rt: str,
00866 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
00867 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
00868 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
00869 |     exists_sql, extra = _rr_scope_exists("v", modalidad=modalidad)
00870 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search="", foco="Todo", alias="v")
00871 |     return qdf(f"""
00872 |         SELECT
00873 |             MAX(v.fecha) AS fecha_stock,
00874 |             COUNT(*)::int AS total_skus,
00875 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(v."Venta(+7)", 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS venta_0,
00876 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."NEGATIVO", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS negativos,
00877 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS quiebres,
00878 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE
00879 |                 WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00880 |                  AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00881 |                 THEN 1 ELSE 0
00882 |             END), 0)::int AS otros
00883 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00884 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00885 |           AND {exists_sql}
00886 |           {where_extra}
00887 |     """, {
00888 |         "rutero": rutero,
00889 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
00890 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00891 |         **extra,
00892 |         **p2,
00893 |     })
00894 | 
00895 | 
00896 | def get_tabla_ux_total_home(
00897 |     cod_rt: str,
00898 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
00899 |     foco: str = "Todo",
00900 |     search: str = "",
00901 | ) -> int:
00902 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search, foco, alias="v")

00904 |         SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total
00905 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v

00907 |         {where_extra}
00908 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, **p2})

01107 | 
01108 | def _scope_tipo_norm(value: str | None) -> str | None:
01109 |     v = str(value or "").strip().upper()
01110 |     return v if v in {"GESTOR", "SUPERVISOR"} else None
01111 | 
01112 | 
01113 | def _scope_match_text_expr(
01114 |     alias: str,
01115 |     preferred_field: str,
01116 |     fallback_field: str | None = None,
01117 | ) -> str:
01118 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01119 |     parts = [f"NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}{preferred_field}, '')), '')"]
01120 |     if fallback_field and fallback_field != preferred_field:
01121 |         parts.append(f"NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}{fallback_field}, '')), '')")
01122 |     parts.append("''")
01123 |     return "COALESCE(" + ", ".join(parts) + ")"
01124 | 
01125 | 
01126 | # =========================================================
01127 | # 5) CLIENTE_SCOPE SOBRE VISTAS DEDICADAS
01128 | # =========================================================
01129 | def _scope_norm_expr(field: str) -> str:
01130 |     return f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({field}, '')))"
01131 | 
01132 | 
01133 | def _scope_is_selected(value: str | None) -> bool:
01134 |     if value is None:
01135 |         return False
01136 |     v = str(value).strip()
01137 |     return bool(v) and v.upper() != "TODOS"
01138 | 
01139 | 
01140 | def _normalize_scope_focos(
01141 |     focos: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None,
01142 | ) -> list[str]:
01143 |     valid_focos = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
01144 | 
01145 |     if isinstance(focos, str):
01146 |         raw = [x.strip() for x in focos.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
01147 |     elif focos is None:
01148 |         raw = []
01149 |     else:
01150 |         raw = [str(x).strip() for x in focos if str(x).strip()]
01151 | 
01152 |     out: list[str] = []
01153 |     for item in raw:
01154 |         if item in valid_focos and item not in out:
01155 |             out.append(item)
01156 |     return out
01157 | 
01158 | 
01159 | def _scope_page_clause(
01160 |     limit: int | None,
01161 |     offset: int | None,
01162 |     params: dict[str, Any],
01163 | ) -> str:
01164 |     if limit is None:
01165 |         return ""
01166 |     params["limit"] = max(int(limit), 1)
01167 |     params["offset"] = max(int(offset or 0), 0)
01168 |     return " LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset "
01169 | 
01170 | 
01171 | def _scope_cliente_filters(
01172 |     *,
01173 |     alias: str = "",
01174 |     marca: str | None = None,
01175 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01176 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01177 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01178 |     cliente_field: str = "cliente_norm",
01179 |     responsable_field: str = "responsable_norm",
01180 |     responsable_tipo_field: str = "responsable_tipo",
01181 |     marca_field: str = "marca",
01182 |     apply_marca_intersection: bool = False,
01183 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
01184 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01185 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
01186 |     filters: list[str] = []
01187 | 
01188 |     if _scope_is_selected(cliente):
01189 |         filters.append(
01190 |             f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{cliente_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':cliente')}"
01191 |         )
01192 |         params["cliente"] = str(cliente).strip()
01193 | 
01194 |     tipo_norm = _scope_tipo_norm(responsable_tipo)
01195 | 
01196 |     if _scope_is_selected(responsable) and tipo_norm is None:
01197 |         filters.append("AND 1=0")
01198 | 
01199 |     if tipo_norm is not None:
01200 |         filters.append(
01201 |             f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{responsable_tipo_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':responsable_tipo')}"
01202 |         )
01203 |         params["responsable_tipo"] = tipo_norm
01204 | 
01205 |     if _scope_is_selected(responsable):
01206 |         filters.append(
01207 |             f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{responsable_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':responsable')}"
01208 |         )
01209 |         params["responsable"] = str(responsable).strip()
01210 | 
01211 |     if _scope_is_selected(marca):
01212 |         params["marca"] = str(marca).strip()
01213 |         if apply_marca_intersection:
01214 |             cliente_match_expr = _scope_match_text_expr(
01215 |                 alias,
01216 |                 cliente_field,
01217 |                 "cliente" if cliente_field != "cliente" else None,
01218 |             )
01219 |             filters.append(
01220 |                 f"""
01221 |                 AND EXISTS (
01222 |                     SELECT 1
01223 |                     FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01224 |                     WHERE b.cod_rt = {pfx}cod_rt
01225 |                       AND {_scope_norm_expr('b.cliente')} = {_scope_norm_expr(cliente_match_expr)}
01226 |                       AND {_scope_norm_expr('b.marca')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':marca')}
01227 |                 )
01228 |                 """
01229 |             )
01230 |         else:
01231 |             filters.append(
01232 |                 f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{marca_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':marca')}"
01233 |             )
01234 | 
01235 |     return "\n".join(filters), params
01236 | 
01237 | 
01238 | def _scope_summary_filters(
01239 |     *,
01240 |     alias: str = "",
01241 |     marca: str | None = None,
01242 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01243 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01244 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01245 |     focos: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None = None,
01246 |     search: str = "",
01247 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
01248 |     filters_sql, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01249 |         alias=alias,
01250 |         marca=marca,
01251 |         cliente=cliente,
01252 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01253 |         responsable=responsable,
01254 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01255 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01256 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01257 |         marca_field="marca",
01258 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01259 |     )
01260 | 
01261 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01262 |     filters: list[str] = [filters_sql] if filters_sql else []
01263 | 
01264 |     focos_norm = _normalize_scope_focos(focos)
01265 |     if focos_norm:
01266 |         foco_clauses: list[str] = []
01267 |         if "Venta 0" in focos_norm:
01268 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}venta_0, 0) > 0")
01269 |         if "Negativo" in focos_norm:
01270 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}negativos, 0) > 0")
01271 |         if "Quiebres" in focos_norm:
01272 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}quiebres, 0) > 0")
01273 |         if "Otros" in focos_norm:
01274 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}otros, 0) > 0")
01275 |         if foco_clauses:
01276 |             filters.append("AND (" + " OR ".join(f"({c})" for c in foco_clauses) + ")")
01277 | 
01278 |     s = (search or "").strip()
01279 |     if len(s) >= 2:
01280 |         filters.append(
01281 |             f"""
01282 |             AND (
01283 |                 CAST({pfx}cod_rt AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
01284 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}local_nombre_rr, '') ILIKE :q
01285 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}cliente, '') ILIKE :q
01286 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}responsable, '') ILIKE :q
01287 |             )
01288 |             """
01289 |         )
01290 |         params["q"] = f"%{s}%"
01291 | 
01292 |     return "\n".join(x for x in filters if x), params
01293 | 
01294 | 
01295 | def _scope_detail_filters(
01296 |     *,
01297 |     alias: str = "",
01298 |     marca: str | None = None,
01299 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01300 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01301 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01302 |     focos: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None = None,
01303 |     search: str = "",
01304 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
01305 |     filters_sql, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01306 |         alias=alias,
01307 |         marca=marca,
01308 |         cliente=cliente,
01309 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01310 |         responsable=responsable,
01311 |         cliente_field="cliente",
01312 |         responsable_field="responsable",
01313 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01314 |         marca_field="marca",
01315 |         apply_marca_intersection=False,
01316 |     )
01317 | 
01318 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01319 |     filters: list[str] = [filters_sql] if filters_sql else []
01320 | 
01321 |     focos_norm = _normalize_scope_focos(focos)
01322 |     if focos_norm:
01323 |         foco_clauses: list[str] = []
01324 |         if "Venta 0" in focos_norm:
01325 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}venta_7, 0) = 0")
01326 |         if "Negativo" in focos_norm:
01327 |             foco_clauses.append(f"{_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}negativo')} = 'SI'")
01328 |         if "Quiebres" in focos_norm:
01329 |             foco_clauses.append(f"{_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}riesgo_quiebre')} = 'SI'")
01330 |         if "Otros" in focos_norm:
01331 |             foco_clauses.append(
01332 |                 f"""
01333 |                 (
01334 |                     NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}otros, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01335 |                     AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}otros')} NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
01336 |                 )
01337 |                 """
01338 |             )
01339 |         if foco_clauses:
01340 |             filters.append("AND (" + " OR ".join(f"({c})" for c in foco_clauses) + ")")
01341 | 
01342 |     s = (search or "").strip()
01343 |     if len(s) >= 2:
01344 |         filters.append(
01345 |             f"""
01346 |             AND (
01347 |                 CAST({pfx}cod_rt AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
01348 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}local_nombre_rr, '') ILIKE :q
01349 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}cliente, '') ILIKE :q
01350 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}responsable, '') ILIKE :q
01351 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}marca, '') ILIKE :q
01352 |                 OR CAST({pfx}sku AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
01353 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}producto, '') ILIKE :q
01354 |             )
01355 |             """
01356 |         )
01357 |         params["q"] = f"%{s}%"
01358 | 
01359 |     return "\n".join(x for x in filters if x), params
01360 | 
01361 | 
01362 | def get_marcas_home_global() -> list[str]:
01363 |     sql = f"""
01364 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01365 |             TRIM(marca) AS marca
01366 |         FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW}
01367 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(marca, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01368 |         ORDER BY marca
01369 |     """
01370 |     df = _selector_df("get_marcas_home_global", sql)
01371 |     return df["marca"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []
01372 | 
01373 | 
01374 | def get_clientes_home_scope(marca: str | None = None) -> list[str]:
01375 |     where_extra, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01376 |         alias="rr",
01377 |         marca=marca,
01378 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01379 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01380 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01381 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01382 |     )
01383 |     sql = f"""
01384 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01385 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente), ''), TRIM(rr.cliente_norm)) AS cliente
01386 |         FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01387 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente_norm, rr.cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01388 |         {where_extra}
01389 |         ORDER BY cliente
01390 |     """
01391 |     df = _selector_df("get_clientes_home_scope", sql, params)
01392 |     return df["cliente"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []
01393 | 
01394 | 
01395 | def get_responsables_home_scope(
01396 |     tipo: str,
01397 |     marca: str | None = None,
01398 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01399 | ) -> list[str]:
01400 |     tipo_norm = str(tipo or "").strip().upper()
01401 |     if tipo_norm not in {"GESTOR", "SUPERVISOR"}:
01402 |         return []
01403 | 
01404 |     where_extra, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01405 |         alias="rr",
01406 |         marca=marca,
01407 |         cliente=cliente,
01408 |         responsable_tipo=tipo_norm,
01409 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01410 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01411 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01412 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01413 |     )
01414 |     sql = f"""
01415 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01416 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable), ''), TRIM(rr.responsable_norm)) AS responsable
01417 |         FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01418 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.responsable_norm, rr.responsable, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01419 |         {where_extra}
01420 |         ORDER BY responsable
01421 |     """
01422 |     df = _selector_df("get_responsables_home_scope", sql, params)
01423 |     return df["responsable"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []
01424 | 
01425 | 
01426 | def get_rr_people_scope(
01427 |     tipo: str,
01428 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01429 |     marca: str | None = None,
01430 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01431 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01432 |     tipo_norm = str(tipo or "").strip().upper()
01433 |     if tipo_norm not in {"GESTOR", "SUPERVISOR"}:
01434 |         return pd.DataFrame(
01435 |             columns=[
01436 |                 "rutero",
01437 |                 "reponedor",
01438 |                 "responsable",
01439 |                 "cliente",
01440 |                 "locales_relacionados",
01441 |             ]
01442 |         )
01443 | 
01444 |     where_extra, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01445 |         alias="rr",
01446 |         marca=marca,
01447 |         cliente=cliente,
01448 |         responsable_tipo=tipo_norm,
01449 |         responsable=responsable,
01450 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01451 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01452 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01453 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01454 |     )
01455 |     sql = f"""
01456 |         SELECT
01457 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.rutero), ''), '-') AS rutero,
01458 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.reponedor), ''), '-') AS reponedor,
01459 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable), ''), TRIM(rr.responsable_norm)) AS responsable,
01460 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente), ''), TRIM(rr.cliente_norm)) AS cliente,
01461 |             COUNT(DISTINCT rr.cod_rt)::int AS locales_relacionados
01462 |         FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01463 |         WHERE 1=1
01464 |         {where_extra}
01465 |         GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
01466 |         ORDER BY rutero, reponedor, cliente
01467 |     """
01468 |     return _selector_df("get_rr_people_scope", sql, params)

01470 | 
01471 | def get_scope_level(
01472 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01473 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01474 | ) -> str:
01475 |     has_cliente = _scope_is_selected(cliente)
01476 |     has_responsable = _scope_is_selected(responsable)
01477 | 
01478 |     if not has_cliente and not has_responsable:
01479 |         return "L0"
01480 |     if has_cliente and not has_responsable:
01481 |         return "L1"
01482 |     if not has_cliente and has_responsable:
01483 |         return "L2"
01484 |     return "L3"
01485 | 
01486 | 
01487 | def get_kpis_scope_cliente(
01488 |     marca: str | None = None,
01489 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01490 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01491 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01492 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01493 |     search: str = "",
01494 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01495 |     where_summary, params_summary = _scope_summary_filters(
01496 |         alias="s",
01497 |         marca=marca,
01498 |         cliente=cliente,
01499 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01500 |         responsable=responsable,
01501 |         focos=focos,
01502 |         search=search,
01503 |     )
01504 | 
01505 |     where_detail, params_detail = _scope_detail_filters(
01506 |         alias="b",
01507 |         marca=marca,
01508 |         cliente=cliente,
01509 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01510 |         responsable=responsable,
01511 |         focos=focos,
01512 |         search=search,
01513 |     )
01514 | 
01515 |     params = {**params_summary, **params_detail}
01516 | 
01517 |     sql = f"""
01518 |         WITH kpi AS (
01519 |             SELECT
01520 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cod_rt)::int AS locales_scope,
01521 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cliente_norm)::int AS clientes_scope,
01522 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.responsable_norm)::int AS responsables_scope,
01523 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01524 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01525 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01526 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01527 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros
01528 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01529 |             WHERE 1=1
01530 |             {where_summary}
01531 |         ),
01532 |         fecha AS (
01533 |             SELECT
01534 |                 MAX(b.fecha) AS fecha_stock
01535 |             FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01536 |             WHERE 1=1
01537 |             {where_detail}
01538 |         )
01539 |         SELECT
01540 |             fecha.fecha_stock,
01541 |             kpi.locales_scope,
01542 |             kpi.clientes_scope,
01543 |             kpi.responsables_scope,
01544 |             kpi.total_skus,
01545 |             kpi.venta_0,
01546 |             kpi.negativos,
01547 |             kpi.quiebres,
01548 |             kpi.otros
01549 |         FROM kpi
01550 |         CROSS JOIN fecha
01551 |     """
01552 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01553 | 
01554 | 
01555 | def get_tabla_scope_responsable_total_page(
01556 |     marca: str | None = None,
01557 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01558 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01559 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01560 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01561 |     search: str = "",
01562 |     limit: int | None = None,
01563 |     offset: int | None = None,
01564 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01565 |     where_extra, params = _scope_summary_filters(
01566 |         alias="s",
01567 |         marca=marca,
01568 |         cliente=cliente,
01569 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01570 |         responsable=responsable,
01571 |         focos=focos,
01572 |         search=search,
01573 |     )
01574 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01575 | 
01576 |     sql = f"""
01577 |         WITH base AS (
01578 |             SELECT
01579 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') AS responsable_tipo,
01580 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable), ''), TRIM(s.responsable_norm)) AS responsable,
01581 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cliente_norm)::int AS clientes,
01582 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cod_rt)::int AS locales,
01583 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01584 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01585 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01586 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01587 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros,
01588 |                 (
01589 |                     COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)
01590 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)
01591 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)
01592 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)
01593 |                 )::int AS skus_en_foco
01594 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01595 |             WHERE 1=1
01596 |             {where_extra}
01597 |             GROUP BY 1, 2
01598 |         )
01599 |         SELECT
01600 |             base.*,
01601 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01602 |         FROM base
01603 |         ORDER BY skus_en_foco DESC, negativos DESC, venta_0 DESC, otros DESC, quiebres DESC, responsable ASC
01604 |         {page_sql}
01605 |     """
01606 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01607 |

01609 | def get_tabla_scope_cliente_total_page(
01610 |     marca: str | None = None,
01611 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01612 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01613 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01614 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01615 |     search: str = "",
01616 |     limit: int | None = None,
01617 |     offset: int | None = None,
01618 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01619 |     where_extra, params = _scope_summary_filters(
01620 |         alias="s",
01621 |         marca=marca,
01622 |         cliente=cliente,
01623 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01624 |         responsable=responsable,
01625 |         focos=focos,
01626 |         search=search,
01627 |     )
01628 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01629 | 
01630 |     sql = f"""
01631 |         WITH base AS (
01632 |             SELECT
01633 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente), ''), TRIM(s.cliente_norm)) AS cliente,
01634 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.responsable_norm)::int AS responsables,
01635 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cod_rt)::int AS locales,
01636 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01637 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01638 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01639 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01640 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros,
01641 |                 (
01642 |                     COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)
01643 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)
01644 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)
01645 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)
01646 |                 )::int AS skus_en_foco
01647 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01648 |             WHERE 1=1
01649 |             {where_extra}
01650 |             GROUP BY 1
01651 |         )
01652 |         SELECT
01653 |             base.*,
01654 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01655 |         FROM base
01656 |         ORDER BY skus_en_foco DESC, negativos DESC, venta_0 DESC, otros DESC, quiebres DESC, cliente ASC
01657 |         {page_sql}
01658 |     """
01659 |     return qdf(sql, params)

01661 | 
01662 | def get_tabla_scope_local_total_page(
01663 |     marca: str | None = None,
01664 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01665 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01666 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01667 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01668 |     search: str = "",
01669 |     limit: int | None = None,
01670 |     offset: int | None = None,
01671 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01672 |     where_extra, params = _scope_summary_filters(
01673 |         alias="s",
01674 |         marca=marca,
01675 |         cliente=cliente,
01676 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01677 |         responsable=responsable,
01678 |         focos=focos,
01679 |         search=search,
01680 |     )
01681 |     rr_where_extra, rr_params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01682 |         alias="rr",
01683 |         marca=marca,
01684 |         cliente=cliente,
01685 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01686 |         responsable=responsable,
01687 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01688 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01689 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01690 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01691 |     )
01692 |     params = {**params, **rr_params}
01693 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01694 | 
01695 |     sql = f"""
01696 |         WITH rr_ctx AS (
01697 |             SELECT
01698 |                 rr.cod_rt,
01699 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente), ''), ''))) AS cliente_norm_match,
01700 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable_tipo), ''), '-'))) AS responsable_tipo_match,
01701 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable), ''), ''))) AS responsable_norm_match,
01702 |                 STRING_AGG(
01703 |                     DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.rutero), ''), '-'),
01704 |                     ' | '
01705 |                     ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.rutero), ''), '-')
01706 |                 ) AS rutero,
01707 |                 STRING_AGG(
01708 |                     DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.reponedor), ''), '-'),
01709 |                     ' | '
01710 |                     ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.reponedor), ''), '-')
01711 |                 ) AS reponedor
01712 |             FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01713 |             WHERE 1=1
01714 |             {rr_where_extra}
01715 |             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
01716 |         ),
01717 |         base AS (
01718 |             SELECT
01719 |                 s.cod_rt,
01720 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.local_nombre_rr), ''), CAST(s.cod_rt AS TEXT)) AS nombre_local_rr,
01721 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente), ''), TRIM(s.cliente_norm)) AS cliente,
01722 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') AS responsable_tipo,
01723 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable), ''), TRIM(s.responsable_norm)) AS responsable,
01724 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente), ''), ''))) AS cliente_norm_match,
01725 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_tipo), ''), '-'))) AS responsable_tipo_match,
01726 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable), ''), ''))) AS responsable_norm_match,
01727 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01728 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01729 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01730 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01731 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros,
01732 |                 (
01733 |                     COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)
01734 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)
01735 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)
01736 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)
01737 |                 )::int AS skus_en_foco
01738 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01739 |             WHERE 1=1
01740 |             {where_extra}
01741 |             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8
01742 |         )
01743 |         SELECT
01744 |             base.cod_rt,
01745 |             base.nombre_local_rr,
01746 |             base.cliente,
01747 |             base.responsable_tipo,
01748 |             base.responsable,
01749 |             COALESCE(rr_ctx.rutero, '-') AS rutero,
01750 |             COALESCE(rr_ctx.reponedor, '-') AS reponedor,
01751 |             base.total_skus,
01752 |             base.venta_0,
01753 |             base.negativos,
01754 |             base.quiebres,
01755 |             base.otros,
01756 |             base.skus_en_foco,
01757 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01758 |         FROM base
01759 |         LEFT JOIN rr_ctx
01760 |             ON rr_ctx.cod_rt = base.cod_rt
01761 |            AND rr_ctx.cliente_norm_match = base.cliente_norm_match
01762 |            AND rr_ctx.responsable_tipo_match = base.responsable_tipo_match
01763 |            AND rr_ctx.responsable_norm_match = base.responsable_norm_match
01764 |         ORDER BY
01765 |             base.skus_en_foco DESC,
01766 |             base.negativos DESC,
01767 |             base.venta_0 DESC,
01768 |             base.otros DESC,
01769 |             base.quiebres DESC,
01770 |             base.nombre_local_rr ASC
01771 |         {page_sql}
01772 |     """
01773 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01774 | 
01775 | 
01776 | def get_detalle_sku_scope_total_page(
01777 |     marca: str | None = None,
01778 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01779 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01780 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01781 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01782 |     search: str = "",
01783 |     limit: int | None = None,
01784 |     offset: int | None = None,
01785 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01786 |     level = get_scope_level(cliente=cliente, responsable=responsable)
01787 |     if level in {"L0", "L1"}:
01788 |         return pd.DataFrame(
01789 |             columns=[
01790 |                 "fecha",
01791 |                 "cod_rt",
01792 |                 "nombre_local_rr",
01793 |                 "cliente",
01794 |                 "responsable_tipo",
01795 |                 "responsable",
01796 |                 "marca",
01797 |                 "sku",
01798 |                 "descripcion",
01799 |                 "stock",
01800 |                 "venta_7",
01801 |                 "negativo",
01802 |                 "riesgo_quiebre",
01803 |                 "otros",
01804 |                 "total_rows",
01805 |             ]
01806 |         )
01807 | 
01808 |     where_extra, params = _scope_detail_filters(
01809 |         alias="b",
01810 |         marca=marca,
01811 |         cliente=cliente,
01812 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01813 |         responsable=responsable,
01814 |         focos=focos,
01815 |         search=search,
01816 |     )
01817 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01818 | 
01819 |     sql = f"""
01820 |         SELECT
01821 |             b.fecha,
01822 |             b.cod_rt,
01823 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.local_nombre_rr), ''), CAST(b.cod_rt AS TEXT)) AS nombre_local_rr,
01824 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.cliente), ''), '') AS cliente,
01825 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') AS responsable_tipo,
01826 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.responsable), ''), '') AS responsable,
01827 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.marca), ''), '') AS marca,
01828 |             CAST(b.sku AS TEXT) AS sku,
01829 |             COALESCE(b.producto, '') AS descripcion,
01830 |             COALESCE(b.stock, 0)::int AS stock,
01831 |             COALESCE(b.venta_7, 0)::int AS venta_7,
01832 |             COALESCE(b.negativo, '') AS negativo,
01833 |             COALESCE(b.riesgo_quiebre, '') AS riesgo_quiebre,
01834 |             COALESCE(b.otros, '') AS otros,
01835 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01836 |         FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01837 |         WHERE 1=1
01838 |         {where_extra}
01839 |         ORDER BY
01840 |             CASE WHEN {_scope_norm_expr('b.negativo')} = 'SI' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
01841 |             CASE WHEN {_scope_norm_expr('b.riesgo_quiebre')} = 'SI' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
01842 |             COALESCE(b.venta_7, 0) ASC,
01843 |             COALESCE(b.marca, '') ASC,
01844 |             CAST(b.sku AS TEXT) ASC
01845 |         {page_sql}
01846 |     """
01847 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01848 | 
01849 | 
01850 | # =========================================================
01851 | # 6) AUDITORÍA DE COBERTURA E INCONSISTENCIAS
01852 | # =========================================================
01853 | def get_scope_clientes_rr(
01854 |     cod_rt: str,
01855 |     rutero: str,
01856 |     reponedor: str,
01857 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
01858 | ) -> list[str]:
01859 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "modalidad")
01860 |     df = qdf(f"""
01861 |         SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(cliente) AS cliente
01862 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
01863 |         WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
01864 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
01865 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
01866 |           {modalidad_sql}
01867 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01868 |         ORDER BY cliente
01869 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, "rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor, **extra})
01870 |     return df["cliente"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []
01871 | 
01872 | 
01873 | def get_rr_stock_en_local(cod_rt: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
01874 |     return qdf(f"""
01875 |         SELECT
01876 |             rr.cod_rt,
01877 |             TRIM(rr.modalidad) AS modalidad,
01878 |             TRIM(rr.rutero) AS rutero,
01879 |             TRIM(rr.reponedor) AS reponedor,
01880 |             TRIM(rr.cliente) AS cliente_rr,
01881 |             CASE
01882 |                 WHEN EXISTS (
01883 |                     SELECT 1
01884 |                     FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
01885 |                     WHERE v.cod_rt = rr.cod_rt
01886 |                       AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."MARCA", ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')))
01887 |                 ) THEN 'SI'
01888 |                 ELSE 'NO'
01889 |             END AS tiene_stock_match
01890 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
01891 |         WHERE rr.cod_rt = :cod_rt
01892 |         ORDER BY modalidad, rutero, reponedor, cliente_rr
01893 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt})
01894 | 
01895 | 
01896 | def get_cobertura_local(cod_rt: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
01897 |     return qdf(f"""
01898 |         WITH rr AS (
01899 |             SELECT DISTINCT
01900 |                 cod_rt,
01901 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, ''))) AS cliente_norm
01902 |             FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
01903 |             WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
01904 |               AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01905 |         ),
01906 |         st AS (
01907 |             SELECT DISTINCT
01908 |                 cod_rt,
01909 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE("MARCA", ''))) AS marca_norm
01910 |             FROM {RESULT_VIEW}
01911 |             WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
01912 |               AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE("MARCA", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01913 |         )
01914 |         SELECT
01915 |             :cod_rt AS cod_rt,
01916 |             (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rr)::int AS clientes_rr,
01917 |             (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM st)::int AS clientes_stock,
01918 |             (
01919 |                 SELECT COUNT(*)::int
01920 |                 FROM rr
01921 |                 INNER JOIN st
01922 |                     ON rr.cod_rt = st.cod_rt
01923 |                    AND rr.cliente_norm = st.marca_norm
01924 |             ) AS clientes_match
01925 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt})
01926 | 
01927 | 
01928 | def get_clientes_sin_match_rr_stock(
01929 |     cod_rt: str,
01930 |     rutero: str,
01931 |     reponedor: str,
01932 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
01933 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01934 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "rr.modalidad")
01935 |     return qdf(f"""
01936 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01937 |             rr.cod_rt,
01938 |             TRIM(rr.modalidad) AS modalidad,
01939 |             TRIM(rr.rutero) AS rutero,
01940 |             TRIM(rr.reponedor) AS reponedor,
01941 |             TRIM(rr.cliente) AS cliente_rr
01942 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
01943 |         WHERE rr.cod_rt = :cod_rt
01944 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
01945 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
01946 |           {modalidad_sql}
01947 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01948 |           AND NOT EXISTS (
01949 |               SELECT 1
01950 |               FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
01951 |               WHERE v.cod_rt = rr.cod_rt
01952 |                 AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."MARCA", ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')))
01953 |           )
01954 |         ORDER BY cliente_rr
01955 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, "rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor, **extra})
01956 | 
01957 |

01987 | 
01988 | def _cg_page_clause(limit: int | None, offset: int | None, params: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
01989 |     clauses: list[str] = []
01990 |     if limit is not None:
01991 |         params["limit"] = max(1, int(limit))
01992 |         clauses.append("LIMIT :limit")
01993 |     if offset is not None:
01994 |         params["offset"] = max(0, int(offset))
01995 |         clauses.append("OFFSET :offset")
01996 |     return (" " + " ".join(clauses)) if clauses else ""
01997 |

01999 | def _cg_select_page(
02000 |     *,
02001 |     selector_name: str,
02002 |     view_name: str,
02003 |     limit: int | None = None,
02004 |     offset: int | None = None,
02005 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
02006 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
02007 |     page_sql = _cg_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
02008 |     sql = f"""
02009 |         SELECT *
02010 |         FROM {view_name}
02011 |         {page_sql}
02012 |     """
02013 |     return _selector_df(selector_name, sql, params or None)

02087 | 
02088 | def get_cg_contract_smoke() -> dict[str, Any]:
02089 |     checks = [
02090 |         ("parity", CG_PARITY_VIEW),
02091 |         ("scope", CG_SCOPE_VIEW),
02092 |         ("alertas", CG_ALERTAS_VIEW),
02093 |         ("inicio_jefe", CG_INICIO_JEFE_VIEW),
02094 |         ("inicio_gestor", CG_INICIO_GESTOR_VIEW),
02095 |         ("detalle", CG_DETALLE_VIEW),
02096 |     ]
02097 |     results: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
02098 |     failed_objects: list[str] = []
02099 |     non_zero_expected = {"parity", "scope", "alertas", "inicio_jefe", "inicio_gestor", "detalle"}
02100 | 
02101 |     for object_name, view_name in checks:
02102 |         try:
02103 |             df = _selector_df(
02104 |                 f"smoke_{object_name}",
02105 |                 f"SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS rows FROM {view_name}",
02106 |             )
02107 |             rows = int(df.iloc[0]["rows"] or 0) if df is not None and not df.empty else 0
02108 |             status = "ok" if rows > 0 or object_name not in non_zero_expected else "warn"
02109 |             results.append({
02110 |                 "object": object_name,
02111 |                 "view": view_name,
02112 |                 "rows": rows,
02113 |                 "status": status,
02114 |             })
02115 |         except Exception as exc:
02116 |             failed_objects.append(object_name)
02117 |             results.append({
02118 |                 "object": object_name,
02119 |                 "view": view_name,
02120 |                 "rows": None,
02121 |                 "status": "fail",
02122 |                 "error": f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}",
02123 |             })
02124 | 
02125 |     zero_warns = [r["object"] for r in results if r.get("status") == "warn"]
02126 |     smoke_status = "fail" if failed_objects else ("warn" if zero_warns else "ok")
02127 |     return {
02128 |         "smoke_status": smoke_status,
02129 |         "branch": "B3_CONTROL_GESTION_SQL",
02130 |         "views_checked": len(checks),
02131 |         "failed_objects": failed_objects,
02132 |         "zero_row_objects": zero_warns,
02133 |         "results": results,
02134 |     }

00044 | def _clean_yes(v) -> str:
00045 |     return "SI" if str(v or "").strip().upper() == "SI" else ""
00046 | 
00047 | 
00048 | def _clean_otros(v) -> str:
00049 |     out = str(v or "").strip()
00050 |     return "" if out.upper() in {"", "NO", "N/A", "NA", "-"} else out

00053 | def _venta_0_flag(v) -> str:
00054 |     try:
00055 |         return "SI" if int(pd.to_numeric(v, errors="coerce") or 0) == 0 else ""
00056 |     except Exception:
00057 |         return ""
