01661 | 
01662 | def get_tabla_scope_local_total_page(
01663 |     marca: str | None = None,
01664 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01665 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01666 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01667 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01668 |     search: str = "",
01669 |     limit: int | None = None,
01670 |     offset: int | None = None,
01671 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01672 |     where_extra, params = _scope_summary_filters(
01673 |         alias="s",
01674 |         marca=marca,
01675 |         cliente=cliente,
01676 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01677 |         responsable=responsable,
01678 |         focos=focos,
01679 |         search=search,
01680 |     )
01681 |     rr_where_extra, rr_params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01682 |         alias="rr",
01683 |         marca=marca,
01684 |         cliente=cliente,
01685 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01686 |         responsable=responsable,
01687 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01688 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01689 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01690 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01691 |     )
01692 |     params = {**params, **rr_params}
01693 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01694 | 
01695 |     sql = f"""
01696 |         WITH rr_ctx AS (
01697 |             SELECT
01698 |                 rr.cod_rt,
01699 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente), ''), ''))) AS cliente_norm_match,
01700 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable_tipo), ''), '-'))) AS responsable_tipo_match,
01701 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable), ''), ''))) AS responsable_norm_match,
01702 |                 STRING_AGG(
01703 |                     DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.rutero), ''), '-'),
01704 |                     ' | '
01705 |                     ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.rutero), ''), '-')
01706 |                 ) AS rutero,
01707 |                 STRING_AGG(
01708 |                     DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.reponedor), ''), '-'),
01709 |                     ' | '
01710 |                     ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.reponedor), ''), '-')
01711 |                 ) AS reponedor
01712 |             FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01713 |             WHERE 1=1
01714 |             {rr_where_extra}
01715 |             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
01716 |         ),
01717 |         base AS (
01718 |             SELECT
01719 |                 s.cod_rt,
01720 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.local_nombre_rr), ''), CAST(s.cod_rt AS TEXT)) AS nombre_local_rr,
01721 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente), ''), TRIM(s.cliente_norm)) AS cliente,
01722 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') AS responsable_tipo,
01723 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable), ''), TRIM(s.responsable_norm)) AS responsable,
01724 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente), ''), ''))) AS cliente_norm_match,
01725 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_tipo), ''), '-'))) AS responsable_tipo_match,
01726 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable), ''), ''))) AS responsable_norm_match,
01727 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01728 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01729 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01730 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01731 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros,
01732 |                 (
01733 |                     COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)
01734 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)
01735 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)
01736 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)
01737 |                 )::int AS skus_en_foco
01738 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01739 |             WHERE 1=1
01740 |             {where_extra}
01741 |             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8
01742 |         )
01743 |         SELECT
01744 |             base.cod_rt,
01745 |             base.nombre_local_rr,
01746 |             base.cliente,
01747 |             base.responsable_tipo,
01748 |             base.responsable,
01749 |             COALESCE(rr_ctx.rutero, '-') AS rutero,
01750 |             COALESCE(rr_ctx.reponedor, '-') AS reponedor,
01751 |             base.total_skus,
01752 |             base.venta_0,
01753 |             base.negativos,
01754 |             base.quiebres,
01755 |             base.otros,
01756 |             base.skus_en_foco,
01757 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01758 |         FROM base
01759 |         LEFT JOIN rr_ctx
01760 |             ON rr_ctx.cod_rt = base.cod_rt
01761 |            AND rr_ctx.cliente_norm_match = base.cliente_norm_match
01762 |            AND rr_ctx.responsable_tipo_match = base.responsable_tipo_match
01763 |            AND rr_ctx.responsable_norm_match = base.responsable_norm_match
01764 |         ORDER BY
01765 |             base.skus_en_foco DESC,
01766 |             base.negativos DESC,
01767 |             base.venta_0 DESC,
01768 |             base.otros DESC,
01769 |             base.quiebres DESC,
01770 |             base.nombre_local_rr ASC
01771 |         {page_sql}
01772 |     """
01773 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01774 | 
01775 | 
01776 | def get_detalle_sku_scope_total_page(
01777 |     marca: str | None = None,
01778 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01779 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01780 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01781 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01782 |     search: str = "",
01783 |     limit: int | None = None,
01784 |     offset: int | None = None,
01785 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01786 |     level = get_scope_level(cliente=cliente, responsable=responsable)
01787 |     if level == "L0":
01788 |         return pd.DataFrame(
01789 |             columns=[
01790 |                 "fecha",
01791 |                 "cod_rt",
01792 |                 "nombre_local_rr",
01793 |                 "cliente",
01794 |                 "responsable_tipo",
01795 |                 "responsable",
01796 |                 "rutero",
01797 |                 "reponedor",
01798 |                 "marca",
01799 |                 "sku",
01800 |                 "descripcion",
01801 |                 "stock",
01802 |                 "venta_7",
01803 |                 "negativo",
01804 |                 "riesgo_quiebre",
01805 |                 "otros",
01806 |                 "total_rows",
01807 |             ]
01808 |         )
01809 | 
01810 |     where_extra, params = _scope_detail_filters(
01811 |         alias="b",
01812 |         marca=marca,
01813 |         cliente=cliente,
01814 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01815 |         responsable=responsable,
01816 |         focos=focos,
01817 |         search=search,
01818 |     )
01819 |     rr_where_extra, rr_params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01820 |         alias="rr",
01821 |         marca=marca,
01822 |         cliente=cliente,
01823 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01824 |         responsable=responsable,
01825 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01826 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01827 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01828 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01829 |     )
01830 |     params = {**params, **rr_params}
01831 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01832 | 
01833 |     sql = f"""
01834 |         WITH rr_ctx AS (
01835 |             SELECT
01836 |                 rr.cod_rt,
01837 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente), ''), ''))) AS cliente_norm_match,
01838 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable_tipo), ''), '-'))) AS responsable_tipo_match,
01839 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable), ''), ''))) AS responsable_norm_match,
01840 |                 STRING_AGG(
01841 |                     DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.rutero), ''), '-'),
01842 |                     ' | '
01843 |                     ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.rutero), ''), '-')
01844 |                 ) AS rutero,
01845 |                 STRING_AGG(
01846 |                     DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.reponedor), ''), '-'),
01847 |                     ' | '
01848 |                     ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.reponedor), ''), '-')
01849 |                 ) AS reponedor
01850 |             FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01851 |             WHERE 1=1
01852 |             {rr_where_extra}
01853 |             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
01854 |         )
01855 |         SELECT
01856 |             b.fecha,
01857 |             b.cod_rt,
01858 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.local_nombre_rr), ''), CAST(b.cod_rt AS TEXT)) AS nombre_local_rr,
01859 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.cliente), ''), '') AS cliente,
01860 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') AS responsable_tipo,
01861 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.responsable), ''), '') AS responsable,
01862 |             COALESCE(rr_ctx.rutero, '-') AS rutero,
01863 |             COALESCE(rr_ctx.reponedor, '-') AS reponedor,
01864 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.marca), ''), '') AS marca,
01865 |             CAST(b.sku AS TEXT) AS sku,
01866 |             COALESCE(b.producto, '') AS descripcion,
01867 |             COALESCE(b.stock, 0)::int AS stock,
01868 |             COALESCE(b.venta_7, 0)::int AS venta_7,
01869 |             COALESCE(b.negativo, '') AS negativo,
01870 |             COALESCE(b.riesgo_quiebre, '') AS riesgo_quiebre,
01871 |             COALESCE(b.otros, '') AS otros,
01872 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01873 |         FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01874 |         LEFT JOIN rr_ctx
01875 |             ON rr_ctx.cod_rt = b.cod_rt
01876 |            AND rr_ctx.cliente_norm_match = {_scope_norm_expr('b.cliente')}
01877 |            AND rr_ctx.responsable_tipo_match = {_scope_norm_expr('b.responsable_tipo')}
01878 |            AND rr_ctx.responsable_norm_match = {_scope_norm_expr('b.responsable')}
01879 |         WHERE 1=1
01880 |         {where_extra}
01881 |         ORDER BY
01882 |             CASE WHEN {_scope_norm_expr('b.negativo')} = 'SI' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
01883 |             CASE WHEN {_scope_norm_expr('b.riesgo_quiebre')} = 'SI' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
01884 |             COALESCE(b.venta_7, 0) ASC,
01885 |             COALESCE(b.marca, '') ASC,
01886 |             CAST(b.sku AS TEXT) ASC
01887 |         {page_sql}
01888 |     """
01889 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01890 |

01892 | # =========================================================
01893 | # 6) AUDITORÍA DE COBERTURA E INCONSISTENCIAS
01894 | # =========================================================
01895 | def get_scope_clientes_rr(
01896 |     cod_rt: str,
01897 |     rutero: str,
01898 |     reponedor: str,
01899 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
01900 | ) -> list[str]:
01901 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "modalidad")
01902 |     df = qdf(f"""
01903 |         SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(cliente) AS cliente
01904 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
01905 |         WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
01906 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
01907 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
01908 |           {modalidad_sql}
01909 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01910 |         ORDER BY cliente
01911 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, "rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor, **extra})
01912 |     return df["cliente"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []
01913 | 
01914 | 
01915 | def get_rr_stock_en_local(cod_rt: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
01916 |     return qdf(f"""
01917 |         SELECT
01918 |             rr.cod_rt,
01919 |             TRIM(rr.modalidad) AS modalidad,
01920 |             TRIM(rr.rutero) AS rutero,
01921 |             TRIM(rr.reponedor) AS reponedor,
01922 |             TRIM(rr.cliente) AS cliente_rr,
01923 |             CASE
01924 |                 WHEN EXISTS (
01925 |                     SELECT 1
01926 |                     FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
01927 |                     WHERE v.cod_rt = rr.cod_rt
01928 |                       AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."MARCA", ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')))
01929 |                 ) THEN 'SI'
01930 |                 ELSE 'NO'
01931 |             END AS tiene_stock_match
01932 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
01933 |         WHERE rr.cod_rt = :cod_rt
01934 |         ORDER BY modalidad, rutero, reponedor, cliente_rr
01935 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt})
01936 | 
01937 | 
01938 | def get_cobertura_local(cod_rt: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
01939 |     return qdf(f"""
01940 |         WITH rr AS (
01941 |             SELECT DISTINCT
01942 |                 cod_rt,
01943 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, ''))) AS cliente_norm
01944 |             FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
01945 |             WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
01946 |               AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01947 |         ),
01948 |         st AS (
01949 |             SELECT DISTINCT
01950 |                 cod_rt,
01951 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE("MARCA", ''))) AS marca_norm
01952 |             FROM {RESULT_VIEW}
01953 |             WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
01954 |               AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE("MARCA", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01955 |         )
01956 |         SELECT
01957 |             :cod_rt AS cod_rt,
01958 |             (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rr)::int AS clientes_rr,
01959 |             (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM st)::int AS clientes_stock,
01960 |             (
01961 |                 SELECT COUNT(*)::int
01962 |                 FROM rr
01963 |                 INNER JOIN st
01964 |                     ON rr.cod_rt = st.cod_rt
01965 |                    AND rr.cliente_norm = st.marca_norm
01966 |             ) AS clientes_match
01967 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt})
01968 | 
01969 | 
01970 | def get_clientes_sin_match_rr_stock(
01971 |     cod_rt: str,
01972 |     rutero: str,
01973 |     reponedor: str,
01974 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
01975 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01976 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "rr.modalidad")
01977 |     return qdf(f"""
01978 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01979 |             rr.cod_rt,
01980 |             TRIM(rr.modalidad) AS modalidad,
01981 |             TRIM(rr.rutero) AS rutero,
01982 |             TRIM(rr.reponedor) AS reponedor,
01983 |             TRIM(rr.cliente) AS cliente_rr
01984 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
01985 |         WHERE rr.cod_rt = :cod_rt
01986 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
01987 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
01988 |           {modalidad_sql}
01989 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01990 |           AND NOT EXISTS (
01991 |               SELECT 1
01992 |               FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
01993 |               WHERE v.cod_rt = rr.cod_rt
01994 |                 AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."MARCA", ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')))
01995 |           )
01996 |         ORDER BY cliente_rr
01997 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, "rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor, **extra})

02015 |         },

02018 |             "inicio_jefe": CG_COMPAT_INICIO_JEFE_VIEW,
02019 |             "inicio_gestor": CG_COMPAT_INICIO_GESTOR_VIEW,
02020 |             "detalle": CG_COMPAT_DETALLE_VIEW,
02021 |         },
02022 |         "rules": [
02023 |             "no_recalculo_negocio_en_python",
02024 |             "pair_global_truth_separada_de_scope_assigned_truth",
02025 |             "no_supervisor_no_reponedor_en_contrato_publico_actual",

02029 | 
02030 | def _cg_page_clause(limit: int | None, offset: int | None, params: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
02031 |     clauses: list[str] = []
02032 |     if limit is not None:
02033 |         params["limit"] = max(1, int(limit))
02034 |         clauses.append("LIMIT :limit")
02035 |     if offset is not None:
02036 |         params["offset"] = max(0, int(offset))
02037 |         clauses.append("OFFSET :offset")
02038 |     return (" " + " ".join(clauses)) if clauses else ""
02039 | 
02040 | 
02041 | def _cg_select_page(
02042 |     *,
02043 |     selector_name: str,
02044 |     view_name: str,
02045 |     limit: int | None = None,
02046 |     offset: int | None = None,
02047 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
02048 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
02049 |     page_sql = _cg_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
02050 |     sql = f"""
02051 |         SELECT *
02052 |         FROM {view_name}
02053 |         {page_sql}
02054 |     """
02055 |     return _selector_df(selector_name, sql, params or None)

02129 | 
02130 | def get_cg_contract_smoke() -> dict[str, Any]:
02131 |     checks = [
02132 |         ("parity", CG_PARITY_VIEW),
02133 |         ("scope", CG_SCOPE_VIEW),
02134 |         ("alertas", CG_ALERTAS_VIEW),
02135 |         ("inicio_jefe", CG_INICIO_JEFE_VIEW),
02136 |         ("inicio_gestor", CG_INICIO_GESTOR_VIEW),
02137 |         ("detalle", CG_DETALLE_VIEW),
02138 |     ]
02139 |     results: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
02140 |     failed_objects: list[str] = []
02141 |     non_zero_expected = {"parity", "scope", "alertas", "inicio_jefe", "inicio_gestor", "detalle"}
02142 | 
02143 |     for object_name, view_name in checks:
02144 |         try:
02145 |             df = _selector_df(
02146 |                 f"smoke_{object_name}",
02147 |                 f"SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS rows FROM {view_name}",
02148 |             )
02149 |             rows = int(df.iloc[0]["rows"] or 0) if df is not None and not df.empty else 0
02150 |             status = "ok" if rows > 0 or object_name not in non_zero_expected else "warn"
02151 |             results.append({
02152 |                 "object": object_name,
02153 |                 "view": view_name,
02154 |                 "rows": rows,
02155 |                 "status": status,
02156 |             })
02157 |         except Exception as exc:
02158 |             failed_objects.append(object_name)
02159 |             results.append({
02160 |                 "object": object_name,
02161 |                 "view": view_name,
02162 |                 "rows": None,
02163 |                 "status": "fail",
02164 |                 "error": f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}",
02165 |             })
02166 | 
02167 |     zero_warns = [r["object"] for r in results if r.get("status") == "warn"]
02168 |     smoke_status = "fail" if failed_objects else ("warn" if zero_warns else "ok")
02169 |     return {
02170 |         "smoke_status": smoke_status,
02171 |         "branch": "B3_CONTROL_GESTION_SQL",
02172 |         "views_checked": len(checks),
02173 |         "failed_objects": failed_objects,
02174 |         "zero_row_objects": zero_warns,
02175 |         "results": results,
02176 |     }
02177 |

00079 | def build_export_df(df_ux: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
00080 |     df = df_ux.copy()
00081 | 
00082 |     needed = [
00083 |         "fecha",
00084 |         "MARCA",
00085 |         "Sku",
00086 |         "Descripción del Producto",
00087 |         "Stock",
00088 |         "Venta(+7)",
00089 |         "NEGATIVO",
00090 |         "RIESGO DE QUIEBRE",
00091 |         "OTROS",
00092 |     ]
00093 |     for c in needed:
00094 |         if c not in df.columns:
00095 |             df[c] = ""
00096 | 
00097 |     df["Fecha stock"] = pd.to_datetime(df["fecha"], errors="coerce").dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d").fillna("")
00098 |     df["Sku"] = df["Sku"].astype(str)
00099 |     df["Stock"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Stock"], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
00100 |     df["Venta(+7)"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Venta(+7)"], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
00101 | 
00102 |     df["VENTA 0"] = df["Venta(+7)"].apply(_venta_0_flag)
00103 |     df["NEGATIVO"] = df["NEGATIVO"].apply(_clean_yes)
00104 |     df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"] = df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"].apply(_clean_yes)
00105 |     df["OTROS"] = df["OTROS"].apply(_clean_otros)
00106 |

00153 | 
00154 | def _sorted_for_export(df_in: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
00155 |     if df_in is None or df_in.empty:
00156 |         return df_in
00157 | 
00158 |     df = df_in.copy()
00159 | 
00160 |     if "MARCA" not in df.columns:
00161 |         df["MARCA"] = ""
00162 |     if "Sku" not in df.columns:
00163 |         df["Sku"] = ""
00164 |     if "Descripción del Producto" not in df.columns:
00165 |         df["Descripción del Producto"] = ""
00166 | 
00167 |     for c in ["MARCA", "Sku", "Descripción del Producto", "CLIENTE", "COD_RT", "LOCAL", "RUTERO", "REPONEDOR", "FOCO PRINCIPAL"]:
00168 |         if c in df.columns:
00169 |             df[c] = df[c].astype(str)
00170 | 
00171 |     sku_num = pd.to_numeric(df["Sku"], errors="coerce")
00172 |     df["_sku_is_text"] = sku_num.isna().astype(int)
00173 |     df["_sku_num"] = sku_num.fillna(0)
00174 | 
00175 |     if "FOCO PRINCIPAL" in df.columns and ({"CLIENTE", "COD_RT", "LOCAL"} & set(df.columns)):
00176 |         if "CLIENTE" not in df.columns:
00177 |             df["CLIENTE"] = ""
00178 |         if "COD_RT" not in df.columns:
00179 |             df["COD_RT"] = ""
00180 |         if "LOCAL" not in df.columns:
00181 |             df["LOCAL"] = ""
00182 |         if "RUTERO" not in df.columns:
00183 |             df["RUTERO"] = ""
00184 |         if "REPONEDOR" not in df.columns:
00185 |             df["REPONEDOR"] = ""
00186 |         sort_cols = [
00187 |             "CLIENTE", "COD_RT", "LOCAL", "RUTERO", "REPONEDOR",
00188 |             "MARCA", "FOCO PRINCIPAL", "_sku_is_text", "_sku_num", "Sku", "Descripción del Producto"
00189 |         ]
00190 |     elif "FOCO PRINCIPAL" in df.columns:
00191 |         sort_cols = ["MARCA", "FOCO PRINCIPAL", "_sku_is_text", "_sku_num", "Sku", "Descripción del Producto"]
00192 |     else:
00193 |         sort_cols = ["MARCA", "_sku_is_text", "_sku_num", "Sku", "Descripción del Producto"]
00194 | 
00195 |     df = df.sort_values(
00196 |         by=sort_cols,
00197 |         ascending=[True] * len(sort_cols),
00198 |         kind="mergesort",
00199 |     ).drop(columns=["_sku_is_text", "_sku_num"])
00200 | 
00201 |     return df

00203 | 
00204 | def _focus_principal(row) -> str:
00205 |     neg = _clean_yes(row.get("NEGATIVO", ""))
00206 |     quiebre = _clean_yes(row.get("RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", ""))
00207 |     venta0 = _venta_0_flag(row.get("Venta(+7)", 0))
00208 |     otros = _clean_otros(row.get("OTROS", ""))
00209 | 
00210 |     # prioridad semántica operativa
00211 |     if neg == "SI":
00212 |         return "NEGATIVO"
00213 |     if quiebre == "SI":
00214 |         return "QUIEBRE"
00215 |     if venta0 == "SI":
00216 |         return "VENTA 0"
00217 |     if otros:
00218 |         return "OTROS"
00219 |     return ""
00220 | 
00221 | 
00222 | def _accion_sugerida(foco_principal: str) -> str:
00223 |     if foco_principal == "NEGATIVO":
00224 |         return "Ajustar inventario y validar sala"
00225 |     if foco_principal == "QUIEBRE":
00226 |         return "Solicitar empuje o reposición"
00227 |     if foco_principal == "VENTA 0":
00228 |         return "Revisar exhibición, precio y rotación"
00229 |     if foco_principal == "OTROS":
00230 |         return "Revisar observación cliente"
00231 |     return ""
00232 | 
00233 | 
00234 | def _normalize_focos_export(foco) -> list[str]:
00235 |     valid = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
00236 | 
00237 |     if foco is None:
00238 |         raw = []
00239 |     elif isinstance(foco, str):
00240 |         raw = [x.strip() for x in foco.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
00241 |     else:
00242 |         raw = [str(x).strip() for x in foco if str(x).strip()]
00243 | 
00244 |     out = []
00245 |     for x in raw:
00246 |         if x in valid and x not in out:
00247 |             out.append(x)
00248 |     return out
00249 |

00251 | def build_focus_export_df(df_ux: pd.DataFrame, foco: str | list[str] = "Todo") -> pd.DataFrame:
00252 |     df = df_ux.copy()
00253 | 
00254 |     needed = [
00255 |         "fecha",
00256 |         "COD_RT",
00257 |         "LOCAL",
00258 |         "CLIENTE",
00259 |         "RUTERO",
00260 |         "REPONEDOR",
00261 |         "MARCA",
00262 |         "Sku",
00263 |         "Descripción del Producto",
00264 |         "Stock",
00265 |         "Venta(+7)",
00266 |         "NEGATIVO",
00267 |         "RIESGO DE QUIEBRE",
00268 |         "OTROS",
00269 |     ]
00270 |     for c in needed:
00271 |         if c not in df.columns:
00272 |             df[c] = ""
00273 | 
00274 |     df["Fecha stock"] = pd.to_datetime(df["fecha"], errors="coerce").dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d").fillna("")
00275 |     for c in ["COD_RT", "LOCAL", "CLIENTE", "RUTERO", "REPONEDOR", "MARCA"]:
00276 |         df[c] = df[c].astype(str).replace({"nan": "", "None": ""}).fillna("")
00277 |     df["Sku"] = df["Sku"].astype(str)
00278 |     df["Stock"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Stock"], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
00279 |     df["Venta(+7)"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Venta(+7)"], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
00280 | 
00281 |     df["VENTA 0"] = df["Venta(+7)"].apply(_venta_0_flag)
00282 |     df["NEGATIVO"] = df["NEGATIVO"].apply(_clean_yes)
00283 |     df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"] = df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"].apply(_clean_yes)
00284 |     df["OTROS"] = df["OTROS"].apply(_clean_otros)
00285 |     df["FOCO PRINCIPAL"] = df.apply(_focus_principal, axis=1)
00286 |     df["ACCIÓN SUGERIDA"] = df["FOCO PRINCIPAL"].apply(_accion_sugerida)
00287 | 
00288 |     focos = _normalize_focos_export(foco)
00289 | 
00290 |     if focos:
00291 |         mask = pd.Series(False, index=df.index)
00292 | 
00293 |         if "Venta 0" in focos:
00294 |             mask = mask | (df["VENTA 0"] == "SI")
00295 |         if "Negativo" in focos:
00296 |             mask = mask | (df["NEGATIVO"] == "SI")
00297 |         if "Quiebres" in focos:
00298 |             mask = mask | (df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"] == "SI")
00299 |         if "Otros" in focos:
00300 |             mask = mask | (df["OTROS"] != "")
00301 | 
00302 |         df = df[mask].copy()
00303 |     else:
00304 |         df = df[df["FOCO PRINCIPAL"] != ""].copy()
00305 | 
00306 |     if df.empty:
00307 |         return pd.DataFrame(columns=FOCUS_EXPORT_COLS)
00308 | 
00309 |     df = _sorted_for_export(df)
00310 |     return df[FOCUS_EXPORT_COLS]

00313 | def export_excel_generic(sheet_name: str, df_export: pd.DataFrame) -> bytes:
00314 |     out = io.BytesIO()
00315 |     safe_sheet = str(sheet_name or "DATA")[:31]
00316 |     df_export = _sorted_for_export(df_export)
00317 | 
00318 |     with pd.ExcelWriter(out, engine="openpyxl") as writer:
00319 |         df_export.to_excel(writer, index=False, sheet_name=safe_sheet)
00320 |         ws = writer.sheets[safe_sheet]
00321 |         ws.freeze_panes = "A2"
00322 |         ws.auto_filter.ref = ws.dimensions
00323 | 
00324 |         for col_cells in ws.columns:
00325 |             col_letter = col_cells[0].column_letter
00326 |             values = []
00327 |             for cell in col_cells[:200]:
00328 |                 if cell.value is not None:
00329 |                     values.append(len(str(cell.value)))
00330 |             max_len = max(values) if values else 10
00331 |             ws.column_dimensions[col_letter].width = min(max(10, max_len + 2), 45)
00332 | 
00333 |     return out.getvalue()

00418 | def _pdf_column_widths(columns: list[str]) -> tuple[list[float], object]:
00419 |     width_map_cm = {
00420 |         "Fecha stock": 2.1,
00421 |         "FECHA STOCK": 2.1,
00422 |         "MARCA": 2.2,
00423 |         "Sku": 2.0,
00424 |         "SKU": 2.0,
00425 |         "COD_RT": 2.0,
00426 |         "LOCAL": 4.2,
00427 |         "CLIENTE": 3.2,
00428 |         "RESP. TIPO": 2.5,
00429 |         "RESPONSABLE": 3.2,
00430 |         "RUTERO": 3.0,
00431 |         "REPONEDOR": 3.4,
00432 |         "CLIENTES": 2.2,
00433 |         "LOCALES": 2.0,
00434 |         "TOTAL SKUS": 2.3,
00435 |         "SKUS EN FOCO": 2.5,
00436 |         "Stock": 1.6,
00437 |         "STOCK": 1.6,
00438 |         "VENTA(+7)": 2.0,
00439 |         "VENTA 0": 1.9,
00440 |         "NEGATIVO": 2.0,
00441 |         "RIESGO DE QUIEBRE": 3.0,
00442 |         "QUIEBRES OBS.": 2.8,
00443 |         "OTROS": 2.4,
00444 |         "Descripción del Producto": 8.4,
00445 |         "PRODUCTO": 8.4,
00446 |         "FOCO PRINCIPAL": 2.8,
00447 |         "ACCIÓN SUGERIDA": 4.8,
00448 |     }
00449 |     widths_cm = [width_map_cm.get(col, 2.5) for col in columns]
00450 |     total_cm = sum(widths_cm)
00451 |     pagesize = landscape(A3) if len(columns) >= 10 or total_cm > 27.2 else landscape(A4)
00452 |     return [w * cm for w in widths_cm], pagesize

00454 | 
00455 | def export_pdf_generic(title_lines: list[str], df_export: pd.DataFrame, columns: list[str]) -> bytes:
00456 |     out = io.BytesIO()
00457 |     col_widths, pagesize = _pdf_column_widths(columns)
00458 |     doc = SimpleDocTemplate(
00459 |         out,
00460 |         pagesize=pagesize,
00461 |         leftMargin=0.8 * cm,
00462 |         rightMargin=0.8 * cm,
00463 |         topMargin=0.8 * cm,
00464 |         bottomMargin=0.8 * cm,
00465 |     )
00466 | 
00467 |     styles = getSampleStyleSheet()
00468 |     body = ParagraphStyle(
00469 |         "BodySmallWrap",
00470 |         parent=styles["BodyText"],
00471 |         fontName="Helvetica",
00472 |         fontSize=6.3,
00473 |         leading=7.2,
00474 |     )
00475 |     header = ParagraphStyle(
00476 |         "HeaderSmallWrap",
00477 |         parent=styles["BodyText"],
00478 |         fontName="Helvetica-Bold",
00479 |         fontSize=7,
00480 |         leading=8,
00481 |     )
00482 | 
00483 |     wrap_cols = {
00484 |         "Descripción del Producto",
00485 |         "PRODUCTO",
00486 |         "ACCIÓN SUGERIDA",
00487 |         "OTROS",
00488 |         "LOCAL",
00489 |         "CLIENTE",
00490 |         "RESPONSABLE",
00491 |         "RESP. TIPO",
00492 |         "RUTERO",
00493 |         "REPONEDOR",
00494 |         "FOCO PRINCIPAL",
00495 |     }
00496 |     numeric_cols = {
00497 |         "Stock",
00498 |         "STOCK",
00499 |         "TOTAL SKUS",
00500 |         "SKUS EN FOCO",
00501 |         "VENTA(+7)",
00502 |         "VENTA 0",
00503 |         "CLIENTES",
00504 |         "LOCALES",
00505 |     }
00506 |     center_cols = {
00507 |         "VENTA 0",
00508 |         "NEGATIVO",
00509 |         "RIESGO DE QUIEBRE",
00510 |         "QUIEBRES OBS.",
00511 |         "FOCO PRINCIPAL",
00512 |     }
00513 | 
00514 |     story = []
00515 |     for line in title_lines:
00516 |         story.append(Paragraph(line, styles["Heading4"]))
00517 |     story.append(Spacer(1, 8))
00518 | 
00519 |     df = _sorted_for_export(df_export)
00520 |     for c in columns:
00521 |         if c not in df.columns:
00522 |             df[c] = ""
00523 |     df = df[columns].copy()
00524 | 
00525 |     data = [[Paragraph(str(col), header) for col in columns]]
00526 |     for _, r in df.iterrows():
00527 |         row = []
00528 |         for c in columns:
00529 |             v = r.get(c, "")
00530 |             if c in wrap_cols:
00531 |                 row.append(Paragraph(str(v), body))
00532 |             else:
00533 |                 row.append(str(v))
00534 |         data.append(row)
00535 | 
00536 |     table = LongTable(data, colWidths=col_widths, repeatRows=1)
00537 |     style = [
00538 |         ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.HexColor("#E6E6E6")),
00539 |         ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.25, colors.HexColor("#CFCFCF")),
00540 |         ("VALIGN", (0, 0), (-1, -1), "TOP"),
00541 |         ("ROWBACKGROUNDS", (0, 1), (-1, -1), [colors.white, colors.HexColor("#F7F7F7")]),
00542 |         ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 3),
00543 |         ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 3),
00544 |         ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 2.5),
00545 |         ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 2.5),
00546 |     ]
00547 | 
00548 |     for idx, col in enumerate(columns):
00549 |         if col in numeric_cols:
00550 |             style.append(("ALIGN", (idx, 1), (idx, -1), "RIGHT"))
00551 |         elif col in center_cols:
00552 |             style.append(("ALIGN", (idx, 1), (idx, -1), "CENTER"))
00553 |         else:
00554 |             style.append(("ALIGN", (idx, 1), (idx, -1), "LEFT"))
00555 | 
00556 |     table.setStyle(TableStyle(style))
00557 |     story.append(table)
00558 |     doc.build(story)
00559 |     return out.getvalue()

00018 | def _qp_get(key: str, default: str = "") -> str:
00019 |     try:
00020 |         qp = st.query_params  # Streamlit moderno
00021 |         v = qp.get(key, default)
00022 |         if isinstance(v, list):
00023 |             return v[0] if v else default
00024 |         return v if v is not None else default
00025 |     except Exception:
00026 |         qp = st.experimental_get_query_params()
00027 |         v = qp.get(key, [default])
00028 |         return v[0] if isinstance(v, list) and v else default

00031 | def _as_bool(s: str) -> bool:
00032 |     s = (s or "").strip().lower()
00033 |     return s in {"1", "true", "t", "si", "sí", "y", "yes"}

00036 | def _infer_runtime_env() -> str:
00037 |     raw = (
00038 |         os.getenv("STOCKZERO_RUNTIME_ENV", "")
00039 |         or os.getenv("APP_ENV", "")
00040 |         or os.getenv("ENV", "")
00041 |     ).strip().lower()

00043 |         return raw
00044 |     if any(os.getenv(k) for k in ("IS_STREAMLIT_CLOUD", "STREAMLIT_RUNTIME", "STREAMLIT_CLOUD")):
00045 |         return "public"
00046 |     if os.name == "nt":

00055 | def _ensure_run_context() -> None:
00056 |     seq = int(st.session_state.get("_run_seq", 0)) + 1
00057 |     stamp = int(time.time() * 1000) % 1000000
00058 |     st.session_state["_run_seq"] = seq
00059 |     st.session_state["_run_id"] = f"RUN{seq:04d}-{stamp:06d}"

00064 | def _dbg(msg: str, tag: str = "UI", **kv) -> None:
00065 |     global DEBUG
00066 |     ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%H:%M:%S.%f")[:-3]
00067 |     ctx = {
00068 |         "run_id": st.session_state.get("_run_id", "-"),
00069 |         "env": st.session_state.get("_runtime_env", "-"),
00070 |         "path": st.session_state.get("_run_path", "-"),
00071 |         "mode": st.session_state.get("home_mode", "-"),
00072 |     }
00073 |     payload = {**ctx, **kv}
00074 |     extra = " ".join([f"{k}={v}" for k, v in payload.items()]) if payload else ""
00075 |     line = f"{ts} | {tag} | {msg}" + (f" | {extra}" if extra else "")
00076 | 
00077 |     try:
00078 |         logger.info("DBG %s", line)
00079 |     except Exception:
00080 |         pass
00081 | 
00082 |     if not DEBUG:
00083 |         return
00084 | 
00085 |     st.session_state.setdefault("_dbg_lines", [])
00086 |     st.session_state["_dbg_lines"].append(line)
00087 | 
00088 |     if len(st.session_state["_dbg_lines"]) > 250:
00089 |         st.session_state["_dbg_lines"] = st.session_state["_dbg_lines"][-250:]
00090 | 
00091 |     st.session_state["_dbg_last"] = f"{tag} | {msg}"
00092 | 
00093 | def _dbg_block() -> None:
00094 |     global DEBUG
00095 |     if not DEBUG:
00096 |         return
00097 |     st.sidebar.markdown("### 🛠 DEBUG")
00098 |     st.sidebar.caption(f"Último paso: {st.session_state.get('_dbg_last', '-')}")
00099 |     with st.sidebar.expander("Trace (últimos 250)", expanded=False):
00100 |         st.sidebar.code("\n".join(st.session_state.get("_dbg_lines", [])))
00101 | 
00102 | 
00103 | def _timed(label: str, tag: str = "UI"):
00104 |     class _T:
00105 |         def __enter__(self_):
00106 |             self_.t0 = time.perf_counter()
00107 |             _dbg(f"START {label}", tag=tag)
00108 |             return self_
00109 | 
00110 |         def __exit__(self_, exc_type, exc, tb):
00111 |             ms = round((time.perf_counter() - self_.t0) * 1000.0, 3)
00112 |             if exc_type is None:
00113 |                 _dbg(f"OK {label}", tag=tag, ms=ms)
00114 |             else:
00115 |                 _dbg(f"ERR {label}", tag=tag, ms=ms, exc=str(exc_type.__name__))
00116 |             return False
00117 | 
00118 |     return _T()

00124 | def _normalize_focos_ui(value) -> list[str]:
00125 |     if value is None:
00126 |         raw = []
00127 |     elif isinstance(value, str):
00128 |         raw = [x.strip() for x in value.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
00129 |     else:
00130 |         raw = [str(x).strip() for x in value if str(x).strip()]
00131 | 
00132 |     out = []
00133 |     for x in raw:
00134 |         if x in FOCO_OPTIONS and x not in out:
00135 |             out.append(x)
00136 |     return out
00137 | 
00138 | 
00139 | def _foco_label(value) -> str:
00140 |     focos = _normalize_focos_ui(value)
00141 |     return "Todo" if not focos else " | ".join(focos)
00142 | 
00143 | 
00144 | def _render_kpi_cards(kpis_row: dict | None) -> None:
00145 |     values = {
00146 |         "Venta 0": int((kpis_row or {}).get("venta_0") or 0),
00147 |         "Negativo": int((kpis_row or {}).get("negativos") or 0),
00148 |         "Quiebres": int((kpis_row or {}).get("quiebres") or 0),
00149 |         "Otros": int((kpis_row or {}).get("otros") or 0),
00150 |     }
00151 | 
00152 |     cards = [
00153 |         ("Venta 0", values["Venta 0"], "Productos sin rotación"),
00154 |         ("Negativo", values["Negativo"], "Ajustar inventario"),
00155 |         ("Quiebres", values["Quiebres"], "Solicitar empuje"),
00156 |         ("Otros", values["Otros"], "Observación cliente"),
00157 |     ]
00158 | 
00159 |     st.markdown(
00160 |         """
00161 | <style>
00162 | .sz-kpi-grid{
00163 |     display:grid;
00164 |     grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));
00165 |     gap:.75rem;
00166 |     margin:.35rem 0 .35rem 0;
00167 | }
00168 | .sz-kpi-card{
00169 |     border:1px solid rgba(128,128,128,.22);
00170 |     border-radius:12px;
00171 |     padding:.85rem .95rem;
00172 |     background:rgba(250,250,250,.02);
00173 | }
00174 | .sz-kpi-title{
00175 |     font-size:.95rem;
00176 |     font-weight:600;
00177 |     margin-bottom:.5rem;
00178 | }
00179 | .sz-kpi-body{
00180 |     display:flex;
00181 |     align-items:center;
00182 |     gap:.7rem;
00183 | }
00184 | .sz-kpi-value{
00185 |     font-size:2.1rem;
00186 |     line-height:1;
00187 |     font-weight:700;
00188 |     min-width:2.2rem;
00189 | }
00190 | .sz-kpi-desc{
00191 |     font-size:.98rem;
00192 |     line-height:1.2;
00193 |     opacity:.86;
00194 | }
00195 | </style>
00196 |         """,
00197 |         unsafe_allow_html=True,
00198 |     )
00199 | 
00200 |     cards_html = "".join(
00201 |         f'<div class="sz-kpi-card">'
00202 |         f'<div class="sz-kpi-title">{title}</div>'
00203 |         f'<div class="sz-kpi-body">'
00204 |         f'<div class="sz-kpi-value">{value}</div>'
00205 |         f'<div class="sz-kpi-desc">{desc}</div>'
00206 |         f'</div>'
00207 |         f'</div>'
00208 |         for title, value, desc in cards
00209 |     )
00210 | 
00211 |     st.markdown(f'<div class="sz-kpi-grid">{cards_html}</div>', unsafe_allow_html=True)
00212 |     
00213 | 
00214 | def _scope_value_or_none(value: str | None, all_token: str = "Todos") -> str | None:
00215 |     if value is None:
00216 |         return None
00217 |     v = str(value).strip()
00218 |     if not v:
00219 |         return None
00220 |     if v.upper() == str(all_token).strip().upper():
00221 |         return None
00222 |     if v.upper() == "— SELECCIONA TIPO —".upper():
00223 |         return None
00224 |     return v
00225 | 
00226 | 
00227 | def _df_total_rows(df: pd.DataFrame | None) -> int:
00228 |     if df is None or df.empty or "total_rows" not in df.columns:
00229 |         return 0
00230 |     try:
00231 |         return int(df["total_rows"].iloc[0] or 0)
00232 |     except Exception:
00233 |         return 0
00234 | 
00235 | 
00236 | def _drop_total_rows(df: pd.DataFrame | None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00237 |     if df is None:
00238 |         return pd.DataFrame()
00239 |     return df.drop(columns=["total_rows"], errors="ignore").copy()
00240 | 
00241 | 
00242 | def _rename_and_pick(
00243 |     df: pd.DataFrame | None,
00244 |     rename_map: dict[str, str],
00245 |     ordered_cols: list[str] | None = None,
00246 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
00247 |     view = _drop_total_rows(df).rename(columns=rename_map)
00248 |     if ordered_cols:
00249 |         for col in ordered_cols:
00250 |             if col not in view.columns:
00251 |                 view[col] = ""
00252 |         view = view[ordered_cols]
00253 |     return view
00254 |

00756 |         def _get_page_state(page_key: str, page_size: int = 25) -> tuple[int, int]:
00757 |             input_key = f"{page_key}_ui"
00758 | 
00759 |             st.session_state.setdefault(page_key, 1)
00760 |             st.session_state.setdefault(input_key, 1)
00761 | 
00762 |             try:
00763 |                 current_page = int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1))
00764 |             except Exception:
00765 |                 current_page = 1
00766 | 
00767 |             current_page = max(1, current_page)
00768 |             st.session_state[page_key] = current_page
00769 | 
00770 |             if int(st.session_state.get(input_key, current_page)) != current_page:
00771 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = current_page
00772 | 
00773 |             return current_page, (current_page - 1) * page_size
00774 | 
00775 |         def _render_scope_pager(page_key: str, total_rows: int, page_size: int = 25):
00776 |             input_key = f"{page_key}_ui"
00777 |             total_pages = max(1, int(math.ceil(total_rows / page_size))) if total_rows > 0 else 1
00778 | 
00779 |             if int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) > total_pages:
00780 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = total_pages
00781 |             if int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) < 1:
00782 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = 1
00783 | 
00784 |             current_page = int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1))
00785 |             if int(st.session_state.get(input_key, current_page)) != current_page:
00786 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = current_page
00787 | 
00788 |             def _prev():
00789 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = max(1, int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) - 1)
00790 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = st.session_state[page_key]
00791 | 
00792 |             def _next():
00793 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = min(total_pages, int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) + 1)
00794 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = st.session_state[page_key]
00795 | 
00796 |             def _from_input():
00797 |                 try:
00798 |                     new_page = int(st.session_state.get(input_key, 1))
00799 |                 except Exception:
00800 |                     new_page = 1
00801 |                 new_page = max(1, min(total_pages, new_page))
00802 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = new_page
00803 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = new_page
00804 | 
00805 |             if total_rows:
00806 |                 start = (current_page - 1) * page_size + 1
00807 |                 end = min(current_page * page_size, total_rows)
00808 |                 pager_text = f"{start}-{end} de {total_rows} registros"
00809 |             else:
00810 |                 pager_text = "Sin filas para el filtro aplicado."
00811 | 
00812 |             p1, p2, p3, p4 = st.columns([0.9, 1.3, 0.9, 2.2], gap="small")
00813 | 
00814 |             with p1:
00815 |                 st.button(
00816 |                     "◀",
00817 |                     key=f"{page_key}_prev_btn",
00818 |                     disabled=(current_page <= 1),
00819 |                     on_click=_prev,
00820 |                     use_container_width=True,
00821 |                 )
00822 | 
00823 |             with p2:
00824 |                 st.number_input(
00825 |                     "Página",
00826 |                     min_value=1,
00827 |                     max_value=max(1, total_pages),
00828 |                     step=1,
00829 |                     key=input_key,
00830 |                     on_change=_from_input,
00831 |                     label_visibility="collapsed",
00832 |                 )
00833 | 
00834 |             with p3:
00835 |                 st.button(
00836 |                     "▶",
00837 |                     key=f"{page_key}_next_btn",
00838 |                     disabled=(current_page >= total_pages),
00839 |                     on_click=_next,
00840 |                     use_container_width=True,
00841 |                 )
00842 | 
00843 |             with p4:
00844 |                 st.caption(pager_text)
00845 |

01604 | 
01605 |         def _cg_show(title: str, df: pd.DataFrame | None) -> None:
01606 |             st.markdown(f"#### {title}")
01607 |             if df is None or df.empty:
01608 |                 st.info("Sin filas para esta superficie del contrato B3.")
01609 |                 return
01610 |             st.dataframe(df, width="stretch", hide_index=True)
01611 | 
01612 |         try:
01613 |             smoke = db.get_cg_contract_smoke()
01614 |         except Exception as e:
01615 |             _dbg("FAIL cg_contract_smoke", err=repr(e))
01616 |             st.error("No pude validar el contrato B3 en db.py.")
01617 |             with st.expander("Detalles técnicos"):
01618 |                 st.code(repr(e))
01619 |                 if DEBUG:
01620 |                     st.code(traceback.format_exc())
01621 |             st.stop()
01622 | 
01623 |         smoke_status = str(smoke.get("smoke_status") or "unknown").upper()
01624 |         st.caption(f"B3 contrato público | smoke={smoke_status} | rol={role_sel} | módulo={module_sel}")
01625 | 
01626 |         smoke_rows = pd.DataFrame(smoke.get("results") or [])
01627 |         if smoke_rows.empty:
01628 |             st.warning("Smoke sin resultados. Revisa visibilidad de views public.v_cg_*.")
01629 |         else:
01630 |             st.dataframe(smoke_rows, width="stretch", hide_index=True)
01631 | 
01632 |         try:
01633 |             if module_sel == "Inicio":
01634 |                 if role_sel == "JEFE OPERACIONES":
01635 |                     with _timed("PAGE cg_inicio_jefe", tag="PAGE"):
01636 |                         df_inicio = db.get_cg_inicio_jefe(limit=200, offset=0)
01637 |                 else:
01638 |                     with _timed("PAGE cg_inicio_gestor", tag="PAGE"):
01639 |                         df_inicio = db.get_cg_inicio_gestor(limit=200, offset=0)
01640 | 
01641 |                 with _timed("PAGE cg_alertas_control_gestion", tag="PAGE"):
01642 |                     df_alertas = db.get_cg_alertas_control_gestion(limit=200, offset=0)
01643 | 
01644 |                 _cg_show("Inicio", df_inicio)
01645 |                 _cg_show("Alertas", df_alertas)
01646 | 
01647 |             else:
01648 |                 with _timed("PAGE cg_cumplimiento_semana_local_parity", tag="PAGE"):
01649 |                     df_parity = db.get_cg_cumplimiento_semana_local_parity(limit=200, offset=0)
01650 |                 with _timed("PAGE cg_cumplimiento_semana_scope", tag="PAGE"):
01651 |                     df_scope = db.get_cg_cumplimiento_semana_scope(limit=200, offset=0)
01652 |                 with _timed("PAGE cg_cumplimiento_detalle", tag="PAGE"):
01653 |                     df_detalle = db.get_cg_cumplimiento_detalle(limit=200, offset=0)
01654 | 
01655 |                 _cg_show("Cumplimiento parity", df_parity)
01656 |                 _cg_show("Cumplimiento scope", df_scope)
01657 |                 _cg_show("Detalle", df_detalle)
01658 | 
01659 |         except Exception as e:

02291 |     def _row_indicadores(r) -> str:
02292 |         parts = []
02293 | 
02294 |         try:
02295 |             v = int(r.get("Venta(+7)", 0) or 0)
02296 |         except Exception:
02297 |             v = 0
02298 |         if v == 0:
02299 |             parts.append("Venta 0: Productos sin rotación (Prioridad Alta).")
02300 | 
02301 |         if str(r.get("NEGATIVO", "")).strip().upper() == "SI":
02302 |             parts.append("Negativo: Realizar ajuste de inventario.")
02303 | 
02304 |         if str(r.get("RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", "")).strip().upper() == "SI":
02305 |             parts.append("Quiebres: Solicitar empuje.")
02306 | 
02307 |         ot = str(r.get("OTROS", "") or "").strip()
02308 |         if ot and ot.upper() not in {"NO", "N/A", "NA", "-"}:
02309 |             parts.append("Otros: Observaciones cliente.")
02310 | 
02311 |         return " · ".join(parts)

00105 | @st.cache_data(ttl=ACTIVE_DB_URL_TTL, show_spinner=False)
00106 | def _get_active_db_url_cached() -> str:
00107 |     cache_sig = _sig("active_db_url")
00108 |     _set_mark("INFRA", "active_db_url", cache_sig)
00109 | 
00110 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00111 |     primary, fallback = _get_db_urls()
00112 |     selected = "none"
00113 | 
00114 |     if primary and _probe_pg(primary, target="primary"):
00115 |         selected = "primary"
00116 |         out = primary
00117 |     elif fallback and _probe_pg(fallback, target="fallback"):
00118 |         logger.warning("Usando DB_URL_FALLBACK (primary no responde).")
00119 |         selected = "fallback"
00120 |         out = fallback
00121 |     else:
00122 |         out = primary or (fallback or "")
00123 |         if primary:
00124 |             selected = "primary_unchecked"
00125 |         elif fallback:
00126 |             selected = "fallback_unchecked"
00127 | 
00128 |     _trace(
00129 |         "INFRA",
00130 |         "active_db_url_exec",
00131 |         active_db_url_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00132 |         selected=selected,
00133 |         fallback_present=bool(fallback),
00134 |         ttl=ACTIVE_DB_URL_TTL,
00135 |     )
00136 |     return out

00139 | class AppError(RuntimeError):
00140 |     pass

00143 | TRACE_STATE_KEY = "_stock_zero_trace"
00144 | 
00145 | 
00146 | def _safe_session_state():
00147 |     try:
00148 |         return st.session_state
00149 |     except Exception:
00150 |         return None

00152 | 
00153 | def _infer_runtime_env() -> str:
00154 |     raw = (
00155 |         os.getenv("STOCKZERO_RUNTIME_ENV", "")
00156 |         or os.getenv("APP_ENV", "")
00157 |         or os.getenv("ENV", "")
00158 |     ).strip().lower()
00159 |     if raw in {"local", "public"}:
00160 |         return raw
00161 |     if any(os.getenv(k) for k in ("IS_STREAMLIT_CLOUD", "STREAMLIT_RUNTIME", "STREAMLIT_CLOUD")):
00162 |         return "public"
00163 |     if os.name == "nt":
00164 |         return "local"
00165 |     if any(Path(p).exists() for p in ("/mount/src", "/home/appuser", "/home/adminuser")):
00166 |         return "public"
00167 |     if (os.getenv("USER", "") or os.getenv("USERNAME", "")).strip().lower() in {"appuser", "adminuser"}:
00168 |         return "public"
00169 |     return "public" if os.name != "nt" else "local"

00171 | 
00172 | def _trace_ctx() -> dict[str, Any]:
00173 |     ss = _safe_session_state()
00174 |     return {
00175 |         "run_id": (ss.get("_run_id") if ss is not None else None) or "-",
00176 |         "env": (ss.get("_runtime_env") if ss is not None else None) or _infer_runtime_env(),
00177 |         "path": (ss.get("_run_path") if ss is not None else None) or "-",
00178 |         "mode": (ss.get("home_mode") if ss is not None else None) or "-",
00179 |     }
00180 | 
00181 | 
00182 | def _fmt_ms(seconds: float) -> float:
00183 |     return round(seconds * 1000.0, 3)
00184 | 
00185 | 
00186 | def _trace(tag: str, event: str, **kv) -> None:
00187 |     payload = {**_trace_ctx(), **kv}
00188 |     extra = " ".join(f"{k}={v}" for k, v in payload.items())
00189 |     try:
00190 |         logger.info("TRACE %s | %s | %s", tag, event, extra)
00191 |     except Exception:
00192 |         pass
00193 | 
00194 | 
00195 | def _sig(*parts: Any) -> str:
00196 |     try:
00197 |         raw = json.dumps(parts, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, default=str)
00198 |     except Exception:
00199 |         raw = repr(parts)
00200 |     return hashlib.md5(raw.encode("utf-8", errors="ignore")).hexdigest()[:12]
00201 | 
00202 | 
00203 | def _trace_bucket() -> dict[str, Any]:
00204 |     ss = _safe_session_state()
00205 |     if ss is None:
00206 |         return {}
00207 |     bucket = ss.get(TRACE_STATE_KEY)
00208 |     if not isinstance(bucket, dict):
00209 |         bucket = {"marks": {}}
00210 |         ss[TRACE_STATE_KEY] = bucket
00211 |     if "marks" not in bucket or not isinstance(bucket["marks"], dict):
00212 |         bucket["marks"] = {}
00213 |     return bucket
00214 | 
00215 | 
00216 | def _get_mark(scope: str, name: str, sig: str) -> str | None:
00217 |     bucket = _trace_bucket()
00218 |     return bucket.get("marks", {}).get(f"{scope}:{name}:{sig}")
00219 | 
00220 | 
00221 | def _set_mark(scope: str, name: str, sig: str) -> str:
00222 |     bucket = _trace_bucket()
00223 |     stamp = str(time.time_ns())
00224 |     bucket.setdefault("marks", {})[f"{scope}:{name}:{sig}"] = stamp
00225 |     return stamp

00228 | # =========================================================
00229 | # 1) INFRA
00230 | # =========================================================
00231 | def _get_db_urls() -> tuple[str, str | None]:
00232 |     primary = (os.getenv("DB_URL_APP", "") or os.getenv("DB_URL", "")).strip()
00233 |     fallback = os.getenv("DB_URL_FALLBACK", "").strip() or None
00234 |     if not primary and not fallback:
00235 |         raise AppError(
00236 |             "Configuración incompleta: falta DB_URL_APP/DB_URL.\n"
00237 |             "Solución: agrega en tu .env una línea:\n"
00238 |             "DB_URL_APP=postgresql://USER:PASS@HOST:PORT/DB"
00239 |         )
00240 |     return primary, fallback
00241 | 
00242 | 
00243 | def _probe_pg(url: str, target: str = "primary") -> bool:
00244 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00245 |     if psycopg2 is None:
00246 |         _trace(
00247 |             "INFRA",
00248 |             "probe_pg",
00249 |             target=target,
00250 |             probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00251 |             ok=True,
00252 |             driver="psycopg2_missing",
00253 |         )
00254 |         return True
00255 | 
00256 |     timeout = int(os.getenv("CONNECT_TIMEOUT", "3"))
00257 |     try:
00258 |         with psycopg2.connect(url, connect_timeout=timeout) as conn:
00259 |             with conn.cursor() as cur:
00260 |                 cur.execute("SELECT 1;")
00261 |         ok = True
00262 |     except Exception as e:
00263 |         ok = False
00264 |         _trace(
00265 |             "INFRA",
00266 |             "probe_pg_err",
00267 |             target=target,
00268 |             probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00269 |             ok=ok,
00270 |             err=type(e).__name__,
00271 |         )
00272 |         return ok
00273 | 
00274 |     _trace("INFRA", "probe_pg", target=target, probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), ok=ok)
00275 |     return ok
00276 | 
00277 | 
00278 | def get_active_db_url() -> str:
00279 |     cache_sig = _sig("active_db_url")
00280 |     before = _get_mark("INFRA", "active_db_url", cache_sig)
00281 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00282 |     out = _get_active_db_url_cached()
00283 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("INFRA", "active_db_url", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00284 |     _trace("INFRA", "get_active_db_url", active_db_url_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), cache_state=cache_state)
00285 |     return out

00288 | @st.cache_resource(show_spinner=False)
00289 | def _engine_cached(db_url: str) -> Engine:
00290 |     cache_sig = _sig(db_url)
00291 |     _set_mark("INFRA", "engine", cache_sig)
00292 | 
00293 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00294 |     pool_size = int(os.getenv("POOL_SIZE", "15"))
00295 |     max_overflow = int(os.getenv("MAX_OVERFLOW", "30"))
00296 |     pool_timeout = int(os.getenv("POOL_TIMEOUT", "30"))
00297 |     pool_recycle = int(os.getenv("POOL_RECYCLE", "1800"))
00298 | 
00299 |     connect_timeout = int(os.getenv("CONNECT_TIMEOUT", "3"))
00300 |     stmt_timeout_ms = int(os.getenv("STATEMENT_TIMEOUT_MS", "15000"))
00301 | 
00302 |     connect_args: dict[str, Any] = {"connect_timeout": connect_timeout}
00303 |     if stmt_timeout_ms > 0:
00304 |         connect_args["options"] = f"-c statement_timeout={stmt_timeout_ms}"
00305 | 
00306 |     eng = create_engine(
00307 |         db_url,
00308 |         pool_size=pool_size,
00309 |         max_overflow=max_overflow,
00310 |         pool_timeout=pool_timeout,
00311 |         pool_recycle=pool_recycle,
00312 |         pool_pre_ping=True,
00313 |         future=True,
00314 |         connect_args=connect_args,
00315 |     )
00316 |     _trace(
00317 |         "INFRA",
00318 |         "engine_exec",
00319 |         engine_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00320 |         pool_size=pool_size,
00321 |         max_overflow=max_overflow,
00322 |         pool_timeout=pool_timeout,
00323 |         pool_recycle=pool_recycle,
00324 |         stmt_timeout_ms=stmt_timeout_ms,
00325 |     )
00326 |     return eng
00327 |

00329 | def get_engine() -> Engine:
00330 |     db_url = get_active_db_url()

00332 |     before = _get_mark("INFRA", "engine", cache_sig)
00333 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00334 |     eng = _engine_cached(db_url)
00335 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("INFRA", "engine", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00336 |     _trace("INFRA", "get_engine", engine_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), cache_state=cache_state)
00337 |     return eng

00390 | @st.cache_data(ttl=300, show_spinner=False)
00391 | def _get_data_version_cached() -> str:
00392 |     cache_sig = _sig("data_version")
00393 |     _set_mark("DV", "data_version", cache_sig)
00394 | 
00395 |     eng = get_engine()
00396 |     candidates = [
00397 |         ("public.fact_stock_venta.ingested_at", "SELECT MAX(ingested_at) AS dv FROM public.fact_stock_venta;"),
00398 |         (RESULT_VIEW, f"SELECT MAX(fecha) AS dv FROM {RESULT_VIEW};"),
00399 |         ("public.v_data_version", "SELECT MAX(fecha_datos) AS dv FROM public.v_data_version;"),
00400 |     ]
00401 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00402 |     with eng.connect() as conn:
00403 |         for source, sql in candidates:
00404 |             try:
00405 |                 t_sql = time.perf_counter()
00406 |                 df = pd.read_sql(text(sql), conn)
00407 |                 read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)
00408 |                 dv = df.iloc[0]["dv"]
00409 |                 _trace("DV", "data_version_candidate", source=source, read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms, dv_found=dv is not None)
00410 |                 if dv is not None:
00411 |                     out = str(dv)
00412 |                     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source=source, dv=out)
00413 |                     return out
00414 |             except Exception as e:
00415 |                 _trace("DV", "data_version_candidate_err", source=source, err=type(e).__name__)
00416 |                 continue
00417 | 
00418 |     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source="none", dv="NA")
00419 |     return "NA"
00420 |

00437 | @st.cache_data(ttl=QDF_TTL, show_spinner=False)
00438 | def _qdf_cached(data_version: str, sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00439 |     cache_sig = _sig(data_version, sql, params or {})
00440 |     _set_mark("QUERY", "qdf", cache_sig)
00441 | 
00442 |     eng = get_engine()
00443 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00444 |     with eng.connect() as conn:
00445 |         t_sql = time.perf_counter()
00446 |         df = pd.read_sql(text(sql), conn, params=params)
00447 |         read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)
00448 | 
00449 |     total_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0)
00450 |     _trace(
00451 |         "QUERY",
00452 |         "qdf_exec",
00453 |         dv_sig=_sig(data_version),
00454 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00455 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00456 |         rows=len(df),
00457 |         read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00458 |         qdf_total_ms=total_ms,
00459 |         page_read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00460 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00461 |     )
00462 |     _trace(
00463 |         "PAGE",
00464 |         "page_exec",
00465 |         dv_sig=_sig(data_version),
00466 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00467 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00468 |         rows=len(df),
00469 |         page_read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00470 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,

00484 |         "QUERY",
00485 |         "qdf",
00486 |         dv_sig=_sig(dv),

00491 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,

00493 |         dv_state=dv_state,
00494 |     )
00495 |     _trace(

00556 | # =========================================================
00557 | # 2) HELPERS DE SCOPE / FILTROS
00558 | # =========================================================
00559 | def _modalidad_clause(modalidad: str | None, field: str = "rr.modalidad") -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00560 |     if modalidad and str(modalidad).strip():
00561 |         return (
00562 |             f" AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({field}, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:modalidad, '')))",
00563 |             {"modalidad": str(modalidad).strip()},
00564 |         )
00565 |     return "", {}
00566 | 
00567 | 
00568 | def _build_result_filters(
00569 |     marcas: list[str] | None,
00570 |     search: str,
00571 |     foco: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None,
00572 |     alias: str = "",
00573 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00574 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
00575 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
00576 |     filters: list[str] = []
00577 | 
00578 |     if marcas:
00579 |         filters.append(f'AND {pfx}"MARCA" = ANY(:marcas)')
00580 |         params["marcas"] = marcas
00581 | 
00582 |     valid_focos = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
00583 | 
00584 |     if isinstance(foco, str):
00585 |         raw_focos = [x.strip() for x in foco.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
00586 |     elif foco is None:
00587 |         raw_focos = []
00588 |     else:
00589 |         raw_focos = [str(x).strip() for x in foco if str(x).strip()]
00590 | 
00591 |     focos = []
00592 |     for item in raw_focos:
00593 |         if item in valid_focos and item not in focos:
00594 |             focos.append(item)
00595 | 
00596 |     if focos:
00597 |         foco_clauses: list[str] = []
00598 | 
00599 |         if "Venta 0" in focos:
00600 |             foco_clauses.append(f'COALESCE({pfx}"Venta(+7)", 0) = 0')
00601 | 
00602 |         if "Negativo" in focos:
00603 |             foco_clauses.append(f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}\"NEGATIVO\", ''))) = 'SI'")
00604 | 
00605 |         if "Quiebres" in focos:
00606 |             foco_clauses.append(f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}\"RIESGO DE QUIEBRE\", ''))) = 'SI'")
00607 | 
00608 |         if "Otros" in focos:
00609 |             foco_clauses.append(
00610 |                 f"""
00611 |                 (
00612 |                     NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}"OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00613 |                     AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}"OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00614 |                 )
00615 |                 """
00616 |             )
00617 | 
00618 |         if foco_clauses:
00619 |             filters.append("AND (" + " OR ".join(f"({c})" for c in foco_clauses) + ")")
00620 | 
00621 |     s = (search or "").strip()
00622 |     if len(s) >= 2:
00623 |         filters.append(
00624 |             f"""
00625 |             AND (
00626 |                 CAST({pfx}"Sku" AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
00627 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}"Descripción del Producto", '') ILIKE :q
00628 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}"MARCA", '') ILIKE :q
00629 |             )
00630 |             """
00631 |         )
00632 |         params["q"] = f"%{s}%"
00633 | 
00634 |     return "\n".join(filters), params
00635 | 
00636 | 
00637 | 
00638 | def _rr_scope_exists(alias: str = "v", modalidad: str | None = None) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00639 |     modalidad_sql, modalidad_params = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "rr.modalidad")
00640 |     sql = f"""
00641 |         EXISTS (
00642 |             SELECT 1
00643 |             FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
00644 |             WHERE rr.cod_rt = {alias}.cod_rt
00645 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00646 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00647 |               {modalidad_sql}
00648 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({alias}."MARCA", '')))
00649 |         )
00650 |     """
00651 |     return sql, modalidad_params
00652 |

00655 | # 3) SELECTORES / CONTEXTO DESDE RUTA_RUTERO
00656 | # =========================================================
00657 | def get_rutero_reponedor() -> pd.DataFrame:
00658 |     return qdf(f"""
00659 |         SELECT DISTINCT
00660 |             TRIM(rutero) AS rutero,
00661 |             TRIM(reponedor) AS reponedor
00662 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00663 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00664 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00665 |         ORDER BY rutero, reponedor
00666 |     """)

00669 | def get_locales(rutero: str, reponedor: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
00670 |     return qdf(f"""
00671 |         SELECT DISTINCT
00672 |             cod_rt,
00673 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt) AS nombre_local_rr
00674 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00675 |         WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00676 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00677 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cod_rt, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00678 |         ORDER BY cod_rt, nombre_local_rr
00679 |     """, {"rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor})

00682 | def get_contexto_local(
00683 |     rutero: str,
00684 |     reponedor: str,
00685 |     cod_rt: str,
00686 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
00687 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
00688 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "modalidad")
00689 |     sql = f"""
00690 |         SELECT
00691 |             cod_rt,
00692 |             MAX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt)) AS nombre_local_rr,
00693 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), '')) AS clientes,
00694 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), '')) AS modalidades,
00695 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), '')) AS mercaderistas
00696 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00697 |         WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
00698 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00699 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00700 |           {modalidad_sql}
00701 |         GROUP BY cod_rt
00702 |     """
00703 |     params = {
00704 |         "rutero": rutero,
00705 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
00706 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00707 |         **extra,
00708 |     }
00709 |     return _selector_df("get_contexto_local", sql, params)

00820 | def get_marcas(

00841 | 
00842 | def get_kpis_local_home(cod_rt: str, marcas: list[str] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00843 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search="", foco="Todo", alias="v")
00844 |     return qdf(f"""
00845 |         SELECT
00846 |             MAX(v.fecha) AS fecha_stock,
00847 |             COUNT(*)::int AS total_skus,
00848 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(v."Venta(+7)", 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS venta_0,
00849 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."NEGATIVO", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS negativos,
00850 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS quiebres,
00851 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE
00852 |                 WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00853 |                  AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00854 |                 THEN 1 ELSE 0
00855 |             END), 0)::int AS otros
00856 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00857 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00858 |         {where_extra}
00859 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, **p2})

00870 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search="", foco="Todo", alias="v")
00871 |     return qdf(f"""
00872 |         SELECT
00873 |             MAX(v.fecha) AS fecha_stock,
00874 |             COUNT(*)::int AS total_skus,
00875 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(v."Venta(+7)", 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS venta_0,
00876 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."NEGATIVO", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS negativos,
00877 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS quiebres,
00878 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE
00879 |                 WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00880 |                  AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00881 |                 THEN 1 ELSE 0
00882 |             END), 0)::int AS otros
00883 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v

00886 |           {where_extra}

00896 | def get_tabla_ux_total_home(
00897 |     cod_rt: str,
00898 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
00899 |     foco: str = "Todo",
00900 |     search: str = "",
00901 | ) -> int:
00902 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search, foco, alias="v")
00903 |     df = qdf(f"""
00904 |         SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total
00905 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00906 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00907 |         {where_extra}
00908 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, **p2})
00909 |     return int(df.iloc[0]["total"]) if df is not None and not df.empty else 0

00911 | 
00912 | def get_tabla_ux_page_home(
00913 |     cod_rt: str,
00914 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
00915 |     page: int = 1,
00916 |     page_size: int = 25,
00917 |     foco: str = "Todo",
00918 |     search: str = "",
00919 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
00920 |     page = max(int(page or 1), 1)
00921 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search, foco, alias="v")
00922 |     return qdf(f"""
00923 |         SELECT
00924 |           v.fecha,
00925 |           v."MARCA", v."Sku", v."Descripción del Producto",
00926 |           v."Stock", v."Venta(+7)", v."NEGATIVO", v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", v."OTROS"
00927 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00928 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00929 |         {where_extra}
00930 |         ORDER BY
00931 |           v."MARCA" ASC,
00932 |           CASE WHEN v."Sku" ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
00933 |           CASE WHEN v."Sku" ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN (v."Sku")::bigint END ASC NULLS LAST,
00934 |           v."Sku" ASC,
00935 |           v."Descripción del Producto" ASC
00936 |         LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
00937 |     """, {
00938 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00939 |         "limit": int(page_size),
00940 |         "offset": (page - 1) * int(page_size),
00941 |         **p2,
00942 |     })

00970 | def get_tabla_ux_total(
00971 |     rutero: str,
00972 |     reponedor: str,
00973 |     cod_rt: str,
00974 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
00975 |     foco: str = "Todo",
00976 |     search: str = "",
00977 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
00978 | ) -> int:
00979 |     exists_sql, extra = _rr_scope_exists("v", modalidad=modalidad)
00980 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search, foco, alias="v")
00981 |     df = qdf(f"""
00982 |         SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total
00983 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00984 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00985 |           AND {exists_sql}
00986 |           {where_extra}
00987 |     """, {
00988 |         "rutero": rutero,
00989 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
00990 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00991 |         **extra,
00992 |         **p2,
00993 |     })
00994 |     return int(df.iloc[0]["total"]) if df is not None and not df.empty else 0

00997 | def get_tabla_ux_page(
00998 |     rutero: str,
00999 |     reponedor: str,
01000 |     cod_rt: str,
01001 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
01002 |     page: int = 1,
01003 |     page_size: int = 25,
01004 |     foco: str = "Todo",
01005 |     search: str = "",
01006 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
01007 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01008 |     page = max(int(page or 1), 1)
01009 |     exists_sql, extra = _rr_scope_exists("v", modalidad=modalidad)
01010 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search, foco, alias="v")
01011 |     return qdf(f"""
01012 |         SELECT
01013 |           v.fecha,
01014 |           v."MARCA", v."Sku", v."Descripción del Producto",
01015 |           v."Stock", v."Venta(+7)", v."NEGATIVO", v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", v."OTROS"
01016 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
01017 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
01018 |           AND {exists_sql}
01019 |           {where_extra}
01020 |         ORDER BY
01021 |           v."MARCA" ASC,
01022 |           CASE WHEN v."Sku" ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
01023 |           CASE WHEN v."Sku" ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN (v."Sku")::bigint END ASC NULLS LAST,
01024 |           v."Sku" ASC,
01025 |           v."Descripción del Producto" ASC
01026 |         LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
01027 |     """, {
01028 |         "rutero": rutero,
01029 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
01030 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
01031 |         "limit": int(page_size),
01032 |         "offset": (page - 1) * int(page_size),
01033 |         **extra,
01034 |         **p2,
01035 |     })

01038 | def get_tabla_ux_paginada(
01039 |     rutero: str,
01040 |     reponedor: str,
01041 |     cod_rt: str,
01042 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
01043 |     page: int = 1,
01044 |     page_size: int = 25,
01045 |     foco: str = "Todo",
01046 |     search: str = "",
01047 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
01048 | ) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, int]:
01049 |     total = get_tabla_ux_total(
01050 |         rutero=rutero,
01051 |         reponedor=reponedor,
01052 |         cod_rt=cod_rt,
01053 |         marcas=marcas,
01054 |         foco=foco,
01055 |         search=search,
01056 |         modalidad=modalidad,
01057 |     )
01058 |     df = get_tabla_ux_page(
01059 |         rutero=rutero,
01060 |         reponedor=reponedor,
01061 |         cod_rt=cod_rt,
01062 |         marcas=marcas,
01063 |         page=page,
01064 |         page_size=page_size,
01065 |         foco=foco,
01066 |         search=search,
01067 |         modalidad=modalidad,
01068 |     )
01069 |     return df, int(total or 0)
