00390 | @st.cache_data(ttl=300, show_spinner=False)
00391 | def _get_data_version_cached() -> str:
00392 |     cache_sig = _sig("data_version")
00393 |     _set_mark("DV", "data_version", cache_sig)
00394 | 
00395 |     eng = get_engine()
00396 |     candidates = [
00397 |         ("public.fact_stock_venta.ingested_at", "SELECT MAX(ingested_at) AS dv FROM public.fact_stock_venta;"),
00398 |         (RESULT_VIEW, f"SELECT MAX(fecha) AS dv FROM {RESULT_VIEW};"),
00399 |         ("public.v_data_version", "SELECT MAX(fecha_datos) AS dv FROM public.v_data_version;"),
00400 |     ]
00401 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00402 |     with eng.connect() as conn:
00403 |         for source, sql in candidates:
00404 |             try:
00405 |                 t_sql = time.perf_counter()
00406 |                 df = pd.read_sql(text(sql), conn)
00407 |                 read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)
00408 |                 dv = df.iloc[0]["dv"]
00409 |                 _trace("DV", "data_version_candidate", source=source, read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms, dv_found=dv is not None)
00410 |                 if dv is not None:
00411 |                     out = str(dv)
00412 |                     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source=source, dv=out)
00413 |                     return out
00414 |             except Exception as e:
00415 |                 _trace("DV", "data_version_candidate_err", source=source, err=type(e).__name__)
00416 |                 continue
00417 | 
00418 |     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source="none", dv="NA")
00419 |     return "NA"
00420 |

00422 | def _get_data_version_with_state() -> tuple[str, str]:
00423 |     cache_sig = _sig("data_version")
00424 |     before = _get_mark("DV", "data_version", cache_sig)
00425 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00426 |     out = _get_data_version_cached()
00427 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("DV", "data_version", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00428 |     _trace("DV", "get_data_version", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), cache_state=cache_state, dv=out)
00429 |     return out, cache_state

00431 | 
00432 | def get_data_version() -> str:
00433 |     out, _ = _get_data_version_with_state()

00437 | @st.cache_data(ttl=QDF_TTL, show_spinner=False)
00438 | def _qdf_cached(data_version: str, sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00439 |     cache_sig = _sig(data_version, sql, params or {})
00440 |     _set_mark("QUERY", "qdf", cache_sig)
00441 | 
00442 |     eng = get_engine()
00443 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00444 |     with eng.connect() as conn:
00445 |         t_sql = time.perf_counter()
00446 |         df = pd.read_sql(text(sql), conn, params=params)
00447 |         read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)
00448 | 
00449 |     total_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0)
00450 |     _trace(
00451 |         "QUERY",
00452 |         "qdf_exec",
00453 |         dv_sig=_sig(data_version),
00454 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00455 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00456 |         rows=len(df),
00457 |         read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00458 |         qdf_total_ms=total_ms,
00459 |         page_read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00460 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00461 |     )
00462 |     _trace(
00463 |         "PAGE",
00464 |         "page_exec",
00465 |         dv_sig=_sig(data_version),
00466 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00467 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00468 |         rows=len(df),
00469 |         page_read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00470 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00471 |     )
00472 |     return df
00473 | 
00474 | 
00475 | def qdf(sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00476 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00477 |     dv, dv_state = _get_data_version_with_state()
00478 |     cache_sig = _sig(dv, sql, params or {})
00479 |     before = _get_mark("QUERY", "qdf", cache_sig)
00480 |     df = _qdf_cached(dv, sql, params)
00481 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("QUERY", "qdf", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00482 |     total_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0)
00483 |     _trace(
00484 |         "QUERY",
00485 |         "qdf",
00486 |         dv_sig=_sig(dv),
00487 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00488 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00489 |         rows=0 if df is None else len(df),
00490 |         qdf_total_ms=total_ms,
00491 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00492 |         cache_state=cache_state,
00493 |         dv_state=dv_state,
00494 |     )
00495 |     _trace(
00496 |         "PAGE",
00497 |         "page",
00498 |         dv_sig=_sig(dv),
00499 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00500 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00501 |         rows=0 if df is None else len(df),
00502 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00503 |         cache_state=cache_state,
00504 |         dv_state=dv_state,
00505 |     )
00506 |     return df

00551 |         dv_state="not_used",

00555 | 
00556 | # =========================================================
00557 | # 2) HELPERS DE SCOPE / FILTROS
00558 | # =========================================================
00559 | def _modalidad_clause(modalidad: str | None, field: str = "rr.modalidad") -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00560 |     if modalidad and str(modalidad).strip():
00561 |         return (
00562 |             f" AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({field}, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:modalidad, '')))",
00563 |             {"modalidad": str(modalidad).strip()},
00564 |         )
00565 |     return "", {}
00566 | 
00567 | 
00568 | def _build_result_filters(
00569 |     marcas: list[str] | None,
00570 |     search: str,
00571 |     foco: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None,
00572 |     alias: str = "",
00573 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00574 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
00575 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
00576 |     filters: list[str] = []
00577 | 
00578 |     if marcas:
00579 |         filters.append(f'AND {pfx}"MARCA" = ANY(:marcas)')
00580 |         params["marcas"] = marcas
00581 | 
00582 |     valid_focos = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
00583 | 
00584 |     if isinstance(foco, str):
00585 |         raw_focos = [x.strip() for x in foco.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
00586 |     elif foco is None:
00587 |         raw_focos = []
00588 |     else:
00589 |         raw_focos = [str(x).strip() for x in foco if str(x).strip()]
00590 | 
00591 |     focos = []
00592 |     for item in raw_focos:
00593 |         if item in valid_focos and item not in focos:
00594 |             focos.append(item)
00595 | 
00596 |     if focos:
00597 |         foco_clauses: list[str] = []
00598 | 
00599 |         if "Venta 0" in focos:
00600 |             foco_clauses.append(f'COALESCE({pfx}"Venta(+7)", 0) = 0')
00601 | 
00602 |         if "Negativo" in focos:
00603 |             foco_clauses.append(f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}\"NEGATIVO\", ''))) = 'SI'")
00604 | 
00605 |         if "Quiebres" in focos:
00606 |             foco_clauses.append(f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}\"RIESGO DE QUIEBRE\", ''))) = 'SI'")
00607 | 
00608 |         if "Otros" in focos:
00609 |             foco_clauses.append(
00610 |                 f"""
00611 |                 (
00612 |                     NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}"OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00613 |                     AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}"OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00614 |                 )
00615 |                 """
00616 |             )
00617 | 
00618 |         if foco_clauses:
00619 |             filters.append("AND (" + " OR ".join(f"({c})" for c in foco_clauses) + ")")
00620 | 
00621 |     s = (search or "").strip()
00622 |     if len(s) >= 2:
00623 |         filters.append(
00624 |             f"""
00625 |             AND (
00626 |                 CAST({pfx}"Sku" AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
00627 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}"Descripción del Producto", '') ILIKE :q
00628 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}"MARCA", '') ILIKE :q
00629 |             )
00630 |             """
00631 |         )
00632 |         params["q"] = f"%{s}%"
00633 | 
00634 |     return "\n".join(filters), params
00635 | 
00636 | 
00637 | 
00638 | def _rr_scope_exists(alias: str = "v", modalidad: str | None = None) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00639 |     modalidad_sql, modalidad_params = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "rr.modalidad")
00640 |     sql = f"""
00641 |         EXISTS (
00642 |             SELECT 1
00643 |             FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
00644 |             WHERE rr.cod_rt = {alias}.cod_rt
00645 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00646 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00647 |               {modalidad_sql}
00648 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({alias}."MARCA", '')))
00649 |         )
00650 |     """
00651 |     return sql, modalidad_params

00654 | # =========================================================
00655 | # 3) SELECTORES / CONTEXTO DESDE RUTA_RUTERO
00656 | # =========================================================
00657 | def get_rutero_reponedor() -> pd.DataFrame:
00658 |     return qdf(f"""
00659 |         SELECT DISTINCT
00660 |             TRIM(rutero) AS rutero,
00661 |             TRIM(reponedor) AS reponedor
00662 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00663 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00664 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00665 |         ORDER BY rutero, reponedor
00666 |     """)
00667 |

00669 | def get_locales(rutero: str, reponedor: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
00670 |     return qdf(f"""
00671 |         SELECT DISTINCT
00672 |             cod_rt,
00673 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt) AS nombre_local_rr
00674 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00675 |         WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00676 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00677 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cod_rt, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00678 |         ORDER BY cod_rt, nombre_local_rr
00679 |     """, {"rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor})

00681 | 
00682 | def get_contexto_local(
00683 |     rutero: str,
00684 |     reponedor: str,
00685 |     cod_rt: str,
00686 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
00687 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
00688 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "modalidad")
00689 |     sql = f"""
00690 |         SELECT
00691 |             cod_rt,
00692 |             MAX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt)) AS nombre_local_rr,
00693 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), '')) AS clientes,
00694 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), '')) AS modalidades,
00695 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), '')) AS mercaderistas
00696 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00697 |         WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
00698 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00699 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00700 |           {modalidad_sql}
00701 |         GROUP BY cod_rt
00702 |     """
00703 |     params = {
00704 |         "rutero": rutero,
00705 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
00706 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00707 |         **extra,
00708 |     }
00709 |     return _selector_df("get_contexto_local", sql, params)

00767 | def get_mercaderistas_home() -> pd.DataFrame:

00770 |             TRIM(reponedor) AS mercaderista
00771 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00772 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00773 |         ORDER BY mercaderista
00774 |     """)
00775 | 
00776 | 
00777 | def get_locales_por_mercaderista(mercaderista: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
00778 |     return qdf(f"""
00779 |         SELECT DISTINCT
00780 |             cod_rt,
00781 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt) AS nombre_local
00782 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00783 |         WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:mercaderista, '')))
00784 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cod_rt, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00785 |         ORDER BY cod_rt, nombre_local
00786 |     """, {"mercaderista": mercaderista})

00789 | def get_contexto_local_home(cod_rt: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
00790 |     sql = f"""
00791 |         SELECT
00792 |             cod_rt,
00793 |             MAX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt)) AS local_nombre,
00794 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), ''), ' | '
00795 |                        ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), '')) AS clientes,
00796 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), ''), ' | '
00797 |                        ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), '')) AS mercaderistas,
00798 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), ''), ' | '
00799 |                        ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), '')) AS modalidades
00800 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00801 |         WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
00802 |         GROUP BY cod_rt
00803 |     """
00804 |     return _selector_df("get_contexto_local_home", sql, {"cod_rt": cod_rt})

00842 | def get_kpis_local_home(cod_rt: str, marcas: list[str] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00843 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search="", foco="Todo", alias="v")
00844 |     return qdf(f"""
00845 |         SELECT
00846 |             MAX(v.fecha) AS fecha_stock,
00847 |             COUNT(*)::int AS total_skus,
00848 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(v."Venta(+7)", 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS venta_0,
00849 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."NEGATIVO", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS negativos,
00850 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS quiebres,
00851 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE
00852 |                 WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00853 |                  AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00854 |                 THEN 1 ELSE 0
00855 |             END), 0)::int AS otros
00856 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00857 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00858 |         {where_extra}
00859 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, **p2})

00912 | def get_tabla_ux_page_home(
00913 |     cod_rt: str,
00914 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
00915 |     page: int = 1,
00916 |     page_size: int = 25,
00917 |     foco: str = "Todo",
00918 |     search: str = "",
00919 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:

00933 |           CASE WHEN v."Sku" ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN (v."Sku")::bigint END ASC NULLS LAST,
00934 |           v."Sku" ASC,
00935 |           v."Descripción del Producto" ASC
00936 |         LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
00937 |     """, {
00938 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00939 |         "limit": int(page_size),
00940 |         "offset": (page - 1) * int(page_size),
00941 |         **p2,
00942 |     })

01106 | 
01107 | 
01108 | def _scope_tipo_norm(value: str | None) -> str | None:
01109 |     v = str(value or "").strip().upper()
01110 |     return v if v in {"GESTOR", "SUPERVISOR"} else None
01111 | 
01112 | 
01113 | def _scope_match_text_expr(
01114 |     alias: str,
01115 |     preferred_field: str,
01116 |     fallback_field: str | None = None,
01117 | ) -> str:
01118 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01119 |     parts = [f"NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}{preferred_field}, '')), '')"]
01120 |     if fallback_field and fallback_field != preferred_field:
01121 |         parts.append(f"NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}{fallback_field}, '')), '')")
01122 |     parts.append("''")
01123 |     return "COALESCE(" + ", ".join(parts) + ")"
01124 | 
01125 | 
01126 | # =========================================================
01127 | # 5) CLIENTE_SCOPE SOBRE VISTAS DEDICADAS
01128 | # =========================================================
01129 | def _scope_norm_expr(field: str) -> str:
01130 |     return f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({field}, '')))"
01131 | 
01132 | 
01133 | def _scope_is_selected(value: str | None) -> bool:
01134 |     if value is None:
01135 |         return False
01136 |     v = str(value).strip()
01137 |     return bool(v) and v.upper() != "TODOS"
01138 | 
01139 | 
01140 | def _normalize_scope_focos(
01141 |     focos: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None,
01142 | ) -> list[str]:
01143 |     valid_focos = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
01144 | 
01145 |     if isinstance(focos, str):
01146 |         raw = [x.strip() for x in focos.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
01147 |     elif focos is None:
01148 |         raw = []
01149 |     else:
01150 |         raw = [str(x).strip() for x in focos if str(x).strip()]
01151 | 
01152 |     out: list[str] = []
01153 |     for item in raw:
01154 |         if item in valid_focos and item not in out:
01155 |             out.append(item)
01156 |     return out
01157 | 
01158 | 
01159 | def _scope_page_clause(
01160 |     limit: int | None,
01161 |     offset: int | None,
01162 |     params: dict[str, Any],
01163 | ) -> str:
01164 |     if limit is None:
01165 |         return ""
01166 |     params["limit"] = max(int(limit), 1)
01167 |     params["offset"] = max(int(offset or 0), 0)
01168 |     return " LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset "
01169 | 
01170 | 
01171 | def _scope_cliente_filters(
01172 |     *,
01173 |     alias: str = "",
01174 |     marca: str | None = None,
01175 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01176 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01177 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01178 |     cliente_field: str = "cliente_norm",
01179 |     responsable_field: str = "responsable_norm",
01180 |     responsable_tipo_field: str = "responsable_tipo",
01181 |     marca_field: str = "marca",
01182 |     apply_marca_intersection: bool = False,
01183 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
01184 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01185 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
01186 |     filters: list[str] = []
01187 | 
01188 |     if _scope_is_selected(cliente):
01189 |         filters.append(
01190 |             f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{cliente_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':cliente')}"
01191 |         )
01192 |         params["cliente"] = str(cliente).strip()
01193 | 
01194 |     tipo_norm = _scope_tipo_norm(responsable_tipo)
01195 | 
01196 |     if _scope_is_selected(responsable) and tipo_norm is None:
01197 |         filters.append("AND 1=0")
01198 | 
01199 |     if tipo_norm is not None:
01200 |         filters.append(
01201 |             f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{responsable_tipo_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':responsable_tipo')}"
01202 |         )
01203 |         params["responsable_tipo"] = tipo_norm
01204 | 
01205 |     if _scope_is_selected(responsable):
01206 |         filters.append(
01207 |             f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{responsable_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':responsable')}"
01208 |         )
01209 |         params["responsable"] = str(responsable).strip()
01210 | 
01211 |     if _scope_is_selected(marca):
01212 |         params["marca"] = str(marca).strip()
01213 |         if apply_marca_intersection:
01214 |             cliente_match_expr = _scope_match_text_expr(
01215 |                 alias,
01216 |                 cliente_field,
01217 |                 "cliente" if cliente_field != "cliente" else None,
01218 |             )
01219 |             filters.append(
01220 |                 f"""
01221 |                 AND EXISTS (
01222 |                     SELECT 1
01223 |                     FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01224 |                     WHERE b.cod_rt = {pfx}cod_rt
01225 |                       AND {_scope_norm_expr('b.cliente')} = {_scope_norm_expr(cliente_match_expr)}
01226 |                       AND {_scope_norm_expr('b.marca')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':marca')}
01227 |                 )
01228 |                 """
01229 |             )
01230 |         else:
01231 |             filters.append(
01232 |                 f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{marca_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':marca')}"
01233 |             )
01234 | 
01235 |     return "\n".join(filters), params
01236 | 
01237 | 
01238 | def _scope_summary_filters(
01239 |     *,
01240 |     alias: str = "",
01241 |     marca: str | None = None,
01242 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01243 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01244 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01245 |     focos: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None = None,
01246 |     search: str = "",
01247 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
01248 |     filters_sql, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01249 |         alias=alias,
01250 |         marca=marca,
01251 |         cliente=cliente,
01252 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01253 |         responsable=responsable,
01254 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01255 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01256 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01257 |         marca_field="marca",
01258 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01259 |     )
01260 | 
01261 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01262 |     filters: list[str] = [filters_sql] if filters_sql else []
01263 | 
01264 |     focos_norm = _normalize_scope_focos(focos)
01265 |     if focos_norm:
01266 |         foco_clauses: list[str] = []
01267 |         if "Venta 0" in focos_norm:
01268 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}venta_0, 0) > 0")
01269 |         if "Negativo" in focos_norm:
01270 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}negativos, 0) > 0")
01271 |         if "Quiebres" in focos_norm:
01272 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}quiebres, 0) > 0")
01273 |         if "Otros" in focos_norm:
01274 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}otros, 0) > 0")
01275 |         if foco_clauses:
01276 |             filters.append("AND (" + " OR ".join(f"({c})" for c in foco_clauses) + ")")
01277 | 
01278 |     s = (search or "").strip()
01279 |     if len(s) >= 2:
01280 |         filters.append(
01281 |             f"""
01282 |             AND (
01283 |                 CAST({pfx}cod_rt AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
01284 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}local_nombre_rr, '') ILIKE :q
01285 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}cliente, '') ILIKE :q
01286 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}responsable, '') ILIKE :q
01287 |             )
01288 |             """
01289 |         )
01290 |         params["q"] = f"%{s}%"
01291 | 
01292 |     return "\n".join(x for x in filters if x), params
01293 | 
01294 | 
01295 | def _scope_detail_filters(
01296 |     *,
01297 |     alias: str = "",
01298 |     marca: str | None = None,
01299 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01300 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01301 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01302 |     focos: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None = None,
01303 |     search: str = "",
01304 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
01305 |     filters_sql, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01306 |         alias=alias,
01307 |         marca=marca,
01308 |         cliente=cliente,
01309 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01310 |         responsable=responsable,
01311 |         cliente_field="cliente",
01312 |         responsable_field="responsable",
01313 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01314 |         marca_field="marca",
01315 |         apply_marca_intersection=False,
01316 |     )
01317 | 
01318 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01319 |     filters: list[str] = [filters_sql] if filters_sql else []
01320 | 
01321 |     focos_norm = _normalize_scope_focos(focos)
01322 |     if focos_norm:
01323 |         foco_clauses: list[str] = []
01324 |         if "Venta 0" in focos_norm:
01325 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}venta_7, 0) = 0")
01326 |         if "Negativo" in focos_norm:
01327 |             foco_clauses.append(f"{_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}negativo')} = 'SI'")
01328 |         if "Quiebres" in focos_norm:
01329 |             foco_clauses.append(f"{_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}riesgo_quiebre')} = 'SI'")
01330 |         if "Otros" in focos_norm:
01331 |             foco_clauses.append(
01332 |                 f"""
01333 |                 (
01334 |                     NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}otros, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01335 |                     AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}otros')} NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
01336 |                 )
01337 |                 """
01338 |             )
01339 |         if foco_clauses:
01340 |             filters.append("AND (" + " OR ".join(f"({c})" for c in foco_clauses) + ")")
01341 | 
01342 |     s = (search or "").strip()
01343 |     if len(s) >= 2:
01344 |         filters.append(
01345 |             f"""
01346 |             AND (
01347 |                 CAST({pfx}cod_rt AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
01348 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}local_nombre_rr, '') ILIKE :q
01349 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}cliente, '') ILIKE :q
01350 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}responsable, '') ILIKE :q
01351 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}marca, '') ILIKE :q
01352 |                 OR CAST({pfx}sku AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
01353 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}producto, '') ILIKE :q
01354 |             )
01355 |             """
01356 |         )
01357 |         params["q"] = f"%{s}%"
01358 | 
01359 |     return "\n".join(x for x in filters if x), params
01360 | 
01361 | 
01362 | def get_marcas_home_global() -> list[str]:
01363 |     sql = f"""
01364 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01365 |             TRIM(marca) AS marca
01366 |         FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW}
01367 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(marca, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01368 |         ORDER BY marca
01369 |     """
01370 |     df = _selector_df("get_marcas_home_global", sql)
01371 |     return df["marca"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []
01372 | 
01373 | 
01374 | def get_clientes_home_scope(marca: str | None = None) -> list[str]:
01375 |     where_extra, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01376 |         alias="rr",
01377 |         marca=marca,
01378 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01379 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01380 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01381 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01382 |     )
01383 |     sql = f"""
01384 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01385 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente), ''), TRIM(rr.cliente_norm)) AS cliente
01386 |         FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01387 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente_norm, rr.cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01388 |         {where_extra}
01389 |         ORDER BY cliente
01390 |     """
01391 |     df = _selector_df("get_clientes_home_scope", sql, params)
01392 |     return df["cliente"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []

01394 | 
01395 | def get_responsables_home_scope(
01396 |     tipo: str,
01397 |     marca: str | None = None,
01398 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01399 | ) -> list[str]:
01400 |     tipo_norm = str(tipo or "").strip().upper()
01401 |     if tipo_norm not in {"GESTOR", "SUPERVISOR"}:
01402 |         return []
01403 | 
01404 |     where_extra, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01405 |         alias="rr",
01406 |         marca=marca,
01407 |         cliente=cliente,
01408 |         responsable_tipo=tipo_norm,
01409 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01410 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01411 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01412 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01413 |     )
01414 |     sql = f"""
01415 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01416 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable), ''), TRIM(rr.responsable_norm)) AS responsable
01417 |         FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01418 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.responsable_norm, rr.responsable, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01419 |         {where_extra}
01420 |         ORDER BY responsable
01421 |     """
01422 |     df = _selector_df("get_responsables_home_scope", sql, params)
01423 |     return df["responsable"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []

01425 | 
01426 | def get_rr_people_scope(
01427 |     tipo: str,
01428 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01429 |     marca: str | None = None,
01430 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01431 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01432 |     tipo_norm = str(tipo or "").strip().upper()
01433 |     if tipo_norm not in {"GESTOR", "SUPERVISOR"}:
01434 |         return pd.DataFrame(
01435 |             columns=[
01436 |                 "rutero",
01437 |                 "reponedor",
01438 |                 "responsable",
01439 |                 "cliente",
01440 |                 "locales_relacionados",
01441 |             ]
01442 |         )
01443 | 
01444 |     where_extra, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01445 |         alias="rr",
01446 |         marca=marca,
01447 |         cliente=cliente,
01448 |         responsable_tipo=tipo_norm,
01449 |         responsable=responsable,
01450 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01451 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01452 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01453 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01454 |     )
01455 |     sql = f"""
01456 |         SELECT
01457 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.rutero), ''), '-') AS rutero,
01458 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.reponedor), ''), '-') AS reponedor,
01459 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable), ''), TRIM(rr.responsable_norm)) AS responsable,
01460 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente), ''), TRIM(rr.cliente_norm)) AS cliente,
01461 |             COUNT(DISTINCT rr.cod_rt)::int AS locales_relacionados
01462 |         FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01463 |         WHERE 1=1
01464 |         {where_extra}
01465 |         GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
01466 |         ORDER BY rutero, reponedor, cliente
01467 |     """
01468 |     return _selector_df("get_rr_people_scope", sql, params)

01470 | 
01471 | def get_scope_level(
01472 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01473 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01474 | ) -> str:
01475 |     has_cliente = _scope_is_selected(cliente)
01476 |     has_responsable = _scope_is_selected(responsable)
01477 | 
01478 |     if not has_cliente and not has_responsable:
01479 |         return "L0"
01480 |     if has_cliente and not has_responsable:
01481 |         return "L1"
01482 |     if not has_cliente and has_responsable:
01483 |         return "L2"
01484 |     return "L3"
01485 | 
01486 | 
01487 | def get_kpis_scope_cliente(
01488 |     marca: str | None = None,
01489 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01490 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01491 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01492 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01493 |     search: str = "",
01494 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01495 |     where_summary, params_summary = _scope_summary_filters(
01496 |         alias="s",
01497 |         marca=marca,
01498 |         cliente=cliente,
01499 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01500 |         responsable=responsable,
01501 |         focos=focos,
01502 |         search=search,
01503 |     )
01504 | 
01505 |     where_detail, params_detail = _scope_detail_filters(
01506 |         alias="b",
01507 |         marca=marca,
01508 |         cliente=cliente,
01509 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01510 |         responsable=responsable,
01511 |         focos=focos,
01512 |         search=search,
01513 |     )
01514 | 
01515 |     params = {**params_summary, **params_detail}
01516 | 
01517 |     sql = f"""
01518 |         WITH kpi AS (
01519 |             SELECT
01520 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cod_rt)::int AS locales_scope,
01521 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cliente_norm)::int AS clientes_scope,
01522 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.responsable_norm)::int AS responsables_scope,
01523 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01524 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01525 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01526 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01527 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros
01528 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01529 |             WHERE 1=1
01530 |             {where_summary}
01531 |         ),
01532 |         fecha AS (
01533 |             SELECT
01534 |                 MAX(b.fecha) AS fecha_stock
01535 |             FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01536 |             WHERE 1=1
01537 |             {where_detail}
01538 |         )
01539 |         SELECT
01540 |             fecha.fecha_stock,
01541 |             kpi.locales_scope,
01542 |             kpi.clientes_scope,
01543 |             kpi.responsables_scope,
01544 |             kpi.total_skus,
01545 |             kpi.venta_0,
01546 |             kpi.negativos,
01547 |             kpi.quiebres,
01548 |             kpi.otros
01549 |         FROM kpi
01550 |         CROSS JOIN fecha
01551 |     """
01552 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01553 | 
01554 | 
01555 | def get_tabla_scope_responsable_total_page(
01556 |     marca: str | None = None,
01557 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01558 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01559 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01560 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01561 |     search: str = "",
01562 |     limit: int | None = None,
01563 |     offset: int | None = None,
01564 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01565 |     where_extra, params = _scope_summary_filters(
01566 |         alias="s",
01567 |         marca=marca,
01568 |         cliente=cliente,
01569 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01570 |         responsable=responsable,
01571 |         focos=focos,
01572 |         search=search,
01573 |     )
01574 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01575 | 
01576 |     sql = f"""
01577 |         WITH base AS (
01578 |             SELECT
01579 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') AS responsable_tipo,
01580 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable), ''), TRIM(s.responsable_norm)) AS responsable,
01581 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cliente_norm)::int AS clientes,
01582 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cod_rt)::int AS locales,
01583 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01584 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01585 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01586 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01587 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros,
01588 |                 (
01589 |                     COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)
01590 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)
01591 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)
01592 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)
01593 |                 )::int AS skus_en_foco
01594 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01595 |             WHERE 1=1
01596 |             {where_extra}
01597 |             GROUP BY 1, 2
01598 |         )
01599 |         SELECT
01600 |             base.*,
01601 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01602 |         FROM base
01603 |         ORDER BY skus_en_foco DESC, negativos DESC, venta_0 DESC, otros DESC, quiebres DESC, responsable ASC
01604 |         {page_sql}
01605 |     """
01606 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01607 | 
01608 | 
01609 | def get_tabla_scope_cliente_total_page(
01610 |     marca: str | None = None,
01611 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01612 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01613 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01614 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01615 |     search: str = "",
01616 |     limit: int | None = None,
01617 |     offset: int | None = None,
01618 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01619 |     where_extra, params = _scope_summary_filters(
01620 |         alias="s",
01621 |         marca=marca,
01622 |         cliente=cliente,
01623 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01624 |         responsable=responsable,
01625 |         focos=focos,
01626 |         search=search,
01627 |     )
01628 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01629 | 
01630 |     sql = f"""
01631 |         WITH base AS (
01632 |             SELECT
01633 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente), ''), TRIM(s.cliente_norm)) AS cliente,
01634 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.responsable_norm)::int AS responsables,
01635 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cod_rt)::int AS locales,
01636 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01637 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01638 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01639 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01640 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros,
01641 |                 (
01642 |                     COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)
01643 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)
01644 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)
01645 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)
01646 |                 )::int AS skus_en_foco
01647 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01648 |             WHERE 1=1
01649 |             {where_extra}
01650 |             GROUP BY 1
01651 |         )
01652 |         SELECT
01653 |             base.*,
01654 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01655 |         FROM base
01656 |         ORDER BY skus_en_foco DESC, negativos DESC, venta_0 DESC, otros DESC, quiebres DESC, cliente ASC
01657 |         {page_sql}
01658 |     """
01659 |     return qdf(sql, params)

01661 | 
01662 | def get_tabla_scope_local_total_page(
01663 |     marca: str | None = None,
01664 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01665 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01666 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01667 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01668 |     search: str = "",
01669 |     limit: int | None = None,
01670 |     offset: int | None = None,
01671 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01672 |     where_extra, params = _scope_summary_filters(
01673 |         alias="s",
01674 |         marca=marca,
01675 |         cliente=cliente,
01676 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01677 |         responsable=responsable,
01678 |         focos=focos,
01679 |         search=search,
01680 |     )
01681 |     rr_where_extra, rr_params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01682 |         alias="rr",
01683 |         marca=marca,
01684 |         cliente=cliente,
01685 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01686 |         responsable=responsable,
01687 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01688 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01689 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01690 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01691 |     )
01692 |     params = {**params, **rr_params}
01693 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01694 | 
01695 |     sql = f"""
01696 |         WITH rr_ctx AS (
01697 |             SELECT
01698 |                 rr.cod_rt,
01699 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente), ''), ''))) AS cliente_norm_match,
01700 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable_tipo), ''), '-'))) AS responsable_tipo_match,
01701 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable), ''), ''))) AS responsable_norm_match,
01702 |                 STRING_AGG(
01703 |                     DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.rutero), ''), '-'),
01704 |                     ' | '
01705 |                     ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.rutero), ''), '-')
01706 |                 ) AS rutero,
01707 |                 STRING_AGG(
01708 |                     DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.reponedor), ''), '-'),
01709 |                     ' | '
01710 |                     ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.reponedor), ''), '-')
01711 |                 ) AS reponedor
01712 |             FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01713 |             WHERE 1=1
01714 |             {rr_where_extra}
01715 |             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
01716 |         ),
01717 |         base AS (
01718 |             SELECT
01719 |                 s.cod_rt,
01720 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.local_nombre_rr), ''), CAST(s.cod_rt AS TEXT)) AS nombre_local_rr,
01721 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente), ''), TRIM(s.cliente_norm)) AS cliente,
01722 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') AS responsable_tipo,
01723 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable), ''), TRIM(s.responsable_norm)) AS responsable,
01724 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente), ''), ''))) AS cliente_norm_match,
01725 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_tipo), ''), '-'))) AS responsable_tipo_match,
01726 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable), ''), ''))) AS responsable_norm_match,
01727 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01728 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01729 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01730 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01731 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros,
01732 |                 (
01733 |                     COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)
01734 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)
01735 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)
01736 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)
01737 |                 )::int AS skus_en_foco
01738 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01739 |             WHERE 1=1
01740 |             {where_extra}
01741 |             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8
01742 |         )
01743 |         SELECT
01744 |             base.cod_rt,
01745 |             base.nombre_local_rr,
01746 |             base.cliente,
01747 |             base.responsable_tipo,
01748 |             base.responsable,
01749 |             COALESCE(rr_ctx.rutero, '-') AS rutero,
01750 |             COALESCE(rr_ctx.reponedor, '-') AS reponedor,
01751 |             base.total_skus,
01752 |             base.venta_0,
01753 |             base.negativos,
01754 |             base.quiebres,
01755 |             base.otros,
01756 |             base.skus_en_foco,
01757 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01758 |         FROM base
01759 |         LEFT JOIN rr_ctx
01760 |             ON rr_ctx.cod_rt = base.cod_rt
01761 |            AND rr_ctx.cliente_norm_match = base.cliente_norm_match
01762 |            AND rr_ctx.responsable_tipo_match = base.responsable_tipo_match
01763 |            AND rr_ctx.responsable_norm_match = base.responsable_norm_match
01764 |         ORDER BY
01765 |             base.skus_en_foco DESC,
01766 |             base.negativos DESC,
01767 |             base.venta_0 DESC,
01768 |             base.otros DESC,
01769 |             base.quiebres DESC,
01770 |             base.nombre_local_rr ASC
01771 |         {page_sql}
01772 |     """
01773 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01774 | 
01775 | 
01776 | def get_detalle_sku_scope_total_page(
01777 |     marca: str | None = None,
01778 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01779 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01780 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01781 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01782 |     search: str = "",
01783 |     limit: int | None = None,
01784 |     offset: int | None = None,
01785 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01786 |     level = get_scope_level(cliente=cliente, responsable=responsable)
01787 |     if level in {"L0", "L1"}:
01788 |         return pd.DataFrame(
01789 |             columns=[
01790 |                 "fecha",
01791 |                 "cod_rt",
01792 |                 "nombre_local_rr",
01793 |                 "cliente",
01794 |                 "responsable_tipo",
01795 |                 "responsable",
01796 |                 "marca",
01797 |                 "sku",
01798 |                 "descripcion",
01799 |                 "stock",
01800 |                 "venta_7",
01801 |                 "negativo",
01802 |                 "riesgo_quiebre",
01803 |                 "otros",
01804 |                 "total_rows",
01805 |             ]
01806 |         )
01807 | 
01808 |     where_extra, params = _scope_detail_filters(
01809 |         alias="b",
01810 |         marca=marca,
01811 |         cliente=cliente,
01812 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01813 |         responsable=responsable,
01814 |         focos=focos,
01815 |         search=search,
01816 |     )
01817 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01818 | 
01819 |     sql = f"""
01820 |         SELECT
01821 |             b.fecha,
01822 |             b.cod_rt,
01823 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.local_nombre_rr), ''), CAST(b.cod_rt AS TEXT)) AS nombre_local_rr,
01824 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.cliente), ''), '') AS cliente,
01825 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') AS responsable_tipo,
01826 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.responsable), ''), '') AS responsable,
01827 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.marca), ''), '') AS marca,
01828 |             CAST(b.sku AS TEXT) AS sku,
01829 |             COALESCE(b.producto, '') AS descripcion,
01830 |             COALESCE(b.stock, 0)::int AS stock,
01831 |             COALESCE(b.venta_7, 0)::int AS venta_7,
01832 |             COALESCE(b.negativo, '') AS negativo,
01833 |             COALESCE(b.riesgo_quiebre, '') AS riesgo_quiebre,
01834 |             COALESCE(b.otros, '') AS otros,
01835 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01836 |         FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01837 |         WHERE 1=1
01838 |         {where_extra}
01839 |         ORDER BY
01840 |             CASE WHEN {_scope_norm_expr('b.negativo')} = 'SI' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
01841 |             CASE WHEN {_scope_norm_expr('b.riesgo_quiebre')} = 'SI' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
01842 |             COALESCE(b.venta_7, 0) ASC,
01843 |             COALESCE(b.marca, '') ASC,
01844 |             CAST(b.sku AS TEXT) ASC
01845 |         {page_sql}
01846 |     """
01847 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01848 | 
01849 | 
01850 | def get_export_inventario_cliente(
01851 |     cliente: str,
01852 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01853 |     cliente_sel = str(cliente or "").strip()
01854 |     if not cliente_sel:
01855 |         return pd.DataFrame(
01856 |             columns=[
01857 |                 "fecha",
01858 |                 "COD_RT",
01859 |                 "LOCAL",
01860 |                 "CLIENTE",
01861 |                 "RUTERO",
01862 |                 "REPONEDOR",
01863 |                 "MARCA",
01864 |                 "Sku",
01865 |                 "Descripción del Producto",
01866 |                 "Stock",
01867 |                 "Venta(+7)",
01868 |                 "NEGATIVO",
01869 |                 "RIESGO DE QUIEBRE",
01870 |                 "OTROS",
01871 |             ]
01872 |         )
01873 | 
01874 |     sql = f"""
01875 |         WITH fecha_ref AS (
01876 |             SELECT MAX(b.fecha) AS fecha_stock
01877 |             FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01878 |             WHERE {_scope_norm_expr('b.cliente')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':cliente')}
01879 |         ),
01880 |         rr_ctx AS (
01881 |             SELECT
01882 |                 rr.cod_rt,
01883 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente), ''), ''))) AS cliente_norm_match,
01884 |                 STRING_AGG(
01885 |                     DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.rutero), ''), '-'),
01886 |                     ' | '
01887 |                     ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.rutero), ''), '-')
01888 |                 ) AS rutero,
01889 |                 STRING_AGG(
01890 |                     DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.reponedor), ''), '-'),
01891 |                     ' | '
01892 |                     ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.reponedor), ''), '-')
01893 |                 ) AS reponedor
01894 |             FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01895 |             WHERE {_scope_norm_expr("COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente_norm), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente), ''), '')")} = {_scope_norm_expr(':cliente')}
01896 |             GROUP BY 1, 2
01897 |         ),
01898 |         base_fact AS (
01899 |             SELECT
01900 |                 b.fecha,
01901 |                 b.cod_rt,
01902 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.local_nombre_rr), ''), CAST(b.cod_rt AS TEXT)) AS local_nombre_rr,
01903 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.cliente), ''), '') AS cliente,
01904 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.marca), ''), '') AS marca,
01905 |                 CAST(b.sku AS TEXT) AS sku,
01906 |                 COALESCE(b.producto, '') AS producto,
01907 |                 COALESCE(b.stock, 0)::int AS stock,
01908 |                 COALESCE(b.venta_7, 0)::int AS venta_7,
01909 |                 COALESCE(b.negativo, '') AS negativo,
01910 |                 COALESCE(b.riesgo_quiebre, '') AS riesgo_quiebre,
01911 |                 COALESCE(b.otros, '') AS otros,
01912 |                 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
01913 |                     PARTITION BY
01914 |                         b.fecha,
01915 |                         b.cod_rt,
01916 |                         {_scope_norm_expr('b.cliente')},
01917 |                         {_scope_norm_expr('b.marca')},
01918 |                         CAST(b.sku AS TEXT)
01919 |                     ORDER BY
01920 |                         COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.local_nombre_rr), ''), CAST(b.cod_rt AS TEXT)) ASC,
01921 |                         COALESCE(b.producto, '') ASC,
01922 |                         COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') ASC,
01923 |                         COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.responsable), ''), '') ASC
01924 |                 ) AS rn_fact
01925 |             FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01926 |             CROSS JOIN fecha_ref fr
01927 |             WHERE {_scope_norm_expr('b.cliente')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':cliente')}
01928 |               AND (fr.fecha_stock IS NULL OR b.fecha = fr.fecha_stock)
01929 |         ),
01930 |         fact_dedup AS (
01931 |             SELECT
01932 |                 fecha,
01933 |                 cod_rt,
01934 |                 local_nombre_rr,
01935 |                 cliente,
01936 |                 marca,
01937 |                 sku,
01938 |                 producto,
01939 |                 stock,
01940 |                 venta_7,
01941 |                 negativo,
01942 |                 riesgo_quiebre,
01943 |                 otros
01944 |             FROM base_fact
01945 |             WHERE rn_fact = 1
01946 |         )
01947 |         SELECT
01948 |             f.fecha,
01949 |             CAST(f.cod_rt AS TEXT) AS "COD_RT",
01950 |             f.local_nombre_rr AS "LOCAL",
01951 |             f.cliente AS "CLIENTE",
01952 |             COALESCE(rr_ctx.rutero, '-') AS "RUTERO",
01953 |             COALESCE(rr_ctx.reponedor, '-') AS "REPONEDOR",
01954 |             f.marca AS "MARCA",
01955 |             f.sku AS "Sku",
01956 |             f.producto AS "Descripción del Producto",
01957 |             f.stock AS "Stock",
01958 |             f.venta_7 AS "Venta(+7)",
01959 |             f.negativo AS "NEGATIVO",
01960 |             f.riesgo_quiebre AS "RIESGO DE QUIEBRE",
01961 |             f.otros AS "OTROS"
01962 |         FROM fact_dedup f
01963 |         LEFT JOIN rr_ctx
01964 |           ON rr_ctx.cod_rt = f.cod_rt
01965 |          AND rr_ctx.cliente_norm_match = {_scope_norm_expr('f.cliente')}
01966 |         ORDER BY
01967 |             f.local_nombre_rr ASC,
01968 |             f.marca ASC,
01969 |             CASE WHEN f.sku ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
01970 |             CASE WHEN f.sku ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN CAST(f.sku AS BIGINT) END ASC NULLS LAST,
01971 |             f.sku ASC,
01972 |             f.producto ASC
01973 |     """
01974 |     return qdf(sql, {"cliente": cliente_sel})
01975 | 
01976 | 
01977 | # =========================================================
01978 | # 6) AUDITORÍA DE COBERTURA E INCONSISTENCIAS
01979 | # =========================================================
01980 | def get_scope_clientes_rr(
01981 |     cod_rt: str,
01982 |     rutero: str,
01983 |     reponedor: str,
01984 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
01985 | ) -> list[str]:
01986 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "modalidad")
01987 |     df = qdf(f"""
01988 |         SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(cliente) AS cliente
01989 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
01990 |         WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
01991 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
01992 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
01993 |           {modalidad_sql}
01994 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01995 |         ORDER BY cliente
01996 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, "rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor, **extra})
01997 |     return df["cliente"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []
01998 | 
01999 | 
02000 | def get_rr_stock_en_local(cod_rt: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
02001 |     return qdf(f"""
02002 |         SELECT
02003 |             rr.cod_rt,
02004 |             TRIM(rr.modalidad) AS modalidad,
02005 |             TRIM(rr.rutero) AS rutero,
02006 |             TRIM(rr.reponedor) AS reponedor,
02007 |             TRIM(rr.cliente) AS cliente_rr,
02008 |             CASE
02009 |                 WHEN EXISTS (
02010 |                     SELECT 1
02011 |                     FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
02012 |                     WHERE v.cod_rt = rr.cod_rt
02013 |                       AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."MARCA", ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')))
02014 |                 ) THEN 'SI'
02015 |                 ELSE 'NO'
02016 |             END AS tiene_stock_match
02017 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
02018 |         WHERE rr.cod_rt = :cod_rt
02019 |         ORDER BY modalidad, rutero, reponedor, cliente_rr
02020 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt})
02021 | 
02022 | 
02023 | def get_cobertura_local(cod_rt: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
02024 |     return qdf(f"""
02025 |         WITH rr AS (
02026 |             SELECT DISTINCT
02027 |                 cod_rt,
02028 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, ''))) AS cliente_norm
02029 |             FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
02030 |             WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
02031 |               AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
02032 |         ),
02033 |         st AS (
02034 |             SELECT DISTINCT
02035 |                 cod_rt,
02036 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE("MARCA", ''))) AS marca_norm
02037 |             FROM {RESULT_VIEW}
02038 |             WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
02039 |               AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE("MARCA", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
02040 |         )
02041 |         SELECT
02042 |             :cod_rt AS cod_rt,
02043 |             (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rr)::int AS clientes_rr,
02044 |             (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM st)::int AS clientes_stock,
02045 |             (
02046 |                 SELECT COUNT(*)::int
02047 |                 FROM rr
02048 |                 INNER JOIN st
02049 |                     ON rr.cod_rt = st.cod_rt
02050 |                    AND rr.cliente_norm = st.marca_norm
02051 |             ) AS clientes_match
02052 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt})
02053 | 
02054 | 
02055 | def get_clientes_sin_match_rr_stock(
02056 |     cod_rt: str,
02057 |     rutero: str,
02058 |     reponedor: str,
02059 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
02060 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
02061 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "rr.modalidad")
02062 |     return qdf(f"""
02063 |         SELECT DISTINCT
02064 |             rr.cod_rt,
02065 |             TRIM(rr.modalidad) AS modalidad,
02066 |             TRIM(rr.rutero) AS rutero,
02067 |             TRIM(rr.reponedor) AS reponedor,
02068 |             TRIM(rr.cliente) AS cliente_rr
02069 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
02070 |         WHERE rr.cod_rt = :cod_rt
02071 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
02072 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
02073 |           {modalidad_sql}
02074 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
02075 |           AND NOT EXISTS (
02076 |               SELECT 1
02077 |               FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
02078 |               WHERE v.cod_rt = rr.cod_rt
02079 |                 AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."MARCA", ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')))
02080 |           )
02081 |         ORDER BY cliente_rr
02082 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, "rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor, **extra})

02085 | 
02086 | # =========================================================
02087 | # 7) CONTROL GESTION B3 / CONTRATO PUBLICO CANONICO
02088 | # =========================================================
02089 | def get_cg_contract() -> dict[str, Any]:
02090 |     return {
02091 |         "status": "frozen",
02092 |         "branch": "B3_CONTROL_GESTION_SQL",
02093 |         "roles_publicos": ["JEFE_OPERACIONES", "GESTOR"],
02094 |         "views": {
02095 |             "parity": CG_PARITY_VIEW,
02096 |             "scope": CG_SCOPE_VIEW,
02097 |             "alertas": CG_ALERTAS_VIEW,
02098 |             "inicio_jefe": CG_INICIO_JEFE_VIEW,
02099 |             "inicio_gestor": CG_INICIO_GESTOR_VIEW,
02100 |             "detalle": CG_DETALLE_VIEW,
02101 |         },
02102 |         "compat_aliases": {
02103 |             "alertas": CG_COMPAT_ALERTAS_VIEW,
02104 |             "inicio_jefe": CG_COMPAT_INICIO_JEFE_VIEW,
02105 |             "inicio_gestor": CG_COMPAT_INICIO_GESTOR_VIEW,
02106 |             "detalle": CG_COMPAT_DETALLE_VIEW,
02107 |         },
02108 |         "rules": [
02109 |             "no_recalculo_negocio_en_python",
02110 |             "pair_global_truth_separada_de_scope_assigned_truth",
02111 |             "no_supervisor_no_reponedor_en_contrato_publico_actual",
02112 |         ],
02113 |     }
02114 | 
02115 | 
02116 | def _cg_page_clause(limit: int | None, offset: int | None, params: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
02117 |     clauses: list[str] = []
02118 |     if limit is not None:
02119 |         params["limit"] = max(1, int(limit))
02120 |         clauses.append("LIMIT :limit")
02121 |     if offset is not None:
02122 |         params["offset"] = max(0, int(offset))
02123 |         clauses.append("OFFSET :offset")
02124 |     return (" " + " ".join(clauses)) if clauses else ""
02125 | 
02126 | 
02127 | def _cg_text_norm_expr(expr: str) -> str:
02128 |     return f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST({expr} AS TEXT), '')))"
02129 | 
02130 | 
02131 | def _cg_scope_filters(
02132 |     *,
02133 |     alias: str = "v",
02134 |     semana_inicio: str | None = None,
02135 |     gestor: str | None = None,
02136 |     cliente: str | None = None,
02137 |     alerta: str | None = None,
02138 |     cod_rt: str | None = None,
02139 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
02140 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
02141 |     filters: list[str] = []
02142 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
02143 | 
02144 |     if semana_inicio and str(semana_inicio).strip():
02145 |         filters.append(f'AND {pfx}"SEMANA_INICIO" = :semana_inicio')
02146 |         params["semana_inicio"] = str(semana_inicio).strip()
02147 | 
02148 |     if gestor and str(gestor).strip() and str(gestor).strip().upper() != "TODOS":
02149 |         filters.append(
02150 |             f'AND {_cg_text_norm_expr(f"{pfx}" + "\"GESTOR\"")} = {_cg_text_norm_expr(":gestor")}'
02151 |         )
02152 |         params["gestor"] = str(gestor).strip()
02153 | 
02154 |     if cliente and str(cliente).strip() and str(cliente).strip().upper() != "TODOS":
02155 |         filters.append(
02156 |             f'AND {_cg_text_norm_expr(f"{pfx}" + "\"CLIENTE\"")} = {_cg_text_norm_expr(":cliente")}'
02157 |         )
02158 |         params["cliente"] = str(cliente).strip()
02159 | 
02160 |     if alerta and str(alerta).strip() and str(alerta).strip().upper() != "TODAS":
02161 |         filters.append(
02162 |             f'AND {_cg_text_norm_expr(f"{pfx}" + "\"ALERTA\"")} = {_cg_text_norm_expr(":alerta")}'
02163 |         )
02164 |         params["alerta"] = str(alerta).strip()
02165 | 
02166 |     if cod_rt and str(cod_rt).strip():
02167 |         filters.append(f'AND CAST({pfx}"COD_RT" AS TEXT) = :cod_rt')
02168 |         params["cod_rt"] = str(cod_rt).strip()
02169 | 
02170 |     return "\n".join(filters), params
02171 | 
02172 | 
02173 | def _cg_alertas_filters(
02174 |     *,
02175 |     alias: str = "a",
02176 |     semana_inicio: str | None = None,
02177 |     cliente: str | None = None,
02178 |     persona: str | None = None,
02179 |     cod_rt: str | None = None,
02180 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
02181 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
02182 |     filters: list[str] = []
02183 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
02184 | 
02185 |     if semana_inicio and str(semana_inicio).strip():
02186 |         filters.append(
02187 |             f"""
02188 |             AND {pfx}fecha_visita >= CAST(:semana_inicio AS DATE)
02189 |             AND {pfx}fecha_visita < (CAST(:semana_inicio AS DATE) + INTERVAL '7 day')
02190 |             """
02191 |         )
02192 |         params["semana_inicio"] = str(semana_inicio).strip()
02193 | 
02194 |     if cliente and str(cliente).strip() and str(cliente).strip().upper() != "TODOS":
02195 |         filters.append(f'AND {_cg_text_norm_expr(f"{pfx}cliente")} = {_cg_text_norm_expr(":cliente")}')
02196 |         params["cliente"] = str(cliente).strip()
02197 | 
02198 |     if persona and str(persona).strip() and str(persona).strip().upper() != "TODOS":
02199 |         filters.append(f'AND {_cg_text_norm_expr(f"{pfx}persona")} = {_cg_text_norm_expr(":persona")}')
02200 |         params["persona"] = str(persona).strip()
02201 | 
02202 |     if cod_rt and str(cod_rt).strip():
02203 |         filters.append(f"AND CAST({pfx}cod_rt AS TEXT) = :cod_rt")
02204 |         params["cod_rt"] = str(cod_rt).strip()
02205 | 
02206 |     return "\n".join(filters), params
02207 | 
02208 | 
02209 | def _cg_detalle_filters(
02210 |     *,
02211 |     alias: str = "d",
02212 |     semana_inicio: str | None = None,
02213 |     gestor: str | None = None,
02214 |     cliente: str | None = None,
02215 |     cod_rt: str | None = None,
02216 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
02217 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
02218 |     filters: list[str] = []
02219 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
02220 | 
02221 |     if semana_inicio and str(semana_inicio).strip():
02222 |         filters.append(
02223 |             f"""
02224 |             AND {pfx}fecha_visita >= CAST(:semana_inicio AS DATE)
02225 |             AND {pfx}fecha_visita < (CAST(:semana_inicio AS DATE) + INTERVAL '7 day')
02226 |             """
02227 |         )
02228 |         params["semana_inicio"] = str(semana_inicio).strip()
02229 | 
02230 |     if gestor and str(gestor).strip() and str(gestor).strip().upper() != "TODOS":
02231 |         filters.append(f'AND {_cg_text_norm_expr(f"{pfx}gestor")} = {_cg_text_norm_expr(":gestor")}')
02232 |         params["gestor"] = str(gestor).strip()
02233 | 
02234 |     if cliente and str(cliente).strip() and str(cliente).strip().upper() != "TODOS":
02235 |         filters.append(f'AND {_cg_text_norm_expr(f"{pfx}cliente")} = {_cg_text_norm_expr(":cliente")}')
02236 |         params["cliente"] = str(cliente).strip()
02237 | 
02238 |     if cod_rt and str(cod_rt).strip():
02239 |         filters.append(f"AND CAST({pfx}cod_rt AS TEXT) = :cod_rt")
02240 |         params["cod_rt"] = str(cod_rt).strip()
02241 | 
02242 |     return "\n".join(filters), params
02243 | 
02244 | 
02245 | def _cg_select_page(
02246 |     *,
02247 |     selector_name: str,
02248 |     view_name: str,
02249 |     limit: int | None = None,
02250 |     offset: int | None = None,
02251 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
02252 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
02253 |     page_sql = _cg_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
02254 |     sql = f"""
02255 |         SELECT *
02256 |         FROM {view_name}
02257 |         {page_sql}
02258 |     """
02259 |     return _selector_df(selector_name, sql, params or None)
02260 | 
02261 | 
02262 | def _cg_select_page_filtered(
02263 |     *,
02264 |     selector_name: str,
02265 |     view_name: str,
02266 |     where_sql: str = "",
02267 |     order_sql: str = "",
02268 |     params: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
02269 |     limit: int | None = None,
02270 |     offset: int | None = None,
02271 |     from_alias: str | None = None,
02272 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
02273 |     query_params = dict(params or {})
02274 |     page_sql = _cg_page_clause(limit, offset, query_params)
02275 |     alias_sql = f" {from_alias}" if from_alias else ""
02276 |     sql = f"""
02277 |         SELECT
02278 |             x.*,
02279 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
02280 |         FROM (
02281 |             SELECT *
02282 |             FROM {view_name}{alias_sql}
02283 |             WHERE 1=1
02284 |             {where_sql}
02285 |         ) x
02286 |         {order_sql}
02287 |         {page_sql}
02288 |     """
02289 |     return _selector_df(selector_name, sql, query_params or None)
02290 | 
02291 | 
02292 | def get_cg_cumplimiento_semana_local_parity(

02438 | 
02439 | def get_cg_scope_kpis(
02440 |     *,
02441 |     semana_inicio: str | None = None,
02442 |     gestor: str | None = None,
02443 |     cliente: str | None = None,
02444 |     alerta: str | None = None,
02445 |     cod_rt: str | None = None,
02446 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
02447 |     where_sql, params = _cg_scope_filters(
02448 |         alias="v",
02449 |         semana_inicio=semana_inicio,
02450 |         gestor=gestor,
02451 |         cliente=cliente,
02452 |         alerta=alerta,
02453 |         cod_rt=cod_rt,
02454 |     )
02455 |     sql = f"""
02456 |         SELECT
02457 |             COUNT(*)::int AS total_rows_scope,
02458 |             COUNT(DISTINCT CAST("COD_RT" AS TEXT))::int AS locales_scope,
02459 |             COUNT(DISTINCT CAST("CLIENTE" AS TEXT))::int AS clientes_scope,
02460 |             COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE("VISITA", 0)), 0)::int AS visitas_plan,
02461 |             COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE("VISITA_REALIZADA", 0)), 0)::int AS visitas_realizadas,
02462 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE
02463 |                 WHEN {_cg_text_norm_expr('"ALERTA"')} = 'CUMPLE' THEN 1
02464 |                 ELSE 0
02465 |             END), 0)::int AS cumple,
02466 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE
02467 |                 WHEN {_cg_text_norm_expr('"ALERTA"')} LIKE '%DOBLE%'
02468 |                   OR COALESCE("DIAS_DOBLE_MARCAJE", 0) > 0
02469 |                 THEN 1
02470 |                 ELSE 0
02471 |             END), 0)::int AS cumple_con_doble_marcaje,
02472 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE
02473 |                 WHEN {_cg_text_norm_expr('"ALERTA"')} <> 'CUMPLE'
02474 |                  AND {_cg_text_norm_expr('"ALERTA"')} NOT LIKE '%DOBLE%'
02475 |                 THEN 1
02476 |                 ELSE 0
02477 |             END), 0)::int AS incumple
02478 |         FROM {CG_SCOPE_VIEW} v
02479 |         WHERE 1=1
02480 |         {where_sql}
02481 |     """
02482 |     return qdf(sql, params or None)

02629 | 
02630 | def get_cg_contract_smoke() -> dict[str, Any]:
02631 |     checks = [
02632 |         ("parity", CG_PARITY_VIEW),
02633 |         ("scope", CG_SCOPE_VIEW),
02634 |         ("alertas", CG_ALERTAS_VIEW),
02635 |         ("inicio_jefe", CG_INICIO_JEFE_VIEW),
02636 |         ("inicio_gestor", CG_INICIO_GESTOR_VIEW),
02637 |         ("detalle", CG_DETALLE_VIEW),
02638 |     ]
02639 |     results: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
02640 |     failed_objects: list[str] = []
02641 |     non_zero_expected = {"parity", "scope", "alertas", "inicio_jefe", "inicio_gestor", "detalle"}
02642 | 
02643 |     for object_name, view_name in checks:
02644 |         try:
02645 |             df = _selector_df(
02646 |                 f"smoke_{object_name}",
02647 |                 f"SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS rows FROM {view_name}",
02648 |             )
02649 |             rows = int(df.iloc[0]["rows"] or 0) if df is not None and not df.empty else 0
02650 |             status = "ok" if rows > 0 or object_name not in non_zero_expected else "warn"
02651 |             results.append({
02652 |                 "object": object_name,
02653 |                 "view": view_name,
02654 |                 "rows": rows,
02655 |                 "status": status,
02656 |             })
02657 |         except Exception as exc:
02658 |             failed_objects.append(object_name)
02659 |             results.append({
02660 |                 "object": object_name,
02661 |                 "view": view_name,
02662 |                 "rows": None,
02663 |                 "status": "fail",
02664 |                 "error": f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}",
02665 |             })
02666 | 
02667 |     zero_warns = [r["object"] for r in results if r.get("status") == "warn"]
02668 |     smoke_status = "fail" if failed_objects else ("warn" if zero_warns else "ok")
02669 |     return {
02670 |         "smoke_status": smoke_status,
02671 |         "branch": "B3_CONTROL_GESTION_SQL",
02672 |         "views_checked": len(checks),
02673 |         "failed_objects": failed_objects,
02674 |         "zero_row_objects": zero_warns,
02675 |         "results": results,
02676 |     }

00046 | def _clean_yes(v) -> str:
00047 |     return "SI" if str(v or "").strip().upper() == "SI" else ""
00048 | 
00049 | 
00050 | def _clean_otros(v) -> str:
00051 |     out = str(v or "").strip()
00052 |     return "" if out.upper() in {"", "NO", "N/A", "NA", "-"} else out
00053 | 
00054 | 
00055 | def _venta_0_flag(v) -> str:
00056 |     try:
00057 |         return "SI" if int(pd.to_numeric(v, errors="coerce") or 0) == 0 else ""
00058 |     except Exception:
00059 |         return ""

00061 | 
00062 | def build_export_df(df_ux: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
00063 |     df = df_ux.copy()
00064 | 
00065 |     needed = [
00066 |         "fecha",
00067 |         "MARCA",
00068 |         "Sku",
00069 |         "Descripción del Producto",
00070 |         "Stock",
00071 |         "Venta(+7)",
00072 |         "NEGATIVO",
00073 |         "RIESGO DE QUIEBRE",
00074 |         "OTROS",
00075 |     ]
00076 |     for c in needed:
00077 |         if c not in df.columns:
00078 |             df[c] = ""
00079 | 
00080 |     df["Fecha stock"] = pd.to_datetime(df["fecha"], errors="coerce").dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d").fillna("")
00081 |     df["Sku"] = df["Sku"].astype(str)
00082 |     df["Stock"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Stock"], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
00083 |     df["Venta(+7)"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Venta(+7)"], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
00084 | 
00085 |     df["VENTA 0"] = df["Venta(+7)"].apply(_venta_0_flag)
00086 |     df["NEGATIVO"] = df["NEGATIVO"].apply(_clean_yes)
00087 |     df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"] = df["RIESGO DE QUIEBRE"].apply(_clean_yes)
00088 |     df["OTROS"] = df["OTROS"].apply(_clean_otros)
00089 | 
00090 |     return df[EXPORT_COLS]
00091 | 
00092 | 
00093 | def _sorted_for_export(df_in: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
00094 |     if df_in is None or df_in.empty:
00095 |         return df_in
00096 | 
00097 |     df = df_in.copy()
00098 | 
00099 |     if "MARCA" not in df.columns:
00100 |         df["MARCA"] = ""
00101 |     if "Sku" not in df.columns:
00102 |         df["Sku"] = ""
00103 |     if "Descripción del Producto" not in df.columns:
00104 |         df["Descripción del Producto"] = ""
00105 | 
00106 |     for c in ["MARCA", "Sku", "Descripción del Producto", "CLIENTE", "COD_RT", "LOCAL", "RUTERO", "REPONEDOR", "FOCO PRINCIPAL"]:
00107 |         if c in df.columns:
00108 |             df[c] = df[c].astype(str)
00109 | 
00110 |     sku_num = pd.to_numeric(df["Sku"], errors="coerce")
00111 |     df["_sku_is_text"] = sku_num.isna().astype(int)
00112 |     df["_sku_num"] = sku_num.fillna(0)
00113 | 
00114 |     if "FOCO PRINCIPAL" in df.columns and ({"CLIENTE", "COD_RT", "LOCAL"} & set(df.columns)):
00115 |         if "CLIENTE" not in df.columns:
00116 |             df["CLIENTE"] = ""
00117 |         if "COD_RT" not in df.columns:
00118 |             df["COD_RT"] = ""
00119 |         if "LOCAL" not in df.columns:
00120 |             df["LOCAL"] = ""
00121 |         if "RUTERO" not in df.columns:
00122 |             df["RUTERO"] = ""
00123 |         if "REPONEDOR" not in df.columns:
00124 |             df["REPONEDOR"] = ""
00125 |         sort_cols = [
00126 |             "CLIENTE", "COD_RT", "LOCAL", "RUTERO", "REPONEDOR",
00127 |             "MARCA", "FOCO PRINCIPAL", "_sku_is_text", "_sku_num", "Sku", "Descripción del Producto"
00128 |         ]
00129 |     elif "FOCO PRINCIPAL" in df.columns:
00130 |         sort_cols = ["MARCA", "FOCO PRINCIPAL", "_sku_is_text", "_sku_num", "Sku", "Descripción del Producto"]
00131 |     else:
00132 |         sort_cols = ["MARCA", "_sku_is_text", "_sku_num", "Sku", "Descripción del Producto"]
00133 | 
00134 |     df = df.sort_values(
00135 |         by=sort_cols,
00136 |         ascending=[True] * len(sort_cols),
00137 |         kind="mergesort",
00138 |     ).drop(columns=["_sku_is_text", "_sku_num"])
00139 | 
00140 |     return df

00142 | 
00143 | def _focus_principal(row) -> str:
00144 |     neg = _clean_yes(row.get("NEGATIVO", ""))
00145 |     quiebre = _clean_yes(row.get("RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", ""))
00146 |     venta0 = _venta_0_flag(row.get("Venta(+7)", 0))
00147 |     otros = _clean_otros(row.get("OTROS", ""))
00148 | 
00149 |     # prioridad semántica operativa
00150 |     if neg == "SI":
00151 |         return "NEGATIVO"
00152 |     if quiebre == "SI":
00153 |         return "QUIEBRE"
00154 |     if venta0 == "SI":
00155 |         return "VENTA 0"
00156 |     if otros:
00157 |         return "OTROS"
00158 |     return ""
00159 | 
00160 | 
00161 | def _accion_sugerida(foco_principal: str) -> str:
00162 |     if foco_principal == "NEGATIVO":
00163 |         return "Ajustar inventario y validar sala"
00164 |     if foco_principal == "QUIEBRE":
00165 |         return "Solicitar empuje o reposición"
00166 |     if foco_principal == "VENTA 0":
00167 |         return "Revisar exhibición, precio y rotación"
00168 |     if foco_principal == "OTROS":
00169 |         return "Revisar observación cliente"
00170 |     return ""
00171 | 
00172 | 
00173 | def _normalize_focos_export(foco) -> list[str]:
00174 |     valid = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
00175 | 
00176 |     if foco is None:
00177 |         raw = []

00296 | def export_excel_generic(sheet_name: str, df_export: pd.DataFrame) -> bytes:
00297 |     out = io.BytesIO()
00298 |     safe_sheet = str(sheet_name or "DATA")[:31]
00299 |     df_export = _sorted_for_export(df_export)
00300 | 
00301 |     with pd.ExcelWriter(out, engine="openpyxl") as writer:
00302 |         df_export.to_excel(writer, index=False, sheet_name=safe_sheet)
00303 |         ws = writer.sheets[safe_sheet]
00304 |         ws.freeze_panes = "A2"
00305 |         ws.auto_filter.ref = ws.dimensions
00306 | 
00307 |         for col_cells in ws.columns:
00308 |             col_letter = col_cells[0].column_letter
00309 |             values = []
00310 |             for cell in col_cells[:200]:
00311 |                 if cell.value is not None:
00312 |                     values.append(len(str(cell.value)))
00313 |             max_len = max(values) if values else 10
00314 |             ws.column_dimensions[col_letter].width = min(max(10, max_len + 2), 45)
00315 | 
00316 |     return out.getvalue()

00401 | def _pdf_column_widths(columns: list[str]) -> tuple[list[float], object]:
00402 |     width_map_cm = {
00403 |         "Fecha stock": 2.1,
00404 |         "FECHA STOCK": 2.1,
00405 |         "MARCA": 2.2,
00406 |         "Sku": 2.0,
00407 |         "SKU": 2.0,
00408 |         "COD_RT": 2.0,
00409 |         "LOCAL": 4.2,
00410 |         "CLIENTE": 3.2,
00411 |         "RESP. TIPO": 2.5,
00412 |         "RESPONSABLE": 3.2,
00413 |         "RUTERO": 3.0,
00414 |         "REPONEDOR": 3.4,
00415 |         "CLIENTES": 2.2,
00416 |         "LOCALES": 2.0,
00417 |         "TOTAL SKUS": 2.3,
00418 |         "SKUS EN FOCO": 2.5,
00419 |         "Stock": 1.6,
00420 |         "STOCK": 1.6,
00421 |         "VENTA(+7)": 2.0,
00422 |         "VENTA 0": 1.9,
00423 |         "NEGATIVO": 2.0,
00424 |         "RIESGO DE QUIEBRE": 3.0,
00425 |         "QUIEBRES OBS.": 2.8,
00426 |         "OTROS": 2.4,
00427 |         "Descripción del Producto": 8.4,
00428 |         "PRODUCTO": 8.4,
00429 |         "FOCO PRINCIPAL": 2.8,
00430 |         "ACCIÓN SUGERIDA": 4.8,
00431 |     }
00432 |     widths_cm = [width_map_cm.get(col, 2.5) for col in columns]
00433 |     total_cm = sum(widths_cm)
00434 |     pagesize = landscape(A3) if len(columns) >= 10 or total_cm > 27.2 else landscape(A4)
00435 |     return [w * cm for w in widths_cm], pagesize
