00438 | def export_pdf_generic(title_lines: list[str], df_export: pd.DataFrame, columns: list[str]) -> bytes:
00439 |     out = io.BytesIO()
00440 |     col_widths, pagesize = _pdf_column_widths(columns)
00441 |     doc = SimpleDocTemplate(
00442 |         out,
00443 |         pagesize=pagesize,
00444 |         leftMargin=0.8 * cm,
00445 |         rightMargin=0.8 * cm,
00446 |         topMargin=0.8 * cm,
00447 |         bottomMargin=0.8 * cm,
00448 |     )
00449 | 
00450 |     styles = getSampleStyleSheet()
00451 |     body = ParagraphStyle(
00452 |         "BodySmallWrap",
00453 |         parent=styles["BodyText"],
00454 |         fontName="Helvetica",
00455 |         fontSize=6.3,
00456 |         leading=7.2,
00457 |     )
00458 |     header = ParagraphStyle(
00459 |         "HeaderSmallWrap",
00460 |         parent=styles["BodyText"],
00461 |         fontName="Helvetica-Bold",
00462 |         fontSize=7,
00463 |         leading=8,
00464 |     )
00465 | 
00466 |     wrap_cols = {
00467 |         "Descripción del Producto",
00468 |         "PRODUCTO",
00469 |         "ACCIÓN SUGERIDA",
00470 |         "OTROS",
00471 |         "LOCAL",
00472 |         "CLIENTE",
00473 |         "RESPONSABLE",
00474 |         "RESP. TIPO",
00475 |         "RUTERO",
00476 |         "REPONEDOR",
00477 |         "FOCO PRINCIPAL",
00478 |     }
00479 |     numeric_cols = {
00480 |         "Stock",
00481 |         "STOCK",
00482 |         "TOTAL SKUS",
00483 |         "SKUS EN FOCO",
00484 |         "VENTA(+7)",
00485 |         "VENTA 0",
00486 |         "CLIENTES",
00487 |         "LOCALES",
00488 |     }
00489 |     center_cols = {
00490 |         "VENTA 0",
00491 |         "NEGATIVO",
00492 |         "RIESGO DE QUIEBRE",
00493 |         "QUIEBRES OBS.",
00494 |         "FOCO PRINCIPAL",
00495 |     }
00496 | 
00497 |     story = []
00498 |     for line in title_lines:
00499 |         story.append(Paragraph(line, styles["Heading4"]))
00500 |     story.append(Spacer(1, 8))
00501 | 
00502 |     df = _sorted_for_export(df_export)
00503 |     for c in columns:
00504 |         if c not in df.columns:
00505 |             df[c] = ""
00506 |     df = df[columns].copy()
00507 | 
00508 |     data = [[Paragraph(str(col), header) for col in columns]]
00509 |     for _, r in df.iterrows():
00510 |         row = []
00511 |         for c in columns:
00512 |             v = r.get(c, "")
00513 |             if c in wrap_cols:
00514 |                 row.append(Paragraph(str(v), body))
00515 |             else:
00516 |                 row.append(str(v))
00517 |         data.append(row)
00518 | 
00519 |     table = LongTable(data, colWidths=col_widths, repeatRows=1)
00520 |     style = [
00521 |         ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.HexColor("#E6E6E6")),
00522 |         ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.25, colors.HexColor("#CFCFCF")),
00523 |         ("VALIGN", (0, 0), (-1, -1), "TOP"),
00524 |         ("ROWBACKGROUNDS", (0, 1), (-1, -1), [colors.white, colors.HexColor("#F7F7F7")]),
00525 |         ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 3),
00526 |         ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 3),
00527 |         ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 2.5),
00528 |         ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 2.5),
00529 |     ]
00530 | 
00531 |     for idx, col in enumerate(columns):
00532 |         if col in numeric_cols:
00533 |             style.append(("ALIGN", (idx, 1), (idx, -1), "RIGHT"))
00534 |         elif col in center_cols:
00535 |             style.append(("ALIGN", (idx, 1), (idx, -1), "CENTER"))
00536 |         else:
00537 |             style.append(("ALIGN", (idx, 1), (idx, -1), "LEFT"))
00538 | 
00539 |     table.setStyle(TableStyle(style))
00540 |     story.append(table)
00541 |     doc.build(story)
00542 |     return out.getvalue()

00018 | def _qp_get(key: str, default: str = "") -> str:
00019 |     try:
00020 |         qp = st.query_params  # Streamlit moderno
00021 |         v = qp.get(key, default)
00022 |         if isinstance(v, list):
00023 |             return v[0] if v else default
00024 |         return v if v is not None else default
00025 |     except Exception:
00026 |         qp = st.experimental_get_query_params()
00027 |         v = qp.get(key, [default])
00028 |         return v[0] if isinstance(v, list) and v else default

00031 | def _as_bool(s: str) -> bool:
00032 |     s = (s or "").strip().lower()
00033 |     return s in {"1", "true", "t", "si", "sí", "y", "yes"}

00036 | def _infer_runtime_env() -> str:
00037 |     raw = (
00038 |         os.getenv("STOCKZERO_RUNTIME_ENV", "")
00039 |         or os.getenv("APP_ENV", "")
00040 |         or os.getenv("ENV", "")
00041 |     ).strip().lower()

00043 |         return raw
00044 |     if any(os.getenv(k) for k in ("IS_STREAMLIT_CLOUD", "STREAMLIT_RUNTIME", "STREAMLIT_CLOUD")):
00045 |         return "public"
00046 |     if os.name == "nt":

00055 | def _ensure_run_context() -> None:
00056 |     seq = int(st.session_state.get("_run_seq", 0)) + 1
00057 |     stamp = int(time.time() * 1000) % 1000000
00058 |     st.session_state["_run_seq"] = seq
00059 |     st.session_state["_run_id"] = f"RUN{seq:04d}-{stamp:06d}"

00064 | def _dbg(msg: str, tag: str = "UI", **kv) -> None:
00065 |     global DEBUG
00066 |     ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%H:%M:%S.%f")[:-3]
00067 |     ctx = {
00068 |         "run_id": st.session_state.get("_run_id", "-"),
00069 |         "env": st.session_state.get("_runtime_env", "-"),
00070 |         "path": st.session_state.get("_run_path", "-"),
00071 |         "mode": st.session_state.get("home_mode", "-"),
00072 |     }
00073 |     payload = {**ctx, **kv}
00074 |     extra = " ".join([f"{k}={v}" for k, v in payload.items()]) if payload else ""
00075 |     line = f"{ts} | {tag} | {msg}" + (f" | {extra}" if extra else "")
00076 | 
00077 |     try:
00078 |         logger.info("DBG %s", line)
00079 |     except Exception:
00080 |         pass
00081 | 
00082 |     if not DEBUG:
00083 |         return
00084 | 
00085 |     st.session_state.setdefault("_dbg_lines", [])
00086 |     st.session_state["_dbg_lines"].append(line)
00087 | 
00088 |     if len(st.session_state["_dbg_lines"]) > 250:
00089 |         st.session_state["_dbg_lines"] = st.session_state["_dbg_lines"][-250:]
00090 | 
00091 |     st.session_state["_dbg_last"] = f"{tag} | {msg}"
00092 | 
00093 | def _dbg_block() -> None:
00094 |     global DEBUG
00095 |     if not DEBUG:
00096 |         return
00097 |     st.sidebar.markdown("### 🛠 DEBUG")
00098 |     st.sidebar.caption(f"Último paso: {st.session_state.get('_dbg_last', '-')}")
00099 |     with st.sidebar.expander("Trace (últimos 250)", expanded=False):
00100 |         st.sidebar.code("\n".join(st.session_state.get("_dbg_lines", [])))
00101 | 
00102 | 
00103 | def _timed(label: str, tag: str = "UI"):
00104 |     class _T:
00105 |         def __enter__(self_):
00106 |             self_.t0 = time.perf_counter()
00107 |             _dbg(f"START {label}", tag=tag)
00108 |             return self_
00109 | 
00110 |         def __exit__(self_, exc_type, exc, tb):
00111 |             ms = round((time.perf_counter() - self_.t0) * 1000.0, 3)
00112 |             if exc_type is None:
00113 |                 _dbg(f"OK {label}", tag=tag, ms=ms)
00114 |             else:
00115 |                 _dbg(f"ERR {label}", tag=tag, ms=ms, exc=str(exc_type.__name__))
00116 |             return False
00117 | 
00118 |     return _T()
00119 |

00121 | FOCO_OPTIONS = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
00122 | 
00123 | 
00124 | def _normalize_focos_ui(value) -> list[str]:
00125 |     if value is None:
00126 |         raw = []
00127 |     elif isinstance(value, str):
00128 |         raw = [x.strip() for x in value.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
00129 |     else:
00130 |         raw = [str(x).strip() for x in value if str(x).strip()]
00131 | 
00132 |     out = []
00133 |     for x in raw:
00134 |         if x in FOCO_OPTIONS and x not in out:
00135 |             out.append(x)
00136 |     return out

00139 | def _foco_label(value) -> str:
00140 |     focos = _normalize_focos_ui(value)
00141 |     return "Todo" if not focos else " | ".join(focos)

00144 | def _render_kpi_cards(kpis_row: dict | None) -> None:
00145 |     values = {
00146 |         "Venta 0": int((kpis_row or {}).get("venta_0") or 0),
00147 |         "Negativo": int((kpis_row or {}).get("negativos") or 0),
00148 |         "Quiebres": int((kpis_row or {}).get("quiebres") or 0),
00149 |         "Otros": int((kpis_row or {}).get("otros") or 0),
00150 |     }

00213 | 
00214 | def _scope_value_or_none(value: str | None, all_token: str = "Todos") -> str | None:
00215 |     if value is None:
00216 |         return None
00217 |     v = str(value).strip()
00218 |     if not v:
00219 |         return None
00220 |     if v.upper() == str(all_token).strip().upper():
00221 |         return None
00222 |     if v.upper() == "— SELECCIONA TIPO —".upper():
00223 |         return None
00224 |     return v
00225 | 
00226 | 
00227 | def _df_total_rows(df: pd.DataFrame | None) -> int:
00228 |     if df is None or df.empty or "total_rows" not in df.columns:
00229 |         return 0
00230 |     try:
00231 |         return int(df["total_rows"].iloc[0] or 0)
00232 |     except Exception:
00233 |         return 0
00234 | 
00235 | 
00236 | def _drop_total_rows(df: pd.DataFrame | None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00237 |     if df is None:
00238 |         return pd.DataFrame()
00239 |     return df.drop(columns=["total_rows"], errors="ignore").copy()
00240 | 
00241 | 
00242 | def _rename_and_pick(
00243 |     df: pd.DataFrame | None,
00244 |     rename_map: dict[str, str],
00245 |     ordered_cols: list[str] | None = None,
00246 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
00247 |     view = _drop_total_rows(df).rename(columns=rename_map)
00248 |     if ordered_cols:
00249 |         for col in ordered_cols:
00250 |             if col not in view.columns:
00251 |                 view[col] = ""
00252 |         view = view[ordered_cols]
00253 |     return view

00756 |         def _get_page_state(page_key: str, page_size: int = 25) -> tuple[int, int]:
00757 |             input_key = f"{page_key}_ui"
00758 | 
00759 |             st.session_state.setdefault(page_key, 1)
00760 |             st.session_state.setdefault(input_key, 1)
00761 | 
00762 |             try:
00763 |                 current_page = int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1))
00764 |             except Exception:
00765 |                 current_page = 1
00766 | 
00767 |             current_page = max(1, current_page)
00768 |             st.session_state[page_key] = current_page
00769 | 
00770 |             if int(st.session_state.get(input_key, current_page)) != current_page:
00771 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = current_page
00772 | 
00773 |             return current_page, (current_page - 1) * page_size
00774 | 
00775 |         def _render_scope_pager(page_key: str, total_rows: int, page_size: int = 25):
00776 |             input_key = f"{page_key}_ui"
00777 |             total_pages = max(1, int(math.ceil(total_rows / page_size))) if total_rows > 0 else 1
00778 | 
00779 |             if int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) > total_pages:
00780 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = total_pages
00781 |             if int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) < 1:
00782 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = 1
00783 | 
00784 |             current_page = int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1))
00785 |             if int(st.session_state.get(input_key, current_page)) != current_page:
00786 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = current_page
00787 | 
00788 |             def _prev():
00789 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = max(1, int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) - 1)
00790 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = st.session_state[page_key]
00791 | 
00792 |             def _next():
00793 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = min(total_pages, int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) + 1)
00794 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = st.session_state[page_key]
00795 | 
00796 |             def _from_input():
00797 |                 try:
00798 |                     new_page = int(st.session_state.get(input_key, 1))
00799 |                 except Exception:
00800 |                     new_page = 1
00801 |                 new_page = max(1, min(total_pages, new_page))
00802 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = new_page
00803 |                 st.session_state[input_key] = new_page
00804 | 
00805 |             if total_rows:
00806 |                 start = (current_page - 1) * page_size + 1
00807 |                 end = min(current_page * page_size, total_rows)
00808 |                 pager_text = f"{start}-{end} de {total_rows} registros"
00809 |             else:
00810 |                 pager_text = "Sin filas para el filtro aplicado."
00811 | 
00812 |             p1, p2, p3, p4 = st.columns([0.9, 1.3, 0.9, 2.2], gap="small")
00813 | 
00814 |             with p1:
00815 |                 st.button(
00816 |                     "◀",
00817 |                     key=f"{page_key}_prev_btn",
00818 |                     disabled=(current_page <= 1),
00819 |                     on_click=_prev,
00820 |                     use_container_width=True,
00821 |                 )
00822 | 
00823 |             with p2:
00824 |                 st.number_input(
00825 |                     "Página",
00826 |                     min_value=1,
00827 |                     max_value=max(1, total_pages),
00828 |                     step=1,
00829 |                     key=input_key,
00830 |                     on_change=_from_input,
00831 |                     label_visibility="collapsed",
00832 |                 )
00833 | 
00834 |             with p3:
00835 |                 st.button(
00836 |                     "▶",
00837 |                     key=f"{page_key}_next_btn",
00838 |                     disabled=(current_page >= total_pages),
00839 |                     on_click=_next,
00840 |                     use_container_width=True,
00841 |                 )
00842 | 
00843 |             with p4:
00844 |                 st.caption(pager_text)
00845 |

01599 |                 "MÓDULO",
01600 |                 cg_module_opts,
01601 |                 key="sel_cg_module",
01602 |             )
01603 |

01605 |         module_sel = (st.session_state.get("sel_cg_module") or "Inicio").strip()
01606 | 
01607 |         def _cg_get_page_state(page_key: str, page_size: int = 25) -> tuple[int, int]:
01608 |             st.session_state.setdefault(page_key, 1)
01609 |             try:
01610 |                 current_page = int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1))
01611 |             except Exception:
01612 |                 current_page = 1
01613 |             current_page = max(1, current_page)
01614 |             st.session_state[page_key] = current_page
01615 |             return current_page, (current_page - 1) * page_size
01616 | 
01617 |         def _cg_render_pager(page_key: str, total_rows: int, page_size: int = 25) -> None:
01618 |             total_pages = max(1, int(math.ceil(total_rows / page_size))) if total_rows > 0 else 1
01619 |             if int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) > total_pages:
01620 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = total_pages
01621 |             if int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) < 1:
01622 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = 1
01623 | 
01624 |             current_page = int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1))
01625 | 
01626 |             def _page_prev():
01627 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = max(1, int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) - 1)
01628 | 
01629 |             def _page_next():
01630 |                 st.session_state[page_key] = min(total_pages, int(st.session_state.get(page_key, 1)) + 1)
01631 | 
01632 |             p1, p2, p3 = st.columns([0.9, 1.8, 2.5], gap="small")
01633 |             with p1:
01634 |                 st.button(
01635 |                     "◀",
01636 |                     key=f"{page_key}_prev_btn",
01637 |                     disabled=(current_page <= 1),
01638 |                     on_click=_page_prev,
01639 |                     use_container_width=True,
01640 |                 )
01641 |             with p2:
01642 |                 st.selectbox(
01643 |                     "Página",
01644 |                     options=list(range(1, total_pages + 1)),
01645 |                     index=max(0, current_page - 1),
01646 |                     key=f"{page_key}_selectbox",
01647 |                     on_change=lambda: st.session_state.update({page_key: st.session_state[f"{page_key}_selectbox"]}),
01648 |                     label_visibility="collapsed",
01649 |                 )
01650 |             with p3:
01651 |                 st.button(
01652 |                     "▶",
01653 |                     key=f"{page_key}_next_btn",
01654 |                     disabled=(current_page >= total_pages),
01655 |                     on_click=_page_next,
01656 |                     use_container_width=True,
01657 |                 )
01658 |             if total_rows:
01659 |                 start = (current_page - 1) * page_size + 1
01660 |                 end = min(current_page * page_size, total_rows)
01661 |                 st.caption(f"{start}-{end} de {total_rows} registros")
01662 |             else:
01663 |                 st.caption("Sin filas para el filtro aplicado.")
01664 | 
01665 |         def _cg_show_df(title: str, df: pd.DataFrame | None) -> None:
01666 |             st.markdown(f"#### {title}")
01667 |             if df is None or df.empty:
01668 |                 st.info("Sin filas para esta superficie del contrato B3.")
01669 |                 return
01670 |             st.dataframe(df, width="stretch", hide_index=True)
01671 | 
01672 |         def _cg_metric_cards(metrics: dict[str, int | float]) -> None:
01673 |             c1, c2, c3, c4 = st.columns(4)
01674 |             c1.metric("Cumple", int(metrics.get("cumple") or 0))
01675 |             c2.metric("Incumple", int(metrics.get("incumple") or 0))

02610 |     def _row_indicadores(r) -> str:
02611 |         parts = []
02612 | 
02613 |         try:
02614 |             v = int(r.get("Venta(+7)", 0) or 0)
02615 |         except Exception:
02616 |             v = 0
02617 |         if v == 0:
02618 |             parts.append("Venta 0: Productos sin rotación (Prioridad Alta).")
02619 | 
02620 |         if str(r.get("NEGATIVO", "")).strip().upper() == "SI":
02621 |             parts.append("Negativo: Realizar ajuste de inventario.")
02622 | 
02623 |         if str(r.get("RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", "")).strip().upper() == "SI":
02624 |             parts.append("Quiebres: Solicitar empuje.")
02625 | 
02626 |         ot = str(r.get("OTROS", "") or "").strip()
02627 |         if ot and ot.upper() not in {"NO", "N/A", "NA", "-"}:
02628 |             parts.append("Otros: Observaciones cliente.")
02629 | 
02630 |         return " · ".join(parts)
02631 | 
02632 |     if df_raw is not None and not df_raw.empty:
02633 |         df_tbl = df_raw.copy()
02634 | 
02635 |         if "fecha" in df_tbl.columns:
02636 |             df_tbl["FECHA STOCK"] = pd.to_datetime(df_tbl["fecha"], errors="coerce").dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
02637 |             df_tbl["FECHA STOCK"] = df_tbl["FECHA STOCK"].fillna("")
02638 |         else:
02639 |             df_tbl["FECHA STOCK"] = ""
02640 | 
02641 |         df_tbl["INDICADORES"] = df_tbl.apply(_row_indicadores, axis=1)
02642 |         df_tbl = df_tbl.rename(columns={
02643 |             "MARCA": "CLIENTE",
02644 |             "Sku": "SKU",
02645 |             "Descripción del Producto": "PRODUCTO",
02646 |         })
02647 |         df_tbl = df_tbl[["FECHA STOCK", "CLIENTE", "SKU", "PRODUCTO", "Stock", "INDICADORES"]]

00074 | @st.cache_data(ttl=ACTIVE_DB_URL_TTL, show_spinner=False)
00075 | def _get_active_db_url_cached() -> str:
00076 |     cache_sig = _sig("active_db_url")
00077 |     _set_mark("INFRA", "active_db_url", cache_sig)
00078 | 
00079 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00080 |     primary, fallback = _get_db_urls()
00081 |     selected = "none"
00082 | 
00083 |     if primary and _probe_pg(primary, target="primary"):
00084 |         selected = "primary"
00085 |         out = primary
00086 |     elif fallback and _probe_pg(fallback, target="fallback"):
00087 |         logger.warning("Usando DB_URL_FALLBACK (primary no responde).")
00088 |         selected = "fallback"
00089 |         out = fallback
00090 |     else:
00091 |         out = primary or (fallback or "")
00092 |         if primary:
00093 |             selected = "primary_unchecked"
00094 |         elif fallback:
00095 |             selected = "fallback_unchecked"
00096 | 
00097 |     _trace(
00098 |         "INFRA",
00099 |         "active_db_url_exec",
00100 |         active_db_url_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00101 |         selected=selected,
00102 |         fallback_present=bool(fallback),
00103 |         ttl=ACTIVE_DB_URL_TTL,
00104 |     )
00105 |     return out

00122 | def _infer_runtime_env() -> str:
00123 |     raw = (

00125 |         or os.getenv("APP_ENV", "")
00126 |         or os.getenv("ENV", "")
00127 |     ).strip().lower()

00129 |         return raw
00130 |     if any(os.getenv(k) for k in ("IS_STREAMLIT_CLOUD", "STREAMLIT_RUNTIME", "STREAMLIT_CLOUD")):
00131 |         return "public"

00133 |         return "local"

00135 |         return "public"

00137 |         return "public"

00141 | def _trace_ctx() -> dict[str, Any]:
00142 |     ss = _safe_session_state()
00143 |     return {
00144 |         "run_id": (ss.get("_run_id") if ss is not None else None) or "-",
00145 |         "env": (ss.get("_runtime_env") if ss is not None else None) or _infer_runtime_env(),
00146 |         "path": (ss.get("_run_path") if ss is not None else None) or "-",
00147 |         "mode": (ss.get("home_mode") if ss is not None else None) or "-",

00151 | def _fmt_ms(seconds: float) -> float:
00152 |     return round(seconds * 1000.0, 3)
00153 | 
00154 | 
00155 | def _trace(tag: str, event: str, **kv) -> None:
00156 |     payload = {**_trace_ctx(), **kv}
00157 |     extra = " ".join(f"{k}={v}" for k, v in payload.items())
00158 |     try:
00159 |         logger.info("TRACE %s | %s | %s", tag, event, extra)
00160 |     except Exception:
00161 |         pass

00163 | 
00164 | def _sig(*parts: Any) -> str:
00165 |     try:
00166 |         raw = json.dumps(parts, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, default=str)
00167 |     except Exception:
00168 |         raw = repr(parts)
00169 |     return hashlib.md5(raw.encode("utf-8", errors="ignore")).hexdigest()[:12]
00170 | 
00171 | 
00172 | def _trace_bucket() -> dict[str, Any]:
00173 |     ss = _safe_session_state()
00174 |     if ss is None:
00175 |         return {}
00176 |     bucket = ss.get(TRACE_STATE_KEY)
00177 |     if not isinstance(bucket, dict):
00178 |         bucket = {"marks": {}}
00179 |         ss[TRACE_STATE_KEY] = bucket
00180 |     if "marks" not in bucket or not isinstance(bucket["marks"], dict):
00181 |         bucket["marks"] = {}
00182 |     return bucket
00183 | 
00184 | 
00185 | def _get_mark(scope: str, name: str, sig: str) -> str | None:
00186 |     bucket = _trace_bucket()
00187 |     return bucket.get("marks", {}).get(f"{scope}:{name}:{sig}")
00188 | 
00189 | 
00190 | def _set_mark(scope: str, name: str, sig: str) -> str:
00191 |     bucket = _trace_bucket()
00192 |     stamp = str(time.time_ns())
00193 |     bucket.setdefault("marks", {})[f"{scope}:{name}:{sig}"] = stamp
00194 |     return stamp

00200 | def _get_db_urls() -> tuple[str, str | None]:
00201 |     primary = (os.getenv("DB_URL_APP", "") or os.getenv("DB_URL", "")).strip()
00202 |     fallback = os.getenv("DB_URL_FALLBACK", "").strip() or None
00203 |     if not primary and not fallback:
00204 |         raise AppError(
00205 |             "Configuración incompleta: falta DB_URL_APP/DB_URL.\n"
00206 |             "Solución: agrega en tu .env una línea:\n"
00207 |             "DB_URL_APP=postgresql://USER:PASS@HOST:PORT/DB"
00208 |         )
00209 |     return primary, fallback
00210 | 
00211 | 
00212 | def _probe_pg(url: str, target: str = "primary") -> bool:
00213 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00214 |     if psycopg2 is None:
00215 |         _trace(
00216 |             "INFRA",
00217 |             "probe_pg",
00218 |             target=target,
00219 |             probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00220 |             ok=True,
00221 |             driver="psycopg2_missing",
00222 |         )
00223 |         return True
00224 | 
00225 |     timeout = int(os.getenv("CONNECT_TIMEOUT", "3"))
00226 |     try:
00227 |         with psycopg2.connect(url, connect_timeout=timeout) as conn:
00228 |             with conn.cursor() as cur:
00229 |                 cur.execute("SELECT 1;")
00230 |         ok = True
00231 |     except Exception as e:
00232 |         ok = False
00233 |         _trace(
00234 |             "INFRA",
00235 |             "probe_pg_err",
00236 |             target=target,
00237 |             probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00238 |             ok=ok,
00239 |             err=type(e).__name__,
00240 |         )
00241 |         return ok
00242 | 
00243 |     _trace("INFRA", "probe_pg", target=target, probe_pg_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), ok=ok)
00244 |     return ok
00245 | 
00246 | 
00247 | def get_active_db_url() -> str:
00248 |     cache_sig = _sig("active_db_url")
00249 |     before = _get_mark("INFRA", "active_db_url", cache_sig)
00250 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00251 |     out = _get_active_db_url_cached()
00252 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("INFRA", "active_db_url", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00253 |     _trace("INFRA", "get_active_db_url", active_db_url_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), cache_state=cache_state)
00254 |     return out
00255 | 
00256 | 
00257 | @st.cache_resource(show_spinner=False)
00258 | def _engine_cached(db_url: str) -> Engine:
00259 |     cache_sig = _sig(db_url)
00260 |     _set_mark("INFRA", "engine", cache_sig)
00261 | 
00262 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00263 |     pool_size = int(os.getenv("POOL_SIZE", "15"))
00264 |     max_overflow = int(os.getenv("MAX_OVERFLOW", "30"))
00265 |     pool_timeout = int(os.getenv("POOL_TIMEOUT", "30"))
00266 |     pool_recycle = int(os.getenv("POOL_RECYCLE", "1800"))
00267 | 
00268 |     connect_timeout = int(os.getenv("CONNECT_TIMEOUT", "3"))
00269 |     stmt_timeout_ms = int(os.getenv("STATEMENT_TIMEOUT_MS", "15000"))
00270 | 
00271 |     connect_args: dict[str, Any] = {"connect_timeout": connect_timeout}
00272 |     if stmt_timeout_ms > 0:
00273 |         connect_args["options"] = f"-c statement_timeout={stmt_timeout_ms}"
00274 | 
00275 |     eng = create_engine(
00276 |         db_url,
00277 |         pool_size=pool_size,
00278 |         max_overflow=max_overflow,
00279 |         pool_timeout=pool_timeout,
00280 |         pool_recycle=pool_recycle,
00281 |         pool_pre_ping=True,
00282 |         future=True,
00283 |         connect_args=connect_args,
00284 |     )
00285 |     _trace(
00286 |         "INFRA",
00287 |         "engine_exec",
00288 |         engine_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0),
00289 |         pool_size=pool_size,
00290 |         max_overflow=max_overflow,
00291 |         pool_timeout=pool_timeout,
00292 |         pool_recycle=pool_recycle,
00293 |         stmt_timeout_ms=stmt_timeout_ms,
00294 |     )
00295 |     return eng
00296 |

00298 | def get_engine() -> Engine:
00299 |     db_url = get_active_db_url()
00300 |     cache_sig = _sig(db_url)
00301 |     before = _get_mark("INFRA", "engine", cache_sig)
00302 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00303 |     eng = _engine_cached(db_url)
00304 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("INFRA", "engine", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00305 |     _trace("INFRA", "get_engine", engine_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), cache_state=cache_state)
00306 |     return eng

00359 | @st.cache_data(ttl=300, show_spinner=False)
00360 | def _get_data_version_cached() -> str:
00361 |     cache_sig = _sig("data_version")
00362 |     _set_mark("DV", "data_version", cache_sig)
00363 | 
00364 |     eng = get_engine()
00365 |     candidates = [
00366 |         ("public.fact_stock_venta.ingested_at", "SELECT MAX(ingested_at) AS dv FROM public.fact_stock_venta;"),
00367 |         (RESULT_VIEW, f"SELECT MAX(fecha) AS dv FROM {RESULT_VIEW};"),
00368 |         ("public.v_data_version", "SELECT MAX(fecha_datos) AS dv FROM public.v_data_version;"),
00369 |     ]
00370 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00371 |     with eng.connect() as conn:
00372 |         for source, sql in candidates:
00373 |             try:
00374 |                 t_sql = time.perf_counter()
00375 |                 df = pd.read_sql(text(sql), conn)
00376 |                 read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)
00377 |                 dv = df.iloc[0]["dv"]
00378 |                 _trace("DV", "data_version_candidate", source=source, read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms, dv_found=dv is not None)
00379 |                 if dv is not None:
00380 |                     out = str(dv)
00381 |                     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source=source, dv=out)
00382 |                     return out
00383 |             except Exception as e:
00384 |                 _trace("DV", "data_version_candidate_err", source=source, err=type(e).__name__)
00385 |                 continue
00386 | 
00387 |     _trace("DV", "get_data_version_exec", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0), source="none", dv="NA")
00388 |     return "NA"
00389 |

00393 |     before = _get_mark("DV", "data_version", cache_sig)
00394 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00395 |     out = _get_data_version_cached()
00396 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("DV", "data_version", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00397 |     _trace("DV", "get_data_version", data_version_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t0), cache_state=cache_state, dv=out)
00398 |     return out, cache_state

00406 | @st.cache_data(ttl=QDF_TTL, show_spinner=False)
00407 | def _qdf_cached(data_version: str, sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00408 |     cache_sig = _sig(data_version, sql, params or {})
00409 |     _set_mark("QUERY", "qdf", cache_sig)
00410 | 
00411 |     eng = get_engine()
00412 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00413 |     with eng.connect() as conn:
00414 |         t_sql = time.perf_counter()
00415 |         df = pd.read_sql(text(sql), conn, params=params)
00416 |         read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)
00417 | 
00418 |     total_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0)
00419 |     _trace(
00420 |         "QUERY",
00421 |         "qdf_exec",
00422 |         dv_sig=_sig(data_version),
00423 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00424 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00425 |         rows=len(df),
00426 |         read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00427 |         qdf_total_ms=total_ms,
00428 |         page_read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00429 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00430 |     )
00431 |     _trace(
00432 |         "PAGE",
00433 |         "page_exec",
00434 |         dv_sig=_sig(data_version),
00435 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00436 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00437 |         rows=len(df),
00438 |         page_read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00439 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00440 |     )
00441 |     return df
00442 | 
00443 | 
00444 | def qdf(sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00445 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00446 |     dv, dv_state = _get_data_version_with_state()
00447 |     cache_sig = _sig(dv, sql, params or {})
00448 |     before = _get_mark("QUERY", "qdf", cache_sig)
00449 |     df = _qdf_cached(dv, sql, params)
00450 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("QUERY", "qdf", cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00451 |     total_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0)
00452 |     _trace(
00453 |         "QUERY",
00454 |         "qdf",
00455 |         dv_sig=_sig(dv),
00456 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00457 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00458 |         rows=0 if df is None else len(df),
00459 |         qdf_total_ms=total_ms,
00460 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00461 |         cache_state=cache_state,
00462 |         dv_state=dv_state,
00463 |     )
00464 |     _trace(
00465 |         "PAGE",
00466 |         "page",
00467 |         dv_sig=_sig(dv),
00468 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00469 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00470 |         rows=0 if df is None else len(df),
00471 |         page_total_ms=total_ms,
00472 |         cache_state=cache_state,
00473 |         dv_state=dv_state,
00474 |     )
00475 |     return df

00478 | @st.cache_data(ttl=SELECTOR_TTL, show_spinner=False)
00479 | def _selector_df_cached(name: str, sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00480 |     cache_sig = _sig(name, sql, params or {})
00481 |     _set_mark("SELECTOR", name, cache_sig)

00486 |         t_sql = time.perf_counter()

00488 |         read_sql_ms = _fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - t_sql)

00491 |     _trace(
00492 |         "SELECTOR",
00493 |         "selector_exec",

00495 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00496 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),

00498 |         selector_read_sql_ms=read_sql_ms,
00499 |         selector_total_ms=total_ms,
00500 |         dv_state="not_used",

00502 |     return df

00504 | 
00505 | def _selector_df(name: str, sql: str, params: dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00506 |     total_t0 = time.perf_counter()
00507 |     cache_sig = _sig(name, sql, params or {})
00508 |     before = _get_mark("SELECTOR", name, cache_sig)
00509 |     df = _selector_df_cached(name, sql, params)
00510 |     cache_state = "miss" if _get_mark("SELECTOR", name, cache_sig) != before else "hit"
00511 |     _trace(
00512 |         "SELECTOR",
00513 |         name,
00514 |         selector=name,
00515 |         sql_sig=_sig(sql),
00516 |         params_sig=_sig(params or {}),
00517 |         rows=0 if df is None else len(df),
00518 |         selector_total_ms=_fmt_ms(time.perf_counter() - total_t0),
00519 |         cache_state=cache_state,
00520 |         dv_state="not_used",
00521 |     )
00522 |     return df

00524 | 
00525 | # =========================================================
00526 | # 2) HELPERS DE SCOPE / FILTROS
00527 | # =========================================================
00528 | def _modalidad_clause(modalidad: str | None, field: str = "rr.modalidad") -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00529 |     if modalidad and str(modalidad).strip():
00530 |         return (
00531 |             f" AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({field}, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:modalidad, '')))",
00532 |             {"modalidad": str(modalidad).strip()},
00533 |         )
00534 |     return "", {}
00535 | 
00536 | 
00537 | def _build_result_filters(
00538 |     marcas: list[str] | None,
00539 |     search: str,
00540 |     foco: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None,
00541 |     alias: str = "",
00542 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00543 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
00544 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
00545 |     filters: list[str] = []
00546 | 
00547 |     if marcas:
00548 |         filters.append(f'AND {pfx}"MARCA" = ANY(:marcas)')
00549 |         params["marcas"] = marcas
00550 | 
00551 |     valid_focos = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
00552 | 
00553 |     if isinstance(foco, str):
00554 |         raw_focos = [x.strip() for x in foco.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
00555 |     elif foco is None:
00556 |         raw_focos = []
00557 |     else:
00558 |         raw_focos = [str(x).strip() for x in foco if str(x).strip()]
00559 | 
00560 |     focos = []
00561 |     for item in raw_focos:
00562 |         if item in valid_focos and item not in focos:
00563 |             focos.append(item)
00564 | 
00565 |     if focos:
00566 |         foco_clauses: list[str] = []
00567 | 
00568 |         if "Venta 0" in focos:
00569 |             foco_clauses.append(f'COALESCE({pfx}"Venta(+7)", 0) = 0')
00570 | 
00571 |         if "Negativo" in focos:
00572 |             foco_clauses.append(f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}\"NEGATIVO\", ''))) = 'SI'")
00573 | 
00574 |         if "Quiebres" in focos:
00575 |             foco_clauses.append(f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}\"RIESGO DE QUIEBRE\", ''))) = 'SI'")
00576 | 
00577 |         if "Otros" in focos:
00578 |             foco_clauses.append(
00579 |                 f"""
00580 |                 (
00581 |                     NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}"OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00582 |                     AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}"OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00583 |                 )
00584 |                 """
00585 |             )
00586 | 
00587 |         if foco_clauses:
00588 |             filters.append("AND (" + " OR ".join(f"({c})" for c in foco_clauses) + ")")
00589 | 
00590 |     s = (search or "").strip()
00591 |     if len(s) >= 2:
00592 |         filters.append(
00593 |             f"""
00594 |             AND (
00595 |                 CAST({pfx}"Sku" AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
00596 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}"Descripción del Producto", '') ILIKE :q
00597 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}"MARCA", '') ILIKE :q
00598 |             )
00599 |             """
00600 |         )
00601 |         params["q"] = f"%{s}%"
00602 | 
00603 |     return "\n".join(filters), params
00604 | 
00605 | 
00606 | 
00607 | def _rr_scope_exists(alias: str = "v", modalidad: str | None = None) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
00608 |     modalidad_sql, modalidad_params = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "rr.modalidad")
00609 |     sql = f"""
00610 |         EXISTS (
00611 |             SELECT 1
00612 |             FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
00613 |             WHERE rr.cod_rt = {alias}.cod_rt
00614 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00615 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00616 |               {modalidad_sql}
00617 |               AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({alias}."MARCA", '')))
00618 |         )
00619 |     """
00620 |     return sql, modalidad_params

00623 | # =========================================================
00624 | # 3) SELECTORES / CONTEXTO DESDE RUTA_RUTERO
00625 | # =========================================================
00626 | def get_rutero_reponedor() -> pd.DataFrame:
00627 |     return qdf(f"""
00628 |         SELECT DISTINCT
00629 |             TRIM(rutero) AS rutero,
00630 |             TRIM(reponedor) AS reponedor
00631 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00632 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00633 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00634 |         ORDER BY rutero, reponedor
00635 |     """)

00638 | def get_locales(rutero: str, reponedor: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
00639 |     return qdf(f"""
00640 |         SELECT DISTINCT
00641 |             cod_rt,
00642 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt) AS nombre_local_rr
00643 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00644 |         WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00645 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00646 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cod_rt, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00647 |         ORDER BY cod_rt, nombre_local_rr
00648 |     """, {"rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor})

00650 | 
00651 | def get_contexto_local(
00652 |     rutero: str,
00653 |     reponedor: str,
00654 |     cod_rt: str,
00655 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
00656 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
00657 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "modalidad")
00658 |     sql = f"""
00659 |         SELECT
00660 |             cod_rt,
00661 |             MAX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt)) AS nombre_local_rr,
00662 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), '')) AS clientes,
00663 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), '')) AS modalidades,
00664 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), ''), ' | ' ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), '')) AS mercaderistas
00665 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00666 |         WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
00667 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
00668 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
00669 |           {modalidad_sql}
00670 |         GROUP BY cod_rt
00671 |     """
00672 |     params = {
00673 |         "rutero": rutero,
00674 |         "reponedor": reponedor,
00675 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00676 |         **extra,
00677 |     }
00678 |     return _selector_df("get_contexto_local", sql, params)

00748 |         SELECT DISTINCT
00749 |             cod_rt,
00750 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt) AS nombre_local
00751 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00752 |         WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:mercaderista, '')))
00753 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cod_rt, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00754 |         ORDER BY cod_rt, nombre_local
00755 |     """, {"mercaderista": mercaderista})
00756 | 
00757 | 
00758 | def get_contexto_local_home(cod_rt: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
00759 |     sql = f"""
00760 |         SELECT
00761 |             cod_rt,
00762 |             MAX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(local_nombre), ''), cod_rt)) AS local_nombre,
00763 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), ''), ' | '
00764 |                        ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(cliente), '')) AS clientes,
00765 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), ''), ' | '
00766 |                        ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(reponedor), '')) AS mercaderistas,
00767 |             STRING_AGG(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), ''), ' | '
00768 |                        ORDER BY NULLIF(TRIM(modalidad), '')) AS modalidades
00769 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
00770 |         WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
00771 |         GROUP BY cod_rt
00772 |     """
00773 |     return _selector_df("get_contexto_local_home", sql, {"cod_rt": cod_rt})

00811 | def get_kpis_local_home(cod_rt: str, marcas: list[str] | None = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
00812 |     where_extra, p2 = _build_result_filters(marcas, search="", foco="Todo", alias="v")
00813 |     return qdf(f"""
00814 |         SELECT
00815 |             MAX(v.fecha) AS fecha_stock,
00816 |             COUNT(*)::int AS total_skus,
00817 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(v."Venta(+7)", 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS venta_0,
00818 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."NEGATIVO", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS negativos,
00819 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."RIESGO DE QUIEBRE", ''))) = 'SI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int AS quiebres,
00820 |             COALESCE(SUM(CASE
00821 |                 WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
00822 |                  AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."OTROS", ''))) NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
00823 |                 THEN 1 ELSE 0
00824 |             END), 0)::int AS otros
00825 |         FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
00826 |         WHERE v.cod_rt = :cod_rt
00827 |         {where_extra}
00828 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, **p2})

00881 | def get_tabla_ux_page_home(
00882 |     cod_rt: str,
00883 |     marcas: list[str] | None = None,
00884 |     page: int = 1,
00885 |     page_size: int = 25,
00886 |     foco: str = "Todo",
00887 |     search: str = "",
00888 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:

00903 |           v."Sku" ASC,
00904 |           v."Descripción del Producto" ASC

00906 |     """, {
00907 |         "cod_rt": cod_rt,
00908 |         "limit": int(page_size),
00909 |         "offset": (page - 1) * int(page_size),
00910 |         **p2,
00911 |     })

01075 | 
01076 | 
01077 | def _scope_tipo_norm(value: str | None) -> str | None:
01078 |     v = str(value or "").strip().upper()
01079 |     return v if v in {"GESTOR", "SUPERVISOR"} else None
01080 | 
01081 | 
01082 | def _scope_match_text_expr(
01083 |     alias: str,
01084 |     preferred_field: str,
01085 |     fallback_field: str | None = None,
01086 | ) -> str:
01087 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01088 |     parts = [f"NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}{preferred_field}, '')), '')"]
01089 |     if fallback_field and fallback_field != preferred_field:
01090 |         parts.append(f"NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}{fallback_field}, '')), '')")
01091 |     parts.append("''")
01092 |     return "COALESCE(" + ", ".join(parts) + ")"
01093 | 
01094 | 
01095 | # =========================================================
01096 | # 5) CLIENTE_SCOPE SOBRE VISTAS DEDICADAS
01097 | # =========================================================
01098 | def _scope_norm_expr(field: str) -> str:
01099 |     return f"UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE({field}, '')))"
01100 | 
01101 | 
01102 | def _scope_is_selected(value: str | None) -> bool:
01103 |     if value is None:
01104 |         return False
01105 |     v = str(value).strip()
01106 |     return bool(v) and v.upper() != "TODOS"
01107 | 
01108 | 
01109 | def _normalize_scope_focos(
01110 |     focos: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None,
01111 | ) -> list[str]:
01112 |     valid_focos = ["Venta 0", "Negativo", "Quiebres", "Otros"]
01113 | 
01114 |     if isinstance(focos, str):
01115 |         raw = [x.strip() for x in focos.replace("|", ",").split(",") if x.strip()]
01116 |     elif focos is None:
01117 |         raw = []
01118 |     else:
01119 |         raw = [str(x).strip() for x in focos if str(x).strip()]
01120 | 
01121 |     out: list[str] = []
01122 |     for item in raw:
01123 |         if item in valid_focos and item not in out:
01124 |             out.append(item)
01125 |     return out
01126 | 
01127 | 
01128 | def _scope_page_clause(
01129 |     limit: int | None,
01130 |     offset: int | None,
01131 |     params: dict[str, Any],
01132 | ) -> str:
01133 |     if limit is None:
01134 |         return ""
01135 |     params["limit"] = max(int(limit), 1)
01136 |     params["offset"] = max(int(offset or 0), 0)
01137 |     return " LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset "
01138 | 
01139 | 
01140 | def _scope_cliente_filters(
01141 |     *,
01142 |     alias: str = "",
01143 |     marca: str | None = None,
01144 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01145 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01146 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01147 |     cliente_field: str = "cliente_norm",
01148 |     responsable_field: str = "responsable_norm",
01149 |     responsable_tipo_field: str = "responsable_tipo",
01150 |     marca_field: str = "marca",
01151 |     apply_marca_intersection: bool = False,
01152 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
01153 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01154 |     params: dict[str, Any] = {}
01155 |     filters: list[str] = []
01156 | 
01157 |     if _scope_is_selected(cliente):
01158 |         filters.append(
01159 |             f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{cliente_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':cliente')}"
01160 |         )
01161 |         params["cliente"] = str(cliente).strip()
01162 | 
01163 |     tipo_norm = _scope_tipo_norm(responsable_tipo)
01164 | 
01165 |     if _scope_is_selected(responsable) and tipo_norm is None:
01166 |         filters.append("AND 1=0")
01167 | 
01168 |     if tipo_norm is not None:
01169 |         filters.append(
01170 |             f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{responsable_tipo_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':responsable_tipo')}"
01171 |         )
01172 |         params["responsable_tipo"] = tipo_norm
01173 | 
01174 |     if _scope_is_selected(responsable):
01175 |         filters.append(
01176 |             f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{responsable_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':responsable')}"
01177 |         )
01178 |         params["responsable"] = str(responsable).strip()
01179 | 
01180 |     if _scope_is_selected(marca):
01181 |         params["marca"] = str(marca).strip()
01182 |         if apply_marca_intersection:
01183 |             cliente_match_expr = _scope_match_text_expr(
01184 |                 alias,
01185 |                 cliente_field,
01186 |                 "cliente" if cliente_field != "cliente" else None,
01187 |             )
01188 |             filters.append(
01189 |                 f"""
01190 |                 AND EXISTS (
01191 |                     SELECT 1
01192 |                     FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01193 |                     WHERE b.cod_rt = {pfx}cod_rt
01194 |                       AND {_scope_norm_expr('b.cliente')} = {_scope_norm_expr(cliente_match_expr)}
01195 |                       AND {_scope_norm_expr('b.marca')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':marca')}
01196 |                 )
01197 |                 """
01198 |             )
01199 |         else:
01200 |             filters.append(
01201 |                 f"AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}{marca_field}')} = {_scope_norm_expr(':marca')}"
01202 |             )
01203 | 
01204 |     return "\n".join(filters), params
01205 | 
01206 | 
01207 | def _scope_summary_filters(
01208 |     *,
01209 |     alias: str = "",
01210 |     marca: str | None = None,
01211 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01212 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01213 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01214 |     focos: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None = None,
01215 |     search: str = "",
01216 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
01217 |     filters_sql, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01218 |         alias=alias,
01219 |         marca=marca,
01220 |         cliente=cliente,
01221 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01222 |         responsable=responsable,
01223 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01224 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01225 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01226 |         marca_field="marca",
01227 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01228 |     )
01229 | 
01230 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01231 |     filters: list[str] = [filters_sql] if filters_sql else []
01232 | 
01233 |     focos_norm = _normalize_scope_focos(focos)
01234 |     if focos_norm:
01235 |         foco_clauses: list[str] = []
01236 |         if "Venta 0" in focos_norm:
01237 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}venta_0, 0) > 0")
01238 |         if "Negativo" in focos_norm:
01239 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}negativos, 0) > 0")
01240 |         if "Quiebres" in focos_norm:
01241 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}quiebres, 0) > 0")
01242 |         if "Otros" in focos_norm:
01243 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}otros, 0) > 0")
01244 |         if foco_clauses:
01245 |             filters.append("AND (" + " OR ".join(f"({c})" for c in foco_clauses) + ")")
01246 | 
01247 |     s = (search or "").strip()
01248 |     if len(s) >= 2:
01249 |         filters.append(
01250 |             f"""
01251 |             AND (
01252 |                 CAST({pfx}cod_rt AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
01253 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}local_nombre_rr, '') ILIKE :q
01254 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}cliente, '') ILIKE :q
01255 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}responsable, '') ILIKE :q
01256 |             )
01257 |             """
01258 |         )
01259 |         params["q"] = f"%{s}%"
01260 | 
01261 |     return "\n".join(x for x in filters if x), params
01262 | 
01263 | 
01264 | def _scope_detail_filters(
01265 |     *,
01266 |     alias: str = "",
01267 |     marca: str | None = None,
01268 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01269 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01270 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01271 |     focos: str | list[str] | tuple[str, ...] | None = None,
01272 |     search: str = "",
01273 | ) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
01274 |     filters_sql, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01275 |         alias=alias,
01276 |         marca=marca,
01277 |         cliente=cliente,
01278 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01279 |         responsable=responsable,
01280 |         cliente_field="cliente",
01281 |         responsable_field="responsable",
01282 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01283 |         marca_field="marca",
01284 |         apply_marca_intersection=False,
01285 |     )
01286 | 
01287 |     pfx = f"{alias}." if alias else ""
01288 |     filters: list[str] = [filters_sql] if filters_sql else []
01289 | 
01290 |     focos_norm = _normalize_scope_focos(focos)
01291 |     if focos_norm:
01292 |         foco_clauses: list[str] = []
01293 |         if "Venta 0" in focos_norm:
01294 |             foco_clauses.append(f"COALESCE({pfx}venta_7, 0) = 0")
01295 |         if "Negativo" in focos_norm:
01296 |             foco_clauses.append(f"{_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}negativo')} = 'SI'")
01297 |         if "Quiebres" in focos_norm:
01298 |             foco_clauses.append(f"{_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}riesgo_quiebre')} = 'SI'")
01299 |         if "Otros" in focos_norm:
01300 |             foco_clauses.append(
01301 |                 f"""
01302 |                 (
01303 |                     NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE({pfx}otros, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01304 |                     AND {_scope_norm_expr(f'{pfx}otros')} NOT IN ('NO', 'N/A', 'NA', '-')
01305 |                 )
01306 |                 """
01307 |             )
01308 |         if foco_clauses:
01309 |             filters.append("AND (" + " OR ".join(f"({c})" for c in foco_clauses) + ")")
01310 | 
01311 |     s = (search or "").strip()
01312 |     if len(s) >= 2:
01313 |         filters.append(
01314 |             f"""
01315 |             AND (
01316 |                 CAST({pfx}cod_rt AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
01317 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}local_nombre_rr, '') ILIKE :q
01318 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}cliente, '') ILIKE :q
01319 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}responsable, '') ILIKE :q
01320 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}marca, '') ILIKE :q
01321 |                 OR CAST({pfx}sku AS TEXT) ILIKE :q
01322 |                 OR COALESCE({pfx}producto, '') ILIKE :q
01323 |             )
01324 |             """
01325 |         )
01326 |         params["q"] = f"%{s}%"
01327 | 
01328 |     return "\n".join(x for x in filters if x), params
01329 | 
01330 | 
01331 | def get_marcas_home_global() -> list[str]:
01332 |     sql = f"""
01333 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01334 |             TRIM(marca) AS marca
01335 |         FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW}
01336 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(marca, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01337 |         ORDER BY marca
01338 |     """
01339 |     df = _selector_df("get_marcas_home_global", sql)
01340 |     return df["marca"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []
01341 | 
01342 | 
01343 | def get_clientes_home_scope(marca: str | None = None) -> list[str]:
01344 |     where_extra, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01345 |         alias="rr",
01346 |         marca=marca,
01347 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01348 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01349 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01350 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01351 |     )
01352 |     sql = f"""
01353 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01354 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente), ''), TRIM(rr.cliente_norm)) AS cliente
01355 |         FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01356 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente_norm, rr.cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01357 |         {where_extra}
01358 |         ORDER BY cliente
01359 |     """
01360 |     df = _selector_df("get_clientes_home_scope", sql, params)
01361 |     return df["cliente"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []

01363 | 
01364 | def get_responsables_home_scope(
01365 |     tipo: str,
01366 |     marca: str | None = None,
01367 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01368 | ) -> list[str]:
01369 |     tipo_norm = str(tipo or "").strip().upper()
01370 |     if tipo_norm not in {"GESTOR", "SUPERVISOR"}:
01371 |         return []
01372 | 
01373 |     where_extra, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01374 |         alias="rr",
01375 |         marca=marca,
01376 |         cliente=cliente,
01377 |         responsable_tipo=tipo_norm,
01378 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01379 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01380 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01381 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01382 |     )
01383 |     sql = f"""
01384 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01385 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable), ''), TRIM(rr.responsable_norm)) AS responsable
01386 |         FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01387 |         WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.responsable_norm, rr.responsable, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01388 |         {where_extra}
01389 |         ORDER BY responsable
01390 |     """
01391 |     df = _selector_df("get_responsables_home_scope", sql, params)
01392 |     return df["responsable"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []

01394 | 
01395 | def get_rr_people_scope(
01396 |     tipo: str,
01397 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01398 |     marca: str | None = None,
01399 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01400 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01401 |     tipo_norm = str(tipo or "").strip().upper()
01402 |     if tipo_norm not in {"GESTOR", "SUPERVISOR"}:
01403 |         return pd.DataFrame(
01404 |             columns=[
01405 |                 "rutero",
01406 |                 "reponedor",
01407 |                 "responsable",
01408 |                 "cliente",
01409 |                 "locales_relacionados",
01410 |             ]
01411 |         )
01412 | 
01413 |     where_extra, params = _scope_cliente_filters(
01414 |         alias="rr",
01415 |         marca=marca,
01416 |         cliente=cliente,
01417 |         responsable_tipo=tipo_norm,
01418 |         responsable=responsable,
01419 |         apply_marca_intersection=True,
01420 |         cliente_field="cliente_norm",
01421 |         responsable_field="responsable_norm",
01422 |         responsable_tipo_field="responsable_tipo",
01423 |     )
01424 |     sql = f"""
01425 |         SELECT
01426 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.rutero), ''), '-') AS rutero,
01427 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.reponedor), ''), '-') AS reponedor,
01428 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.responsable), ''), TRIM(rr.responsable_norm)) AS responsable,
01429 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rr.cliente), ''), TRIM(rr.cliente_norm)) AS cliente,
01430 |             COUNT(DISTINCT rr.cod_rt)::int AS locales_relacionados
01431 |         FROM {SCOPE_RR_DISTINCT_VIEW} rr
01432 |         WHERE 1=1
01433 |         {where_extra}
01434 |         GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
01435 |         ORDER BY rutero, reponedor, cliente
01436 |     """
01437 |     return _selector_df("get_rr_people_scope", sql, params)

01439 | 
01440 | def get_scope_level(
01441 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01442 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01443 | ) -> str:
01444 |     has_cliente = _scope_is_selected(cliente)
01445 |     has_responsable = _scope_is_selected(responsable)
01446 | 
01447 |     if not has_cliente and not has_responsable:
01448 |         return "L0"
01449 |     if has_cliente and not has_responsable:
01450 |         return "L1"
01451 |     if not has_cliente and has_responsable:
01452 |         return "L2"
01453 |     return "L3"
01454 | 
01455 | 
01456 | def get_kpis_scope_cliente(
01457 |     marca: str | None = None,
01458 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01459 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01460 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01461 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01462 |     search: str = "",
01463 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01464 |     where_summary, params_summary = _scope_summary_filters(
01465 |         alias="s",
01466 |         marca=marca,
01467 |         cliente=cliente,
01468 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01469 |         responsable=responsable,
01470 |         focos=focos,
01471 |         search=search,
01472 |     )
01473 | 
01474 |     where_detail, params_detail = _scope_detail_filters(
01475 |         alias="b",
01476 |         marca=marca,
01477 |         cliente=cliente,
01478 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01479 |         responsable=responsable,
01480 |         focos=focos,
01481 |         search=search,
01482 |     )
01483 | 
01484 |     params = {**params_summary, **params_detail}
01485 | 
01486 |     sql = f"""
01487 |         WITH kpi AS (
01488 |             SELECT
01489 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cod_rt)::int AS locales_scope,
01490 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cliente_norm)::int AS clientes_scope,
01491 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.responsable_norm)::int AS responsables_scope,
01492 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01493 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01494 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01495 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01496 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros
01497 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01498 |             WHERE 1=1
01499 |             {where_summary}
01500 |         ),
01501 |         fecha AS (
01502 |             SELECT
01503 |                 MAX(b.fecha) AS fecha_stock
01504 |             FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01505 |             WHERE 1=1
01506 |             {where_detail}
01507 |         )
01508 |         SELECT
01509 |             fecha.fecha_stock,
01510 |             kpi.locales_scope,
01511 |             kpi.clientes_scope,
01512 |             kpi.responsables_scope,
01513 |             kpi.total_skus,
01514 |             kpi.venta_0,
01515 |             kpi.negativos,
01516 |             kpi.quiebres,
01517 |             kpi.otros
01518 |         FROM kpi
01519 |         CROSS JOIN fecha
01520 |     """
01521 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01522 | 
01523 | 
01524 | def get_tabla_scope_responsable_total_page(
01525 |     marca: str | None = None,
01526 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01527 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01528 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01529 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01530 |     search: str = "",
01531 |     limit: int | None = None,
01532 |     offset: int | None = None,
01533 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01534 |     where_extra, params = _scope_summary_filters(
01535 |         alias="s",
01536 |         marca=marca,
01537 |         cliente=cliente,
01538 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01539 |         responsable=responsable,
01540 |         focos=focos,
01541 |         search=search,
01542 |     )
01543 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01544 | 
01545 |     sql = f"""
01546 |         WITH base AS (
01547 |             SELECT
01548 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') AS responsable_tipo,
01549 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable), ''), TRIM(s.responsable_norm)) AS responsable,
01550 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cliente_norm)::int AS clientes,
01551 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cod_rt)::int AS locales,
01552 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01553 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01554 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01555 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01556 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros,
01557 |                 (
01558 |                     COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)
01559 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)
01560 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)
01561 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)
01562 |                 )::int AS skus_en_foco
01563 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01564 |             WHERE 1=1
01565 |             {where_extra}
01566 |             GROUP BY 1, 2
01567 |         )
01568 |         SELECT
01569 |             base.*,
01570 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01571 |         FROM base
01572 |         ORDER BY negativos DESC, quiebres DESC, venta_0 DESC, responsable ASC
01573 |         {page_sql}
01574 |     """
01575 |     return qdf(sql, params)
01576 |

01578 | def get_tabla_scope_cliente_total_page(
01579 |     marca: str | None = None,
01580 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01581 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01582 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01583 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01584 |     search: str = "",
01585 |     limit: int | None = None,
01586 |     offset: int | None = None,
01587 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01588 |     where_extra, params = _scope_summary_filters(
01589 |         alias="s",
01590 |         marca=marca,
01591 |         cliente=cliente,
01592 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01593 |         responsable=responsable,
01594 |         focos=focos,
01595 |         search=search,
01596 |     )
01597 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01598 | 
01599 |     sql = f"""
01600 |         WITH base AS (
01601 |             SELECT
01602 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente), ''), TRIM(s.cliente_norm)) AS cliente,
01603 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.responsable_norm)::int AS responsables,
01604 |                 COUNT(DISTINCT s.cod_rt)::int AS locales,
01605 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01606 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01607 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01608 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01609 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros,
01610 |                 (
01611 |                     COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)
01612 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)
01613 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)
01614 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)
01615 |                 )::int AS skus_en_foco
01616 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01617 |             WHERE 1=1
01618 |             {where_extra}
01619 |             GROUP BY 1
01620 |         )
01621 |         SELECT
01622 |             base.*,
01623 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01624 |         FROM base
01625 |         ORDER BY negativos DESC, quiebres DESC, venta_0 DESC, cliente ASC
01626 |         {page_sql}
01627 |     """
01628 |     return qdf(sql, params)

01631 | def get_tabla_scope_local_total_page(
01632 |     marca: str | None = None,
01633 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01634 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01635 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01636 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01637 |     search: str = "",
01638 |     limit: int | None = None,
01639 |     offset: int | None = None,
01640 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01641 |     where_extra, params = _scope_summary_filters(
01642 |         alias="s",
01643 |         marca=marca,
01644 |         cliente=cliente,
01645 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01646 |         responsable=responsable,
01647 |         focos=focos,
01648 |         search=search,
01649 |     )
01650 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01651 | 
01652 |     sql = f"""
01653 |         WITH base AS (
01654 |             SELECT
01655 |                 s.cod_rt,
01656 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.local_nombre_rr), ''), CAST(s.cod_rt AS TEXT)) AS nombre_local_rr,
01657 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.cliente), ''), TRIM(s.cliente_norm)) AS cliente,
01658 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') AS responsable_tipo,
01659 |                 COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(s.responsable), ''), TRIM(s.responsable_norm)) AS responsable,
01660 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.skus_scope), 0)::int AS total_skus,
01661 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)::int AS venta_0,
01662 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)::int AS negativos,
01663 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)::int AS quiebres,
01664 |                 COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)::int AS otros,
01665 |                 (
01666 |                     COALESCE(SUM(s.venta_0), 0)
01667 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.negativos), 0)
01668 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.quiebres), 0)
01669 |                     + COALESCE(SUM(s.otros), 0)
01670 |                 )::int AS skus_en_foco
01671 |             FROM {SCOPE_SUMMARY_VIEW} s
01672 |             WHERE 1=1
01673 |             {where_extra}
01674 |             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
01675 |         )
01676 |         SELECT
01677 |             base.*,
01678 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01679 |         FROM base
01680 |         ORDER BY negativos DESC, quiebres DESC, venta_0 DESC, cod_rt ASC
01681 |         {page_sql}
01682 |     """
01683 |     return qdf(sql, params)

01685 | 
01686 | def get_detalle_sku_scope_total_page(
01687 |     marca: str | None = None,
01688 |     cliente: str | None = None,
01689 |     responsable_tipo: str | None = None,
01690 |     responsable: str | None = None,
01691 |     focos: list[str] | None = None,
01692 |     search: str = "",
01693 |     limit: int | None = None,
01694 |     offset: int | None = None,
01695 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01696 |     level = get_scope_level(cliente=cliente, responsable=responsable)
01697 |     if level in {"L0", "L1"}:
01698 |         return pd.DataFrame(
01699 |             columns=[
01700 |                 "fecha",
01701 |                 "cod_rt",
01702 |                 "nombre_local_rr",
01703 |                 "cliente",
01704 |                 "responsable_tipo",
01705 |                 "responsable",
01706 |                 "marca",
01707 |                 "sku",
01708 |                 "descripcion",
01709 |                 "stock",
01710 |                 "venta_7",
01711 |                 "negativo",
01712 |                 "riesgo_quiebre",
01713 |                 "otros",
01714 |                 "total_rows",
01715 |             ]
01716 |         )
01717 | 
01718 |     where_extra, params = _scope_detail_filters(
01719 |         alias="b",
01720 |         marca=marca,
01721 |         cliente=cliente,
01722 |         responsable_tipo=responsable_tipo,
01723 |         responsable=responsable,
01724 |         focos=focos,
01725 |         search=search,
01726 |     )
01727 |     page_sql = _scope_page_clause(limit, offset, params)
01728 | 
01729 |     sql = f"""
01730 |         SELECT
01731 |             b.fecha,
01732 |             b.cod_rt,
01733 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.local_nombre_rr), ''), CAST(b.cod_rt AS TEXT)) AS nombre_local_rr,
01734 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.cliente), ''), '') AS cliente,
01735 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.responsable_tipo), ''), '-') AS responsable_tipo,
01736 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.responsable), ''), '') AS responsable,
01737 |             COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.marca), ''), '') AS marca,
01738 |             CAST(b.sku AS TEXT) AS sku,
01739 |             COALESCE(b.producto, '') AS descripcion,
01740 |             COALESCE(b.stock, 0)::int AS stock,
01741 |             COALESCE(b.venta_7, 0)::int AS venta_7,
01742 |             COALESCE(b.negativo, '') AS negativo,
01743 |             COALESCE(b.riesgo_quiebre, '') AS riesgo_quiebre,
01744 |             COALESCE(b.otros, '') AS otros,
01745 |             COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS total_rows
01746 |         FROM {SCOPE_FACT_BRIDGE_VIEW} b
01747 |         WHERE 1=1
01748 |         {where_extra}
01749 |         ORDER BY
01750 |             CASE WHEN {_scope_norm_expr('b.negativo')} = 'SI' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
01751 |             CASE WHEN {_scope_norm_expr('b.riesgo_quiebre')} = 'SI' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
01752 |             COALESCE(b.venta_7, 0) ASC,
01753 |             COALESCE(b.marca, '') ASC,
01754 |             CAST(b.sku AS TEXT) ASC
01755 |         {page_sql}
01756 |     """
01757 |     return qdf(sql, params)

01759 | 
01760 | # =========================================================
01761 | # 6) AUDITORÍA DE COBERTURA E INCONSISTENCIAS
01762 | # =========================================================
01763 | def get_scope_clientes_rr(
01764 |     cod_rt: str,
01765 |     rutero: str,
01766 |     reponedor: str,
01767 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
01768 | ) -> list[str]:
01769 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "modalidad")
01770 |     df = qdf(f"""
01771 |         SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(cliente) AS cliente
01772 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
01773 |         WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
01774 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
01775 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
01776 |           {modalidad_sql}
01777 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01778 |         ORDER BY cliente
01779 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, "rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor, **extra})
01780 |     return df["cliente"].astype(str).tolist() if df is not None and not df.empty else []
01781 | 
01782 | 
01783 | def get_rr_stock_en_local(cod_rt: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
01784 |     return qdf(f"""
01785 |         SELECT
01786 |             rr.cod_rt,
01787 |             TRIM(rr.modalidad) AS modalidad,
01788 |             TRIM(rr.rutero) AS rutero,
01789 |             TRIM(rr.reponedor) AS reponedor,
01790 |             TRIM(rr.cliente) AS cliente_rr,
01791 |             CASE
01792 |                 WHEN EXISTS (
01793 |                     SELECT 1
01794 |                     FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
01795 |                     WHERE v.cod_rt = rr.cod_rt
01796 |                       AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."MARCA", ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')))
01797 |                 ) THEN 'SI'
01798 |                 ELSE 'NO'
01799 |             END AS tiene_stock_match
01800 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
01801 |         WHERE rr.cod_rt = :cod_rt
01802 |         ORDER BY modalidad, rutero, reponedor, cliente_rr
01803 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt})
01804 | 
01805 | 
01806 | def get_cobertura_local(cod_rt: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
01807 |     return qdf(f"""
01808 |         WITH rr AS (
01809 |             SELECT DISTINCT
01810 |                 cod_rt,
01811 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, ''))) AS cliente_norm
01812 |             FROM {RUTA_TABLE}
01813 |             WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
01814 |               AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01815 |         ),
01816 |         st AS (
01817 |             SELECT DISTINCT
01818 |                 cod_rt,
01819 |                 UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE("MARCA", ''))) AS marca_norm
01820 |             FROM {RESULT_VIEW}
01821 |             WHERE cod_rt = :cod_rt
01822 |               AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE("MARCA", '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01823 |         )
01824 |         SELECT
01825 |             :cod_rt AS cod_rt,
01826 |             (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rr)::int AS clientes_rr,
01827 |             (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM st)::int AS clientes_stock,
01828 |             (
01829 |                 SELECT COUNT(*)::int
01830 |                 FROM rr
01831 |                 INNER JOIN st
01832 |                     ON rr.cod_rt = st.cod_rt
01833 |                    AND rr.cliente_norm = st.marca_norm
01834 |             ) AS clientes_match
01835 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt})
01836 | 
01837 | 
01838 | def get_clientes_sin_match_rr_stock(
01839 |     cod_rt: str,
01840 |     rutero: str,
01841 |     reponedor: str,
01842 |     modalidad: str | None = None,
01843 | ) -> pd.DataFrame:
01844 |     modalidad_sql, extra = _modalidad_clause(modalidad, "rr.modalidad")
01845 |     return qdf(f"""
01846 |         SELECT DISTINCT
01847 |             rr.cod_rt,
01848 |             TRIM(rr.modalidad) AS modalidad,
01849 |             TRIM(rr.rutero) AS rutero,
01850 |             TRIM(rr.reponedor) AS reponedor,
01851 |             TRIM(rr.cliente) AS cliente_rr
01852 |         FROM {RUTA_TABLE} rr
01853 |         WHERE rr.cod_rt = :cod_rt
01854 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.rutero, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:rutero, '')))
01855 |           AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.reponedor, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(:reponedor, '')))
01856 |           {modalidad_sql}
01857 |           AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
01858 |           AND NOT EXISTS (
01859 |               SELECT 1
01860 |               FROM {RESULT_VIEW} v
01861 |               WHERE v.cod_rt = rr.cod_rt
01862 |                 AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(v."MARCA", ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(rr.cliente, '')))
01863 |           )
01864 |         ORDER BY cliente_rr
01865 |     """, {"cod_rt": cod_rt, "rutero": rutero, "reponedor": reponedor, **extra})

00037 | def sha256_text(text: str) -> str:
00038 |     return hashlib.sha256(text.encode("utf-8", errors="ignore")).hexdigest()

00040 | 
00041 | def sha256_file(path: Path) -> str:
00042 |     h = hashlib.sha256()
00043 |     with path.open("rb") as fh:
00044 |         for chunk in iter(lambda: fh.read(1024 * 1024), b""):
00045 |             h.update(chunk)
00046 |     return h.hexdigest()

00049 | def ensure_sslmode(db_url: str) -> str:
00050 |     if not db_url:
00051 |         return db_url
00052 |     if "sslmode=" in db_url:
00053 |         return db_url
00054 |     return db_url + ("&sslmode=require" if "?" in db_url else "?sslmode=require")

00061 | def local_now_sao_paulo() -> dt.datetime:

00064 | 
00065 | def json_safe(v: Any) -> Any:
00066 |     if isinstance(v, (dt.datetime, dt.date, dt.time)):
00067 |         return v.isoformat()
00068 |     if isinstance(v, bytes):
00069 |         return v.decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
00070 |     if isinstance(v, Path):
00071 |         return str(v)
00072 |     if isinstance(v, dict):
00073 |         return {str(k): json_safe(val) for k, val in v.items()}
00074 |     if isinstance(v, (list, tuple)):
00075 |         return [json_safe(x) for x in v]
00076 |     try:
00077 |         json.dumps(v)
00078 |         return v
00079 |     except Exception:
00080 |         return str(v)

00085 |         return json.load(fh)

00088 | def get_db_url(cli_db_url: str | None) -> tuple[str, str]:

00090 |         return ensure_sslmode(cli_db_url), "cli"
00091 |     primary = (os.getenv("DB_URL_APP", "") or os.getenv("DB_URL", "")).strip()
00092 |     fallback = os.getenv("DB_URL_FALLBACK", "").strip()

00094 |         return ensure_sslmode(primary), "env:DB_URL_APP|DB_URL"
00095 |     if fallback:
00096 |         return ensure_sslmode(fallback), "env:DB_URL_FALLBACK"
00097 |     raise SystemExit("Falta DB_URL. Usa --db-url o setea DB_URL_APP / DB_URL / DB_URL_FALLBACK.")

00107 | def compile_sql(query_sql: str) -> str:

00111 | def fetch_rows(conn, sql: str, params: dict[str, Any], timeout_sec: int) -> tuple[list[dict[str, Any]], list[str]]:
00112 |     with conn.cursor(cursor_factory=RealDictCursor) as cur:
00113 |         cur.execute(f"SET statement_timeout = {int(timeout_sec * 1000)};")
00114 |         has_named_params = "%(" in sql
00115 |         if has_named_params:
00116 |             cur.execute(sql, params)
00117 |         else:
00118 |             cur.execute(sql)
00119 |         rows = cur.fetchall()
00120 |         cols = list(rows[0].keys()) if rows else []
00121 |     return [json_safe(dict(r)) for r in rows], cols
