00124 | def query_result_summary(rows: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> dict[str, Any]:
00125 |     if not rows:
00126 |         return {}
00127 |     if len(rows) == 1 and isinstance(rows[0], dict):
00128 |         return dict(rows[0])
00129 |     return {"rows": len(rows)}

00132 | def should_skip_query(qmeta: dict[str, Any], params_used: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[bool, str | None]:
00133 |     req = qmeta.get("requires_params", [])
00134 |     missing = [p for p in req if not params_used.get(p)]
00135 |     if missing:
00136 |         return True, f"missing_params:{','.join(missing)}"
00137 |     return False, None

00140 | def pick_key(row: dict[str, Any], *names: str, default=None):
00141 |     for name in names:
00142 |         if name in row:
00143 |             return row[name]
00144 |     return default

00147 | def classify_gate_effect(q08_first_row: dict[str, Any] | None, has_failures: bool) -> tuple[str, list[dict[str, Any]]]:
00148 |     anomalies: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
00149 |     if has_failures:
00150 |         anomalies.append({
00151 |             "anomaly_id": "ANOM_RUN_FAIL",
00152 |             "type": "query_failures_present",
00153 |             "status": "fail",
00154 |             "severity": "high",
00155 |             "value": True,
00156 |             "threshold": False,
00157 |             "business_impact": "bundle_incompleto_o_inestable",
00158 |             "gate_effect": "blocks",
00159 |         })
00160 |         return "blocks", anomalies
00161 |     if not q08_first_row:
00162 |         anomalies.append({
00163 |             "anomaly_id": "ANOM_NO_Q08",
00164 |             "type": "missing_exact_contract_flags",
00165 |             "status": "warn",
00166 |             "severity": "medium",
00167 |             "value": True,
00168 |             "threshold": False,
00169 |             "business_impact": "sin_bandera_final_de_readiness",
00170 |             "gate_effect": "supports",
00171 |         })
00172 |         return "supports", anomalies
00173 | 
00174 |     observed_ok = bool(pick_key(q08_first_row, "ready_observed_scope_contract"))
00175 |     target_ready = bool(pick_key(q08_first_row, "ready_target_b3_contract", "ready_target_B3_contract"))
00176 |     target_mode = str(pick_key(q08_first_row, "target_b3_contract_mode", "target_B3_contract_mode", default="unknown"))
00177 |

00179 |         anomalies.append({
00180 |             "anomaly_id": "ANOM_OBSERVED_SCOPE_CONTRACT",
00181 |             "type": "observed_scope_contract_incomplete",
00182 |             "status": "fail",
00183 |             "severity": "high",
00184 |             "value": False,
00185 |             "threshold": True,
00186 |             "business_impact": "falta_la_superficie_scope_observada_que_sostiene_la_lectura_actual",
00187 |             "gate_effect": "blocks",
00188 |         })
00189 |         return "blocks", anomalies
00190 | 
00191 |     if not target_ready:
00192 |         anomalies.append({
00193 |             "anomaly_id": "ANOM_TARGET_B3_PENDING",
00194 |             "type": "target_b3_contract_pending",
00195 |             "status": "warn",
00196 |             "severity": "medium",
00197 |             "value": target_mode,
00198 |             "threshold": "exact_contract_complete",
00199 |             "business_impact": "aun_no_hay_contrato_publico_final_B3_congelado",
00200 |             "gate_effect": "supports",
00201 |         })
00202 |         return "supports", anomalies
00203 | 
00204 |     # Cambio de filosofía: el exporter confirma evidencia SQL, no abre por sí mismo el siguiente gate.
00205 |     return "confirms", anomalies

00208 | def resolve_stage(requested_stage: str, has_failures: bool, q08_first_row: dict[str, Any] | None) -> tuple[str, str]:
00209 |     if requested_stage != "auto":
00210 |         return requested_stage, "cli"
00211 |     if has_failures:

00216 |     if target_ready:
00217 |         return "app_runtime", "auto:target_contract_ready"
00218 |     return "sql_contract", "auto:target_contract_pending"

00224 |     has_failures: bool,
00225 |     next_action_override: str,

00228 |         return {
00229 |             "recommended_next_action": next_action_override.strip(),
00230 |             "next_action_source": "cli_override",
00231 |             "stage_message": "se_aplico_override_manual_para_la_siguiente_accion",
00232 |         }

00235 |         return {
00236 |             "recommended_next_action": "corregir_queries_fallidas_y_reemitir_packet",
00237 |             "next_action_source": "failure_policy",
00238 |             "stage_message": "el_packet_es_util_parcialmente_pero_no_debe_cerrar_gates_superiores",

00244 |             "next_action_source": "missing_q08_policy",
00245 |             "stage_message": "falta_bandera_final_para_interpretar_cierre_de_contrato",
00246 |         }
00247 | 
00248 |     observed_ok = bool(pick_key(q08_first_row, "ready_observed_scope_contract"))
00249 |     target_ready = bool(pick_key(q08_first_row, "ready_target_b3_contract", "ready_target_B3_contract"))

00251 | 
00252 |     if not observed_ok:
00253 |         return {
00254 |             "recommended_next_action": "cerrar_superficie_scope_observada_antes_de_avanzar",
00255 |             "next_action_source": "observed_contract_policy",
00256 |             "stage_message": "la_superficie_observada_aun_no_esta_completa",

00260 |         return {
00261 |             "recommended_next_action": q08_next or "completar_contrato_publico_B3_exacto",

00263 |             "stage_message": "el_contrato_target_sigue_pendiente; el_exporter_solo_confirma_evidencia_actual",
00264 |         }

00267 |         "sql_contract": "interpretar_packet_y_congelar_contrato_db.py_si_aplica",
00268 |         "db_contract": "validar_smoke_db_py_contract_y_cerrar_gate_DB_SMOKE",
00269 |         "app_runtime": "validar_consumo_real_app_db.py_y_emitir_packet_final_app_sql",
00270 |         "ux_iteration": "debatir_y_formalizar_directrices_ux_sobre_base_tecnica_estable",
00271 |     }
00272 |     stage_msg = {
00273 |         "sql_contract": "el_contrato_sql_ya_esta_listo; la_transicion_posterior_se_define_fuera_del_exporter",
00274 |         "db_contract": "el_exporter_confirma_sql; el_siguiente_cierre_es_consumo_desde_db.py",
00275 |         "app_runtime": "el_exporter_confirma_sql; el_siguiente_cierre_es_consumo_runtime_desde_app",
00276 |         "ux_iteration": "la_base_tecnica_queda_congelada; la_siguiente_iteracion_puede_enfocarse_en_ux",
00277 |     }
00278 |     return {
00279 |         "recommended_next_action": stage_map.get(resolved_stage, "interpretar_packet_segun_etapa_real_actual_y_actualizar_continuidad"),
00280 |         "next_action_source": f"stage_policy:{resolved_stage}",
00281 |         "stage_message": stage_msg.get(resolved_stage, "stage_no_mapeado_de_forma_especifica"),

00284 | 
00285 | def resolve_gate_effect(
00286 |     auto_gate_effect: str,
00287 |     resolved_stage: str,
00288 |     gate_effect_override: str,
00289 |     has_failures: bool,
00290 |     q08_first_row: dict[str, Any] | None,
00291 | ) -> tuple[str, str]:
00292 |     if gate_effect_override.strip():
00293 |         return gate_effect_override.strip(), "cli_override"
00294 |     if has_failures:
00295 |         return auto_gate_effect, "auto_failure_policy"
00296 |     if not q08_first_row:
00297 |         return auto_gate_effect, "auto_missing_q08_policy"
00298 |     if auto_gate_effect in ("blocks", "supports"):
00299 |         return auto_gate_effect, "auto_contract_policy"
00300 | 
00301 |     # Cuando el contrato target ya está listo, el exporter confirma evidencia SQL.
00302 |     if resolved_stage == "sql_contract":
00303 |         return "opens", "stage_policy:sql_contract"
00304 |     if resolved_stage == "db_contract":
00305 |         return "supports", "stage_policy:db_contract"
00306 |     if resolved_stage == "app_runtime":
00307 |         return "confirms", "stage_policy:app_runtime"
00308 |     if resolved_stage == "ux_iteration":
00309 |         return "informs", "stage_policy:ux_iteration"
00310 |     return "confirms", "default_ready_contract_policy"

00313 | def main() -> None:
00314 |     load_env()
00315 |     ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Ejecuta bundle Supabase V3.1 y emite evidence packet V3.1.")
00316 |     ap.add_argument("--bundle-path", default="Supabase/STOCK_ZERO_SUPABASE_QUERY_BUNDLE_V3_1.json")

00318 |     ap.add_argument("--output-dir", default="Supabase/artifacts")
00319 |     ap.add_argument("--db-url", default="")

00321 |     ap.add_argument("--workspace", default=os.getenv("APP_ENV", "prod_or_staging"))
00322 |     ap.add_argument("--db-role", default="app_or_admin")

00325 |     ap.add_argument("--project-stage", default="auto", choices=STAGE_CHOICES)
00326 |     ap.add_argument("--next-action", default="")
00327 |     ap.add_argument("--gate-effect-override", default="", choices=GATE_EFFECT_CHOICES)
00328 |     args = ap.parse_args()
00329 | 
00330 |     bundle_path = Path(args.bundle_path).resolve()
00331 |     evidence_path = Path(args.evidence_standard_path).resolve()
00332 |     output_dir = Path(args.output_dir).resolve()
00333 |     output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
00334 | 
00335 |     if not bundle_path.exists():

00337 |     if not evidence_path.exists():
00338 |         raise SystemExit(f"No existe evidence standard: {evidence_path}")
00339 | 
00340 |     bundle = load_json(bundle_path)

00345 | 
00346 |     params_used: dict[str, Any] = {}
00347 |     if args.sample_cod_rt.strip():
00348 |         params_used["sample_cod_rt"] = args.sample_cod_rt.strip()
00349 | 
00350 |     db_url, db_source = get_db_url(args.db_url)
00351 |     query_runs: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
00352 |     raw_outputs: dict[str, Any] = {}
00353 |     t_bundle = time.perf_counter()
00354 | 
00355 |     with psycopg2.connect(db_url) as conn:
00356 |         conn.autocommit = True
00357 |         for item in order:
00358 |             qid = item.split("_", 1)[0]
00359 |             qmeta = bundle_queries[qid]
00360 |             skip, reason = should_skip_query(qmeta, params_used)
00361 |             if skip:
00362 |                 query_runs.append({
00363 |                     "query_id": qid,
00364 |                     "query_name": qmeta.get("query_name"),
00365 |                     "query_group": qmeta.get("group"),
00366 |                     "source_objects": qmeta.get("source_objects", []),
00367 |                     "sql_hash": None,
00368 |                     "duration_ms": 0.0,
00369 |                     "row_count": 0,
00370 |                     "status": "skipped",
00371 |                     "severity": "info",
00372 |                     "result_summary": {"skip_reason": reason},
00373 |                     "comparison_vs_previous": "unknown",
00374 |                     "supports_gate": bundle.get("gate_target", "G3_open_B3_app_query_contract"),
00375 |                 })
00376 |                 raw_outputs[qid] = {
00377 |                     "status": "skipped",
00378 |                     "row_count": 0,
00379 |                     "columns": [],
00380 |                     "preview_rows": [],
00381 |                     "rows": [],
00382 |                     "compiled_sql": None,
00383 |                     "meta": {
00384 |                         "query_id": qid,
00385 |                         "query_name": qmeta.get("query_name"),
00386 |                         "purpose": qmeta.get("purpose"),
00387 |                         "group": qmeta.get("group"),
00388 |                     },
00389 |                 }
00390 |                 continue
00391 | 
00392 |             sql = compile_sql(qmeta["sql"])
00393 |             t0 = time.perf_counter()
00394 |             status, severity, error_text = "ok", "info", None
00395 |             rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
00396 |             cols: list[str] = []
00397 |             try:
00398 |                 rows, cols = fetch_rows(conn, sql, params_used, timeout_sec=args.timeout_sec)
00399 |             except Exception as exc:
00400 |                 try:
00401 |                     conn.rollback()
00402 |                 except Exception:
00403 |                     pass
00404 |                 status, severity, error_text = "fail", "high", str(exc)
00405 |             duration_ms = round((time.perf_counter() - t0) * 1000.0, 3)
00406 |             preview_rows = rows[: max(0, int(args.preview_limit))]
00407 |             run_rec = {
00408 |                 "query_id": qid,

00018 | def parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:
00019 |     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Load KPIONE raw sheet into cg_raw.kpione_raw")
00020 |     parser.add_argument("--excel", required=True, help="Path to Excel workbook")
00021 |     parser.add_argument("--db_url", required=True, help="PostgreSQL connection URL")

00023 |     parser.add_argument("--source_file", default=DEFAULT_SOURCE_FILE, help="Logical source file name")
00024 |     return parser.parse_args()
00025 | 
00026 | 
00027 | def normalize_scalar(value: Any) -> str:
00028 |     if value is None:
00029 |         return ""
00030 |     if pd.isna(value):
00031 |         return ""
00032 |     return str(value).strip()
00033 | 
00034 | 
00035 | def row_to_payload(row: pd.Series) -> dict[str, Any]:
00036 |     payload: dict[str, Any] = {}
00037 |     for key, value in row.items():
00038 |         payload[str(key)] = None if pd.isna(value) else str(value)
00039 |     return payload
00040 | 
00041 | 
00042 | def connect_pg8000_from_url(db_url: str) -> pg.Connection:
00043 |     parsed = urlparse(db_url)
00044 | 
00045 |     if parsed.scheme not in ("postgresql", "postgres"):
00046 |         raise ValueError(f"Unsupported db_url scheme: {parsed.scheme}")
00047 | 
00048 |     user = unquote(parsed.username or "")
00049 |     password = unquote(parsed.password or "")
00050 |     host = parsed.hostname or ""
00051 |     port = parsed.port or 5432
00052 |     database = (parsed.path or "/postgres").lstrip("/")
00053 | 
00054 |     if not user:
00055 |         raise ValueError("db_url missing username")
00056 |     if not password:
00057 |         raise ValueError("db_url missing password")
00058 |     if not host:
00059 |         raise ValueError("db_url missing host")
00060 |     if not database:
00061 |         raise ValueError("db_url missing database")
00062 | 
00063 |     return pg.connect(
00064 |         user=user,
00065 |         password=password,
00066 |         host=host,
00067 |         port=port,
00068 |         database=database,
00069 |         ssl_context=True,
00070 |     )
00071 | 
00072 | 
00073 | def insert_batch(conn: pg.Connection, source_file: str, source_sheet: str) -> int:
00074 |     cur = conn.cursor()
00075 |     try:
00076 |         cur.execute(
00077 |             """
00078 |             insert into cg_audit.batch_registry (
00079 |                 source_file, source_sheet, loader_name, loaded_rows, status
00080 |             )
00081 |             values (%s, %s, %s, 0, 'started')
00082 |             returning batch_id
00083 |             """,
00084 |             (source_file, source_sheet, DEFAULT_LOADER_NAME),
00085 |         )
00086 |         batch_id = cur.fetchone()[0]
00087 |         return int(batch_id)
00088 |     finally:
00089 |         cur.close()
00090 | 
00091 | 
00092 | def finalize_batch(
00093 |     conn: pg.Connection,
00094 |     batch_id: int,
00095 |     loaded_rows: int,
00096 |     status: str,
00097 |     notes: str = "",
00098 | ) -> None:
00099 |     cur = conn.cursor()

00101 |         cur.execute(
00102 |             """
00103 |             update cg_audit.batch_registry
00104 |                set loaded_rows = %s,
00105 |                    status = %s,
00106 |                    finished_at = now(),
00107 |                    notes = %s
00108 |              where batch_id = %s
00109 |             """,
00110 |             (loaded_rows, status, notes, batch_id),
00111 |         )
00112 |     finally:
00113 |         cur.close()
00114 |

00116 | def main() -> None:
00117 |     args = parse_args()
00118 |     excel_path = Path(args.excel)
00119 | 
00120 |     if not excel_path.exists():
00121 |         raise FileNotFoundError(f"Excel not found: {excel_path}")
00122 | 
00123 |     df = pd.read_excel(excel_path, sheet_name=args.sheet, dtype=str)
00124 |     df.columns = [str(c).strip() for c in df.columns]
00125 | 
00126 |     required_cols = [
00127 |         "nombre_local",
00128 |         "marca",
00129 |         "trabajador",
00130 |         "Fecha_reg",
00131 |         "estado_foto",
00132 |     ]
00133 |     missing = [c for c in required_cols if c not in df.columns]
00134 |     if missing:
00135 |         raise ValueError(f"KPIONE missing required columns: {missing}")
00136 | 
00137 |     conn = connect_pg8000_from_url(args.db_url)
00138 |     conn.autocommit = False
00139 | 
00140 |     batch_id = None
00141 |     loaded_rows = 0
00142 | 
00143 |     try:
00144 |         batch_id = insert_batch(conn, args.source_file, args.sheet)
00145 |

00148 |             for idx, row in df.iterrows():
00149 |                 payload = row_to_payload(row)
00150 | 
00151 |                 cur.execute(
00152 |                     """
00153 |                     insert into cg_raw.kpione_raw (
00154 |                         batch_id,
00155 |                         source_file,
00156 |                         source_sheet,
00157 |                         source_row,
00158 |                         payload_json,

00166 |                     """,

00168 |                         batch_id,
00169 |                         args.source_file,
00170 |                         args.sheet,

00173 |                         normalize_scalar(row.get("nombre_local")),

00175 |                         normalize_scalar(row.get("trabajador")),
00176 |                         normalize_scalar(row.get("Fecha_reg")),
00177 |                         normalize_scalar(row.get("estado_foto")),
00178 |                     ),
00179 |                 )
00180 |                 loaded_rows += 1
00181 |         finally:
00182 |             cur.close()
00183 |

00185 |         conn.commit()
00186 |

00188 |             json.dumps(

00190 |                     "loader": DEFAULT_LOADER_NAME,

00208 |                 finalize_batch(conn, batch_id, loaded_rows, "error", str(exc)[:1000])
00209 |                 conn.commit()
00210 |             except Exception:
00211 |                 conn.rollback()

00214 |         conn.close()

00020 | def ensure_sslmode(db_url: str) -> str:
00021 |     if not db_url:
00022 |         return db_url
00023 |     if "sslmode=" in db_url:
00024 |         return db_url
00025 |     return db_url + ("&sslmode=require" if "?" in db_url else "?sslmode=require")
00026 | 
00027 | 
00028 | def clean_text(v: Any) -> str:
00029 |     if pd.isna(v) or v is None:
00030 |         return ""
00031 |     return str(v).strip()
00032 | 
00033 | 
00034 | def clean_json_value(v: Any) -> Any:
00035 |     if pd.isna(v) or v is None:
00036 |         return None
00037 |     return str(v)
00038 | 
00039 | 
00040 | def to_json_payload(rec: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
00041 |     return {str(k): clean_json_value(v) for k, v in rec.items()}
00042 | 
00043 | 
00044 | def register_batch(cur, source_file: str, source_sheet: str) -> int:
00045 |     cur.execute(
00046 |         """
00047 |         insert into cg_audit.batch_registry (
00048 |             source_file, source_sheet, loader_name, loaded_rows, status
00049 |         )
00050 |         values (%s, %s, %s, 0, 'started')

00053 |         (source_file, source_sheet, LOADER_NAME),
00054 |     )

00058 | def finalize_batch(cur, batch_id: int, loaded_rows: int, status: str, notes: str = "") -> None:
00059 |     cur.execute(
00060 |         """
00061 |         update cg_audit.batch_registry
00062 |            set loaded_rows = %s,
00063 |                status = %s,
00064 |                finished_at = now(),

00071 | 
00072 | def load_kpione(cur, excel_path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
00073 |     sheet = "DB (KPIONE)"
00074 |     df = pd.read_excel(excel_path, sheet_name=sheet, dtype=str)
00075 |     df.columns = [str(c).strip() for c in df.columns]
00076 | 
00077 |     required = ["nombre_local", "marca", "trabajador", "Fecha_reg", "estado_foto"]
00078 |     missing = [c for c in required if c not in df.columns]
00079 |     if missing:
00080 |         raise ValueError(f"KPIONE missing required columns: {missing}")
00081 | 
00082 |     batch_id = register_batch(cur, excel_path.name, sheet)
00083 | 
00084 |     rows = []
00085 |     for i, rec in enumerate(df.to_dict(orient="records"), start=2):
00086 |         rows.append((
00087 |             batch_id,
00088 |             excel_path.name,
00089 |             sheet,
00090 |             i,
00091 |             Json(to_json_payload(rec), dumps=lambda x: json.dumps(x, ensure_ascii=False)),
00092 |             clean_text(rec.get("nombre_local")),
00093 |             clean_text(rec.get("marca")),
00094 |             clean_text(rec.get("trabajador")),
00095 |             clean_text(rec.get("Fecha_reg")),
00096 |             clean_text(rec.get("estado_foto")),
00097 |         ))
00098 | 
00099 |     execute_values(
00100 |         cur,
00101 |         """
00102 |         insert into cg_raw.kpione_raw (
00103 |             batch_id,
00104 |             source_file,
00105 |             source_sheet,
00106 |             source_row,
00107 |             payload_json,
00108 |             local_raw,
00109 |             cliente_raw,
00110 |             persona_raw,
00111 |             fecha_visita_raw,
00112 |             evidencia_raw
00113 |         ) values %s
00114 |         on conflict (batch_id, source_row) do update set
00115 |             source_file = excluded.source_file,
00116 |             source_sheet = excluded.source_sheet,
00117 |             payload_json = excluded.payload_json,
00118 |             local_raw = excluded.local_raw,
00119 |             cliente_raw = excluded.cliente_raw,
00120 |             persona_raw = excluded.persona_raw,
00121 |             fecha_visita_raw = excluded.fecha_visita_raw,
00122 |             evidencia_raw = excluded.evidencia_raw,
00123 |             ingested_at = now()
00124 |         """,
00125 |         rows,
00126 |         page_size=5000,
00127 |     )
00128 | 
00129 |     finalize_batch(cur, batch_id, len(rows), "ok", f"rows={len(rows)}")
00130 |     return {
00131 |         "sheet": sheet,
00132 |         "batch_id": batch_id,
00133 |         "rows_read": int(len(df)),
00134 |         "rows_loaded": int(len(rows)),
00135 |     }
00136 | 
00137 | 
00138 | def safe_col_name(value: Any, pos: int) -> str:
00139 |     raw = clean_text(value)
00140 |     if not raw or raw.lower() == "null":
00141 |         return f"unnamed_{pos}"
00142 |     raw = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", raw)
00143 |     return raw
00144 | 
00145 | 
00146 | def make_unique(names: list[str]) -> list[str]:
00147 |     seen: dict[str, int] = {}
00148 |     out: list[str] = []
00149 |     for name in names:
00150 |         if name not in seen:
00151 |             seen[name] = 0
00152 |             out.append(name)
00153 |         else:
00154 |             seen[name] += 1
00155 |             out.append(f"{name}__dup{seen[name]}")
00156 |     return out
00157 | 
00158 | 
00159 | def read_power_app_sheet(excel_path: Path) -> pd.DataFrame:
00160 |     raw = pd.read_excel(excel_path, sheet_name="DB (POWER_APP)", header=None, dtype=str)
00161 | 
00162 |     header_row = raw.iloc[0].tolist()
00163 |     clean_cols = make_unique([safe_col_name(v, i) for i, v in enumerate(header_row)])
00164 | 
00165 |     df = raw.iloc[1:].copy().reset_index(drop=True)
00166 |     df.columns = clean_cols
00167 | 
00168 |     resolved: dict[str, str] = {}
00169 |     useful = [
00170 |         "Marca: Título",
00171 |         "Local: Title",
00172 |         "Local: LOCAL",
00173 |         "Local: DIRECCIÓN",
00174 |         "Creado",
00175 |         "Creado por",
00176 |         "CONTAR",
00177 |         "SEM",
00178 |         "FECHA",
00179 |         "REGISTRO_FUERA_CRUCE",
00180 |     ]
00181 | 
00182 |     for col in df.columns:
00183 |         base = col.split("__dup")[0]
00184 |         if base in useful and base not in resolved:
00185 |             resolved[base] = col
00186 | 
00187 |     df = df.rename(columns={v: k for k, v in resolved.items()})
00188 | 
00189 |     required = [
00190 |         "Marca: Título",
00191 |         "Local: Title",
00192 |         "Creado",
00193 |         "Creado por",
00194 |         "REGISTRO_FUERA_CRUCE",
00195 |     ]
00196 |     missing = [c for c in required if c not in df.columns]
00197 |     if missing:
00198 |         raise ValueError(f"POWER_APP missing required sanitized columns: {missing}")
00199 | 
00200 |     return df
00201 | 
00202 | 
00203 | def load_power_app(cur, excel_path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
00204 |     sheet = "DB (POWER_APP)"
00205 |     df = read_power_app_sheet(excel_path)
00206 | 
00207 |     batch_id = register_batch(cur, excel_path.name, sheet)
00208 | 
00209 |     rows = []
00210 |     for i, rec in enumerate(df.to_dict(orient="records"), start=2):
00211 |         rows.append((
00212 |             batch_id,
00213 |             excel_path.name,
00214 |             sheet,
00215 |             i,
00216 |             Json(to_json_payload(rec), dumps=lambda x: json.dumps(x, ensure_ascii=False)),
00217 |             clean_text(rec.get("Local: Title")),
00218 |             clean_text(rec.get("Marca: Título")),
00219 |             clean_text(rec.get("Creado por")),
00220 |             clean_text(rec.get("Creado")),
00221 |             clean_text(rec.get("REGISTRO_FUERA_CRUCE")),
00222 |         ))
00223 | 
00224 |     execute_values(
00225 |         cur,
00226 |         """
00227 |         insert into cg_raw.power_app_raw (
00228 |             batch_id,
00229 |             source_file,
00230 |             source_sheet,
00231 |             source_row,
00232 |             payload_json,
00233 |             title_local_raw,
00234 |             titulo_marca_raw,
00235 |             persona_raw,
00236 |             fecha_visita_raw,
00237 |             evidencia_raw
00238 |         ) values %s
00239 |         on conflict (batch_id, source_row) do update set
00240 |             source_file = excluded.source_file,
00241 |             source_sheet = excluded.source_sheet,
00242 |             payload_json = excluded.payload_json,
00243 |             title_local_raw = excluded.title_local_raw,
00244 |             titulo_marca_raw = excluded.titulo_marca_raw,
00245 |             persona_raw = excluded.persona_raw,
00246 |             fecha_visita_raw = excluded.fecha_visita_raw,
00247 |             evidencia_raw = excluded.evidencia_raw,
00248 |             ingested_at = now()
00249 |         """,
00250 |         rows,
00251 |         page_size=5000,
00252 |     )
00253 | 
00254 |     finalize_batch(cur, batch_id, len(rows), "ok", f"rows={len(rows)} | header_sanitized=true")
00255 |     return {
00256 |         "sheet": sheet,
00257 |         "batch_id": batch_id,
00258 |         "rows_read": int(len(df)),
00259 |         "rows_loaded": int(len(rows)),
00260 |         "notes": "header_sanitized=true",
00261 |     }
00262 | 
00263 | 
00264 | def main() -> None:
00265 |     ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
00266 |     ap.add_argument("--excel", default=DEFAULT_FILE)
00267 |     ap.add_argument("--db_url", default=os.getenv("DB_URL_LOAD", "") or os.getenv("DB_URL", ""))
00268 |     args = ap.parse_args()
00269 | 
00270 |     excel_path = Path(args.excel)
00271 |     if not excel_path.exists():
00272 |         raise SystemExit(f"No existe el archivo: {excel_path}")
00273 |     if not args.db_url:
00274 |         raise SystemExit("Falta DB_URL_LOAD/DB_URL")
00275 | 
00276 |     db_url = ensure_sslmode(args.db_url)
00277 | 
00278 |     result: dict[str, Any] = {
00279 |         "loader": LOADER_NAME,
00280 |         "source_file": excel_path.name,
00281 |         "status": "ok",
00282 |     }
00283 | 
00284 |     with psycopg2.connect(db_url) as conn:
00285 |         with conn.cursor() as cur:
00286 |             kpione_info = load_kpione(cur, excel_path)
00287 |             power_info = load_power_app(cur, excel_path)
00288 |         conn.commit()
00289 | 
00290 |     result["kpione"] = kpione_info
00291 |     result["power_app"] = power_info
00292 |     print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
00293 | 
00294 | 
00295 | if __name__ == "__main__":
00296 |     main()

00013 | 
00014 | def to_int_series(s: pd.Series) -> pd.Series:
00015 |     s = s.fillna(0)
00016 |     return pd.to_numeric(s, errors="coerce").fillna(0).round(0).astype(int)
00017 | 
00018 | 
00019 | def to_text_series(s: pd.Series) -> pd.Series:
00020 |     return s.fillna("").astype(str).str.strip()
00021 | 
00022 | 
00023 | def to_sku_text(s: pd.Series) -> pd.Series:
00024 |     s = s.astype(str).str.strip()
00025 |     s = s.str.replace(r"\.0$", "", regex=True)
00026 |     return s

00080 |     out = out[out["sku"].astype(str).str.len() > 0]
00081 |     out = out[out["marca"].astype(str).str.len() > 0]

00085 |     out = out[out["cod_rt"] != "NO_RT"].copy()
00086 | 
00087 |     # Defensa extra contra colisiones dentro del mismo payload
00088 |     conflict_key = ["fecha", "cod_rt", "sku", "marca"]
00089 |     duplicate_payload_count = int(out.duplicated(subset=conflict_key, keep="last").sum())
00090 |     out = out.drop_duplicates(subset=conflict_key, keep="last").copy()
00091 |

00110 |             f"omitidas_no_rt={no_rt_count} "
00111 |             f"omitidas_duplicate_payload={duplicate_payload_count}"
00112 |         )

00016 | 
00017 | 
00018 | def clean_str(series: pd.Series) -> pd.Series:
00019 |     # Convierte NaN -> "" y limpia espacios
00020 |     s = series.where(series.notna(), "")
00021 |     s = s.astype(str)
00022 |     # pandas puede dejar "nan" como string cuando viene mezclado
00023 |     s = s.replace({"nan": "", "None": "", "NaT": ""})
00024 |     return s.str.strip()
00025 | 
00026 | 
00027 | def to_int01(s: pd.Series) -> pd.Series:
00028 |     # días vienen como 1.0 o NaN
00029 |     return pd.to_numeric(s, errors="coerce").fillna(0).round(0).astype(int)
00030 | 
00031 | 
00032 | def to_int(s: pd.Series) -> pd.Series:
00033 |     return pd.to_numeric(s, errors="coerce").fillna(0).round(0).astype(int)
00034 | 
00035 | 
00036 | def md5_row(values) -> str:
00037 |     raw = "|".join("" if v is None else str(v).strip() for v in values)
00038 |     return hashlib.md5(raw.encode("utf-8", errors="ignore")).hexdigest()
00039 | 
00040 | 
00041 | def ensure_sslmode(db_url: str) -> str:
00042 |     # Supabase normalmente requiere sslmode=require (seguro dejarlo puesto)
00043 |     if not db_url:
00044 |         return db_url
00045 |     if "sslmode=" in db_url:
00046 |         return db_url
00047 |     if "?" in db_url:
00048 |         return db_url + "&sslmode=require"
00049 |     return db_url + "?sslmode=require"

00001 | # -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
00002 | """
00003 | scanner.py — Auditor del proyecto (sin ejecutar tu app).
00004 | 
00005 | Genera 1 SOLO .txt con:
00006 | - Entorno Python (sys.executable, sys.version)
00007 | - Chequeo paquetes (streamlit, pandas, openpyxl)
00008 | - Imports por archivo (resumen)
00009 | - ÍNDICE por archivo + sub-índice de defs/classes (con línea original del .py)
00010 | - Dump completo de cada .py con números de línea y marcadores:
00011 |     <<<BEGIN FILE: path>>>
00012 |     <<<END FILE: path>>>
00013 | 
00014 | Uso:
00015 |     python skills/scanner.py
00016 |     python skills/scanner.py --root "C:\\Users\\basti\\Desktop\\STOCK_ZERO\\app" --out "scanner_audit.txt"

00026 | import sys
00027 | from dataclasses import dataclass
00028 | from datetime import datetime
00029 | from pathlib import Path
00030 | from typing import Dict, List, Tuple
00031 | 
00032 | 
00033 | IGNORE_DIRS = {
00034 |     ".git", ".svn", ".hg",
00035 |     "__pycache__", ".pytest_cache", ".mypy_cache",
00036 |     ".venv", "venv", "env",
00037 |     ".streamlit",
00038 |     "node_modules",
00039 | }
00040 | 
00041 | TARGET_PKGS = ["streamlit", "pandas", "openpyxl"]

00043 | 
00044 | @dataclass
00045 | class PyFileInfo:
00046 |     rel: str
00047 |     abs_path: Path
00048 |     src: str
00049 |     size: int
00050 |     mtime: str
00051 |     sha256: str
00052 |     imports: List[str]
00053 |     has_streamlit: bool
00054 |     symbols: List[Tuple[int, str, str]]  # (lineno, kind, name) kind in {"def","class","async def"}
00055 | 
00056 | 
00057 | def pkg_status(pkg: str) -> str:
00058 |     spec = importlib.util.find_spec(pkg)
00059 |     return "OK" if spec is not None else "MISSING"
00060 | 
00061 | 
00062 | def safe_read_text(p: Path) -> str:
00063 |     try:
00064 |         return p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
00065 |     except UnicodeDecodeError:
00066 |         return p.read_text(encoding="cp1252", errors="replace")
00067 | 
00068 | 
00069 | def collect_py_files(root: Path) -> List[Path]:
00070 |     files: List[Path] = []
00071 |     for dirpath, dirnames, filenames in os.walk(root):
00072 |         dirnames[:] = [d for d in dirnames if d not in IGNORE_DIRS]
00073 |         for fn in filenames:
00074 |             if fn.lower().endswith(".py"):
00075 |                 files.append(Path(dirpath) / fn)
00076 |     return sorted(files, key=lambda x: str(x).lower())
00077 | 
00078 | 
00079 | def sha256_text(text: str) -> str:
00080 |     h = hashlib.sha256()
00081 |     h.update(text.encode("utf-8", errors="replace"))
00082 |     return h.hexdigest()
00083 | 
00084 | 
00085 | def parse_imports(tree: ast.AST) -> List[str]:
00086 |     imports: List[str] = []
00087 |     for node in ast.walk(tree):
00088 |         if isinstance(node, ast.Import):
00089 |             for n in node.names:
00090 |                 imports.append(n.name)
00091 |         elif isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom):
00092 |             imports.append(node.module or "")
00093 |     # unique preserving order
00094 |     seen = set()
00095 |     uniq = []
00096 |     for i in imports:
00097 |         if i and i not in seen:
00098 |             seen.add(i)
00099 |             uniq.append(i)
00100 |     return uniq
00101 | 
00102 | 
00103 | def parse_symbols(tree: ast.AST) -> List[Tuple[int, str, str]]:
00104 |     """
00105 |     Extrae defs/classes con su lineno del archivo original.
00106 |     Incluye funciones anidadas también (sirve para auditoría).
00107 |     """
00108 |     syms: List[Tuple[int, str, str]] = []
00109 |     for node in ast.walk(tree):
00110 |         if isinstance(node, ast.FunctionDef):
00111 |             syms.append((getattr(node, "lineno", -1), "def", node.name))
00112 |         elif isinstance(node, ast.AsyncFunctionDef):
00113 |             syms.append((getattr(node, "lineno", -1), "async def", node.name))
00114 |         elif isinstance(node, ast.ClassDef):
00115 |             syms.append((getattr(node, "lineno", -1), "class", node.name))
00116 |     syms = [s for s in syms if s[0] and s[0] > 0]
00117 |     syms.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
00118 |     return syms
00119 | 
00120 | 
00121 | def format_code_with_lineno(src: str, width: int = 5) -> str:
00122 |     out_lines = []
00123 |     for i, line in enumerate(src.splitlines(), start=1):
00124 |         out_lines.append(f"{i:0{width}d} | {line}")
00125 |     return "\n".join(out_lines)
00126 | 
00127 | 
00128 | def load_file_info(root: Path, p: Path) -> PyFileInfo:
00129 |     rel = str(p.relative_to(root))
00130 |     src = safe_read_text(p)
00131 | 
00132 |     try:
00133 |         st = p.stat()
00134 |         size = st.st_size
00135 |         mtime = datetime.fromtimestamp(st.st_mtime).isoformat(timespec="seconds")
00136 |     except Exception:
00137 |         size = -1
00138 |         mtime = "N/A"
00139 | 
00140 |     digest = sha256_text(src)
00141 | 
00142 |     tree = ast.parse(src, filename=str(p))
00143 |     imps = parse_imports(tree)
00144 |     syms = parse_symbols(tree)
00145 |     has_streamlit = any(i == "streamlit" or i.startswith("streamlit.") for i in imps)
00146 | 
00147 |     return PyFileInfo(
00148 |         rel=rel,
00149 |         abs_path=p,
00150 |         src=src,
00151 |         size=size,
00152 |         mtime=mtime,
00153 |         sha256=digest,
00154 |         imports=imps,
00155 |         has_streamlit=has_streamlit,
00156 |         symbols=syms,
00157 |     )
00158 | 
00159 | 
00160 | def main():
00161 |     ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
00162 |     ap.add_argument("--root", default=".", help="Ruta raíz del proyecto")
00163 |     ap.add_argument("--out", default="codigo_app_stockzero.txt", help="Archivo de salida (un solo .txt)")
00164 |     ap.add_argument("--max-dump-lines", type=int, default=0,
00165 |                     help="Máximo líneas por archivo en el dump (0 = sin límite).")
00166 |     args = ap.parse_args()
00167 |

00182 |         except Exception as e:

00190 |     lines.append(f"Root : {root}")
00191 |     lines.append("=" * 96)
00192 |     lines.append("")
00193 |

00210 |     else:
00211 |         lines.append(f"Errores: {len(syntax_errors)}")
00212 |         for rel, err in syntax_errors:
00213 |             lines.append(f"- {rel}: {err}")

00215 |

00219 |         imps = ", ".join(fi.imports) if fi.imports else "(sin imports)"

00260 |             f"SIZE : {fi.size} bytes",

00001 | # -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
00002 | from __future__ import annotations
00003 | 
00004 | """
00005 | STOCK_ZERO / GESTIONZERO
00006 | Supabase preflight for local network diagnosis (V3).
00007 | 
00008 | Changes vs V2:
00009 | - catches DNS resolution failures instead of crashing
00010 | - reports host parsing and resolution problems per target
00011 | - continues testing remaining targets
00012 | - keeps TCP / SQL phases separate
00013 | """
00014 | 
00015 | import argparse
00016 | import json
00017 | import socket
00018 | import time
00019 | from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict
00020 | 
00021 | import psycopg2
00022 | 
00023 | READ_SQL = "select now(), current_user, inet_server_addr(), inet_server_port();"
00024 | WRITE_SQL = """
00025 | begin;
00026 | insert into cg_audit.batch_registry
00027 | (source_name, file_name, file_hash, row_count_raw, loaded_by, status)
00028 | values
00029 | ('PING_PRECHECK', 'ping.txt', 'x', 1, 'stock_zero_preflight', 'in_progress')
00030 | returning batch_id::text;
00031 | """
00032 | 
00033 | @dataclass
00034 | class AddrCheck:
00035 |     family: str
00036 |     ip: str
00037 |     port: int
00038 |     tcp_ok: bool
00039 |     tcp_ms: float | None
00040 |     tcp_error: str | None
00041 | 
00042 | @dataclass
00043 | class TargetResult:
00044 |     name: str
00045 |     dsn_present: bool
00046 |     host: str | None
00047 |     port: int | None
00048 |     resolve_ok: bool
00049 |     resolve_error: str | None
00050 |     addresses: list[AddrCheck]
00051 |     connect_ok: bool
00052 |     connect_ms: float | None
00053 |     read_ok: bool
00054 |     read_ms: float | None
00055 |     write_ok: bool
00056 |     write_ms: float | None
00057 |     rollback_ok: bool

00059 |     error_text: str | None
00060 | 
00061 | def parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:
00062 |     ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
00063 |     ap.add_argument("--direct-url", default=None)
00064 |     ap.add_argument("--pooler-url", default=None)
00065 |     ap.add_argument("--session-pooler-url", default=None)
00066 |     ap.add_argument("--connect-timeout", type=int, default=10)
00067 |     ap.add_argument("--tcp-timeout", type=float, default=3.0)
00068 |     ap.add_argument("--prefer-ipv4", action="store_true", default=True)
00069 |     ap.add_argument("--no-prefer-ipv4", dest="prefer_ipv4", action="store_false")
00070 |     ap.add_argument("--json", action="store_true")
00071 |     return ap.parse_args()
00072 | 
00073 | def dsn_sources(args: argparse.Namespace) -> dict[str, str | None]:
00074 |     import os
00075 |     return {
00076 |         "direct_5432": args.direct_url or os.getenv("DB_URL_DIRECT"),
00077 |         "pooler_6543": args.pooler_url or os.getenv("DB_URL_POOLER") or os.getenv("DB_URL_LOAD"),
00078 |         "session_pooler_5432": args.session_pooler_url or os.getenv("DB_URL_SESSION_POOLER"),
00079 |     }
00080 | 
00081 | def family_name(fam: int) -> str:
00082 |     return {socket.AF_INET: "IPv4", socket.AF_INET6: "IPv6"}.get(fam, str(fam))
00083 | 
00084 | def extract_host_port(dsn: str) -> tuple[str | None, int | None]:
00085 |     try:
00086 |         params = psycopg2.extensions.parse_dsn(dsn)
00087 |         host = params.get("host")
00088 |         port_raw = params.get("port")
00089 |         port = int(port_raw) if port_raw else 5432
00090 |         return host, port
00091 |     except Exception:
00092 |         return None, None
00093 | 
00094 | def resolve_addrs(host: str, port: int) -> tuple[bool, str | None, list[tuple[int, str]]]:
00095 |     seen: set[tuple[int, str]] = set()
00096 |     out: list[tuple[int, str]] = []
00097 |     try:
00098 |         for fam, _, _, _, sockaddr in socket.getaddrinfo(host, port, type=socket.SOCK_STREAM):
00099 |             ip = sockaddr[0]
00100 |             key = (fam, ip)
00101 |             if key not in seen:
00102 |                 seen.add(key)
00103 |                 out.append((fam, ip))
00104 |         return True, None, out
00105 |     except Exception as e:
00106 |         return False, f"{type(e).__name__}: {e}", []
00107 | 
00108 | def tcp_probe(ip: str, port: int, fam: int, timeout: float) -> AddrCheck:
00109 |     t0 = time.perf_counter()
00110 |     s = None
00111 |     try:
00112 |         s = socket.socket(fam, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
00113 |         s.settimeout(timeout)
00114 |         s.connect((ip, port))
00115 |         return AddrCheck(
00116 |             family=family_name(fam),
00117 |             ip=ip,
00118 |             port=port,
00119 |             tcp_ok=True,
00120 |             tcp_ms=round((time.perf_counter() - t0) * 1000, 1),
00121 |             tcp_error=None,
00122 |         )
00123 |     except Exception as e:
00124 |         return AddrCheck(
00125 |             family=family_name(fam),
00126 |             ip=ip,
00127 |             port=port,
00128 |             tcp_ok=False,
00129 |             tcp_ms=round((time.perf_counter() - t0) * 1000, 1),
00130 |             tcp_error=f"{type(e).__name__}: {e}",
00131 |         )
00132 |     finally:
00133 |         try:
00134 |             if s is not None:
00135 |                 s.close()
00136 |         except Exception:
00137 |             pass
00138 | 
00139 | def choose_connect_order(addrs: list[tuple[int, str]], prefer_ipv4: bool) -> list[tuple[int, str]]:
00140 |     if not prefer_ipv4:
00141 |         return addrs
00142 |     v4 = [x for x in addrs if x[0] == socket.AF_INET]
00143 |     v6 = [x for x in addrs if x[0] == socket.AF_INET6]
00144 |     return v4 + v6
00145 | 
00146 | def try_sql(dsn: str | None, host: str | None, port: int | None, connect_timeout: int, tcp_timeout: float, prefer_ipv4: bool) -> TargetResult:
00147 |     if not dsn:
00148 |         return TargetResult("", False, host, port, False, "MissingDSN: No DSN supplied", [], False, None, False, None, False, None, False, "MissingDSN", "No DSN supplied")
00149 | 
00150 |     if not host or not port:
00151 |         return TargetResult("", True, host, port, False, "HostOrPortMissingFromDSN", [], False, None, False, None, False, None, False, "HostParseError", "Unable to parse host/port from DSN")
00152 | 
00153 |     resolve_ok, resolve_error, addrs = resolve_addrs(host, port)
00154 |     ordered = choose_connect_order(addrs, prefer_ipv4)
00155 |     addresses = [tcp_probe(ip, port, fam, timeout=tcp_timeout) for fam, ip in ordered]
00156 | 
00157 |     conn = None
00158 |     cur = None
00159 |     connect_ms = None
00160 |     read_ms = None
00161 |     write_ms = None
00162 |     rollback_ok = False
00163 | 
00164 |     try:
00165 |         t0 = time.perf_counter()
00166 |         conn = psycopg2.connect(
00167 |             dsn,
00168 |             connect_timeout=connect_timeout,
00169 |             application_name="stock_zero_preflight_v3",
00170 |             keepalives=1,
00171 |             keepalives_idle=30,
00172 |             keepalives_interval=10,
00173 |             keepalives_count=5,
00174 |         )
00175 |         connect_ms = round((time.perf_counter() - t0) * 1000, 1)
00176 | 
00177 |         cur = conn.cursor()
00178 | 
00179 |         t1 = time.perf_counter()
00180 |         cur.execute(READ_SQL)
00181 |         cur.fetchone()
00182 |         read_ms = round((time.perf_counter() - t1) * 1000, 1)
00183 | 
00184 |         t2 = time.perf_counter()
00185 |         cur.execute(WRITE_SQL)
00186 |         cur.fetchone()
00187 |         write_ms = round((time.perf_counter() - t2) * 1000, 1)
00188 | 
00189 |         conn.rollback()
00190 |         rollback_ok = True
00191 | 
00192 |         return TargetResult("", True, host, port, resolve_ok, resolve_error, addresses, True, connect_ms, True, read_ms, True, write_ms, rollback_ok, None, None)
00193 | 
00194 |     except Exception as e:
00195 |         try:
00196 |             if conn is not None:
00197 |                 conn.rollback()
00198 |         except Exception:
00199 |             pass
00200 |         return TargetResult("", True, host, port, resolve_ok, resolve_error, addresses, connect_ms is not None, connect_ms, read_ms is not None, read_ms, write_ms is not None, write_ms, rollback_ok, type(e).__name__, str(e))
00201 | 
00202 |     finally:
00203 |         try:
00204 |             if cur is not None:
00205 |                 cur.close()
00206 |         except Exception:
00207 |             pass
00208 |         try:
00209 |             if conn is not None:
00210 |                 conn.close()
00211 |         except Exception:
00212 |             pass
00213 | 
00214 | def print_target(name: str, result: TargetResult) -> None:
00215 |     print("=" * 90)
00216 |     print(f"[TARGET] {name}")
00217 |     print(f"[DSN] {'present' if result.dsn_present else 'missing'} | host={result.host} | port={result.port}")
00218 |     print(f"[RESOLVE] {'OK' if result.resolve_ok else 'FAIL'} | err={result.resolve_error}")
00219 |     if result.addresses:
00220 |         for a in result.addresses:
00221 |             status = "OK" if a.tcp_ok else "FAIL"
00222 |             print(f"[TCP] {a.family} {a.ip}:{a.port} -> {status} | ms={a.tcp_ms} | err={a.tcp_error}")
00223 |     else:
00224 |         print("[TCP] no addresses resolved")
00225 |     print(f"[CONNECT] {'OK' if result.connect_ok else 'FAIL'} | ms={result.connect_ms}")
00226 |     print(f"[READ] {'OK' if result.read_ok else 'FAIL'} | ms={result.read_ms}")
00227 |     print(f"[WRITE] {'OK' if result.write_ok else 'FAIL'} | ms={result.write_ms}")
00228 |     print(f"[ROLLBACK] {'OK' if result.rollback_ok else 'FAIL'}")
00229 |     if result.error_type or result.error_text:
00230 |         print(f"[ERROR] {result.error_type}: {result.error_text}")
00231 | 
00232 | def recommendation(results: dict[str, TargetResult]) -> str:
00233 |     for preferred in ("session_pooler_5432", "pooler_6543", "direct_5432"):
00234 |         r = results.get(preferred)
00235 |         if r and r.write_ok:
00236 |             return f"usable_sql_endpoint={preferred}"
00237 |     for preferred in ("session_pooler_5432", "pooler_6543", "direct_5432"):
00238 |         r = results.get(preferred)
00239 |         if r and r.read_ok:
00240 |             return f"read_only_endpoint={preferred}; write_blocked_or_unverified"
00241 |     for preferred in ("session_pooler_5432", "pooler_6543", "direct_5432"):
00242 |         r = results.get(preferred)
00243 |         if r and r.resolve_ok and any(a.tcp_ok for a in r.addresses):
00244 |             return f"tcp_only_endpoint={preferred}; sql_handshake_blocked"
00245 |     for preferred in ("session_pooler_5432", "pooler_6543", "direct_5432"):
00246 |         r = results.get(preferred)
00247 |         if r and not r.resolve_ok:
00248 |             return f"dns_blocked_or_broken_endpoint={preferred}"
00249 |     return "no_usable_endpoint_from_current_network"
00250 | 
00251 | def main() -> int:
00252 |     args = parse_args()
00253 |     urls = dsn_sources(args)
00254 |     results = {}
00255 | 
00256 |     for name, dsn in urls.items():
00257 |         host, port = extract_host_port(dsn) if dsn else (None, None)
00258 |         res = try_sql(dsn, host, port, args.connect_timeout, args.tcp_timeout, args.prefer_ipv4)
00259 |         res.name = name
00260 |         results[name] = res
00261 |         if not args.json:
00262 |             print_target(name, res)
00263 | 
00264 |     rec = recommendation(results)
00265 |     if args.json:
00266 |         payload = {"results": {k: asdict(v) for k, v in results.items()}, "recommendation": rec}
00267 |         print(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
00268 |     else:
00269 |         print("=" * 90)
00270 |         print(f"[RECOMMENDATION] {rec}")
00271 |     return 0
00272 | 
00273 | if __name__ == "__main__":
00274 |     raise SystemExit(main())

<<<END FILE: supabase_preflight_v3.py>>>
